title: Economic Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for Microgrids with Generator Up and Downtime Constraints
summary: Recently there has been a lot of progress in the development of economic nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) schemes for multistage optimal power flow (OPF) problems. However, the additional inclusion of discrete decision variables to model generator runtimes and generator startup costs can amount to large scale mixed-integer nonlinear programs (MINLPs) that are computationally very challenging. This work investigates the practical approach that replaces the nonlinear AC power flow equations by convex quadratic approximations. In combination with the discrete generator dynamics this leads to a mixed-integer quadratically constrained program (MIQCP) which is of significantly lower complexity and can be solved in reasonable time by off-the-shelf solvers such as CPLEX. We further show that simple terminal constraints are not sufficient to guarantee recursive feasibility of the NMPC scheme if constraints on generator runtime and on the number of generator startup events are present. To address this challenge we propose the use of additional time-coupled constraints and prove the resulting recursive feasibility property. Based on the assumption of periodic dissipativity of the underlying system we can prove stability of the proposed controller. To illustrate our results, we present simulations of a realistic 6-bus microgrid under different demand scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文针对含离散决策变量（发电机运行时间和启动成本）的多阶段最优潮流问题，提出用凸二次近似替代非线性AC潮流方程，得到混合整数二次约束规划（MIQCP），并引入时间耦合约束以保证递推可行性，最终通过周期耗散性假设证明控制器稳定性，并在6节点微电网仿真中验证效果。
AI.motivation: 多阶段最优潮流问题中，离散决策变量（发电机运行时间、启动成本）的引入导致大规模混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）计算复杂度极高，亟需降低复杂度的方法以实现实时经济NMPC。
AI.method: 1) 用凸二次近似替代非线性AC潮流方程，将MINLP简化为MIQCP；2) 针对发电机运行时间和启动事件约束下简单终端约束无法保证递推可行性的问题，提出额外时间耦合约束并证明递推可行性；3) 基于系统周期耗散性假设证明控制器稳定性。
AI.result: 所提MIQCP方法显著降低计算复杂度，可通过CPLEX等商用求解器在合理时间内求解；提出的时间耦合约束能有效保证递推可行性；在6节点微电网不同需求场景下的仿真验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 凸二次近似结合时间耦合约束是一种处理含离散决策变量的多阶段OPF问题的有效实用方法，兼顾了计算效率和理论保证（递推可行性与稳定性）。

title: Automated Synthesis of Lyapunov Functions for Multi-Agent Systems under Jointly Connected Topology
summary: This article investigates the consensus tracking problem of multi-agent systems under jointly connected topology through automated synthesis of Lyapunov functions. Based on the proposed distributed nonlinear control protocol, several consensus criteria for first-order multi-agent systems are established and certified by the construction and synthesis of more general polynomial Lyapunov functions. By employing sum-of-squares decomposition for multivariate polynomials, we can efficiently synthesize polynomial Lyapunov functions to achieve consensus verification in polynomial time, although the widely used quadratic Lyapunov functions do not exist. Moreover, polynomial coupling functions for our proposed protocol are concomitantly generated. Furthermore, the distributed nonlinear control protocol is extended to deal with second-order multi-agent systems, while ensuring second-order consensus verification. Finally, an example is presented to demonstrate the efficacy of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多项式Lyapunov函数自动综合的方法，解决多智能体系统在联合连通拓扑下的共识跟踪问题，设计了分布式非线性控制协议，并利用平方和分解实现多项式时间内的共识验证。
AI.motivation: 在联合连通拓扑下，传统的二次型Lyapunov函数无法用于共识验证，需要探索更一般的多项式Lyapunov函数合成方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出分布式非线性控制协议；通过平方和（SOS）分解自动合成多项式Lyapunov函数；将方法从一阶系统推广到二阶多智能体系统。
AI.result: 建立了基于多项式Lyapunov函数的一阶多智能体系统共识判据；可在多项式时间内高效验证共识；方法成功扩展到二阶系统并保证共识验证。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自动综合Lyapunov函数方法有效解决了联合连通拓扑下多智能体系统的共识跟踪问题，避免了二次型函数的局限性。

title: OptiLoop: Coordination-in-the-Loop Verification and Repair for LLM-Generated Optimization Agents
summary: Many decentralized decision problems require multiple parties to coordinate on shared decisions while keeping objectives, constraints, and data private. Large language models (LLMs) offer a promising way to lower the barrier to participation by generating local optimization agents from natural-language specifications. In coordination settings, however, executability is not enough: a generated agent may compile, solve, and pass local checks while still being semantically wrong, for example by misrepresenting costs, mis-scoping constraints, or responding incorrectly to incentives. Such errors often surface only during coordination, as systematic behavioral failures rather than infeasibility. We propose coordination-in-the-loop verification and repair for LLM-generated optimization agents. We instantiate this idea with an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM)-style consensus protocol and introduce OptiLoop, a pipeline that generates local optimization agents from text, verifies them through short, bounded coordination runs against a fixed reference counterparty, extracts structured behavioral and static evidence, and applies evidence-driven repair. When failures are structural rather than implementational, OptiLoop escalates from localized code fixes to corrected-formulation repair, and it can additionally reuse episodic lessons from prior instances. On 40 held-out test scenarios, OptiLoop-Full improves objective match from 66.0% to 93.0% and social match from 68.5% to 89.0% relative to a strong local-validation baseline, while reducing mean objective gap from 15.3% to 3.5% and mean social gap from 7.6% to 2.0%. These results show that, for generated optimization agents deployed inside decentralized decision loops, correctness should be validated in the loop itself rather than through isolated execution alone.

AI.tldr: 提出协调在环验证与修复（Coordination-in-the-Loop Verification and Repair）框架，通过ADMM共识协议和OptiLoop流水线，对LLM生成的优化代理进行协调性验证与修复，将目标匹配从66%提升至93%，社会匹配从68.5%提升至89%。
AI.motivation: 去中心化决策问题中，LLM生成的优化代理即使通过本地验证，在协调环境中仍可能出现语义错误（如成本误表示、约束范围错误、激励响应错误），这些错误仅在协调过程中暴露。现有本地验证方法不足以确保协调正确性。
AI.method: 提出协调在环验证与修复框架，基于ADMM风格共识协议。OptiLoop流水线包含：从文本生成本地优化代理、通过短协调运行验证、提取结构化行为和静态证据、执行证据驱动的修复（局部代码修复→校正公式修复→复用历史经验）。
AI.result: 在40个测试场景上，OptiLoop-Full将目标匹配从66.0%提升至93.0%，社会匹配从68.5%提升至89.0%；平均目标差距从15.3%降至3.5%，平均社会差距从7.6%降至2.0%。
AI.conclusion: 对于部署在去中心化决策循环中的生成式优化代理，正确性验证应在协调循环本身中进行，而非通过孤立的本地执行。

title: Global Convergence and Error Propagation in Neural Gradient Flows: A Riemannian Optimization Framework
summary: We develop a geometric convergence theory for neural-network optimization within the minimizing movement scheme (MMS) framework. Reformulating each neural MMS step as a minimization over the set of increments in a Hilbert space, we show that under a $C^2$ network with locally non-degenerate Jacobian this increment set is a boundaryless smooth embedded submanifold, on which a natural preconditioned (Gauss--Newton-type) gradient flow in parameter space induces exactly the Riemannian gradient flow. Under a strict interior-localization condition and an explicit data condition, the reached sublevel set is geodesically convex and the subproblem objective is geodesically strongly convex on it; both the continuous Riemannian gradient flow and its discrete companion via the exponential map converge linearly to the unique subproblem minimizer. Propagating finite-time inner-solver inexactness and neural-approximation error through the MMS iterations yields a uniform function-space tracking bound and an explicit trajectory budget, so the inexact neural iterates converge to an $O(δ)$-neighborhood of the global minimum. Numerical experiments on nonlinear regression and a small-scale latent-diffusion testbed indicate that the Gauss--Newton-type inner solver achieves smaller trajectory errors with substantially fewer inner iterations than first-order baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文在最小移动方案(MMS)框架下发展了神经网络优化的几何收敛理论。通过将问题重新表述为希尔伯特空间中的增量集极小化，证明了该增量集在特定条件下是光滑嵌入子流形，且自然预条件梯度流等价于黎曼梯度流。在严格内部局部化条件和显式数据条件下，子问题目标函数在可达子水平集上是测地强凸的，连续和离散的黎曼梯度流均线性收敛。通过传播迭代误差和逼近误差，证明了非精确神经迭代收敛到全局最优的O(δ)邻域。数值实验表明高斯-牛顿型内层求解器比一阶基线方法具有更小的轨迹误差和更少的内迭代次数。
AI.motivation: 当前神经网络优化理论缺乏严格的几何收敛性分析。本文旨在将最小移动方案(MMS)框架与神经网络优化相结合，建立基于黎曼几何的收敛理论，从而为神经网络优化提供更坚实的理论基础和更高效的算法设计依据。
AI.method: 1) 将神经MMS每一步重新表述为希尔伯特空间中的增量集极小化问题；2) 证明在C²光滑且局部非退化雅可比条件下，增量集是光滑嵌入子流形；3) 建立预条件梯度流与黎曼梯度流的等价性；4) 引入严格内部局部化条件和显式数据条件保证测地凸性和强凸性；5) 传播内层求解器非精确性和神经逼近误差，建立跟踪界和轨迹预算。
AI.result: 1) 证明了连续和离散黎曼梯度流均线性收敛到唯一的子问题极小值点；2) 建立了非精确神经迭代收敛到全局最优O(δ)邻域的理论保证；3) 在非线性回归和潜扩散测试任务上，高斯-牛顿型内层求解器比一阶基线方法实现了更小的轨迹误差和更少的内迭代次数。
AI.conclusion: 本文为神经网络优化提供了严格的几何收敛理论框架，将MMS与黎曼几何工具相结合，不仅理论上证明了线性收敛性，还通过误差传播分析给出了实际非精确算法的收敛保证。实验验证了所提高斯-牛顿型方法的优越性。该工作为神经网络优化的理论基础和算法设计开辟了新路径。

title: Regime-Based Portfolio Allocation Using Hidden Markov Models and Reinforcement Learning
summary:
This study develops a regime-aware portfolio allocation framework that integrates Markov switching models with Reinforcement Learning (RL) to dynamically allocate across equities (SPY), long-term Treasuries (TLT), and gold (GLD). Using daily ETF data from 2004-2025, we first characterize market behavior through a discrete Markov chain and then estimate a three-state Gaussian Hidden Markov Model (HMM) selected by the Bayesian Information Criterion (BIC). The estimated regimes-low-volatility, transitional, and high-volatility-exhibit strong persistence and state-dependent return dynamics consistent with recent findings on nonlinear market states (Ardia et al., 2024; Gupta & Pierdzioch, 2023). State-conditional analysis shows that SPY dominates in stable regimes, while TLT and GLD provide protection during stressed periods, motivating regime-conditioned allocation rules.
  We evaluate rule-based rotation and RL-driven strategies using a 30% out-of-sample test window with a one-day execution lag to avoid look-ahead bias. Both HMM-based allocations outperform a passive SPY benchmark, while the RL policy achieves the highest risk-adjusted performance, delivering the strongest Sharpe ratio and materially lower drawdowns, yet remains fully interpretable through discrete regime-dependent actions. Sensitivity analysis confirms the robustness of the three-state specification relative to two-state alternatives. Overall, the results demonstrate that RL can systematically enhance HMM-based regime detection, providing a transparent, adaptive, and empirically grounded framework for tactical asset allocation. The combined HMM-RL system provides a transparent, rules-based approach to tactical allocation that improves risk-adjusted performance relative to standard benchmark strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合马尔可夫转换模型与强化学习的机制感知投资组合框架，利用2004-2025年美股、长期国债和黄金的日频数据，通过三态高斯隐马尔可夫模型识别低波动、过渡和高波动三种市场状态，并在此基础上评估基于规则的轮动策略和强化学习驱动的分配策略。结果显示，强化学习策略在夏普比率和最大回撤方面均优于被动标普500基准，且保持完全可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统资产配置方法难以适应非线性、状态依赖的市场环境，而单一统计模型或机器学习方法在动态调整和可解释性之间存在矛盾。本文旨在整合HMM的机制识别能力与RL的序列决策优化优势，构建一个既透明又自适应的战术资产配置框架。
AI.method: 首先利用贝叶斯信息准则选择三态高斯HMM，基于SPY、TLT、GLD日频数据（2004-2025）估计市场状态（低波动、过渡、高波动）；然后分别设计基于规则的轮动策略和RL驱动的分配策略，采用30%样本外测试窗口和一天执行滞后以避免前视偏差。
AI.result: HMM-based分配策略均跑赢被动SPY基准；RL策略取得最高的风险调整后表现，包括最强的夏普比率和显著更低的最大回撤；敏感性分析验证了三态设定优于两态替代方案。
AI.conclusion: RL能够系统性地增强HMM的机制检测能力，提供透明、自适应且经验可验证的战术资产分配框架，在提升风险调整收益的同时保持规则的可解释性。

title: Historical Developments in Probability Measures for Asset Pricing: From State Prices to Modern Pricing Kernels
summary: This review summarizes the historical development of probability measures in asset pricing, from early mathematical finance and state price theory to risk-neutral valuation, martingale measures, forward measures, stochastic discount factors, incomplete-market measure selection, benchmark pricing, robust and nonlinear pricing, and modern data-driven probability transformations. The central theme is that asset pricing is not merely an exercise in estimating physical probabilities. Instead, pricing theory constructs, transforms, or selects probability measures so that market prices can be represented as expectations after discounting, numeraire normalization, marginal utility weighting, entropy penalization, calibration, or information conditioning. The paper emphasizes landmark contributions including Bachelier's probabilistic model of speculation, Arrow-Debreu state-contingent claims, Black-Scholes-Merton option pricing, Harrison-Kreps and Harrison-Pliska's martingale formalization, Delbaen and Schachermayer's fundamental theorem, Breeden-Litzenberger implied state price densities, change of numeraire methods, Hansen-Jagannathan stochastic discount factor restrictions, Cochrane's SDF synthesis, and recent empirical and machine learning work on learned pricing kernels. Text-, attention-, and sentiment-based probability transformations are treated as recent information-adjusted forecasting extensions that complement, rather than replace, martingale, numeraire, SDF, and incomplete-market frameworks. The paper also collects key formulas for state prices, stochastic discount factors, Radon-Nikodym densities, Girsanov changes of measure, risk-neutral valuation, forward measures, implied densities, coherent risk measures, benchmark pricing, learned SDFs, and information-adjusted forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了资产定价中概率度量的历史发展，从早期数学金融到现代数据驱动概率变换，核心论点是资产定价本质上是构造、变换或选择概率度量，而非估计物理概率。
AI.motivation: 阐明资产定价的本质不是估计物理概率，而是通过构造、变换或选择概率度量来将市场价格表示为期望值，从而统一理解各种定价框架的内在联系。
AI.method: 采用文献综述方法，系统梳理了从Bachelier到现代机器学习定价核的完整发展脉络，涵盖了概率度量构建的关键技术：贴现、计价单位归一化、边际效用加权、熵惩罚、校准和信息条件处理。
AI.result: 识别出资产定价概率度量的多种构建路径：风险中性测度、前向测度、随机贴现因子、不完备市场测度选择、基准定价、稳健/非线性定价，以及基于文本、注意力和情感的数据驱动概率变换。
AI.conclusion: 概率度量变换是资产定价的核心方法论，现代数据驱动方法（文本、注意力、情感）是传统鞅、计价单位、SDF和不完备市场框架的补充而非替代，文章系统整理了关键公式体系。

title: Learning after COVID-19 and the ICT career aspirations: Are students entering the AI era with weaker skills?
summary: This paper examines whether students are entering the generative AI era with sufficiently strong educational foundations, focusing on the relationship between learning environments and changes in ICT related career aspirations across countries. The analysis uses country-level data from PISA 2018 and 2022, combining indicators of student autonomy, digital skills and teacher support. A mixed-method approach is applied, including descriptive statistics, regression analysis, clustering, latent representation learning (using Variational Autoencoder-VAE), discriminant analysis and probabilistic modeling to capture both observable and latent dimensions of educational readiness. Unlike prior research that treats learning loss, digital skills and career expectations separately, our analysis integrates them within a comparative longitudinal framework. It shifts the focus from short-term post-pandemic effects to the structural capacity of education systems to prepare students for digital and AI-driven labor markets. Results show a global but uneven increase in ICT career aspirations. Digital skills emerge as the strongest and most consistent predictor, while teacher support plays a complementary role. Autonomy shows weaker, context-dependent effects. Educational readiness is multidimensional, and ICT aspirations evolve relatively independently from other career domains.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用PISA 2018和2022数据，采用混合方法分析各国学习环境与ICT职业期望变化的关系，发现数字技能是预测ICT职业期望的最强因素，教师支持起补充作用，学生自主性影响较弱且依赖情境。
AI.motivation: 考察学生是否在生成式AI时代具备足够的教育基础，特别是学习环境与ICT相关职业期望变化之间的关系，将学习损失、数字技能和职业期望整合在比较纵向框架中分析。
AI.method: 使用PISA 2018和2022国家层面数据，结合学生自主性、数字技能和教师支持指标，采用描述性统计、回归分析、聚类分析、变分自编码器（VAE）潜在表示学习、判别分析和概率建模等混合方法。
AI.result: 全球ICT职业期望呈不均衡增长；数字技能是最强且最一致的预测因素；教师支持起互补作用；学生自主性影响较弱且依赖具体情境；教育准备度是多维的，ICT期望与其他职业领域相对独立发展。
AI.conclusion: 研究将焦点从短期疫情后效应转向教育系统结构能力，强调教育系统需具备为学生准备数字化和AI驱动劳动力市场的结构性能力，ICT职业期望受多维度因素影响且具有独立性。

title: Calibrated Inference for the Conditional Average Treatment Effect in the Few-Placebo Regime via Gaussian Processes
summary: Estimating how much an intervention helps a given individual the conditional average treatment effect (CATE) is increasingly central to decision-making in medicine, economics, and policy, where an estimate is most useful when accompanied by a calibrated uncertainty interval. We study the few-placebo regime, in which one treatment arm is much smaller than the other, as arises in unequal-allocation trials and small-holdout $A/B$ tests. The standard estimator in this setting is the X-Learner, and a natural way to obtain credible intervals is to make its second stage Bayesian. We show that these intervals under-cover: they contain the true effect less often than their nominal level. We trace this to a structural cause the X-Learner's regression target inherits the bias of a nuisance model fitted to the small arm, so the posterior is centered away from the true effect and we find that the standard remedy, regressing an orthogonal doubly-robust score, is also unreliable here, since the regime's limited overlap leaves the estimator either highly variable or, once stabilized, biased once more. Both consequences reflect a pattern that extends beyond causal inference: a separately estimated variance is attached to a point estimate of a hard-to-learn quantity, and the point estimate's bias is not captured by that variance. We propose GP-CATE, which models each arm's outcome surface with a Gaussian process, so the scarce arm's uncertainty enters the posterior directly rather than as an unmodelled bias. Across synthetic and semi-synthetic benchmarks, GP-CATE attains calibrated coverage where the estimators we compare against including Causal Forest and BART do not, at the cost of intervals that are appropriately wide when the data are uninformative.

AI.tldr: 本文研究少量安慰剂组（treatment arm远小于control arm）条件下的条件平均处理效应（CATE）估计问题。发现X-Learner在贝叶斯化后置信区间覆盖不足，原因是第二阶段的回归目标继承了小样本臂的偏差。提出GP-CATE方法，用高斯过程对每臂结果曲面建模，使稀缺臂的不确定性直接进入后验而非作为未建模偏差，在合成和半合成基准上实现了校准的覆盖。
AI.motivation: 在医学、经济学和政策决策中，CATE的估计需要伴随校准的不确定性区间。现有方法在少量安慰剂组（如不等分配试验、小留出A/B测试）场景下，置信区间覆盖不足，这对决策可靠性构成威胁。
AI.method: 提出GP-CATE方法：对每个臂的结果曲面用高斯过程（GP）建模，使样本稀缺臂的不确定性直接融入后验分布，而非像传统方法那样作为未建模的偏差。这与X-Learner（第二阶段贝叶斯化）和双重稳健得分回归等方法形成对比。
AI.result: 在合成和半合成基准上，GP-CATE实现了校准的覆盖（即置信区间的实际覆盖接近名义水平），而对比方法（包括Causal Forest和BART）未能达到。代价是当数据信息量不足时，区间会适当变宽。
AI.conclusion: 少量安慰剂组场景下，传统CATE估计方法的覆盖不足源于偏差未被方差捕获的结构性问题。GP-CATE通过端到端的概率建模解决了这一问题，尽管会带来更宽的区间，但提供了更诚实的不确定性量化。

title: Subsystem Structure as an Inferential Resource for Coupled Engineered Systems
summary: Engineered infrastructure systems pose inverse problems in which hidden states, unknown parameters, and subsystem couplings must be inferred from sparse and noisy measurements. These problems are difficult because physical subsystems are heterogeneous, sensing is partial, uncertainty is distributed across subsystem interfaces, and computational cost grows rapidly with system size. We address this challenge with probabilistic compositional inference, a graph-based architecture that represents a coupled system as interacting subsystems, each retaining its own local model, estimator, and uncertainty representation, while coupling is handled through physically meaningful stochastic messages exchanged across subsystem interfaces. This formulation allows mechanistic, learned, and deterministic components to coexist within a single inference framework and propagates calibrated uncertainty without assembling a global augmented state or covariance. We validate the framework in three increasingly demanding settings: a sparse-sensing canonical inverse problem, where interface couplings can also be learned from data; infrastructure-scale power networks, where the method matches centralized joint state-and-parameter inference while reducing computational scaling from approximately cubic to approximately linear; and a multi-physics turbine embedded in a power-grid network, where heterogeneous subsystems compose hierarchically without degrading local inference or collapsing local posteriors into a global estimate. Together, these results show that subsystem structure can be exploited as the organizing principle for uncertainty-aware inverse inference in coupled engineered systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种概率组合推理（probabilistic compositional inference）框架，通过图结构将耦合工程系统表示为交互子系统，每个子系统保留局部模型、估计器和不确定性表示，子系统间通过物理上有意义的随机消息传递进行耦合。该方法支持机理模型、学习模型和确定性组件共存，无需组装全局状态即可传播校准后的不确定性。在三个场景中验证：稀疏感知逆问题、大规模电力网络（计算复杂度从立方降至线性）、嵌入电网的多物理场涡轮机。结果表明子系统结构可作为耦合工程系统中不确定性感知逆推理的组织原则。
AI.motivation: 工程基础设施系统面临逆问题，需要从稀疏且有噪声的测量中推断隐藏状态、未知参数和子系统耦合。传统方法面临物理子系统异构、传感不完整、不确定性分布在子系统接口、计算成本随系统规模快速增长等挑战。现有方法往往需要组装全局状态或协方差，成本高昂且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出概率组合推理（probabilistic compositional inference）框架，基于图结构架构将耦合系统建模为交互子系统。每个子系统保留局部模型、局部估计器和局部不确定性表示，子系统间的耦合通过物理上有意义的随机消息（stochastic messages）进行交换。该框架允许机理模型、学习模型和确定性组件共存，无需组装全局增广状态或协方差矩阵即可传播校准后的不确定性。
AI.result: 在稀疏感知逆问题中，接口耦合可以从数据中学习；在基础设施级电力网络中，该方法匹配了全局联合状态-参数推理的精度，同时将计算复杂度从约立方级降至约线性级；在多物理场涡轮机嵌入电网场景中，异构子系统可以分层组合而不降低局部推理性能，也不将局部后验坍缩为全局估计。
AI.conclusion: 子系统结构可以作为耦合工程系统中不确定性感知逆推理的组织原则，实现了可扩展、模块化且保持不确定性的推理框架。

title: From Knowing to Doing: A Memory-Controlled Benchmark for LLM Trading Agents on Stock Markets
summary:
Evaluating whether large language model (LLM) agents can profit in capital markets is increasingly framed as end-to-end trading: place an agent in a historical market, let it trade, and measure portfolio returns. This setup is vulnerable to two evaluation failures. First, long backtests often overlap with the knowledge cutoffs of frontier LLMs, allowing memorized tickers, dates, prices, and market narratives to substitute for investment reasoning. Second, raw returns are a noisy proxy for stock-selection ability, since positive performance may come from market beta, style exposure, or favorable regimes rather than genuine alpha.
  We introduce KTD-Fin (Knowing-To-Doing Financial Benchmark), an end-to-end stock-market trading benchmark that addresses both issues. KTD-Fin uses a data-side masking protocol to anonymize key identifiers and calendar information consistently across prompts and tools, separating historical market memory from investment decision-making. It also incorporates a Barra-style performance attribution framework that decomposes portfolio returns into market, style, and stock-selection alpha components.
  Across ten frontier LLM agents evaluated on the Chinese CSI300 over a 2024--2026 window, masking substantially changes agent rationales, pushing them towards anonymized factor-based reasoning. Attribution analysis further shows that LLM agents' cumulative returns under leakage-controlled evaluation are largely explained by passive market and style exposure, with limited evidence of persistent stock-selection alpha. These findings suggest that financial LLM benchmarks should evaluate not only whether an agent makes money, but also whether the source of returns reflects transferable investment skill. We release KTD-Fin as a reproducible template for leakage-controlled and attribution-aware evaluation of LLM trading agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KTD-Fin基准，通过数据掩码和Barra归因框架解决LLM交易代理评估中的记忆泄露和收益归因问题，发现前沿LLM的超额收益主要来自市场/风格暴露而非选股alpha。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM交易代理评估存在两个核心问题：(1)长回测与模型知识截止日期重叠，代理可能依赖记忆而非推理；(2)原始收益无法区分选股能力与市场/风格收益，导致对代理能力的错误归因。
AI.method: 提出KTD-Fin基准，包含：(1)数据掩码协议——跨prompt和工具匿名化关键标识符和日历信息；(2)Barra风格归因框架——将组合收益分解为市场、风格和选股alpha三部分，用于隔离真实选股能力。
AI.result: 在CSI300上评估10个前沿LLM代理（2024-2026窗口），掩码显著改变了代理的推理逻辑，促使其转向因子化推理。归因分析显示，在泄露控制下，LLM代理的累计收益主要由被动市场和风格暴露解释，缺乏持续的选股alpha证据。
AI.conclusion: 金融LLM基准不仅应评估代理能否赚钱，还应评估收益来源是否反映可迁移的投资技能。KTD-Fin可作为泄露控制和归因感知评估的可复现模板。

title: Robust Inference for Dyadic Data with Dependent Ordered Nodes
summary: Dyadic regression models are commonly analyzed under the conventional dyadic dependence paradigm, in which two observations may be dependent only if the corresponding dyads share a node. This paper studies inference when this paradigm breaks down because nodes are ordered and nearby nodes are exposed to common latent shocks. In this setting, dyads with no common endpoint may still be dependent when their endpoints are close in the ordering. Although each additional covariance term may be weak, the number of nearby-node dyad pairs diverges with the sample size, so their aggregate contribution to the asymptotic variance can be non-negligible. We develop an inferential framework for dyadic arrays with ordered-node dependence. The first estimator is a dependent-node dyadic CRVE that retains covariance terms between dyads with nearby endpoints. The second is a row-column moving-block jackknife that deletes adjacent blocks of nodes together with all dyads touching those nodes. We establish the asymptotic validity of both procedures under weak dependence along the ordered node index. Monte Carlo evidence shows that accounting for ordered-node dependence can substantially improve size control, and that the jackknife version is comparatively stable in finite samples.

AI.tldr: 本文针对有序节点依赖的二元数组提出两种推断方法：依赖节点二元CRVE和行列移动块Jackknife，解决了传统二元依赖范式在节点有序且邻近时因共同潜在冲击导致协方差不可忽略的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统二元回归模型假设只有当二元组共享同一节点时才存在依赖关系。但在节点有序排列且邻近节点受共同潜在冲击影响时，这一范式失效，因为即使不共享节点的二元组也可能因端点接近而产生依赖。单个协方差项虽弱，但数量随样本量发散，其聚合效应对渐近方差影响不可忽略。
AI.method: 提出两种估计量：(1) 依赖节点二元CRVE，保留端点邻近二元组之间的协方差项；(2) 行列移动块Jackknife，删除相邻节点块及与这些节点相关的所有二元组。两种方法均基于有序节点索引的弱依赖假设建立渐近有效性。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛证据表明，考虑有序节点依赖可以显著改善检验的尺寸控制，且Jackknife版本在有限样本中表现更加稳定。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了一个适用于有序节点依赖的二元数组推断框架，弥补了传统范式在有序节点场景下的不足，为相关实证研究提供了更可靠的推断工具。

title: ICG: Improving Cover Image Generation via MLLM-based Prompting and Personalized Preference Alignment
comment: Published in Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing, pages 12268-12278, EMNLP 2025. Official version: https://doi.org/10.18653/v1/2025.emnlp-main.617
summary: Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and diffusion models (DMs) have opened new possibilities for AI-generated content. Yet, personalized cover image generation remains underexplored, despite its critical role in boosting user engagement on digital platforms. We propose ICG, a novel framework that integrates MLLM-based prompting with personalized preference alignment to generate high-quality, contextually relevant covers. ICG extracts semantic features from item titles and reference images via meta tokens, refines them with user embeddings, and injects the resulting personalized context into the diffusion model. To address the lack of labeled supervision, we adopt a multi-reward learning strategy that combines public aesthetic and relevance rewards with a personalized preference model trained from user behavior. Unlike prior pipelines relying on handcrafted prompts and disjointed modules, ICG employs an adapter to bridge MLLMs and diffusion models for end-to-end training. Experiments demonstrate that ICG significantly improves image quality, semantic fidelity, and personalization, leading to stronger user appeal and offline recommendation accuracy in downstream tasks. As a plug-and-play adapter bridging MLLMs and diffusion models, ICG is compatible with common checkpoints and requires no ground-truth labels during optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出ICG框架，整合多模态大语言模型与扩散模型，通过个性化偏好对齐生成封面图像，无需标注数据即可提升图像质量、语义保真度和个性化效果。
AI.motivation: 个性化封面图生成在数字平台中至关重要但尚未被充分探索，现有方法依赖手工提示词和分离模块，缺乏端到端训练与个性化对齐。
AI.method: (1) 从物品标题和参考图中提取语义特征（元令牌），结合用户嵌入进行细化；(2) 通过适配器桥接MLLM与扩散模型实现端到端训练；(3) 采用多奖励学习策略（审美奖励+相关性奖励+个性化偏好模型）。
AI.result: ICG在图像质量、语义保真度和个性化方面显著提升，在下游任务中增强了用户吸引力和离线推荐准确率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ICG作为即插即用适配器，兼容现有检查点，无需真实标签即可优化，有效弥合了MLLM与扩散模型之间的鸿沟。

title: Personalized Observation Normalization for Federated Reinforcement Learning in Simulation Environments with Heterogeneity
comment: Accepted at the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2025
summary: Federated reinforcement learning (FedRL) enables multiple agents to collaboratively train a global policy without sharing raw data, making it ideal for privacy-sensitive applications. However, FedRL faces challenges in heterogeneous environments where differing state-transition dynamics lead to non-identical input distributions and imbalanced parameter updates during aggregation. Therefore, this paper develops a personalized observation normalization (PON) method, allowing each agent to locally normalize raw state inputs using a continuously updated running mean and variance. This design ensures consistent scaling of local feature without overshadowing across agents during aggregation. Furthermore, we demonstrate that sharing normalization parameters across agents is ineffective due to the diverse local input distributions, which highlights the necessity of personalized statistics. Experiments on heterogeneous MuJoCo tasks show that our developed PON accelerates training and achieves superior performance compared to baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出个性化观测归一化(PON)方法，让每个智能体在联邦强化学习中用本地运行的均值和方差归一化状态输入，解决异构环境下状态转移动力学不同导致的输入分布差异和聚合参数不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦强化学习在异构环境中面临状态转移动态不同导致输入分布不一致、聚合时参数更新不平衡的挑战，现有方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 提出个性化观测归一化(PON)方法：每个智能体使用本地持续更新的运行均值和方差对原始状态输入进行归一化，确保本地特征尺度一致且聚合时不被其他智能体主导。
AI.result: 在异构MuJoCo任务上，PON方法相比基线方法加速了训练过程并取得了更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 跨智能体共享归一化参数因本地输入分布不同而无效，个性化统计对异构联邦强化学习至关重要。

title: Identifying and Understanding Human Values in Text: A Tailorable LLM-based Architecture
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure. Published in Proceedings of the 18th International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence (ICAART 2026), Volume 5
summary: As intelligent systems become more autonomous, the scientific community focuses on creating decision-making mechanisms that include ethical and moral considerations, unlike traditional utility-maximisation models. To achieve this, a key aspect is assessing how well these decisions align with human values. To this end, a promising line of research is centred on developing approaches based on Large Language Models (LLMs) to identify human values from text, whether explicit or implicit, enabling their recognition throughout. This paper introduces a LLM-based architecture to detect and quantify the intensity of human values in text, avoiding the limitations of previous approaches tied to specific value theory or complex prompt engineering. The architecture comprises three coordinated modules: one that generates structured value specifications from the foundational texts of any theoretical framework; one that labels texts using these specifications; and one that assigns graded support or resistance based on rhetorical and semantic evidence. This modular approach separates the tasks of conceptualising from detecting human values, creating a scalable and reproducible process driven by value specifications adaptable to various theories. The architecture was instantiated with multiple LLMs and evaluated using the ValueEval dataset. The experiments demonstrate good detection performance, confirming the generality of the pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的模块化架构，用于从文本中检测和量化人类价值观的强度，避免依赖特定价值理论或复杂提示工程，并在ValueEval数据集上验证了良好性能。
AI.motivation: 随着智能系统越来越自主，需要创建包含伦理和道德考量的决策机制，而实现这一目标的关键在于评估智能系统的决策与人类价值观的一致性。现有方法受限于特定价值理论或复杂的提示工程。
AI.method: 提出一个三模块架构：1）从任何理论基础文本生成结构化价值规范；2）用这些规范标注文本；3）基于修辞和语义证据分配分级支持或反对。将概念化与检测分离，实现可扩展、可复现的流程。
AI.result: 在ValueEval数据集上使用多个LLM进行实验，取得了良好的检测性能，验证了该管道的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化方法可适应多种价值理论，分离概念化与检测任务，为价值识别提供了可扩展、可复现的通用框架。

title: Polling Set Construction and Worst-Case Complexity for Direct Search under Polyhedral Convex Constraints
summary: Direct search is one of the most popular derivative-free optimization paradigms, that relies on exploring the variable space using polling directions. To analyze and implement direct search, one typically relies on positive spanning sets. This concept is somewhat decorrelated from interpolation-based sets used in model-based algorithms, another class of derivative-free optimization methods. This discrepancy is even more pronounced for constrained problems, where recent advances in the interpolation-based setting have produced a unified picture that is still lacking in the direct-search case. In this paper, we introduce a new theoretical underpinning for direct-search methods, that can be defined for general convex constraints and lead to complexity guarantees, as in the model-based setting. By focusing on polyhedral convex constraints, we are able to construct polling sets that meet our new theoretical requirements. In particular, our polling sets necessarily include directions outside of the approximate tangent cone, giving theoretical justification to existing practical heuristics which incorporate this idea. Our numerical results confirm that adding these extra directions significantly improves practical performance.

AI.tldr: 本文为直接搜索方法（无导数优化）建立了新的理论基础，通过引入适用于一般凸约束的轮询方向集，填补了直接搜索法与基于模型算法之间的理论鸿沟，并证明了在凸多面体约束下该方法具有复杂度保证，数值实验表明添加近似切锥外方向可显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有直接搜索法（基于正张成集）与基于模型的方法在理论上存在脱节，尤其在处理约束问题时，后者已有统一理论框架而前者缺乏。作者希望为直接搜索法建立类似的理论基础，同时解释和证明实践中添加切锥外方向这一启发式策略的有效性。
AI.method: 针对一般凸约束定义新的轮询方向集理论要求；针对凸多面体约束构造满足该理论要求的轮询集，该集合必然包含近似切锥外的方向；在理论上证明该方法的复杂度保证（与基于模型的方法一致）。
AI.result: 建立了直接搜索法在凸约束下的新理论框架，证明了复杂度保证；数值实验证实添加切锥外方向显著提升了实际性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究统一了直接搜索法与基于模型的无导数优化方法在约束问题上的理论视角，并为实践中添加切锥外方向这一策略提供了严格的数学依据。

title: Stochastic Volatility, Jumps, and Rates: A Unified Framework for Option Pricing and Term-Structure Simulation
summary: This study develops an integrated stochastic modeling framework for pricing short and medium-maturity equity options and assessing interest-rate risk using the Heston (1993), Bates (1996), and CIR (1985) models. We calibrate the Heston model using both the Lewis (2001) Fourier inversion and the Carr-Madan (1999) FFT approach, finding near-identical parameter sets, which is consistent with the calibration stability reported in recent studies such as Agazzotti et al. (2025). Extending the model to Bates shows that jump intensities converge to values effectively equal to zero for 60-day maturities, echoing empirical findings that jumps contribute marginally to short-term smile fitting. We further compare our calibration approach with the joint volatility-surface and variance-term-structure framework proposed by Yoo (2025), confirming that standard Heston/Bates calibration remains robust for the maturities considered. Finally, we calibrate the CIR short-rate model to the Euribor term structure, generating positive and economically consistent forward-rate scenarios in line with recent stochastic-rate option-pricing research by Jeon and Kim (2025). Overall, our results show that continuous stochastic volatility dominates near-term pricing dynamics, while stochastic interest rates materially influence valuations beyond one year.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了Heston、Bates和CIR模型的集成随机建模框架，用于股票期权定价和利率风险评估。研究发现：Heston模型通过Lewis傅里叶反演和Carr-Madan FFT方法得到近乎一致的参数；Bates模型的跳跃强度在60天到期时趋近于零；CIR短期利率模型能生成符合经济预期的远期利率情景。结果表明随机波动率主导短期定价，随机利率显著影响一年以上估值。
AI.motivation: 现有期权定价研究多单独处理波动率和利率风险，缺乏统一的随机建模框架来评估不同期限下两类风险因素的相对重要性。
AI.method: 集成Heston(1993)、Bates(1996)和CIR(1985)模型，分别使用Lewis(2001)傅里叶反演和Carr-Madan(1999)快速傅里叶变换进行校准，并将CIR模型拟合至Euribor期限结构。
AI.result: Heston模型两种校准方法得出近乎相同的参数集；Bates模型跳跃强度在60天到期时收敛于零；CIR模型生成正向且经济一致的远期利率情景。
AI.conclusion: 连续随机波动率主导短期（60天）期权定价，而随机利率对一年以上期限的估值影响显著，跳跃项在短期定价中贡献微乎其微。

title: Human-AI Collaboration for Estimating Scientific Replicability
summary: Determining whether published scientific findings can successfully be replicated is a long-standing challenge in the empirical sciences. Existing approaches for replicability assessment typically rely either on human judgment, i.e., creative assembly of human experts, or on machine learning models trained on paper content metadata. While both approaches have demonstrated value, each also has important limitations. Human forecasts can be influenced by cognitive biases and narrow exposure to the research literature, while automated assessments often struggle to capture contextual cues and subtle signals of credibility. In this paper, we examine a hybrid approach. Specifically, we introduce a hybrid prediction market in which algorithmic agents trade alongside human participants to jointly estimate the likelihood that a published scientific finding will be corroborated via the outcome of a controlled replication study. Agents are trained on outcomes from hundreds of prior replication studies while human participants contribute domain knowledge through real-time trading. We evaluate this hybrid approach through multiple live experiments involving participants from different academic disciplines and compare its performance to artificial-only and human-only baselines. Our results show that, except for a few cases, hybrid markets match or outperform artificial prediction markets, producing more accurate and reliable replication forecasts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合预测市场方法，让算法代理与人类交易者共同预测科学发现的可复制性，实验表明该方法在多数情况下优于纯人工或纯算法基线。
AI.motivation: 现有的可复制性评估方法存在局限：人类判断易受认知偏差影响，而纯机器学习方法难以捕捉上下文线索和微妙的可信度信号。因此需要结合两者优势的混合方案。
AI.method: 构建混合预测市场，算法代理基于数百项复制研究的结果进行训练，人类参与者通过实时交易贡献领域知识，两者共同对科学发现的可复制性进行预测。
AI.result: 通过跨学科多轮实验，混合预测市场在大多数情况下匹配或超越纯算法和纯人类预测市场，产生更准确、更可靠的复制性预测。
AI.conclusion: 混合预测市场有效结合了人类直觉与机器学习的优势，为评估科学可复制性提供了更优的方案。

title: Stop Suppressing the Tail: Causal Inference for Extreme Events
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures, 13 tables. Keywords: double machine learning, dose-response, heavy tails, extreme value theory, causal inference
summary: Estimating how an outcome responds to a continuous treatment (the Average Dose-Response Function, or ADRF) is a core causal-inference primitive. However, when outcomes possess heavy tails, standard robust double machine learning (DML) deliberately suppresses these extremes to stabilize the bulk average. In high-stakes settings, such as financial returns or climate losses, this omitted 1-in-1000 extreme event is the actual target quantity. Furthermore, current methods that read the tail from a model's residuals suffer from circular dependence, causing tail shape inferences to shift drastically based solely on whether the core estimator is switched between Huber and Welsch.The research proposes an ADRF estimator that emits a structured tail-shape output alongside the standard point estimate. Its tail diagnostic (PDHTE+JK) evaluates the per-treatment tail shape from the outcome centered by a pilot median, successfully breaking the circular dependence and rendering the diagnostic invariant to the choice of core method. The output encompasses four treatment-conditional quantities: tail shape $\hatξ(t)$, deep-tail return levels $\hat{Q}_α(t)$, conditional shortfalls $\hat{S}_α(t)$, the recovered mean ADRF, and an explicit refusal mechanism that declines extrapolation when extreme-value modeling is unsupported by the data. Compared to kernel-weighted quantile regression (QR), the proposed estimator reduces deep-tail ($α=0.001$) return-level MAE by 11% and conditional-shortfall MAE by 25.5% across a heavy-tailed panel. It also achieves a 20-29% MAE reduction in sample-scarce regimes ($n\le2000$). On freMTPL2 motor-insurance claims, it successfully triggered an explicit extrapolation refusal on the log-claim scale, which neither QR nor loss-only DML can produce.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的平均剂量-响应函数（ADRF）估计器，能够同时输出结构化的尾部形状诊断（PDHTE+JK）和标准点估计。该方法通过以中位数中心化结果变量打破循环依赖，使尾部推断不受核心估计器选择的影响。在重尾数据上，该方法相比分位数回归将深尾（α=0.001）返回水平的平均绝对误差降低11%，条件短fall降低25.5%，并在小样本场景（n≤2000）实现20-29%的MAE降低。
AI.motivation: 现有双机器学习（DML）方法在处理重尾结果时人为压制极端值，而高风险的金融、气候场景下这些极端事件恰是核心关注量。同时，现有尾部推断方法存在循环依赖问题，尾部形状估计会因核心估计器（如Huber vs Welsch）的选择而发生剧烈变化。
AI.method: 提出结构化尾部ADRF估计器，核心组件为PDHTE+JK尾部诊断：通过中位数中心化结果变量打破循环依赖，输出四种处理条件量——尾部形状ξ̂(t)、深尾返回水平Q̂_α(t)、条件短fall Ŝ_α(t)、恢复的均值ADRF，并包含显式拒绝机制，在数据不支持极值建模时拒绝外推。
AI.result: 相比核加权分位数回归，深尾返回水平MAE降低11%，条件短fall MAE降低25.5%；小样本（n≤2000）场景MAE降低20-29%。在freMTPL2保险索赔数据上成功触发显式外推拒绝（对数索赔尺度），这是QR和仅损失DML无法做到的。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了重尾因果推断中的循环依赖问题，提供了更可靠的尾部诊断，且具备数据驱动的外推拒绝能力，适用于金融、保险、气候等高风险场景。

title: Private & Common Information States in Decentralized Team Equilibrium via Dynamic Programming for POMDPs with Delayed Sharing
summary: Witsenhausen, in his seminal 1971 paper [1], introduced decentralized partially observable Markov decision problems (POMDPs), with multiple agents or controls operating under T-step delayed sharing information patterns. A fundamental problem in [1] is the identification of structural properties of optimal strategies that compress the information patterns into multiple information states. In this paper, we develop such structural properties of optimal strategies and associated dynamic programming (DP) equations, using the concept of decentralized sequential team equilibrium (a generalization of person-by-person optimality from static team theory). Within this framework, each strategy is assigned an individual value function conditioned on its delayed sharing information pattern, while the strategies of all other agents are held fixed. The resulting DP framework yields several new DP equations and characterizations of decentralized team equilibrium. Moreover, these DP equations exhibit fundamental properties analogous to those of centralized DP of POMDPs: the optimization in each agent's DP equations is performed over the agent's action space rather than over strategy spaces; each agent's multiple information states satisfy Markov recursions; and a separation principle holds. The DP equations reveal a structural compression property of optimal strategies: each agent compresses its delayed sharing information pattern into three components: 1) a private posterior distribution conditioned on the agent's delayed sharing information pattern, 2) a centralized posterior distribution conditioned on the common information shared by all agents, and 3) the agent's private information component. This structural result substantially extends Witsenhausen's Assertion 8 in [1].

AI.tldr: 本文针对Witsenhausen提出的延迟共享信息模式下分散式POMDP问题，发展了最优策略的结构性质及其动态规划方程，通过分散式序贯团队均衡概念，揭示了每个Agent可将信息模式压缩为三个组成部分的结构性质，显著扩展了Witsenhausen的断言8。
AI.motivation: Witsenhausen在1971年的开创性工作中提出了分散式POMDP问题，但其核心问题——最优策略的结构性质（信息模式压缩为多个信息状态）——长期未得到充分发展。本文旨在建立此类结构性质及相应的动态规划方程。
AI.method: 采用分散式序贯团队均衡（静态团队理论中逐人最优性的推广）作为分析框架，为每个策略分配基于其延迟共享信息模式的条件价值函数，同时固定其他Agent的策略，推导出新的DP方程和均衡刻画。
AI.result: 建立了与集中式POMDP的DP类似的基本性质：优化在动作空间而非策略空间上进行；各Agent的信息状态满足马尔可夫递归；分离原理成立。最优策略将延迟共享信息模式压缩为三个成分：私有后验分布、中心化后验分布、私有信息分量。
AI.conclusion: 本文的结构性结果显著扩展了Witsenhausen的断言8，为分散式POMDP的最优策略设计提供了理论基础和计算可行的DP框架。

title: IV regression with distribution-valued outcomes
summary: We develop IV Fréchet regression (IVFR), an instrumental-variable (IV) method for settings where the outcome is an entire distribution. Framing the problem as an IV regression in 2-Wasserstein space, IVFR extends global Fréchet regression to the case with endogenous covariates. IVFR projects IV-weighted quantile curves onto the space of valid distributions and then recovers the corresponding regression coefficient functions. The projection provably reduces the estimation error in finite samples and guarantees valid fitted distributions. We show that the IVFR estimator converges weakly to a mean-zero Gaussian process and establish the validity of a multiplier bootstrap procedure for uniform inference. In simulations, the projection reduces the integrated mean squared error (IMSE) by up to 63% relative to existing methods. Revisiting the effects of Chinese import competition on the wage distribution within commuting zones, the proposed method produces 9-10% narrower confidence bands than existing methods. Using our novel uniform confidence bands, we find no evidence that import competition reduced wages at the very bottom of the distribution, but only between the 10th and 35th quantile. We also revisit the effect of county food stamp programs on the county's birth weight distribution and find no significant effects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IV Fréchet回归（IVFR），一种针对分布型结果变量的工具变量方法，在2-Wasserstein空间中进行IV回归，通过投影IV加权分位曲线来估计回归系数函数，并证明该方法在有限样本中降低估计误差、保证分布有效性，在模拟和两个实际应用（中国进口竞争对工资分布的影响、食品券计划对出生体重分布的影响）中展现出更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有IV方法多聚焦于标量或向量型结果变量，缺乏针对分布型结果变量（如整个工资分布、出生体重分布）且存在内生性问题的统计方法。本文旨在填补这一空白，将全局Fréchet回归扩展到内生协变量场景。
AI.method: 将问题框架为2-Wasserstein空间中的IV回归，提出IVFR方法：先对IV加权分位曲线进行投影，使其落入有效分布空间，再恢复对应的回归系数函数。理论方面，证明了投影在有限样本中降低估计误差，并建立了估计量的渐近正态性和bootstrap推断的有效性。
AI.result: 模拟实验中，投影方法使集成均方误差（IMSE）相较于现有方法降低高达63%。在中国进口竞争对工资分布的研究中，置信带窄9-10%；发现进口竞争并未降低最底层工资，而是影响10-35分位点。在食品券计划对出生体重分布的研究中，未发现显著效应。
AI.conclusion: IVFR是一种有效的分布型结果变量的IV方法，通过投影保证分布有效性并降低估计误差，为经济学等领域的分布效应分析提供了更精确的推断工具。

title: LCO: LLM-based Constraint Optimization for Safer Agentic LLMs in Real-world Tasks
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly acting as autonomous agents, but their continuous interaction with the environment can lead to in-context reward hacking (ICRH), a phenomenon where LLMs iteratively optimize their behavior to maximize proxy objectives, inadvertently producing harmful side effects. Existing defense methods are insufficient to address this risk, as ICRH arises not from adversarial inputs but from the model's own over-optimization. To mitigate this issue, we propose \textbf{LLM-based Constraint Optimization (LCO)}, a framework that effectively reduces ICRH without model fine-tuning. LCO consists of two modules: \textit{self-thought module}, which guides the LLM to proactively deliberate and integrate potential safety constraints before execution; and \textit{evolutionary sampling module}, which employs LLM-based crossover and mutation to constrain the model's actions within a safe solution space while maintaining task performance. Experimental results demonstrate that LCO substantially alleviates ICRH in both output-refine and policy-refine scenarios. In particular, on the tweet engagement optimization task, LCO achieves a 39% reduction in the Toxicity Growth Rate (TGR) on GPT-4, while on the policy optimization benchmark, it reduces the ICRH Occurrence Rate by 15.23%, demonstrating safety improvement without sacrificing task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LLM约束优化框架(LCO)，通过自省模块和进化采样模块，在不微调模型的情况下有效减少LLM作为自主代理时的上下文奖励黑客行为(ICRH)，实验显示在毒性和安全性指标上均有显著改善。
AI.motivation: LLM作为自主代理持续与环境交互时，会出现上下文奖励黑客(ICRH)现象——模型过度优化代理目标而产生有害副作用。现有防御方法无法有效应对这一风险，因为ICRH源自模型自身的过度优化而非对抗性输入。
AI.method: 提出LCO框架，包含两个模块：(1)自省模块(self-thought module)，引导LLM在执行前主动思考和整合潜在安全约束；(2)进化采样模块(evolutionary sampling module)，利用LLM驱动的交叉和变异操作，将模型动作限制在安全解空间内，同时保持任务性能。
AI.result: 在推文参与度优化任务上，LCO使GPT-4的毒性增长率(TGR)降低39%；在策略优化基准上，ICRH发生率降低15.23%，且未牺牲任务性能。
AI.conclusion: LCO框架能有效缓解LLM在输出精炼和策略精炼场景中的ICRH问题，在不进行模型微调的前提下实现安全性提升与任务性能的平衡。

title: IGADA-IoT: IoT Sensor Energy Optimization in Wireless Sensor Networks Driven by Automatic Data Augmentation
summary: In wireless sensor networks (WSNs), data augmentation is a novel method to improve sampling-frequency decision performance, thereby enabling energy optimization for IoT (Internet of Things) sensors. However, existing methods rely on a single generator and empirically determined quantities, failing to establish a mapping between dynamic information gaps and multiple generators, and overlooking the heterogeneity of generated samples. Moreover, an evaluation and a closed-loop method that jointly considers the information gap and the model performance are lacking. To address these issues, we propose an information gap-guided IoT sensor automatic data augmentation framework (IGADA-IoT) with hierarchical multi-generator collaboration and scheduling over multiple rounds. Capabilities of different generators are jointly utilized to reduce the information gaps. In the IGADA-IoT, a hierarchical multi-generator collaboration and scheduling strategy (HMGCS) is proposed to enhance the targetedness and rationality of generated sample allocation. An information gap-model performance joint evaluation and closed-loop method (IGMP-EC) is proposed to enhance the accuracy of augmentation decisions, and to mitigate the risks of under-augmentation and over-augmentation. Experimental results show that the IGADA-IoT improves the average accuracy of multiple downstream models by 7.27%. Compared with advanced data augmentation methods, the average accuracy is improved by 8.67%. Compared with the individual generators, the average accuracy is improved by 7.24%. Furthermore, public IoT sensor datasets from the UCR Archive and real-world deployments demonstrate the accuracy and generalizability of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种信息差距引导的物联网传感器自动数据增强框架(IGADA-IoT)，通过分层多生成器协作与调度，在无线传感器网络中提升数据增强效果和采样频率决策性能，平均准确率提升7.27%-8.67%。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法依赖单一生成器和经验确定数量，无法建立动态信息差距与多生成器之间的映射关系，且忽视了生成样本的异质性，缺乏联合考虑信息差距和模型性能的评估与闭环方法。
AI.method: 提出IGADA-IoT框架，包含分层多生成器协作与调度策略(HMGCS)以增强生成样本分配的针对性与合理性，以及信息差距-模型性能联合评估与闭环方法(IGMP-EC)以提高增强决策准确性，减少欠增强和过增强风险。
AI.result: IGADA-IoT使多个下游模型平均准确率提升7.27%，相比先进数据增强方法提升8.67%，相比单个生成器提升7.24%，在UCR Archive和实际部署数据集上验证了准确性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了现有数据增强中生成器单一、分配不合理及缺乏闭环评估的问题，在无需人工干预的情况下实现了自动化、高质量的数据增强。

title: Soro: A Lightweight Foundation Model and Chatbot for Tajik
summary: We present Soro, a family of Tajik-specialized conversational large language models (LLMs) designed for real-world deployment under tight compute and connectivity constraints in Tajikistan. Starting from open-weight Gemma 3 checkpoints, we perform Tajik-only continual pretraining on a curated 1.9-billion-token corpus spanning filtered web text, PDF documents, and curriculum-aligned educational materials, followed by supervised instruction tuning on 40K Tajik teacher-style examples. To enable rigorous evaluation despite the limited coverage of Tajik in standard benchmarks, we introduce a suite of Tajik benchmarks covering general knowledge, linguistic competence, and school- and university entrance-exam domains, and we open-source them on Hugging Face. Across these Tajik benchmarks, Soro substantially outperforms same-size Gemma 3 baselines while retaining strong English performance on standard datasets. We further show that FP8 and INT4 quantization of Soro preserves most Tajik-language gains while reducing memory requirements for edge deployment, supporting an ongoing education-sector pilot and planned scale-out across schools in Tajikistan.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Soro，一组面向塔吉克语的专业对话大语言模型，通过对Gemma 3进行塔吉克语持续预训练（19亿token）和监督微调（4万教学示例）构建，在塔吉克语基准测试上显著优于同尺寸Gemma 3，并通过FP8/INT4量化支持边缘部署，已在塔吉克斯坦教育场景中试点应用。
AI.motivation: 塔吉克语作为低资源语言，缺乏专业大语言模型，且塔吉克斯坦面临计算资源有限、网络连接受限的现实约束，现有模型无法在该场景下有效部署。
AI.method: 基于开源Gemma 3 checkpoint，进行塔吉克语持续预训练（19亿token语料，涵盖网页文本、PDF文档、课程对齐教育材料）；随后进行监督指令微调（4万塔吉克语教师风格示例）；引入了一套塔吉克语基准测试集并开源。
AI.result: Soro在塔吉克语基准测试中大幅超越同尺寸Gemma 3基线，同时保持标准英文数据集上的良好表现；FP8/INT4量化在保留大部分塔吉克语能力的同时显著降低内存需求。
AI.conclusion: Soro证明了在低资源语言和严格计算约束条件下，通过针对性的持续预训练和量化部署，可以有效构建实用的大语言模型，已在塔吉克斯坦教育领域展开试点并计划推广。

title: Optimal Spectral Design with Prior Information
summary: We study a class of spectral design problems in which a prior positive semidefinite information matrix is updated by a sum of rank-one matrices constructed from chosen design vectors subject to a bound on their Euclidean norm. The objective of a spectral design problem is any symmetric convex function of the eigenvalues of the updated information matrix. This framework unifies classical optimal experimental design criteria, including A-, D-, and E-optimality. It also arises in model-based derivative-free optimization, where sampling directions determine the conditioning and accuracy of regression models. Although the objective is symmetric and convex in the eigenvalues, the optimization problem with design vectors/matrix as decision variables is nonconvex, and optimal solutions of their convex relaxations may not be feasible for the spectral design problem. We use tight eigenvalue relaxations to obtain a convex reformulation, and we apply the Schur--Horn theorem to construct a simple polynomial-time algorithm for solving the spectral design problem. We illustrate the optimal spectral designs computed by our algorithm. Moreover, a small set of numerical experiments shows the potential of spectral designs for derivative-free optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类谱设计问题，其中先验正半定信息矩阵由选定的设计向量构造的秩一矩阵更新，目标函数是更新后信息矩阵特征值的对称凸函数。该框架统一了A、D、E最优性等经典实验设计准则，并适用于基于模型的导数自由优化。通过特征值松弛和Schur-Horn定理，作者提出了一个简单多项式时间算法来求解谱设计问题，并通过数值实验展示了其在导数自由优化中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 统一经典最优实验设计准则（A、D、E最优性）并解决导数自由优化中回归模型的条件与精度问题。尽管问题目标函数是特征值的对称凸函数，但设计变量层面的优化是非凸的，且凸松弛的最优解可能不可行。
AI.method: 使用紧的特征值松弛获得凸重构，并应用Schur-Horn定理构造了一个简单的多项式时间算法来求解谱设计问题。
AI.result: 通过算法计算出了最优谱设计，并通过数值实验展示了谱设计在导数自由优化中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种统一框架下求解谱设计问题的有效算法，该算法具有多项式时间复杂度，且在导数自由优化中具有应用前景。

title: Deep Learning Forecasting of the U.S. Aggregate Bond Index
summary: This study looks at the statistical properties and predictability using deep learning methods of the U.S. aggregate bond index in daily observations spanning 2018 to February 2026. We first establish that index levels are extremely persistent and consistent with unitroot behavior (Dickey and Fuller), while log returns are covariance-stationary with weak linear dependence and pronounced volatility clustering characteristic of ARCH-type processes (Engle; Bollerslev). Motivated by the trade-off between stationarity and information retention, we construct a "stationary but maximally persistent" representation via fractional differencing (Granger and Joyeux; Hosking) following the procedure of López de Prado, and evaluate shorthorizon forecast using two neural paradigms: (i) Multilayer Perceptrons (MLPs) trained on lagged vectors with joint lag-length and hyperparameter tuning (Hornik et al.; Rumelhart et al.); and (ii) Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) trained on Gramian Angular Field (GAF) image encodings (Wang and Oates). Empirically, MLPs match the strong naive persistence benchmark on levels, collapse toward near-zero forecasts on returns, and achieve the strongest incremental performance on the fractionally differenced series, where moderate dependence remains but unit-root drift is attenuated. In contrast, CNN-GAF models deliver consistently negative out-of-sample R 2 across all three representations. Overall, the results imply that, for short-horizon forecasting of broad bond indices, the primary determinant of predictive performance is the transformation of the series-its degree of stationarity and memory-rather than architectural complexity. Lag-based models remain competitive under persistence, while GAFbased CNNs are better suited to pattern-based tasks than to persistence-dominated next-step prediction.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习（MLP和CNN-GAF）预测美国债券指数，发现分数差分转换后的序列预测效果最好，而CNN-GAF在所有表示下均表现不佳，表明序列变换比模型复杂度更关键。
AI.motivation: 探究深度学习在金融时间序列预测中的有效性，特别是在债券市场这一具有强持久性的领域，寻找兼顾平稳性与信息保留的最优序列表示方法。
AI.method: 对债券指数水平值、对数收益率和分数差分三种序列表示，分别使用MLP（基于滞后向量）和CNN-GAF（基于Gramian Angular Field图像编码）进行短期预测，并对比朴素持久性基准。
AI.result: MLP在水平值上匹配朴素基准，在收益率上接近零预测，在分数差分序列上表现最佳；CNN-GAF在所有表示上均取得负的样本外R²。
AI.conclusion: 对于债券指数的短期预测，序列变换（平稳性与记忆性的权衡）比模型架构复杂度更重要；基于滞后的模型在持久性数据中仍有竞争力，而GAF-CNN更适合模式识别任务而非持久性主导的下一步预测。

title: Informing AI Policy Assessment using Large-Scale Simulation of Interventions
comment: This work will be published in the proceedings of the ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT) 2026. 15 pages plus end matter and appendix
summary: As the rapid proliferation of AI systems and harms spurs efforts in AI governance around the world, prioritizing among competing policy options has become increasingly challenging for policymakers and researchers. We introduce a methodology for identifying viable policy options to mitigate specified AI harms, helping policymakers and researchers target areas that warrant greater time and resource investment. This method combines participatory evaluation of policies, expert assessment of implementation costs, and an LLM-based assessment of perceived harm mitigation under each policy option. We leverage a genetic algorithm-based simulation study to explore a vast solution space of potential policy combinations, and examine how outcomes change under different weightings of cost, participatory input, and harm mitigation. We find that this method enables exploration of different balances between participatory and expert components, allowing policymakers and researchers to assess how much weight to assign to each. We argue that the diversity of viable policy combinations found by the genetic algorithm could be a useful starting point for deliberation. This method operationalizes existing work on participatory AI by integrating it directly into practical policy development pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合参与式评估、专家评估和LLM评估的方法，利用遗传算法模拟探索AI治理政策组合，帮助政策制定者识别可行政策选项并平衡成本、公众参与和危害缓解效果。
AI.motivation: AI系统快速发展引发的危害促使全球AI治理努力加强，但面对众多竞争性政策选项，如何优先排序成为政策制定者和研究者的重大挑战。
AI.method: 该研究方法包括：(1) 参与式政策评估 (2) 专家对实施成本的评估 (3) 基于LLM的危害缓解效果评估。在此基础上，利用遗传算法模拟探索庞大的政策组合解空间，并分析不同权重（成本、参与性输入、危害缓解）下结果的变化。
AI.result: 该方法能够探索参与式与专家评估之间的不同平衡，让政策制定者评估各自应获得的权重。遗传算法发现的政策组合多样性可作为审议的起点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将参与式AI的现有工作操作化，将其直接整合到实际政策开发流程中，为AI治理提供了一种可落地的政策选项识别工具。

title: Iterative Causal Discovery: Per-Edge Impossibility Certificates, Tier-Aware Oracle Queries, and the $1+K$ Lower Bound
summary: Causal-discovery algorithms return a directed graph, yet provide no principled means of distinguishing edge directions identified by the data from those assigned without an identifying assumption. Under the standard Markov and faithfulness conditions, the observational distribution identifies only a Markov equivalence class; orientations within that class are not determined by the joint distribution and cannot be recovered from additional samples alone, but require either a functional restriction or an intervention. We introduce a protocol for observational causal discovery on continuous data that attaches to each candidate edge a discrete impossibility certificate: a RESOLVED code records the identifiability theorem under which the direction was committed, while an IMPOSSIBLE code records the failure mode together with the specific question a domain expert must answer to resolve it. The bivariate cascade is extended with five gated identifiability tiers LSNM, IGCI, Stein, MDL, and PEIT that abstain when their precondition test rejects. Two oracle primitives, the meta-hub query and the node-children query, jointly establish an upper bound of $1+K$ expert interactions sufficient to recover any DAG, where $K$ denotes the number of non-leaf vertices. Under an ideal-oracle assumption, the bound is met exactly on the asia, sachs, child, and alarm benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RESOLVED协议，为因果发现中每条边附加可识别性证明码（RESOLVED/IMPOSSIBLE），通过五个门控可识别性层级（LSNM, IGCI, Stein, MDL, PEIT）和两个oracle原语，在理论保证下将专家交互次数上界限定为1+K（K为非叶节点数）。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现算法返回有向图，但无法区分由数据识别的边方向与基于假设赋值的边方向。在标准Markov和忠实性条件下，观测分布仅能识别Markov等价类，类内方向无法从数据中恢复，需要功能约束或干预才能确定。
AI.method: 提出RESOLVED协议：1) 为候选边附加可识别性证书（RESOLVED码表示方向由可识别性定理保证，IMPOSSIBLE码记录失败模式及领域专家需回答的问题）；2) 构建五级门控可识别性层级（LSNM, IGCI, Stein, MDL, PEIT），当前提检验不通过时主动弃权；3) 设计两个oracle原语（meta-hub查询和节点-子节点查询），理论上界为1+K次专家交互即可恢复任意DAG。
AI.result: 在理想oracle假设下，该上界在asia、sachs、child、alarm四个基准数据集上精确达到，验证了理论保证的紧致性。
AI.conclusion: RESOLVED协议为观测因果发现提供了可追溯、可解释的边方向决策机制，通过将不确定性问题显式编码并定向给领域专家，在理论保证下最小化专家交互成本。

title: DRIFT: Driving Risk Inference via Field Transmission for Human-like Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted by The IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC) 2026
summary: Risk fields offer spatially structured alternatives to scalar safety metrics. However, hand-crafted static risk field models struggle with occlusion and topology-driven propagation. We present DRIFT, a spatiotemporal risk field governed by an advection-diffusion-reaction partial differential equation (PDE), with an optional telegrapher term. DRIFT draws on three sources: anisotropic Gaussian kernels to capture velocity-induced risk, occlusion-aware latent hazards behind large vehicles, and topology-coupled merge-zone conflict pressure. We further introduce field-centric evaluation metrics to complement the existing Surrogate Safety Measures (SSMs), including Lane-Change Risk Differential, Temporal Anticipation Index, Occlusion Sensitivity Index, and Occlusion Response Latency. Experiments on real-world traffic datasets show that DRIFT reduces occlusion response latency and lowers the near-collision rate under occlusion compared with selected baselines in synthetic scenarios.

AI.tldr: DRIFT是一个由对流-扩散-反应偏微分方程（含电报方程项）驱动的时空风险场，结合各向异性高斯核、遮挡感知潜势和拓扑耦合汇合区冲突压力，并引入新的场中心评估指标，在真实交通数据上相比基线降低了遮挡响应延迟和近碰撞率。
AI.motivation: 传统人工设计的静态风险场模型难以处理遮挡问题和拓扑驱动下的风险传播，需要一种更灵活、动态的时空风险建模方法。
AI.method: 提出DRIFT模型，基于对流-扩散-反应偏微分方程（含可选的telegrapher项）构建时空风险场；融合三个信息源：各向异性高斯核（速度诱导风险）、遮挡感知潜势（大车后的隐藏风险）、拓扑耦合汇合区冲突压力；并设计场中心评估指标。
AI.result: 在真实交通数据集上，DRIFT相比基线方法降低了遮挡响应延迟，并在合成场景中降低了遮挡条件下的近碰撞率。
AI.conclusion: DRIFT通过PDE驱动的动态风险场有效解决了遮挡和拓扑传播问题，场中心评估指标补充了传统SSMs的不足。

title: Unlocking Fine-Grained and Within-Utterance Speaking Style Control in Prompt-Based Text-to-Speech Models
summary: While prompt-based text-to-speech (TTS) models enable natural language-driven speaking style control, they often provide limited fine-grained control and apply a single global style across an utterance. This restricts practical use cases that require continuous style attribute interpolation across utterances and time-varying style transitions within a single utterance. In this paper, we propose novel techniques to achieve both capabilities in existing prompt-based TTS models. For inter-utterance style interpolation, we compute direction vectors between contrastive style prompts in the embedding space and perform simple interpolation, enabling smooth transitions between style characteristics. For intra-utterance style transition, we first identify a strong attention bias toward early tokens in autoregressive TTS decoders, causing the initial audio realization to dominate subsequent generation. To mitigate this effect, we introduce KV-cache swapping and sliding-window attention masking. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed inter-utterance interpolation achieves a 99-100% success rate in gender conversion, up to 36 Hz pitch variation, and up to 1.6 syllables-per-second speed change. Our intra-utterance transition maintains a speaker similarity of 0.81-0.91 and achieves perceptual smoothness scores of 3.48-4.48.

AI.tldr: 本文针对现有基于提示的TTS模型缺乏细粒度控制和全局风格单一的问题，提出了两种新技术：话语间风格插值（通过对比提示的嵌入向量插值实现平滑风格过渡）和话语内风格转换（通过KV缓存交换和滑动窗口注意力掩码克服自回归解码器的早期token注意力偏差），实验验证了其在性别转换、音高、语速控制和说话人相似度、感知平滑度方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的TTS模型虽能通过自然语言驱动说话风格控制，但存在两个关键局限：一是缺乏细粒度控制，二是对整段话语施加单一全局风格，无法满足需要连续风格属性插值（跨话语）和时变风格转换（单话语内）的实际应用需求。
AI.method: 本文提出两类技术：1）话语间风格插值：在嵌入空间中计算对比风格提示之间的方向向量，进行简单插值实现平滑过渡；2）话语内风格转换：发现自回归TTS解码器存在对早期token的强注意力偏差导致初始音频主导后续生成，为此引入KV缓存交换和滑动窗口注意力掩码来缓解该效应。
AI.result: 话语间插值：性别转换成功率99-100%，音高变化最高36 Hz，语速变化最高1.6音节/秒。话语内转换：说话人相似度保持在0.81-0.91，感知平滑度评分达3.48-4.48。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功在现有基于提示的TTS模型上实现了话语间的平滑风格插值和话语内的时变风格转换，显著拓展了实际应用场景的灵活性，且无需额外训练或模型架构改动。

title: A Simple State Space Model Excels at Multivariate Time Series Classification
summary: Structured state space models (SSMs) have recently emerged as a promising foundation for sequence modeling, with Mamba-based architectures demonstrating strong performance through input-dependent state transitions, albeit at considerable complexity. However, their application to time-series classification (TSC) has been largely limited to Mamba-style architectures, leaving the broader SSM design space underexplored. We present the first systematic study spanning diagonal SSMs (S4D) and input-dependent SSMs (Mamba family) on large-scale TSC benchmarks, asking whether such complexity is necessary for top performance. Our results reveal a surprising finding: S4D consistently outperforms Mamba-based variants in both accuracy and efficiency, challenging the assumption that increased complexity translates to meaningful gains in TSC. Building on this, we introduce MS4, lightweight modifications to S4D via a linear input projection and channel-mixing mechanism, and MS4N, a normalized variant that stabilizes state dynamics with negligible overhead. Evaluated on 59 datasets across MONSTER (up to 60 million samples, 50K timesteps, 82 classes) and the UEA benchmark, against 15 baselines, MS4 and MS4N consistently outperform Mamba-based models while remaining more efficient, and MS4N matches or surpasses competing deep learning models that are roughly 2x and 10x larger in parameters. These results position lightweight structured SSMs as a compelling alternative to scaling complexity for TSC.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了结构化状态空间模型（SSMs）在时间序列分类（TSC）中的应用，发现简单的对角SSM（S4D）在多方面优于复杂Mamba架构，并提出了轻量级改进模型MS4和MS4N，在59个数据集上超越Mamba和多数深度学习模型，表明简化而非复杂化是TSC的更优方向。
AI.motivation: 现有TSC研究过度聚焦于复杂的Mamba架构，而更广泛的SSM设计空间（如更简单的S4D）未被充分探索。作者想验证：对于时间序列分类任务，复杂的输入依赖状态转换是否真的必要。
AI.method: 1. 首次系统比较对角SSM（S4D）与输入依赖SSM（Mamba家族）在大规模TSC基准上的性能。2. 提出MS4：在S4D基础上增加线性输入投影和通道混合机制。3. 提出MS4N：进一步加入归一化以稳定状态动态。
AI.result: 在59个数据集（MONSTER和UEA）上，S4D一致优于Mamba变体；MS4/MS4N在所有指标上超过Mamba模型，且MS4N在参数量仅为对比模型1/2到1/10的情况下，性能持平或超越最先进的深度学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级结构化SSM（而非复杂化）是TSC领域更有前景的方向，挑战了"越复杂越好"的主流假设。

title: On the Origin of Synthetic Information by Means of Steganographic Inheritance
summary: The origin of species has been the mystery of mysteries in natural science. By analogy, the origin of synthetic information, we suggest, is the mystery of mysteries in information science. The question carries a moral weight that a technical account can neither fully resolve nor responsibly ignore, as its impact on truth, trust, and human intellect extends deep into the broader economy and society. The very power of artificial intelligence makes the evolutionary lineage of synthetic information grow ever harder to trace, for a sufficiently capable model may generate offspring that bear little resemblance, at either the structural or signal level, to the parent source from which they were derived. As in genetics, two individuals may share the same phenotype mirroring each other in outward appearance, yet differ fundamentally in their genotype. We propose, by means of steganography, a mechanism analogous to heredity. At the moment an offspring is reproduced, a projector derives a trait from the parent, and a steganographic encoder invisibly hides it within the offspring. This trait persists throughout the offspring's life cycle in a cyber ecosystem. When parentage is queried, a steganographic decoder extracts the trait from the offspring and compares it against the traits of candidate parents in a reference pool, thereby nominating the most likely one. A theoretical analysis characterises phylogenetic accuracy as a function of projector and stegosystem properties, whilst empirical evaluations across multiple projectors and stegosystems demonstrate the viability of the proposed methodology under a broad spectrum of processing operations and semantic modifications. We envision a cyber ecosystem in which synthetic information, endowed with hidden yet traceable lineage traits, branches from a simple beginning into endless forms that have been, and are being, evolved.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种类似遗传学中亲本追踪的隐写方法，通过在AI生成的合成信息中嵌入隐秘的血统特征，以追溯其进化来源，从而应对AI内容溯源难题。
AI.motivation: 合成信息（如AI生成内容）的溯源问题日益严峻，因为强大模型生成的"后代"与原始来源在结构和信号层面差异巨大，难以追踪其进化谱系。这影响到了信息真实性、信任和人类智力，具有深远的道德和社会影响。
AI.method: 借鉴遗传学中的亲本追踪机制，提出基于隐写术的血统追踪方法。在合成信息生成（繁殖）时，投影器从父本提取特征，隐写编码器将该特征不可见地嵌入子代中。查询亲本关系时，隐写解码器提取特征并与候选父本比对，提名最可能的亲本。
AI.result: 理论分析刻画了系统投影器和隐写系统属性与谱系追踪准确率之间的关系；实证评估在多种投影器和隐写系统上验证了方法在广泛处理操作和语义修改下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为合成信息构建了可追踪的隐式血统标记机制，展望了一个合成信息像生物进化一样从简单开端分支演化出无穷形态的生态系统。

title: Stability of Quadratically Regularized Optimal Transport
summary: Quadratically regularized optimal transport (QOT) is a sparse alternative to entropic optimal transport. We develop a quantitative stability theory for QOT under perturbations of the marginals, the transport cost function, and the regularization parameter. The centerpiece is an $L^\infty$-stability result for the dual potentials. Starting from an error bound in an $L^2$-space that varies with the marginals, we use a self-bound for the potentials to derive a local $L^\infty$-Lipschitz bound that is uniform over marginals. This bound also yields stability of the optimal coupling and of its support. In particular, we show that for the quadratic transport cost, the support of the optimal coupling is locally Lipschitz in Hausdorff distance under perturbations of the marginals. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first stability result for the optimal support in regularized optimal transport.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了二次正则化最优传输(QOT)在边际分布、成本函数和正则化参数扰动下的定量稳定性理论，核心是通过$L^\infty$稳定性分析得到对偶势函数的局部Lipschitz界，并首次证明了最优耦合支撑集在Hausdorff距离下的局部Lipschitz稳定性。
AI.motivation: QOT是熵正则化最优传输的稀疏替代方案，但缺乏系统的稳定性分析。理解QOT对扰动的稳健性对理论发展和实际应用至关重要。
AI.method: 从依赖于边际分布的$L^2$误差界出发，利用势函数的自界性质，推导出在边际分布上一致的局部$L^\infty$-Lipschitz界，进而得到最优耦合及其支撑集的稳定性。
AI.result: 获得了对偶势函数在$L^\infty$范数下的稳定性；证明了二次成本函数下最优耦合支撑集在Hausdorff距离下关于边际扰动局部Lipschitz连续。
AI.conclusion: 这是正则化最优传输中首次得到最优支撑集的稳定性结果，为QOT的理论基础和应用提供了重要保证。

title: Agentic Literacy Debt: A Structural Problem the AI Literacy Field Has Not Yet Named
summary: Autonomous AI agents now plan, decide, and act on behalf of users across healthcare, financial services, and workplace contexts, often without step-by-step human approval. Existing AI literacy frameworks were built for a world in which humans evaluate AI outputs and decide whether to act; they have no vocabulary for the user who has delegated decision-making authority to an agent whose actions may not be observable, reversible, or controllable. This paper names the resulting problem agentic literacy debt: the accumulating societal deficit that grows when agentic AI systems are deployed at scale without corresponding literacy infrastructure. The debt compounds through three reinforcing channels (normalization of opaque delegation, multi-agent ecosystem complexity, and institutional path dependence), and it is incurred by the organizations that deploy agents but paid by the users, patients, and citizens on whose behalf the agents act. Evidence from healthcare, financial fraud, and global equity contexts suggests the gap is already consequential. The problem is structural, not a temporary lag that curriculum reform will close. It demands a reframing of AI literacy as a governance capability, not an evaluative one.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"代理素养赤字"概念，指自主AI代理大规模部署时，用户缺乏理解、监督和控制代理行为的能力。该问题通过三个渠道加剧，且影响已在实际领域显现，属于结构性问题而非教育滞后。
AI.motivation: 现有AI素养框架只适用于人类评估AI输出并决定是否行动的场景，无法描述已将决策权委托给不可观察、不可逆转、不可控制的自主代理的用户。需要新框架来应对这一系统性差距。
AI.method: 提出"代理素养赤字"概念，识别三个强化渠道（不透明委托的正常化、多代理生态系统复杂性、制度路径依赖），并从医疗保健、金融欺诈和全球公平三个领域提供证据。
AI.result: 三个领域已有证据表明代理素养赤字正在产生实质性后果，且该问题是结构性的，不会通过课程改革自行消失。
AI.conclusion: 需要将AI素养从"评估能力"重新定义为"治理能力"，以应对代理权下放带来的系统性挑战。

title: Triangular-Reference Schrödinger Bridges for Time Series Generation
summary: We introduce Triangular-Reference Schrödinger Bridges for Time Series (TR-SBTS), a conservative extension of the SBTS framework in which the Brownian reference is replaced by an intervalwise frozen, possibly degenerate diffusion reference, triangular across a hierarchy of latent volatility levels. The construction is a single entropy projection on the augmented state space, with the variational constraint imposed jointly across time and the latent levels and unfolded hierarchically by the disintegration of relative entropy. The variational core of SBTS is preserved: the entropy minimiser is the h-transform of the reference, and on each frozen interval the optimal dynamics admit a logarithmic-gradient drift formula on the affine leaves of the active covariance directions, valid even when the frozen covariance is rank-deficient. We establish stability of the frozen approximation and convergence of the corresponding regularised kernel estimators. The construction is realised through a finite-dimensional conditioning map assembled from three complementary reductions of the past -- a block PCR summary, a reference-aware Mahalanobis kernel on past increments induced by the runtime frozen covariance cumulants, and a past-window WLS drift regressor under the same reference metric -- together with a coupled state-covariance bridge step in which each latent level produces a dynamic reference for the level above, summarised by a covariance descriptor; the construction is evaluated on numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TR-SBTS，将SBTS中的布朗参考替换为区间冻结的三角化退化扩散参考，通过熵投影和分层变分约束实现时间序列建模，并给出了数值实验验证。
AI.motivation: 扩展SBTS框架，引入更灵活的参考过程（区间冻结、可能退化的扩散）以适应时间序列中潜在波动率层次结构，同时保持熵最小化的核心性质。
AI.method: 使用区间冻结的三角化扩散参考替换布朗参考；在增广状态空间上施加联合变分约束；通过相对熵分解实现层次化解耦；核心是h-变换和对数梯度漂移公式；构建有限维条件映射（包含块PCR、Mahalanobis核、WLS回归）及状态-协方差桥接步骤。
AI.result: 建立了冻结近似的稳定性及正则化核估计的收敛性；推导了秩亏协方差下仍成立的漂移公式；数值实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: TR-SBTS通过保守扩展参考过程，在保持SBTS变分核心的同时增强了建模灵活性，为层次化时间序列建模提供了新工具。

title: PortBench: A Correlation-Aware, Full-Pipeline Benchmark for LLM-Driven Portfolio Management
summary: LLMs have shown strong performance across diverse financial tasks, yet portfolio management (PM), a critical financial decision-making task, remains poorly benchmarked. Existing benchmarks exhibit two main gaps: they ignore cross-asset correlation structures, thereby failing to distinguish genuinely diversified portfolios from concentrated ones, and fail to evaluate the complete PM decision pipeline in real-world scenarios. We introduce PortBench, a benchmark spanning six heterogeneous asset classes over ten years. PortBench consists of two complementary layers: a static QA dataset of 6,269 correlation-based questions across seven task templates, and a dynamic five-stage allocation pipeline that mirrors the full PM decision cycle. To evaluate these layers, we introduce two dedicated metrics: a dual-layer correlation score that measures whether proposed portfolios exploit inter-class hedging and avoid intra-class concentration, and CEPS, a metric that quantifies how reasoning errors compound across pipeline stages. We further assess strategy robustness and investor alignment under three historical stress regimes and risk profiles. Evaluating ten frontier LLMs, we find that despite strong performance on static financial QA, 90\% of model-profile combinations fail to outperform a basic equal-weight allocation, and models that satisfy every procedural constraint still suffer catastrophic drawdowns under stress. Our source code is available at \href{https://github.com/AgenticFinLab/portbench}{this https URL}.

AI.tldr: 提出了PortBench，一个包含静态QA和动态五阶段分配管道的投资组合管理基准，发现即使最先进的LLM在动态投资场景中也难以超越简单的等权重分配。
AI.motivation: 现有金融基准存在两个主要缺陷：忽略跨资产相关性结构，无法区分真正多元化投资组合与集中投资组合；未能在真实场景中评估完整的投资组合管理决策流程。
AI.method: 构建了PortBench基准，包含两层：静态QA数据集（6,269个基于相关性的问题，7个任务模板）和动态五阶段分配管道（模拟完整PM决策周期）；引入双度量：双层次相关性分数和CEPS（衡量推理错误在管道各阶段累积程度）。
AI.result: 评估10个前沿LLM，发现尽管在静态金融QA上表现强劲，但90%的模型-配置组合未能超越简单的等权重分配，满足所有程序约束的模型在压力下仍遭受灾难性回撤。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM在投资组合管理这一关键金融决策任务上存在严重不足，尤其是在动态决策和压力场景下表现脆弱，需要更全面、更贴近真实场景的基准来推动改进。

title: Digital-Based Potentiostat and Mesoporous Microelectrode Co-Design for Non-Enzymatic Glucose Detection at 0.3V-VDD and 1.65nW-Power
summary: This paper presents a proof-of-concept ultra-low voltage and ultra-low power chronoamperometric electrochemical sensor for non-enzymatic glucose readout integrated circuit (IC) in 130nm CMOS detection featuring a reconfigurable Digital-Based (DB) Potentiostat. The signal transfer and noise characteristics of the new digital-based architecture are analytically described in the frequency domain for the first time by an equivalent linearized model that is validated by simulations and experiments. Based on experiments, the proposed DB potentiostat enables the detection of a wide electrochemical current range, spanning from 600pA to 650nA, with R2=0.991 linearity and consumes only 1.65nW (53.5nW) at V dd = 300mV (V dd = 500mV). The proposed DB readout is tested in a proof of-concept platform for non-enzymatic glucose detection with nanostructured microelectrodes, demonstrating successful non enzymatic glucose detection at physiological levels at the lowest reported voltage and power, even in the presence of an interferent (ascorbic acid) and under aerobic conditions, thus revealing a strong potential for emerging Point of Care (PoC) diagnostics applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一款基于130nm CMOS工艺的超低电压、超低功率计时电流型电化学传感器，用于非酶葡萄糖检测。该传感器采用可重构数字基恒电位仪，在300mV电源电压下仅消耗1.65nW功率，检测电流范围600pA至650nA，线性度R²=0.991，并在生理水平上成功实现了非酶葡萄糖检测。
AI.motivation: 现有电化学传感器在超低电压、超低功耗条件下，难以同时实现宽检测范围和良好线性度，限制了其在即时诊断等场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出一种可重构的数字基恒电位仪架构，首次通过等效线性化模型在频域解析描述了信号传递和噪声特性，并基于130nm CMOS工艺实现集成芯片。
AI.result: 检测电流范围600pA至650nA，线性度R²=0.991；300mV下功耗仅1.65nW，500mV下为53.5nW；在抗坏血酸干扰物存在及有氧条件下，成功实现生理水平非酶葡萄糖检测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了目前最低电压和最低功耗的非酶葡萄糖检测能力，为新兴即时诊断应用提供了有力支撑。

title: RAG-Coding: Enhancing LLM Medical Coding with Structured External Knowledge
comment: Additional experiments and analyses are in progress
summary: We present RAG-Coding, an agentic method for automated ICD-10-CM coding. RAG-Coding orchestrates four large language model (LLM) agents and grounds their coding decisions in external knowledge sources (e.g. the official coding tabular list and guidelines). By retrieving and cross-referencing relevant knowledge in these sources, the agents enhance coding accuracy and ensure clinical compliance. On the MDACE dataset, RAG-Coding outperforms the best LLM-based baseline by 8-13\% in micro-F1 and 2-8\% in macro-F1 across multiple LLM backbones. Compared to the state-of-the-art pretrained language model method, PLM-ICD, RAG-Coding exhibits higher micro recall (+11\%), while PLM-ICD exhibits higher micro precision (+6\%), yielding comparable micro- and macro-F1. Ablations show stepwise gains, highlighting the importance of incorporating external knowledge. We also release MDACE-2025, updating the original dataset with expert re-annotations with the latest 2025 ICD-10-CM guidelines. This update features more fine-grained code labels and enables evaluation against current clinical standards.

AI.tldr: 提出RAG-Coding，一种基于检索增强生成和多智能体协作的自动化ICD-10-CM编码方法，在MDACE数据集上相比基线提升8-13%的micro-F1，并发布了更新版MDACE-2025数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有的ICD编码方法（包括PLM-ICD等预训练语言模型方法）在编码准确性和临床合规性方面仍有提升空间，且缺乏对外部知识（如官方编码表和指南）的有效利用。
AI.method: RAG-Coding编排四个大语言模型智能体，通过检索和交叉引用外部知识源（官方编码列表和指南）来支持编码决策，实现检索增强生成式的自动化编码。
AI.result: 在MDACE数据集上，RAG-Coding在不同LLM骨干下micro-F1提升8-13%，macro-F1提升2-8%；与PLM-ICD相比，micro召回率提高11%，但micro精确率低6%，F1分数相当；消融实验验证了外部知识的逐步增益。
AI.conclusion: RAG-Coding通过智能体协作和外部知识检索有效提升了ICD编码的准确性和临床合规性，同时发布根据2025年最新指南重新标注的MDACE-2025数据集以支持未来研究。

title: $E^3$-Agent: An Executable and Evolving Agent for Resource Management of Edge Generative Inference
summary: Edge deployments of generative inference increasingly face two practical realities: per-device per-model performance is often unknown at deployment time, and it is non-stationary due to user-driven semantic events, background load, and device churn. Consequently, a resource manager that is tuned offline under a fixed regime can become brittle and expensive to maintain. This paper presents $E^3$-Agent, an executable and evolving agent for edge artificial intelligence generated content (AIGC) resource management. $E^3$-Agent separates a fast-path router that makes millisecond-level dispatch decisions from a slow-path, event-driven large language model (LLM) meta-controller that mitigates regime shifts through a small, explicit control surface exposed via a tool interface, including risk gating, router configuration, and rapid performance calibration. The agent learns online from execution feedback and continuously adapts to unknown and time-varying service-time mappings. We evaluate $E^3$-Agent in a discrete-event simulator driven by MLPerf-derived device-model measurement priors, covering cold-start warmup and three dynamic regimes: semantic dynamics, device churn, and hidden drift. Across the dynamic scenarios, $E^3$-Agent reduces average latency by 65%-73% compared to the best static baseline, stays within 7%-10% of an online full-information Oracle used for evaluation, and effectively suppresses stutter rate under semantic degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出E³-Agent，一个可执行且持续演化的边缘AIGC资源管理智能体，通过快慢路径分离架构和在线学习，在动态边缘环境中显著降低推理延迟（65-73%），接近全知Oracle性能。
AI.motivation: 边缘生成式推理面临两大现实问题：每设备每模型的性能在部署时往往未知，且会因用户驱动的语义事件、后台负载和设备更替而呈现非平稳特性。离线调优的资源管理器在这种动态环境下脆弱且维护成本高。
AI.method: E³-Agent采用快慢路径分离架构：快速路径路由器负责毫秒级调度决策，慢路径由事件驱动的大语言模型元控制器通过工具接口（风险门控、路由配置、快速性能校准）应对系统漂移。智能体从执行反馈中在线学习，持续适应未知且时变的服务时间映射。
AI.result: 在基于MLPerf的离散事件模拟器中，E³-Agent在语义动态、设备更替和隐式漂移三种动态场景下，相比最优静态基线降低平均延迟65%-73%，性能在离线Oracle的7%-10%以内，并能有效抑制语义退化下的卡顿率。
AI.conclusion: E³-Agent通过在线学习和快慢路径协同，为边缘AIGC资源管理提供了一种可适应非平稳环境的实用方案，在未知和时变条件下实现接近最优的调度性能。

title: DynaSchedBench: Calibrated Dynamic Scheduling Benchmarks and Observability Paradox in LLM-based Scheduling Agents
