summary: Progress in neural combinatorial optimization for Dynamic Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (DFJSP) is currently hindered by a methodological tension: static benchmarks encourage benchmark overfitting, while uncalibrated generators obscure algorithmic capability with stochastic noise. To resolve this, we introduce \textbf{DynaSchedBench}, a diagnostic framework for DFJSP that rigorously controls the instance-generation process. Instead of relying on parameter sampling, our approach utilizes Sequential Event-Space Calibrator (SESC) that computes a novel Schedule Stress Index (SSI) to stratify instances by difficulty. We demonstrate that SESC is substantially more computationally efficient than evolutionary baselines while converging reliably to the target metrics. The framework integrates modular components for instance generation, snapshot-based simulation, agents, evaluation, and visualization, thereby enabling rigorous testing of reactive and lookahead-based policies. Leveraging this calibrated environment, we identify key limitations of LLM-based scheduling agents. Specifically, in step-wise online decision-making for dynamic scheduling, we identify an ``Observability Paradox'': providing agents with oracle access to full structural information can degrade policy performance, underperforming concise information. Furthermore, despite substantial token overhead, tool-augmented and refinement strategies fail to reliably improve performance, and most LLM agents fail to consistently surpass strong dispatching baselines-behaving more like robust heuristic approximators than superior optimizers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynaSchedBench框架，通过顺序事件空间校准器(SESC)和调度压力指数(SSI)解决DFJSP中静态基准过拟合和随机噪声问题。发现LLM调度智能体的"可观测性悖论"：完整结构信息反而降低性能，且大多数LLM代理未能超越强启发式基线。
AI.motivation: 当前神经组合优化在DFJSP中的进展受制于方法学张力：静态基准导致过拟合，未校准的生成器用随机噪声模糊算法能力。亟需一个能够严格控制实例生成过程的诊断框架。
AI.method: 提出DynaSchedBench框架，包含：(1) 顺序事件空间校准器(SESC)计算调度压力指数(SSI)按难度分层实例；(2) 模块化组件：实例生成、快照模拟、智能体、评估和可视化；(3) 在 calibrated 环境下系统测试反应式和前瞻策略。
AI.result: (1) SESC比进化基线更高效且能可靠收敛到目标指标；(2) 发现"可观测性悖论"：提供完整结构信息反而降低策略性能；(3) 工具增强和精炼策略虽增加token开销却无法可靠提升性能；(4) 大多数LLM代理无法持续超越强调度基线，更像是鲁棒启发式近似器而非优越优化器。
AI.conclusion: DynaSchedBench为DFJSP提供了可靠的诊断框架；揭示了LLM在动态调度中的根本局限性——它们不是更优的优化器，而只是鲁棒的启发式近似器。

title: Online Sketched Newton-Raphson
summary: In online convex optimization (OCO), a decision-maker is confronted with an unknown environment and seeks to play an optimal sequence of decisions on a short time-scale using only past information. Recent advances in second-order OCO methods have demonstrated tighter regret bounds and improved empirical performance over traditional first-order methods. However, this performance comes at a cost: a matrix inversion is now required, which scales with the cube of the size of the problem. In this work, we propose sketching to mitigate this limitation. Specifically, we present the online sketched Newton-Raphson method (OSNR) which preserves the tight regret bounds obtained with second-order methods while presenting a strict computational improvement in terms of complexity. We discuss three application scenarios of OSNR: online root finding, unconstrained OCO, and time-varying equality-constrained OCO, and present their respective regret and a constraint violation bound for the latter. In all three applications, OSNR achieves sublinear dynamic regret bounds. For the equality-constrained case, the extension OSNR with equality constraints OSNR-EC is shown to yield sublinear cumulative constraint violation. Finally, we illustrate the performance of OSNR and OSNR-EC on two numerical examples, viz., online position tracking and optimal power flow, and observe that OSNR and OSNR-EC exhibit high performance even at low sampling rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在线草图牛顿-拉夫森方法（OSNR），通过草图技术降低二阶在线凸优化方法的计算复杂度（从立方降至更低），同时保持紧致的遗憾界。在三个场景（在线求根、无约束OCO、时变等式约束OCO）中均实现次线性动态遗憾，并在等式约束场景下达到次线性累计约束违反。数值实验（位置跟踪、最优潮流）验证了低采样率下的高性能。
AI.motivation: 二阶OCO方法虽具有更紧的遗憾界和更好的经验性能，但其矩阵求逆操作计算复杂度过高（与问题规模的立方成正比），限制了实际应用。本文旨在通过草图技术降低这一计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出OSNR方法，在二阶优化中引入草图（sketching）技术替代精确矩阵求逆，从而在保持紧遗憾界的前提下显著降低计算复杂度。针对三种场景（在线求根、无约束OCO、时变等式约束OCO）分别设计了对应变体（包括等式约束扩展OSNR-EC）。
AI.result: OSNR在所有三个应用中都达到次线性动态遗憾界；OSNR-EC在等式约束场景下实现次线性累计约束违反。数值实验（位置跟踪、最优潮流）表明OSNR和OSNR-EC即使在低采样率下也能保持高性能。
AI.conclusion: 草图技术能有效缓解二阶OCO方法的计算瓶颈，OSNR在保持理论保障的同时实现计算效率的显著提升，为大规模在线优化问题提供了实用方案。

title: Democratizing Generative AI for Sustainable Competitive Advantage
comment: Paper presented at BIG AI @ MIT, 2026. This conference has no publication
summary: As generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) diffuses across industries and becomes broadly accessible, the locus of sustainable competitive advantage shifts from technology ownership toward the quality of employee-level adoption and use. This paper develops a cross-level conceptual framework linking firm-level GenAI investment and governance to individual-level AI democratization, defined as the extent to which employees meaningfully, responsibly, and effectively use GenAI in their daily work. We argue that individual-level AI democratization, grounded in three micro foundations (AI usefulness, ease of use, and AI literacy), mediates the relationship between organizational GenAI investments and sustainable competitive advantage. Drawing on the technology acceptance model, resource-based theory, and emerging empirical evidence on AI productivity effects, we advance six propositions linking perceived usefulness, ease of use, AI literacy, responsible use, and innovation outcomes to organizational transformation and sustained relative performance. The framework provides a measurement scaffold for empirical research and offers managerial guidance on treating GenAI as augmentation infrastructure rather than solely as automation. We conclude by outlining future research directions, including longitudinal and cross-cultural investigations of literacy, governance, and transformation dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨层次概念框架，认为企业GenAI投资通过提升员工层面的AI民主化（有用性、易用性、AI素养）来获得可持续竞争优势，而非单纯拥有技术。
AI.motivation: 随着GenAI在各行业普及，竞争优势来源从技术拥有转向员工层面的采纳与使用质量，现有研究缺乏从组织投资到个体使用的跨层次理论整合。
AI.method: 基于技术接受模型、资源基础理论和AI生产力实证证据，构建包含组织投资、个体AI民主化（三个微观基础）和可持续竞争优势的跨层次概念框架，并提出了六个命题。
AI.result: 提出六个命题，连接感知有用性、易用性、AI素养、负责任使用和创新成果与组织转型及持续绩效表现。
AI.conclusion: 框架为实证研究提供测量基础，建议将GenAI视为增强基础设施而非纯粹自动化工具，并指出未来需进行纵向和跨文化研究。

title: Identifiable Bayesian Deep Generative Copulas with Unknown Layer Widths for Data with Arbitrary Marginal Distributions
summary: Deep generative models offer powerful tools for multivariate data analysis, but their black-box architectures are often unidentified and difficult to interpret. We introduce the Deep Discrete Encoder (DDE) Copula, an identifiable and interpretable generative model for multivariate data with arbitrary marginal distributions. The model places a hierarchical directed network of binary latent variables inside a copula framework, enabling flexible dependence modeling for mixed discrete and continuous data. Estimation is based on rank likelihoods, which decouple marginal modeling from posterior inference on the DDE parameters and avoid specifying the marginal distributions. We establish conditions for identification of the DDE copula parameters, ensuring that layer-specific parameters provide meaningful summaries of multivariate dependence. We also prove quotient-space posterior consistency for continuous margins under the exact rank likelihood and treat the extended rank likelihood for tied or mixed margins as a generalized likelihood, with concentration under an additional contrast condition. For computation, we propose a stochastic expectation-maximization algorithm for \emph{maximum a posteriori} estimation, together with initialization strategies that improve convergence. To learn network dimension adaptively, we extend Bayesian rank-selection priors to infer layer-specific widths. Simulations show strong finite-sample performance, and a personality-survey analysis reveals interpretable hierarchical latent structure in complex multivariate data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可识别且可解释的深度生成模型——Deep Discrete Encoder (DDE) Copula，通过将层次化二值潜变量网络嵌入Copula框架，结合秩似然估计和贝叶斯秩选择先验，实现了对混合类型多变量数据的灵活依赖建模与自适应网络结构学习。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型因黑箱架构而难以识别和解释，缺乏可解释的依赖结构建模方法。
AI.method: 将层次化二值潜变量有向网络嵌入Copula框架；采用秩似然解耦边缘建模与参数推断；建立参数可识别条件；提出随机期望最大化算法进行MAP估计；引入贝叶斯秩选择先验自适应学习网络宽度。
AI.result: 仿真实验展现了良好的有限样本性能；人格调查数据分析揭示了复杂多变量数据中可解释的层次化潜结构。
AI.conclusion: DDE Copula是一种兼具可识别性与可解释性的生成模型，能够有效处理混合离散与连续数据，并为多变量依赖结构提供有意义的层次化总结。

title: Information Age-Controllability Trade-offs in Communication-Constrained Networks
summary: We investigate the trade-off between controllability, channel access, and age-related performance in a wireless network of control systems. Controllers share a random-access channel to transmit control inputs to actuators over slotted blocks. We measure reliable control via block controllability, where a block is controllable if it contains a required number of consecutive successful transmissions. In parallel, we capture information freshness via the age of information. To enable efficient allocation of channel resources over time, we introduce adaptive access probabilities at the block level, prioritizing controllers that have not yet achieved controllability. We then derive closed-form expressions for block controllability probability, the peak latency between inter-block consecutive successes, and peak age of information. We further characterize the peak control latency, defined as the time between consecutive controllable blocks. Finally, we optimize access probabilities to jointly balance controllability and age-related metrics. Numerical results illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed adaptive access policies in managing this trade-off in interference-limited wireless control networks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无线控制系统网络中，可控性、信道接入与信息新鲜度之间的权衡。通过引入块级自适应接入概率，优先服务未达可控性的控制器，推导出块可控概率、峰值延迟及信息年龄的闭式表达式，并优化接入概率以平衡可控性与年龄相关指标。
AI.motivation: 在无线控制网络中，如何同时保证控制系统的可靠性（可控性）和信息的及时性（信息年龄）是一个关键挑战。现有研究往往单独考虑其中一方面，缺乏对二者联合分析与权衡的深入理解。
AI.method: 提出块级自适应接入概率策略，优先分配给尚未实现可控性的控制器；建立随机接入信道模型；推导块可控概率、峰值控制延迟、峰值信息年龄的闭式表达式；通过优化接入概率实现可控性与年龄指标的联合平衡。
AI.result: 获得了块可控概率、峰值延迟（连续成功之间的峰值等待时间）以及峰值信息年龄的闭式表达式；数值结果表明所提出的自适应接入策略能有效管理可控性与信息新鲜度之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自适应接入策略能够在干扰受限的无线控制网络中，有效平衡系统可控性与信息新鲜度，为无线控制系统的资源分配提供理论指导。

title: OralAgent: Integrating Reasoning, Tools, and Knowledge for Interactive Dental Image Analysis
summary: Dental image analysis plays a pivotal role in supporting accurate diagnosis and treatment planning in oral healthcare. Although recent advances have produced dental AI models for specific tasks and individual imaging modalities, their isolated designs limit practical use in real-world clinical workflows. In this paper, we present OralAgent, the first dental-specialized AI agent that unifies multimodal reasoning, tool-based decision-making, and knowledge-grounded retrieval within an end-to-end automated framework. It integrates 22 visual analysis tools and 368 widely-used classical dental textbooks, enabling autonomous reasoning, planning, tool use, knowledge retrieval, and multi-step workflow execution. Furthermore, we introduce OralCorpus, a large-scale, high-quality bilingual textual resource containing 134.8M tokens curated for dental retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). To evaluate models' multidisciplinary dental knowledge, we construct OralQA-ZH, a Chinese multiple-choice question benchmark consisting of 798 items across eleven oral subspecialties. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OralAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MMOral-Uni, MMOral-OPG, and OralQA-ZH benchmarks, highlighting its effectiveness, interpretability, and adaptability in real-world clinical settings. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/isjinghao/OralAgent.

AI.tldr: OralAgent是首个牙科专科AI代理系统，集成了22个视觉分析工具和368本经典教科书，在端到端框架中统一了多模态推理、基于工具的决策和知识检索。同时构建了OralCorpus双语语料库（1.348亿token）和OralQA-ZH中文多选题基准（798题），在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有牙科AI模型针对单一任务和单种影像模态设计，各自孤立，无法在实际临床工作流中有效使用。需要一种统一、自动化、可解释的端到端框架来整合多种分析能力。
AI.method: 提出OralAgent牙科专科AI代理，集成22个视觉分析工具和368本经典教科书，实现自主推理、规划、工具使用、知识检索和多步骤工作流执行。同时构建OralCorpus双语语料库（134.8M tokens）用于RAG，以及OralQA-ZH中文多选题基准（798题，覆盖11个亚专科）。
AI.result: 在MMOral-Uni、MMOral-OPG和OralQA-ZH三个基准上均达到SOTA性能，证明了其有效性、可解释性和临床适应性。
AI.conclusion: OralAgent作为首个牙科专科AI代理，通过统一多模态推理、工具使用和知识检索，有效提升了牙科影像分析的自动化水平和临床实用性，代码和模型已开源。

title: Tackling Multimodal Learning Challenges with Mixture-of-Expert: A Survey
comment: This survey paper has just been accepted by IJCAI 2026. Results were released by 30 April 2026. As I could not find a particular place to drop the acceptance email. I have upload the acceptance email alongside the LaTeX files of the paper, named as Acceptance_email.pdf
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) presents a naturally compatible and scalable framework for multimodal learning, demonstrating strong adaptability across diverse modalities and tasks. Despite its growing success, a comprehensive and systematic review on the MoE metho addressing multimodal challenges remains lacking. Existing surveys tend to evaluate either multimodal learning or MoE independently from method taxonomy, overlooking the unique interplay between them. This survey fills that gap by answering a central question: \textit{How does MoE effectively resolve multimodal challenges?} We approach this from three key perspectives: (1) \textbf{MoE as an Efficient Multimodal Engine:} enabling scalable multimodal modeling by decoupling computational cost from parameter growth and mitigating modality redundancy through selective expert activation; (2) \textbf{MoE as a Multimodal Representation Learner:} integrating complementary multi-opinion expert knowledge to enrich alignment and interaction representations; and (3) \textbf{MoE as a Multimodal Adapter:} providing a modular and flexible mechanism to model imperfect data scenarios such as modality imbalance and missing modality. Through our extensive literature review, we identify critical research gaps, including interpretable routing, expert communication, modality integration, and lifelong multimodal learning. We position this survey as a foundation for future research toward interpretable and sustainable multimodal Mixture-of-Experts system.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了混合专家模型（MoE）在多模态学习中的应用，从三个关键视角回答“MoE如何有效解决多模态挑战”这一核心问题：高效多模态引擎、多模态表示学习器和多模态适配器，并指出了可解释路由、专家通信等未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有综述要么独立评估多模态学习，要么独立评估MoE的方法分类，忽略了二者之间的独特交互机制。因此，本文旨在填补这一空白，系统回答MoE如何有效解决多模态挑战这一核心问题。
AI.method: 本文采用文献综述方法，从三个关键视角分析MoE在多模态学习中的作用：(1) MoE作为高效多模态引擎，通过解耦计算成本与参数增长、选择性专家激活减少模态冗余；(2) MoE作为多模态表示学习器，整合互补的多观点专家知识以丰富对齐与交互表示；(3) MoE作为多模态适配器，提供模块化灵活机制应对模态不平衡、模态缺失等不完美数据场景。
AI.result: 识别出关键研究空白，包括可解释路由、专家通信、模态整合以及终身多模态学习等方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文定位为未来可解释且可持续的多模态混合专家系统研究的基础性综述。

title: Why LLMs Fail at Causal Discovery and How Interventional Agents Escape
summary: Causal discovery is a cornerstone of scientific reasoning, yet whether large language models can perform it reliably remains an open question. Recent benchmarks show that even fine-tuned models plateau on simple causal graphs and degrade as complexity grows, but why they fail has not been established. We prove the failure is fundamental: supervised fine-tuning, direct preference optimization, and in-context learning all produce predictors that cannot distinguish between causal graphs generating similar observational data, and any attempt to do so requires the model's internal representations to grow unboundedly, violating the very conditions under which these methods work. We formalize this as a kernel obstruction theorem, establishing that the limitation is intrinsic to the learning paradigm, \emph{not any particular model or dataset}. We propose Agentic Causal Bayesian Optimization (A-CBO), wherein a frozen language model serves as an interventional oracle answering targeted queries about intervention effects, while an external Bayesian loop concentrates beliefs over candidate graphs in logarithmically many rounds. Because the decision operates outside the space where the obstruction applies, A-CBO provably converges while the underlying model remains unchanged. On Corr2Cause, A-CBO matches fine-tuned baselines without any training. On Extended Corr2Cause, a new benchmark scaling to 24 variables with 18K test samples, A-CBO significantly outperforms both fine-tuning and preference optimization, with the advantage growing

AI.tldr: 本文证明监督微调、直接偏好优化和上下文学习无法可靠地进行因果发现（因为模型无法区分生成相似观测数据的因果图），并提出Agentic Causal Bayesian Optimization（A-CBO）方法，通过冻结语言模型作为干预预言机+外部贝叶斯循环，在对数轮内收敛到正确的因果图，无需训练即可超越微调基线。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有基准显示大模型在因果发现任务上表现有限，但失败的根本原因一直没有被阐明。本文旨在从理论层面证明这种失败的必然性，并提出一种不受此限制的新方法。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Causal Bayesian Optimization（A-CBO），将冻结的语言模型作为干预预言机（回答关于干预效果的定向查询），外部贝叶斯循环在对数轮内集中对候选图的后验信念。决策在核障碍定理适用的空间之外进行，因此保证收敛。
AI.result: 在Corr2Cause上，A-CBO无需训练即可匹配微调基线；在扩展到24个变量、18000测试样本的Extended Corr2Cause上，A-CBO显著优于微调和偏好优化，且优势随复杂度增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: 当前基于学习的因果发现方法存在理论上的根本局限，而将LLM作为干预预言机与贝叶斯优化结合的范式可以绕过这一局限，实现可证明的收敛和更好的扩展性。

title: Convergence of empirical subgradients for optimal transport-based objectives
summary: Optimal transport is widely used to learn distributions, enforce distributional constraints, and model uncertainty. In applications, transport losses are often computed from samples through tractable representations, such as one-dimensional sorting formulas or sliced Wasserstein costs, making them practical components in training pipelines. We study parameterized objectives defined by sampled transport costs and prove graphical convergence of their subdifferentials to the subdifferential of the population objective. In particular, this ensures that standard subgradient methods consistently approach stationary points of the population-level problem. We illustrate the results in several settings, including risk-averse optimization, fairness-constrained learning, and sliced Wasserstein problems. Our analysis highlights that smooth parameterizations provide a favorable interface between statistical consistency and optimization. By contrast, transport objectives with nonsmooth costs and models may exhibit unstable derivatives in the large-sample limit.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于采样运输成本定义的参数化目标函数，证明了其次微分会图形收敛到总体目标的次微分，从而保证次梯度方法能一致逼近总体问题的稳定点。
AI.motivation: 最优传输在分布学习、分布约束建模中广泛应用，但基于样本计算运输损失时，其优化行为的理论保证尚不清晰，尤其是次微分在样本规模增长时的收敛性未得到充分理解。
AI.method: 通过分析参数化运输成本目标的次微分，证明了从样本到总体的图形收敛性，并分别讨论了光滑与非光滑情形下的收敛行为差异。
AI.result: 证明了光滑参数化为统计一致性与优化之间提供了良好的接口；而非光滑成本和模型在样本量增大时可能导致导数不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 光滑参数化是确保运输损失在优化中稳健收敛的关键，次梯度方法可用于风险厌恶优化、公平性约束学习和切片Wasserstein问题等场景。

title: Short-Term Gain, Long-Term Fragility: AI Labor Substitution and the Erosion of Sustainable Capability
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures, Also available on SSRN: https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.6577818
summary: What looks like acceleration can be a quiet transfer of burden from the present to the future. Attempts to replace human labor with AI systems are often presented as rational responses to technological progress, but that view is often structurally short-sighted. Across software development and adjacent knowledge industries, AI is increasingly attractive because it appears to reduce labor costs, speed output, and improve short-term metrics. Yet those gains may be achieved by drawing down human capabilities that are slow to build and difficult to restore. This paper develops a mechanism of capability masking and capability erosion under AI labor substitution. AI-generated output can create the appearance that organizational capability has been replaced, even when dependence on skilled human labor remains. That appearance can support hiring restraint while slower costs accumulate in the background. Evidence from AI-assisted coding shows that generated output still requires substantial human verification and remains uneven in correctness, maintainability, and security. Repository-level studies also suggest limits in handling broader codebase context. More broadly, labor-market, political-economy, and industrial-strategy evidence suggests that substitution pressures are being driven by managerial cost incentives and national competition while increasing risks of concentration and platform control. The result is a system that may look more efficient in the short term while becoming more fragile over time.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，AI替代人类劳动表面上提升了效率，实则可能通过"能力遮蔽"和"能力侵蚀"机制，将短期成本转嫁给未来，导致组织长期脆弱性增加。
AI.motivation: 揭示AI替代劳动力背后隐藏的长期风险——即表面上的效率提升可能是对未来能力的透支，而非真正的技术进步。
AI.method: 提出"能力遮蔽"和"能力侵蚀"两种机制，结合AI辅助编码的证据、代码库研究、劳动力市场分析、政治经济学和产业战略等多方面证据进行论证。
AI.result: AI生成代码仍需大量人工验证，在正确性、可维护性和安全性方面存在不足；替代压力主要由管理层成本激励和国家竞争驱动，增加了产业集中度和平台控制风险。
AI.conclusion: 短期看似更高效的AI替代系统，长期可能使组织变得更为脆弱，真正的成本被悄然转移到了未来。

title: Semiparametrically Efficient Inference for Kernel Measures of Noise Heterogeneity
summary: We develop semiparametrically efficient inference for kernel measures of noise heterogeneity in additive noise models. In many applications, the regression function is estimated using flexible machine learning methods. Downstream procedures based on the resulting residuals can then inherit first-stage bias: regression error may induce spurious dependence between covariates and residuals, invalidating the assumptions needed for standard analysis. We construct a novel Hilbert-valued one-step estimator of the kernel covariance operator between covariates and residuals. Our estimator yields bootstrap-calibrated tests for residual independence and goodness of fit in additive noise models, while also providing asymptotically efficient confidence intervals for the kernel dependence measure under noise heterogeneity. The framework extends to settings with additional covariates, enabling inference on distributional heterogeneity of residual noise across treatment groups. Simulations show improved calibration and power relative to naive plug-in residual methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对加性噪声模型中噪声异质性的核度量，开发了半参数有效推断方法。通过构造希尔伯特值的一步估计量，解决了机器学习回归误差带来的偏差问题，实现了残差独立性的自助校准检验、模型拟合优度检验以及噪声异质性下核依赖度量的渐近有效置信区间。该方法可扩展到含额外协变量的场景，并相比朴素残差方法具有更好的校准和检验效能。
AI.motivation: 在加性噪声模型中，回归函数常使用灵活的机器学习方法估计，但基于残差的下游推断会继承第一阶段估计偏差——回归误差导致协变量与残差间产生虚假依赖，破坏了标准分析所需的假设条件。因此需要一种能够消除一阶段偏差、实现有效推断的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的希尔伯特值一步估计量，用于估计协变量与残差之间的核协方差算子。该方法通过一步校正消除第一阶段机器学习估计带来的偏差，实现半参数有效推断。
AI.result: 该方法可构建自助校准的残差独立性检验和加性噪声模型的拟合优度检验；在噪声异质性下为核依赖度量提供渐近有效的置信区间；可扩展到含额外协变量的情形。仿真实验表明，相比朴素的残差方法，该方法在校准精度和检验效能上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的希尔伯特值一步估计方法有效解决了机器学习估计误差对残差推断的污染问题，为加性噪声模型中的噪声异质性推断提供了半参数有效的理论基础和实用工具。

title: Towards Autonomous Commissioning of Industrial Drives via Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
summary: The commissioning of industrial electric drives still relies heavily on manual tuning of cascaded control loops, requiring expert knowledge and significant time. In this paper, we propose a fully automated approach for tuning the current control loop of industrial drives using Bayesian Optimization (BO) directly on real hardware, without requiring a system model or firmware modifications. The drive is treated as a black-box system, and the controller parameters are iteratively updated through closed-loop experiments. The tuning problem is formulated as a multi-objective optimization task that directly minimizes tracking error, time-weighted error, overshoot, and oscillatory behavior, enabling the identification of Pareto-optimal controller configurations. To address discrete parameters, noisy evaluations, and limited budgets, we adopt a multivariate Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) as the underlying BO strategy. The proposed method operates under practical industrial constraints, including communication latency and limited evaluation budgets. The experimental validation on a real motor drive system under no-load conditions shows that the method achieves performance comparable to expert tuning within a few minutes and without human intervention. Results show that Gaussian Process (GP)-based BO can yield highly competitive final solutions, but TPE-based BO is better aligned with this setting due to faster convergence, richer Pareto-front approximation, and lower computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化的工业电机驱动电流环自动调参方法，无需系统模型和固件修改，通过黑盒优化在几分钟内达到专家级调优性能，实验验证了TPE方法相比高斯过程在该场景下更优。
AI.motivation: 当前工业电机驱动调试严重依赖人工专家对级联控制环进行手动调节，耗时且需要专业知识，缺乏自动化的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 将驱动器视为黑盒系统，采用多目标贝叶斯优化（基于Tree-structured Parzen Estimator）直接在实际硬件上进行闭环实验，迭代更新控制器参数，同时优化跟踪误差、时间加权误差、超调量和振荡行为等多项目标。
AI.result: 在真实电机驱动系统（空载条件）下验证，方法在数分钟内无需人工干预即可达到与专家调优相当的性能。TPE相比高斯过程收敛更快、Pareto前沿更丰富、计算开销更低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的全自动化调参方法在工业实际约束下可行有效，TPE-BO比GP-BO更适合该工业调优场景。

title: BioELX: Cross-lingual Biomedical Entity Linking via Alias-based Retrieval and LLM Ranking
summary: Cross-lingual biomedical entity linking (BEL) maps mentions in any language to unique identifiers in a biomedical knowledge base (KB), supporting clinical and biomedical NLP applications. However, expert-annotated training data for BEL are costly, especially for low-resource languages. Moreover, many cross-lingual BEL systems rely on SapBERT-based retrievers trained on predominantly English aliases in the KB, leading to poor generalization to unseen non-English mentions and limited context-aware disambiguation. We propose BioELX, a two-stage cross-lingual BEL framework that requires no task-specific annotated training corpora. In Stage~1, we enrich SapBERT training with Wikidata-derived multilingual aliases and use the resulting retriever to improve cross-lingual candidate retrieval. In Stage~2, we perform context-aware disambiguation with a pre-trained LLM ranker that jointly considers the mention context and candidate, eliminating the need for supervised training. Experiments on five benchmarks (XL-BEL, EMEA, Patent, WikiMed-DE, and MedMentions) show that BioELX achieves new state-of-the-art performance. It improves average Recall@1 on XL-BEL by +19.2, with especially large gains for low-resource languages, e.g., +21.6 on Turkish, +22.1 on Korean, +30.8 on Thai, and delivers consistent improvements on EMEA (+6.2), Patent (+5.4), and WikiMed-DE (+12.8). Code and resources will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: BioELX是一个两阶段跨语言生物医学实体链接框架，无需标注训练数据。第一阶段用Wikidata多语言别名丰富SapBERT训练改进候选检索，第二阶段用预训练LLM排序器进行上下文感知消歧。在五个基准上达到新SOTA，尤其在低资源语言上提升显著（如土耳其语+21.6，韩语+22.1，泰语+30.8）。
AI.motivation: 跨语言生物医学实体链接（BEL）的低资源语言缺乏专家标注数据，且现有SapBERT检索器主要依赖英文别名，导致对非英文提及泛化能力差、缺乏上下文感知消歧能力。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：Stage1利用Wikidata多语言别名增强SapBERT训练改进候选检索；Stage2使用预训练LLM排序器联合考虑提及上下文和候选进行消歧，无需监督训练。
AI.result: 在XL-BEL上平均Recall@1提升+19.2，低资源语言提升显著（土耳其+21.6，韩+22.1，泰+30.8）；EMEA+6.2，Patent+5.4，WikiMed-DE+12.8。
AI.conclusion: BioELX通过多语言别名增强和LLM上下文消歧，无需标注数据即实现跨语言BEL新SOTA，尤其显著提升低资源语言性能。

title: Metric-Aware PCA as a Linear Instance of Geometric Deep Learning
summary: Geometric deep learning organises neural architectures around the symmetries of their data domain, with the choice of symmetry group serving as a geometric prior that determines what representations can be learned. Metric-Aware Principal Component Analysis (MAPCA) parameterises principal component analysis by a positive-definite metric matrix, with a canonical subfamily interpolating between standard PCA and output whitening and a diagonal-metric point recovering Invariant PCA (IPCA). This paper positions MAPCA within the geometric deep learning framework. The metric is read as the geometric prior; the orthogonal group preserving it is the symmetry group it induces; MAPCA solutions are equivariant under this group with the resulting spectrum invariant; and MAPCA's defining constraint is the linear analogue of the Schur-type weight constraints used in equivariant networks. Across six axes - domain, symmetry group, equivariance, invariance, architectural primitive, and geometric prior - we construct a precise dictionary between MAPCA and geometric deep learning. The technical anchor is a uniqueness theorem characterising IPCA as the unique linear data-derived metric in the MAPCA family that is equivariant under arbitrary diagonal rescaling and projects onto the fixed-point set of the action, equivalent under normalisation to the variance-maximisation criterion in its precise form. The paper closes with three bridges: kernel PCA as the nonlinear extension, spectral graph methods as MAPCA on graphs, and a deep MAPCA construction extending the positioning into deep equivariant networks

AI.tldr: 本文将度量感知主成分分析（MAPCA）定位到几何深度学习框架中，揭示了其与对称性、等变性、不变性等概念的对应关系，并证明了MAPCA是几何深度学习在线性层面的精确类比。
AI.motivation: 将MAPCA纳入几何深度学习框架，建立其与对称群、等变网络等核心概念之间的精确字典，以统一理解这两类方法的内在联系。
AI.method: 通过六个维度（域、对称群、等变性、不变性、架构原语、几何先验）建立MAPCA与几何深度学习之间的对应词典；核心证明是IPCA在MAPCA族中的唯一性定理。
AI.result: MAPCA的度量可视为几何先验；保持该度量的正交群即诱导的对称群；MAPCA解在该群下是等变的，谱具有不变性；MAPCA的约束条件是等变网络中Schur型权重约束的线性类比。
AI.conclusion: MAPCA是几何深度学习在线性层面的精确对应物；核PCA、谱图方法、深度MAPCA分别是其非线性、图结构、深度化的自然扩展。

title: RULER: Representation-Level Verification of Machine Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific training records from a deployed model without retraining from scratch. Current protocols verify this at the output level through membership inference, retain accuracy, and forget-set accuracy, but a model can satisfy all three whilst still encoding forgotten records in its intermediate representations. We introduce RULER, a set of representation-level verification metrics. The oracle-comparative metric M2 measures whether forget-set records occupy the same representational position as in a model retrained without them. The oracle-free metric M4 detects residuals from the unlearned model's internal similarity structure alone, without retraining. Four approximate unlearning methods all pass output-level evaluation, yet under a linear mixed-effects model M2 detects significant residuals in 10 of 12 conditions (p<0.05), with effect sizes growing as the forget fraction increases. A fifth method, Bad Teacher, shows the same residuals despite a different forgetting mechanism. M4 acts as a pre-unlearning diagnostic across tabular, image, clinical text, and face-identity settings: it detects identity-level memorisation in face recognition models where no tested method fully erases the signal.

AI.tldr: 提出了RULER，一套基于表示层的验证指标，用于检测机器学习模型在通过输出层评估后是否仍保留了被遗忘的训练记录信息。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘协议仅在输出层面通过成员推断、保留集和遗忘集准确率进行验证，但模型可能通过中间表示层编码被遗忘记录的信息，从而绕过这些评估。
AI.method: 提出两个指标：M2（基于oracle的指标，比较遗忘记录在遗忘模型与重新训练模型中的表示位置）和M4（无oracle指标，仅从遗忘模型内部相似性结构检测残差）。
AI.result: 四种近似遗忘方法均通过输出层评估，但M2在12种条件中有10种检测到显著残差（p<0.05），且效应大小随遗忘比例增加。第五种方法Bad Teacher也呈现相同残差。M4在表格、图像、临床文本和人脸识别等多种场景中作为遗忘前诊断工具有效。
AI.conclusion: 现有输出层评估不足以验证机器遗忘效果，需要表示层级的验证指标来确保真正的隐私保护。

title: Dynamic Stabilisation of Boundary Control Systems
summary: We design observer-based controllers to stabilise abstract linear boundary control systems on Hilbert spaces. Our main results introduce conditions for exponential, strong, and polynomial stability, and establish external well-posedness of the closed-loop system. We design controllers for a one-dimensional wave equation, a two-dimensional wave equation with distributed control and observation, and a non-uniform SCOLE model.

AI.tldr: 本文针对希尔伯特空间上的抽象线性边界控制系统，设计了基于观测器的控制器，给出了指数、强和多项式稳定性的条件，并建立了闭环系统的外部适定性。在多个波动方程和SCOLE模型上验证了方法。
AI.motivation: 针对抽象线性边界控制系统，设计基于观测器的控制器以实现稳定化，并建立闭环系统的适定性理论。
AI.method: 采用基于观测器的控制器设计方法，在希尔伯特空间框架下推导指数、强和多项式稳定性的充分条件，并分析闭环系统的外部适定性。
AI.result: 给出了指数稳定性、强稳定性和多项式稳定性的条件，证明了闭环系统的外部适定性；在一维波动方程、二维波动方程（分布式控制与观测）以及非均匀SCOLE模型上成功应用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于观测器的控制器能有效稳定抽象线性边界控制系统，且在不同类型的波动方程和复杂结构模型上均有效。

title: Mathematical Modelling of Ethical AI Use in Higher Education: A Coordination Game Framework for Future-Facing Learning
summary:
The rapid uptake of generative artificial intelligence (AI) in higher education is reshaping assessment practices and intensifying concerns around academic integrity, fairness, and learning quality. While institutional responses increasingly emphasise policy guidance and ethical principles, there remains limited formal understanding of how collective norms of responsible or opportunistic AI use emerge and stabilise within student cohorts. This paper reframes student AI use in assessment as a coordination problem shaped by peer expectations and assessment design rather than individual compliance alone. We develop a coordination-based evolutionary game-theoretic framework that captures learning value, effort, perceived fairness, and transparency, with institutional AI governance modelled implicitly through reflective assessment incentives.
  We use analytical results and finite-population simulations to reveal threshold-driven behavioural transitions in student AI use: small, well-calibrated changes in reflective assessment incentives can trigger rapid shifts towards responsible, learning-oriented AI-use norms, whereas weak or misaligned incentives allow opportunistic practices to persist. These non-linear dynamics explain why policy statements alone often fail to change behaviour, while modest assessment redesigns can have disproportionate effects. By providing a mechanism-level account of how assessment structures shape collective AI-use practices, this work offers higher education institutions an analytically grounded tool for Future Facing Learning, supporting proportionate, pedagogy-led AI governance without reliance on surveillance or punitive enforcement.

AI.tldr: 本文通过演化博弈论框架，揭示了学生群体中AI使用规范的涌现与稳定机制，发现反思性评估激励的小幅调整可引发向负责任的AI使用规范的非线性转变，为高等教育机构提供了不依赖监控或惩罚的、以教学法为导向的AI治理工具。
AI.motivation: 尽管高等教育机构对生成式AI的应对越来越强调政策指导和伦理原则，但学界对学生在评估中负责任或机会主义使用AI的集体规范如何形成并稳定下来，仍缺乏正式的理解。本文试图将学生的AI使用重新定义为受同伴期望和评估设计共同塑造的协调问题，而非单纯的个体合规问题。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个基于协调的演化博弈论框架，模型纳入了学习价值、努力、感知公平性和透明度等要素，并通过反思性评估激励隐式建模机构AI治理。采用解析结果与有限种群模拟相结合的方法进行分析。
AI.result: 研究发现学生AI使用存在阈值驱动的行为转变：反思性评估激励的小幅、精准调整可触发向负责任的、以学习为导向的AI使用规范的快速转变；而薄弱或错位的激励则使机会主义行为持续存在。这种非线性动力学解释了为何单纯的政策声明往往无效，而适度的评估重新设计却能产生不成比例的巨大影响。
AI.conclusion: 本文为高等教育机构提供了基于机制层面的理解，说明评估结构如何塑造集体AI使用实践，支持面向未来的学习，倡导相称的、以教学法为主导的AI治理，无需依赖监控或惩罚性执法。

title: Accelerating Reinforcement Learning Training Using Simulation Surrogate Models
summary: High-fidelity simulation models are widely used to analyze complex stochastic systems, but their high computational cost motivates the development of cheaper surrogate models that approximate the simulation model's input-output relationship. In parallel, reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful framework for making online decisions in stochastic environments, with increasing attention being given to the use of simulation models as training environments for RL models. We investigate a class of surrogate models suitable for accelerating RL training in settings where the reward structure, model parameters, or system dynamics change over time and explore their interactions with simulation models and RL models. Through numerical experiments on a stochastic service system modeled via discrete-event simulation, we demonstrate that leveraging surrogate models can substantially accelerate RL training and re-training.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在动态变化的环境中，使用代理模型加速强化学习训练的方法，并通过离散事件仿真验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 高保真仿真模型计算成本高，而强化学习在随机环境中做出在线决策时通常需要大量训练，因此需要开发更廉价的代理模型来加速强化学习训练，特别是在奖励结构、模型参数或系统动态随时间变化的情况下。
AI.method: 研究了一类适用于动态环境下的代理模型，探索了代理模型、仿真模型与强化学习模型之间的交互机制，并通过离散事件仿真构建的随机服务系统进行数值实验。
AI.result: 数值实验结果表明，使用代理模型能够显著加速强化学习的训练和重新训练过程。
AI.conclusion: 代理模型可以有效降低高保真仿真在强化学习训练中的计算负担，在动态变化的环境中具有实际应用价值。

title: Actor-Identifier-Critic Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Model-Free Optimal Control of Nonlinear Systems with Stochastic Packet Dropouts
summary: Packet dropouts in control systems poses a critical challenge, as it can significantly compromise system performance and stability. In these conditions, classical controllers often struggle to deliver effective control, as they rely on accurate system models, which may not always be available. This paper proposes a novel Actor-Identifier-Critic~(AIC) controller to address model-free tracking control of nonlinear systems in the presence of packet dropouts in both the controller-to-actuator and sensor-to-controller channels. Using an identifier to learn the system dynamics, the proposed controller is able to handle packet dropouts in the communication link and facilitate gradient propagation from the critic to the actor within a model-free control framework. The performance of the proposed method is demonstrated on two nonlinear SIMO and MIMO systems and a case study on power system stability subject to stochastic packet dropouts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种Actor-Identifier-Critic (AIC)控制器，用于解决存在数据包丢失的非线性系统无模型跟踪控制问题。该控制器通过标识器学习系统动态，处理通信链路中的数据包丢失，并在两个非线性系统和电力系统稳定性案例中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 控制系统中的数据包丢失会严重损害系统性能和稳定性，而经典控制器依赖精确系统模型，在模型不可用时难以有效控制。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的Actor-Identifier-Critic (AIC)控制器框架，其中标识器用于学习系统动态，处理控制器-执行器和传感器-控制器两个通道的数据包丢失，并促进从评论家到行动者的梯度传播。
AI.result: 在两个非线性SIMO和MIMO系统以及一个电力系统稳定性案例研究中验证了所提方法的性能，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: AIC控制器能够有效应对数据包丢失问题，实现非线性系统的无模型跟踪控制。

title: Bridging the Stability-Expressivity Gap: Synthetic Data Scaling and Preference Alignment for Low-Resource Spoken Language Models
summary: Spoken Language Models (SLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for speech synthesis by bypassing explicit grapheme-to-phoneme pipelines. However, their effectiveness in low-resource languages remains fundamentally limited by the scarcity of transcribed speech. In practice, synthetic data has become the primary strategy for scaling SLMs in such settings, providing reliable phonetic supervision when real data is insufficient. In this work, we show that this reliance introduces a fundamental trade-off, which we term the Stability-Expressivity Gap: while synthetic data improves phonetic accuracy, it progressively suppresses prosodic variability, ultimately leading to a collapse of expressivity (Synthetic Erosion). To bridge this gap, we propose two self-alignment frameworks. Disentanglement-Guided Self-Alignment (DGSA) recovers expressivity for complex languages by exploiting prosody-timbre separation. For regimes where authentic references are exceptionally limited, Temperature-Driven Self-Critique (TDSC) stabilizes generation through automated exploration and filtering. Our approach outperforms strong commercial systems, including ElevenLabs and Gemini Pro, and enables the first zero-shot voice cloning capability for Lao.

AI.tldr: 针对低资源语言语音合成中合成数据导致的表现力坍塌问题，提出两种自对齐框架（DGSA和TDSC），在保持音素准确性的同时恢复韵律变异性，首次实现老挝语的零样本语音克隆。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言缺乏足够的转录语音数据，现有SLM依赖合成数据扩展，但合成数据在提升音素准确性的同时会压制韵律变异性，导致表现力坍塌（Synthetic Erosion），亟需解决这一稳定-表现力权衡问题。
AI.method: 1) Disentanglement-Guided Self-Alignment (DGSA)：通过韵律-音色分离恢复复杂语言的表现力；2) Temperature-Driven Self-Critique (TDSC)：在参考样本极少的场景下，通过自动探索与过滤稳定生成过程。
AI.result: 在低资源语言上超越ElevenLabs和Gemini Pro等强商业系统，首次实现老挝语的零样本语音克隆。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据导致的稳定-表现力鸿沟可以通过自对齐框架有效弥合，为极低资源语言的语音合成提供了可行方案。

title: Comparative Analysis of Liquid Neural Networks and LSTM for Sequential Pattern Recognition: Robustness, Efficiency, and Clinical Utility
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, 6 tables, The conference paper will appear in Proceedings of JCSSE 2026
summary: Traditional Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) units operate on discrete time steps, often failing to capture the fluid temporal dynamics of real-world physical processes. Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs), specifically Closed-form Continuous-time (CfC) networks, address this by modeling the hidden state evolution as a continuous differential equation. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive benchmarking study across four distinct sequential modalities: neuromorphic event-based data (N-MNIST), stroke-based drawing (QuickDraw), visual handwriting (IAM), and physiological time-series (PhysioNet Sepsis-3). Furthermore, we perform a rigorous stress test using temporal dropout to evaluate model robustness against missing data. Our findings reveal that LNNs consistently provide superior parameter efficiency and significantly higher robustness in natively temporal domains and clinical environments where data sparsity is prevalent. This extended preprint provides additional background on related datasets and the LNN theoretical lineage, supplemented with a detailed appendix documenting our full implementation and experimental settings.

AI.tldr: 本文对液态神经网络（LNN/CfC）与RNN/LSTM在四种时序模态上进行基准测试，发现LNN在参数效率和对缺失数据的鲁棒性上显著优于传统模型。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN/LSTM基于离散时间步长，难以捕捉真实物理过程的连续时间动态特性，因此需要探索能建模连续时间演化的神经网络。
AI.method: 在四种时序模态（N-MNIST、QuickDraw、IAM、PhysioNet Sepsis-3）上进行综合基准测试，并通过时间丢弃法（temporal dropout）进行鲁棒性压力测试。
AI.result: LNN在参数效率和鲁棒性方面一致优于RNN/LSTM，尤其在时序性强和数据稀疏的临床环境中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: LNN（CfC网络）凭借其连续微分方程建模能力，在时序任务中更具参数效率与鲁棒性，适合处理稀疏、不完整的现实时序数据。

title: LaneRoPE: Positional Encoding for Collaborative Parallel Reasoning and Generation
summary: Parallel LLM test-time scaling techniques (e.g., best-of-$N$) require drawing $N>1$ sequences conditioned on the same input prompt. These methods boost accuracy while exploiting the computational efficiency of batching $N$ generations. However, each sequence in the batch is traditionally generated independently and hence does not reuse intermediate generations, computations, or observations from other sequences. In this paper, we propose LaneRoPE to enable coordination and collaboration among $N>1$ sequences at generation time. LaneRoPE involves two key ideas: (a) an inter-sequence attention mask to make sampling of sequences dependent on one another; and (b) a RoPE extension that injects positional information that captures relative positions between tokens, both within and outside a particular sequence. We evaluate our approach on mathematical reasoning tasks and find promising results: LaneRoPE enables collaboration among sequences, yielding additional accuracy gains under limited generated sequence length. Importantly, since LaneRoPE enables coordination with minimal changes to the underlying LLM architecture and introduces a negligible overhead at inference time, it is appealing to rapidly incorporate parallel reasoning into existing LLM inference pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaneRoPE，通过序列间注意力掩码和RoPE扩展，使并行生成的N个序列能够协作推理，在数学推理任务上取得准确率提升，且仅需对LLM架构做极小修改，推理开销可忽略不计。
AI.motivation: 现有的并行测试时缩放技术（如best-of-N）虽然通过批处理提升了计算效率，但各序列独立生成，无法复用中间结果或相互协作，这限制了推理能力的进一步提升。
AI.method: LaneRoPE包含两个关键设计：(a) 序列间注意力掩码，使不同序列的采样相互依赖；(b) RoPE扩展，注入同时涵盖序列内和序列间相对位置的编码信息。
AI.result: 在数学推理任务上，LaneRoPE使序列间能够协作，在有限的生成序列长度下实现了额外的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 由于LaneRoPE对底层LLM架构改动极小且推理开销可忽略，因此适合快速集成到现有LLM推理管线中，实现并行推理能力的增强。

title: De-risking solutions to optimization problems
summary:
We develop a cutting-plane methodology that adjusts solutions to optimization problems so
  as to reduce features that bring about exposure to risk, such as concentration of assets
  or resources. The methodology is agnostic to the representation of risk. Our procedure aims
  to reduce the appropriate risk metric without accruing a significant increase in nominal
  cost, rapidly, or proves that such an adjustment is not possible. The underlying approach
  borrows from techniques used in first-order methods for optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种切割平面方法，用于调整优化问题的解，以减少风险暴露特征（如资产或资源集中度）。该方法与风险表示无关，旨在快速降低风险指标而不显著增加名义成本，或证明无法实现这种调整。技术基础借鉴了优化中的一阶方法。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法在生成解时往往未充分考虑风险暴露（如资产集中度），导致解虽在名义目标上最优，但隐含较大风险。作者希望开发一种方法，在保持名义成本增长不大的前提下，主动调整解以减少风险特征。
AI.method: 采用切割平面方法，迭代地识别解中导致风险暴露的特征，并通过添加约束（切割）逐步调整解。方法借鉴了一阶优化技术（如梯度下降类方法）的思想，使得调整过程快速收敛。该方法不依赖特定的风险表示形式，具有广泛适用性。
AI.result: 该方法能够快速降低所选风险指标，同时避免名义成本的显著增加；或在无法实现风险降低时，快速证明该结论。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种通用的、与风险表示无关的切割平面框架，可有效平衡优化解的名义性能与风险暴露，为风险敏感优化提供了一种新工具。

title: Using Zero-Shot LLM-Generated Survey Data for Geographically Explicit Population Synthesis
summary: There is a growing interest in utilizing synthetic populations for a diverse range of applications. At the same time, we are witnessing a tremendous growth in artificial intelligence in all walks of life. This paper evaluates whether zero-shot large language model (LLM)-generated health survey data can serve as inputs to a conventional iterative proportional fitting (IPF) workflow for geographically explicit population synthesis. Using the 2023 Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS), we generate synthetic survey records for the U.S. states of Colorado and Mississippi with GPT-4.1 and Gemini-2.5-Pro. We use the generated data in an IPF-based synthesis pipeline and evaluate the resulting census tract-level synthetic populations against external benchmarks. Results show both LLMs capture several major state-level contrasts, indicating zero-shot generation produces geographically differentiated survey data. However, performance is strongly variable-dependent. Downstream effects in population synthesis are mixed, as IPF sometimes amplifies or reduces errors in the generated data. Spatial validation shows that LLM-based populations reproduce census tract-level patterns reasonably well, especially for variables that were more aligned with the ground truth data. Overall, the LLM-generated survey data shows promise as supplementary input, but not yet as a replacement for real survey data.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了零样本大语言模型生成的健康调查数据能否替代传统调查数据，用于人口合成工作流。结果显示LLM数据能捕捉州级差异，但变量表现差异大，IPF会放大或减小误差，尚不能完全替代真实调查数据。
AI.motivation: 合成人口数据的需求日益增长，同时AI发展迅速。本文希望探索能否用LLM零样本生成的调查数据替代传统真实调查数据，作为人口合成工作流的输入，以降低数据采集成本。
AI.method: 利用GPT-4.1和Gemini-2.5-Pro零样本生成2023年BRFSS调查数据，覆盖科罗拉多州和密西西比州；将生成数据输入迭代比例拟合（IPF）工作流进行地理显式人口合成；通过与外部基准对比，评估最终合成人口在普查区层面上的表现。
AI.result: LLM能捕捉主要州级差异，生成地理差异化数据；但性能因变量而异，下游IPF有时放大、有时减小误差；空间验证表明LLM人口能较好再现普查区层面模式，尤其对与真实数据更对齐的变量效果更好。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成的调查数据有潜力作为补充输入，但尚不能替代真实调查数据。

title: Evolving and Detecting Multi-Turn Deception using Geometric Signatures
summary: Safety defenses for large language models (LLMs) are typically trained and evaluated on single-turn prompts, yet real attacks often unfold as indirect, multi-turn probing. To defend against this more nuanced form of deception, we present a unified pipeline that generates realistic multi-turn deceptive question sets via multi-objective genetic prompt optimization with co-evolving mutation operators. We validate this dataset through a human study, which also revealed that early generations yielded the most convincing deception and practical constraints such as adherence filtering and ordering effects. Using this data, we were able to detect deceptive attempts to access prohibited information using simple, explainable geometric signals in embedding space coupled with a lightweight feed-forward classifier. Three geometric features (angular coverage, distance ratio, and linearity) augmented with pairwise similarity statistics led to a compact predictive model that achieved consistently high recall (0.89) across base, reworded, and truncated (three-turn) scenarios, with test-time F1 ranging from 0.74-0.86. The results support a central hypothesis that multi-turn deceptive intent leaves a stable geometric footprint that enables lightweight, transparent screening without expensive end-to-end training. We further discuss responsible uses, limitations, and paths toward larger, more diverse human-evaluated datasets. The primary contribution to artificial intelligence is the multi-objective evolutionary framework for prompt generation, and the engineering application is the deployment of a lightweight geometric detection system for LLM safety infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过多目标遗传优化生成多轮欺骗性问题的pipeline，并利用嵌入空间中的几何特征（角度覆盖、距离比、线性度）实现轻量级欺骗检测，召回率达0.89。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全防御主要针对单轮提示设计，但真实攻击常以间接、多轮探测的方式展开，现有方法难以应对这种更隐蔽的欺骗形式。
AI.method: 提出统一pipeline：1) 基于多目标遗传提示优化与协同进化变异算子生成逼真的多轮欺骗性问题集；2) 通过人类研究验证数据质量；3) 提取嵌入空间中的三种几何特征（角度覆盖、距离比、线性度）结合成对相似性统计，训练轻量级前馈分类器进行检测。
AI.result: 在base、reworded和truncated三种场景下，召回率稳定达0.89，测试F1分数在0.74-0.86之间。
AI.conclusion: 多轮欺骗意图在嵌入空间中留下稳定的几何足迹，支持使用轻量级透明筛查方法替代昂贵的端到端训练；并讨论了负责任使用、局限性和未来数据集扩展方向。

title: On the Solvability of Quasi-Regulator Equations in Non-smooth Output Regulation
summary: Motivated by the prevalence of non-smooth, possibly non-periodic signals in real-world applications, the output regulation of linear systems subject to non-smooth non-periodic exogenous signals has emerged as a challenging problem. A fundamental prerequisite for solving this problem is the existence of solutions to the so-called ``quasi-regulator equations''. In this paper, we investigate the solvability of these equations. To this end, we reformulate the quasi-regulator equations as differential-algebraic equations and highlight the critical role played by the system's relative degree. We finally propose a ``non-smooth non-resonance condition'' that, under specific relative degree requirements, provides a necessary and sufficient characterization of the solvability of the quasi-regulator equations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了线性系统在非光滑非周期外生信号作用下的输出调节问题，重点分析了"准调节方程"的可解性，提出了一种基于相对度的非光滑非共振条件，为该类方程的可解性提供了充要条件。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中广泛存在非光滑、非周期信号，而传统输出调节理论主要针对光滑/周期信号，因此需要解决线性系统在非光滑非周期外生信号下的输出调节问题，而该问题的前提是准调节方程有解。
AI.method: 将准调节方程重新表述为微分代数方程，利用系统的相对度概念进行分析，并提出了"非光滑非共振条件"来刻画方程的可解性。
AI.result: 在特定的相对度要求下，所提出的非光滑非共振条件为准调节方程的可解性提供了充要刻画。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非光滑非周期信号下的输出调节问题奠定了理论基础，准调节方程的可解性条件为后续控制设计提供了重要依据。

title: From AR to Diffusion: Efficiently Adapting Large Language Models with Strictly Causal and Elastic Horizons
summary: Diffusion models promise efficient parallel text generation but rely on bidirectional attention, creating a structural mismatch with pre-trained Autoregressive (AR) models. This incompatibility precludes reusing robust AR priors, necessitating prohibitive pre-training from scratch. To bridge this gap, we propose FLUID, a framework that efficiently adapts AR backbones to the diffusion paradigm. By enforcing Strictly Causal Alignment, FLUID enables seamless initialization from standard GPT-style checkpoints, circumventing the need for massive pre-training. Furthermore, we introduce Elastic Horizons, an entropy-driven mechanism that dynamically modulates denoising strides based on local information density rather than fixed schedules. Experiments demonstrate that FLUID achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing training costs by orders of magnitude, effectively reconciling established AR foundations with efficient parallel generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/Oli-lab-nun/FLUID/tree/main.

AI.tldr: FLUID框架通过严格因果对齐机制，成功将预训练的自回归（AR）骨干网络适配到扩散模型范式，实现高效并行文本生成，并引入弹性步长机制动态调整去噪过程，大幅降低训练成本且达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽然能实现高效的并行文本生成，但其使用的双向注意力机制与预训练自回归模型在结构上不兼容，导致无法复用强大的AR预训练权重，需要从头进行昂贵的预训练。本文旨在弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出FLUID框架：(1) 严格因果对齐（Strictly Causal Alignment），实现从标准GPT风格检查点的无缝初始化；(2) 弹性步长机制（Elastic Horizons），基于信息熵动态调节去噪步长而非固定调度。
AI.result: FLUID达到SOTA性能，同时将训练成本降低数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: FLUID有效调和了已建立的自回归模型基础与高效并行生成之间的矛盾，为复用AR预训练权重到扩散模型提供了可行方案。

title: Architecture-driven Shift: towards a lightweight selector for capturing the trends of logit shift
summary: Continual Learning (CL) is a practical paradigm to utilize power of deep pre-trained neural networks, but which pre-trained model has a better ability to balance ``Plasticity-Stability", deserving to be chosen? The logit shift serves as a natural proxy because it represents the logit shift in CL scenarios. However, obtaining the logit shift requires huge computational cost, which hinders large-scale model selection. Existing theoretical analyses fail to offer an efficient alternative because of the assumption of uniform hidden layer widths, which ignores the structural heterogeneity (variable width and depth) of real-world architectures. This raises a critical question: what theoretically relationship can be identified between heterogeneous architecture and logit shift on prior tasks (that the model has been trained on)? To answer the question, we decouple logit shift into architecture dependency and data dependency to establish our framework, which reveals that the combination of two dependency, defined as Architecture-driven Shift (ADS), that can capture the logit shift tendency well computable with few data samples. Specifically, for a well-optimized model on prior tasks, higher ADS is associated with a larger logit shift after training on the current task, which derived based on three mechanistic components: (1) spectral norm scaling of weight matrix gradients with layer width, (2) the optimization path length of the new task, and (3) the asymptotic task conflict in wide networks. Extensive empirical results across more than 175 diverse architectures demonstrate a strong monotonic correlation (the weakest Spearman's $r_s=0.731$) between ADS and logit shift. Practically, we demonstrate that ADS can serve as a lightweight proxy of the expected calibration error, which is a widely used metric for reliable CL model selection, on three datasets across six scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Architecture-driven Shift (ADS) 作为衡量持续学习中预训练模型塑性-稳定性平衡能力的轻量级代理指标。通过将 logit shift 解耦为架构依赖和数据依赖，ADS 能高效预测模型在持续学习中的行为，实验证明其与 logit shift 存在强单调相关（最低 Spearman $r_s=0.731$），并可作为期望校准误差的有效代理用于模型选择。
AI.motivation: 持续学习中需要选择能平衡"塑性-稳定性"的预训练模型，但现有方法计算 logit shift 成本极高，而理论分析因假设均匀隐藏层宽度而忽略实际架构的异质性（可变宽度和深度），无法提供高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 将 logit shift 解耦为架构依赖性和数据依赖性，定义 Architecture-driven Shift (ADS)。基于三个机制组件推导：(1) 权重矩阵梯度谱范数与层宽的缩放关系，(2) 新任务的优化路径长度，(3) 宽网络中的渐近任务冲突。仅需少量数据样本即可计算 ADS。
AI.result: 在超过175种不同架构上的实验表明，ADS 与 logit shift 之间存在强单调相关（最弱 Spearman $r_s=0.731$）。在三个数据集的六种场景中，ADS 可作为期望校准误差的有效轻量级代理，用于可靠的持续学习模型选择。
AI.conclusion: ADS 为持续学习中预训练模型选择提供了一种高效、理论支持且计算轻量的新指标，揭示了架构异质性与 logit shift 之间的理论关系，填补了现有理论分析的空白。

title: Discovery Agents for Real-Time Analytics: Toward Proactive Insight Systems
comment: Accepted at Supporting Our AI Overlords (SAO) at the ACM Conference on AI and Agentic Systems (CAIS), May 26 2026, San Jose, CS, USA
summary: Modern analytics systems are fundamentally reactive, requiring users to define queries over increasingly complex and continuously evolving data. In real-time streaming environments, this paradigm breaks down, as the space of potential insights becomes too large to enumerate manually. We present a multi-agent architecture for autonomous insight discovery over real-time data streams. The system implements a continuous discovery loop in which agents generate hypotheses, compile them into executable analytics, validate generated artifacts, and produce visualizations and deployable applications. The architecture leverages Apache Kafka for event-driven coordination, Apache Flink for stream processing, and large language models to implement specialized agents. A key contribution is a contract-driven design based on typed intermediate artifacts, enabling modularity, observability, lineage, and safer execution of dynamically generated analytics. Through use cases in retail, finance, and public data, we show how this architecture supports a shift from query-driven analytics to proactive, discovery-driven systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多智能体架构的自主洞察发现系统，利用LLM、Kafka和Flink在实时数据流中实现从被动查询到主动发现的范式转换。
AI.motivation: 传统分析系统是反应式的，需要用户手动定义查询，但在实时流式环境中，潜在洞察空间过大，无法穷举枚举，亟需一种自主发现机制。
AI.method: 构建多智能体架构，包含假设生成、编译执行、验证和可视化等智能体；采用Apache Kafka进行事件驱动协调，Flink进行流处理，LLM实现智能体；关键创新是基于类型化中间工件的契约驱动设计，保证模块化、可观测性、血缘追踪和安全执行。
AI.result: 在零售、金融和公共数据用例中验证了该架构从查询驱动向主动发现驱动转换的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该架构证明了将LLM与流处理系统结合，能够实现实时数据流的自主洞察发现，推动分析系统从反应式向主动式演进。

title: Hautus-Type Criteria for Controllability and Stabilizability of Backward-Structured Stochastic Systems
summary: This paper develops sharp Hautus-type criteria, stochastic counterparts of the classical Popov-Belevitch-Hautus test, for exact controllability and stabilizability of backwardstructured stochastic linear systems. The main finding is that the stochastic Hautus obstruction is not a left eigenvector, as in deterministic linear systems, nor an arbitrary symmetric eigenmatrix, but a positive semidefinite eigenmatrix of a Lyapunov-type operator. We prove that exact controllability is equivalent to the absence of such nonzero positive semidefinite eigenmatrices that are orthogonal to the control directions. This cone restriction is sharp: excluding all symmetric eigenmatrices with the same orthogonality property is sufficient but not necessary. We further show that stabilizability is characterized by the same cone-restricted Hautus condition imposed only on the nonstable spectral part of the Lyapunov-type operator. Thus the stochastic Hautus theory developed here is governed by a simultaneous spectral restriction and cone restriction. In addition to these criteria, we provide finite-rank and Gramian characterizations underlying exact controllability, establish the corresponding controllability decomposition, and show that exact controllability implies stabilizability.

AI.tldr: 本文针对后向随机线性系统，发展了精确可控性和可镇定性的尖刻Hautus型判据（随机PBH检验）。主要发现：随机Hautus障碍不是左特征向量或任意对称特征矩阵，而是Lyapunov型算子的正半定特征矩阵。精确可控性等价于不存在与控制方向正交的非零正半定特征矩阵；可镇定性的特征则是在非稳定谱部分施加相同锥约束的Hautus条件。
AI.motivation: 将确定性线性系统中经典的PBH测试（Popov-Belevitch-Hautus）推广到后向随机线性系统，解决随机框架下精确可控性与可镇定性的代数判据问题。
AI.method: 引入Lyapunov型算子的正半定特征矩阵概念，建立锥约束下的随机Hautus条件；同时结合有限秩刻画、Gramian刻画和可控性分解进行验证。
AI.result: （1）精确可控性等价于不存在非零正半定特征矩阵与所有控制方向正交；（2）可镇定性由非稳定谱部分的锥约束Hautus条件刻画；（3）发展了有限秩与Gramian刻画，证明了精确可控性蕴含可镇定性。
AI.conclusion: 随机Hautus理论受谱约束与锥约束双重支配，为后向随机线性系统的可控性与镇定性提供了充要的、尖锐的代数判据。

title: REC-CBM: Rubric-Aware Error-Correction Concept Bottleneck Models for Trustworthy Open-Ended Grading
summary: Open-ended grading is central to equitable and personalized education, yet manual grading remains time-consuming and costly, underscoring the need for automated grading systems. Although recent neural and large language model (LLM) based systems have demonstrated superior performance, they are typically black-box models whose scoring processes and rationales are difficult for educators to verify and trust. Concept bottleneck models (CBMs) have emerged as a promising approach by routing predictions through human-interpretable concepts, providing a mechanistic guarantee of transparency. However, standard CBMs are not tailored to open-ended grading: they do not explicitly model fine-grained rubric dimensions, inadequately capture the ordinal semantics of scoring scales, and neglect inherent reliability issues in human concept annotations. To address these limitations, we propose REC-CBM, a rubric-aware error-correction concept bottleneck model for trustworthy open-ended grading. REC-CBM introduces a rubric-aware concept encoder that learns concept-specific representations over responses and an ordinal pairwise calibration objective that preserves ranking structure among rubric dimensions. It further incorporates a latent concept error-correction module that denoises concept predictions before final grade prediction while preserving interpretability. Comprehensive experiments on publicly available datasets show that REC-CBM consistently improves grading performance and produces more faithful concept-level reasoning than both state-of-the-art baselines. Further analyses validate the contribution of each component and demonstrate the applicability in realistic educational settings. Overall, this work provides a practical, interpretable grading solution that enables educators to inspect, intervene in, and trust automated decisions, advancing more transparent and trustworthy education.

AI.tldr: 本文提出REC-CBM，一种基于概念瓶颈模型的可解释自动评分系统，通过引入rubric感知的概念编码器、有序对校准目标和潜在概念纠错模块，解决了开放型评分中的透明度、有序语义和标注噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 开放型评分对公平和个性化教育至关重要，但人工评分耗时且昂贵。现有神经模型和LLM方法虽性能优异，但作为黑盒模型，其评分过程和推理逻辑难以被教育工作者验证和信任。概念瓶颈模型（CBM）虽有透明性优势，但标准CBM未针对开放型评分特性进行设计，无法建模细粒度评分维度、缺乏评分尺度的有序语义，且忽略了人工概念标注的可靠性问题。
AI.method: 提出REC-CBM，包含三个核心组件：（1）rubric感知概念编码器，学习针对不同评分维度的概念表征；（2）有序对校准目标，保持评分维度间的排序结构；（3）潜在概念纠错模块，在保留可解释性的同时对概念预测进行去噪处理，再用于最终评分预测。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，REC-CBM在评分性能和概念级推理的可信度上均优于现有基线方法。消融实验验证了各组件贡献，并在真实教育场景中展示了适用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个实用且可解释的自动评分方案，使教育工作者能够审查、干预和信任自动化决策，推动了更透明、更可信的教育AI系统的发展。

title: Unsupervised Identification and Removal of Spurious Correlations During Fine-Tuning
summary: Fine-tuning a pretrained language model on a curated dataset can produce spurious correlations between the fine-tuning task and unintended latent factors -- such as misaligned personas or political slant -- that the curation procedure has entangled with the task. The model can latch onto these spurious correlations, leading to bias and reduced out-of-distribution generalisation. We prove that under reasonable assumptions on task complexity and the spurious correlation, such latent factors can be identified, without supervision, from the weights of a naive LoRA fine-tune. Existing approaches to removing bias, such as activation steering, remove identified factors from residual-stream activations, either at inference or during training. We argue, however, that the goal should be to remove the spurious correlation, not the latent factor itself, as the pretrained model may rely on it for genuine task signal. To enable this, we propose GRASP, GRadient projection of Associated Spurious Patterns, which prevents the model from acquiring new reliance on the identified latent factor while preserving any pretrained content along it. We validate on three fine-tuning tasks. The first two involve emergent misalignment, where fine-tuning on a narrow task -- in our case, writing insecure code and giving bad medical advice -- leads to misaligned responses on unrelated topics. Here our method completely removes misalignment in the insecure code case and reduces them by ~5x in the bad medical advice case, beating all baselines in the trade-off between misalignment-reduction and task-preservation. The last is a novel political-bias experiment, where fine-tuning on right-skewed Reddit financial-advice data causes political-lean drift on unrelated topics. Here our method reduces drift by more than half, while improving financial task performance, beating all baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRASP方法，通过梯度投影去除微调中产生的虚假相关性（如偏见、政治倾向），保留预训练模型的有用信号，在安全代码、医疗建议和政治偏见三个任务上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在特定数据集上微调时，会因数据收集过程引入的虚假相关性（如与任务无关的人设、政治倾向等）而产生偏差，影响模型在分布外数据上的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出GRASP（GRadient projection of Associated Spurious Patterns）方法，通过分析LoRA微调权重识别潜在虚假因子，再通过梯度投影防止模型学习到这些因子，同时保留预训练模型中已有的有用信号。
AI.result: 在不安全代码任务上完全消除偏差；在不良医疗建议任务上将偏差减少约5倍；在政治偏见任务上将漂移减少超过一半，同时提升金融任务性能，所有任务均优于基线。
AI.conclusion: GRASP能有效去除微调中产生的虚假相关性而不损害模型原有的有用能力，为提升语言模型的公平性和泛化性提供了新的思路。

title: Modeling Community Attitude through Reaction Tone: A Human-AI Collaborative Framework for Evaluating LLM Alignment with Linguistic Behaviors in Online Communities
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized as proxies for computational social analysis; yet, their ability to faithfully represent the "thick descriptions" (Geertz, 1973) of human communities remains a critical challenge. Current evaluations often reduce social identity to static labels, sidelining how real-world groups navigate social shifts. To bridge this gap, we introduce CARE (Community-Aware Reaction Evaluation), a reaction-centered framework that benchmarks LLM-simulated discourse against the authentic, event-contingent responses of distinct communities to real-world news. By characterizing a fine-grained spectrum of illocutionary tones and the underlying attitudes they manifest--validated through human-AI collaboration--our diagnosis reveals a persistent "realism gap": steering LLMs with explicit community prompts fails to inherently improve simulation fidelity. Analysis further identifies divergent behavioral signatures among frontier models, suggesting that current alignment strategies remain insufficient for capturing the sociolinguistic dynamics of online groups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CARE框架，通过评估LLM模拟不同社区对真实新闻事件的话语反应，发现存在"现实主义差距"——即使明确提示社区身份，LLM也无法忠实再现真实社区的社会语言动态。
AI.motivation: 现有评估将社会身份简化为静态标签，忽略了现实群体如何应对社会变迁；LLM作为社会分析代理的"厚描述"能力缺乏有效评估方法。
AI.method: 提出CARE框架，基于反应中心的方法，通过人类-AI协作验证的言外语气与潜在态度的细粒度频谱，将LLM模拟的话语与真实社区对新闻事件的反应进行基准对比。
AI.result: 发现持续存在的"现实主义差距"：即使用社区提示引导LLM，也无法本质上提升模拟的忠实度；前沿模型之间表现出不同的行为特征，表明当前的对齐策略不足以捕捉在线群体的社会语言动态。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM的对齐策略在捕捉社会语言动态方面存在根本性不足，需要新的方法弥合模拟与真实社区之间的差距。

title: Detect by Yourself: Self-Designing Agentic Workflows for Few-Shot Graph Anomaly Detection
summary: Graph anomaly detection aims to identify anomaly nodes in attributed graphs and plays an important role in real-world applications. However, existing graph anomaly detection methods still face two key challenges: 1) fixed pipelines, which restrict their adaptability across different graph tasks under limited supervision; 2) weak evidence, which prevents them from explicitly incorporating contextual and structural anomaly signals into the detection process. In this paper, we propose a novel framework, self-designing agentic workflows for few-shot graph anomaly detection (SignGAD). Specifically, we propose a novel paradigm that reformulates graph anomaly detection task from training a fixed anomaly detector to designing task-conditioned detection workflows. By constructing detection workflows, SignGAD selects suitable graph encodings and detector designs to exploit task-specific anomaly evidence. Meanwhile, we introduce a guarded final refit strategy to refine the selected workflow by calibrating refit acceptance, enhancing reliability under limited supervision. Extensive experiments conducted on several real-world datasets demonstrate that SignGAD achieves strong performance against state-of-the-art methods, highlighting its effectiveness on graph anomaly detection tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出SignGAD框架，通过自设计代理工作流将图异常检测从固定检测器训练转为任务条件检测流程设计，在少样本场景下实现强性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图异常检测方法面临两大挑战：1）固定流水线限制了在不同图任务下的适应性；2）弱证据无法显式整合上下文和结构异常信号。
AI.method: 提出SignGAD框架：1）将异常检测任务重构为设计任务条件检测工作流，通过选择合适图编码和检测器设计来挖掘任务特定异常证据；2）引入带保护的最终重拟合策略，通过校准重拟合接受度来增强少样本下的可靠性。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上，SignGAD相比现有最先进方法取得了强性能表现。
AI.conclusion: SignGAD通过工作流自设计范式有效解决了固定流水线和弱证据问题，在图异常检测任务上展现出显著优势。

title: Agyn: An Open-Source Platform for AI Agents with Scalable On-Demand Execution, Agent Definition as a Code, and Zero-Trust Access
summary: As organizations move toward production deployments of AI agents, which execute non-deterministic workflows, maintain stateful sessions, and often operate with privileged access to internal services, the engineering challenge shifts from building individual agents to operating them at scale with proper isolation, governance, and security. In this paper we present Agyn, an open-source platform designed around three key principles tailored for agent workloads: a signal-driven, stateful serverless runtime on Kubernetes; a Terraform provider for agent and harness definition; and a security model grounded in zero-trust and least-privilege principles. Agyn is agent-agnostic, model-agnostic, and cloud-agnostic.

AI.tldr: Agyn是一个开源的AI Agent平台，基于Kubernetes的信号驱动有状态无服务器运行时、Terraform基础设施管理以及零信任安全模型，支持跨云、跨模型、跨Agent的通用部署。
AI.motivation: 企业在将AI Agent投入生产时面临非确定性工作流、有状态会话管理、高权限访问等工程挑战，现有方案在隔离性、治理性和安全性方面不足，需要专门针对Agent负载的平台。
AI.method: 提出Agyn平台，三大核心设计：1) 基于Kubernetes的信号驱动、有状态无服务器运行时；2) 使用Terraform provider定义Agent及其"harness"（安全约束框架）；3) 基于零信任和最小权限原则的安全模型。平台对Agent、模型和云环境均无绑定。
AI.result: Agyn实现了Agent工作负载在生产环境中的规模化运营，提供了隔离性、治理能力和安全保障，同时保持了跨平台兼容性。
AI.conclusion: Agyn为AI Agent的生产级部署提供了一个开源、云无关、模型无关的解决方案，核心价值在于将Agent运维的工程挑战系统化地转化为平台能力。

title: Machine Learning for Exact Time Series Aggregation in Generation Expansion Planning with Energy Storage
summary: This paper investigates a generation expansion planning (GEP) problem encompassing renewable, thermal, and storage technologies while simultaneously optimizing market participation, operational expenditures, and capital investment. To alleviate the computational burden of the GEP model, we propose a novel iterative time series aggregation (TSA) method that constructs a temporally aggregated counterpart of the original full-scale GEP model. Unlike traditional TSA methods, which are purely heuristic, our method enables the assessment of the optimality gap between the aggregated and full-scale models. Moreover, by leveraging machine learning-based estimates of the GEP model marginal costs, the algorithm guides TSA to construct an aggregated model that preserves the active constraints of its full-scale counterpart, which has been shown to yield exact temporal aggregation. Numerical results show that incorporating estimated marginal costs as clustering features substantially improves the quality of temporal aggregation compared with traditional TSA methods that rely solely on input data analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合机器学习估计边际成本的迭代时间序列聚合方法，用于解决发电扩展规划问题的计算负担，相比传统TSA方法能更优地保留原模型的活跃约束并评估最优性间隙。
AI.motivation: 发电扩展规划（GEP）问题计算负担巨大，传统时间序列聚合（TSA）方法仅基于输入数据分析且为纯启发式，无法评估聚合模型与原始模型之间的最优性差距。
AI.method: 提出一种迭代时间序列聚合方法，利用机器学习估计GEP模型的边际成本，以此作为聚类特征引导TSA构建聚合模型，保留原模型中的活跃约束，实现精确的时间聚合。
AI.result: 数值结果显示，与传统仅依赖输入数据分析的TSA方法相比，将估计的边际成本纳入聚类特征显著提升了时间聚合的质量。
AI.conclusion: 该迭代TSA方法不仅能评估聚合模型与全规模模型之间的最优性差距，还能通过机器学习估计边际成本来保留活跃约束，从而实现精确的时间聚合。

title: LLM-assisted sentiment analysis for integrated computational and qualitative mixed methods education research: A case study of students' written reflection assignments
summary: Written reflection assignments give students valuable opportunities for critical self-assessment, meaning making, and learning processing. Additionally, such reflections provide rich data for qualitative education research. However, qualitative data can be time-consuming to analyze. It is even more time-intensive to qualitatively compare findings between different groups of participants, usually limiting comparison to, at most, one variable (e.g., binary gender). Large language models (LLMs) have recently begun to be critically evaluated for use as qualitative research assistants. Using a longitudinal case of written student reflections (n=151) from a study abroad program, we investigate how LLM-assisted sentiment analysis can enable longitudinal mixed-methods research combining computational and thematic analyses. First, statistical testing is used to quantitatively compare sentiment differences according to seven different student identity/lived experience variables. Then, these results inform qualitative data analysis to investigate the reasons underlying these differences. For the case of undergraduate students studying abroad, we found that prior experience living abroad was the only personal variable impacting students' sentiments of their verbal language and communication behaviors. This workflow has implications for how qualitative researchers can more easily probe multiple variables when comparing participants from different demographic groups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大语言模型辅助的情感分析工作流，能够高效地对比多个学生身份/生活经历变量对书面反思文本情感的影响。通过对151份留学项目学生反思的分析，发现仅有"先前海外生活经历"显著影响学生对语言交流行为的情感态度。
AI.motivation: 传统定性分析在比较不同群体时耗时巨大，通常只能对比单一变量（如二元性别）。需要一种方法能够同时探查多个变量，提高定性比较研究的效率。
AI.method: 采用纵向案例（n=151份学生反思），先用统计检验定量比较7种学生身份/生活经历变量的情感差异，再用LLM辅助的定性主题分析探究差异背后的原因，形成混合方法研究流程。
AI.result: 在海外留学本科生案例中，仅"先前海外生活经历"是影响学生对语言交流行为情感态度的显著个人变量，其他6个变量无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流使定性研究者能够更便捷地同时探查多个变量，突破传统单变量比较的局限，为纵向混合方法教育研究提供了高效的新范式。

title: Soft Specialists: $α$-Rényi Ensembles for Uncertainty-Aware LLM Post-Training
summary: Existing training approaches for large language models learn a single set of parameters, based on large volumes of data, which is typically heterogeneous, conflicting and often outright contradictory. As a result, the model is forced to compress conflicting goals, and inherent uncertainties into a single, averaged pattern of behaviour. We propose an $α$-Rényi variational framework for learning distributions over post-training parameters, offering an uncertainty-aware alternative to deep ensemble approaches. The resulting variational objective interpolates between classical variational Bayes and predictively oriented posterior learning, balancing between globally plausible individual models against systems of complementary specialists. We identify local stability criteria, demonstrating how model misspecification can make non-degenerate posterior spread locally favourable, manifesting contradictory or conflicting data as epistemic uncertainty. We apply our framework to LLM post-training, learning an ensemble of LoRA adapters attached to a shared, frozen base model, providing a scalable training procedure for both supervised fine-tuning and preference optimisation. Our approach enables training examples to be softly routed across ensemble members, promoting model specialisation and providing actionable uncertainty estimates across different tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于α-Rényi变分框架的方法，用于学习大语言模型后训练参数的分布，通过集成LoRA适配器实现模型专业化，并在不确定性估计方面优于传统深度集成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM训练方法使用单一参数集处理 heterogeneous、冲突甚至矛盾的训练数据，导致模型被迫将冲突目标和不确定性压缩为单一平均行为模式。
AI.method: 提出α-Rényi变分框架学习后训练参数的分布；该变分目标在经典变分贝叶斯与预测导向后验学习之间插值；在LLM后训练中，学习一组LoRA适配器（附着在共享冻结基座上），实现训练样本在集成成员间的软路由。
AI.result: 该方法实现了模型专业化，提供了可操作的不确定性估计；识别了局部稳定性准则，证明模型错误指定可使非退化后验扩散局部有利，将矛盾/冲突数据表现为认知不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为监督微调和偏好优化提供了可扩展的训练流程，在全局合理模型与互补专家系统之间取得平衡。

title: Intelligence as Managed Autonomy: Failure, Escalation, and Governance for Agentic AI Systems
summary: As autonomous and agentic AI systems scale in robotic and human-machine environments, managing hallucination and persistent but unjustified action remains an open challenge. Rather than attributing these failures solely to model or alignment limitations, this paper explores the architectural vulnerability of unbounded autonomy - the presumption that an agent should continue operating regardless of rising uncertainty. It introduces a theory of managed autonomy that defines intelligent behavior through the formal capacity to detect epistemic drift, suspend reasoning, attempt recovery, and ultimately surrender control when reliability diminishes. We instantiate this theory via the SMARt (Self-Managing Multi-tier Autonomous Reasoning with Regulated/Revoked transitions) model, a four-layer framework featuring Stable, Meta-cognitive, Assisted, and Regulated states. By developing a timed, guarded Petri net formulation, we establish theoretically bounded properties for the system, demonstrating how architecture can formally mandate escalation, constrain invalid outputs, and ensure governance reachability under specified conditions. We further analyze how incorporating domain-specific trigger sets across varied operational settings (e.g., healthcare, robotics, etc.) can systematically preserve safety, assuming completeness and soundness criteria are met. Because these triggers are designed to be adaptive, the SMARt model accommodates the safe, controlled expansion of an agent's operational scope over time. We conclude that formalizing failure management within the autonomy lifecycle is a crucial step toward realizing reliable and governed artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种管理自主AI系统幻觉与不合理行为的理论框架——SMARt模型，通过四层状态机（稳定、元认知、辅助、监管）和定时监控Petri网，形式化定义了智能体在不确定性上升时检测认知漂移、暂停推理、尝试恢复乃至放弃控制的能力，从而从架构层面保障系统安全与可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有自主AI系统在规模化部署中面临幻觉和持续不合理行动的难题，但以往研究多将其归因于模型能力或对齐不足。本文认为根本问题在于"无限自主"的架构缺陷——智能体在不确定性上升时仍被默认允许继续运作。因此需要从架构层面形式化定义故障管理机制。
AI.method: 提出SMARt模型，包含四个层级状态：Stable（稳定态）、Meta-cognitive（元认知态）、Assisted（辅助态）、Regulated（监管态）。采用定时监控Petri网形式化建模，为系统建立有界性理论证明，确保架构能够强制升级、约束无效输出、并在特定条件下保证治理可达性。同时引入领域特定的自适应触发集，在不同操作场景（如医疗、机器人等）中维护安全性。
AI.result: 从理论上证明了该架构能够形式化地强制智能体在不确定性升高时进行状态升级、约束无效行为产出，并保证治理机制在指定条件下的可达性。通过领域特定的自适应触发集，系统能够在满足完备性和正确性条件的前提下，在不同应用场景中系统性地维护安全，并允许智能体在可控范围内安全扩展操作范围。
AI.conclusion: 在自主智能体的生命周期中形式化故障管理，是实现可靠、可治理人工智能的关键一步。将自主权管理从模型/对齐层面的修补提升到架构层面的形式化保障，是构建可信AI系统的重要方向。

title: EvoSpec: Evolving Speculative Decoding via Real-Time Vocabulary and Parameter AdaptationTarget
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model inference via a draft-then-verify paradigm, yet the output projection layer becomes a bottleneck as vocabulary sizes scale. While existing static pruning methods effectively reduce this overhead, they suffer from precipitous drops in acceptance rate in specialized domains or topic-switching scenarios due to their inability to capture dynamic distribution shifts. To address this, we introduce EvoSpec, a framework that enables real-time evolution of the draft model through dynamic vocabulary and parameter adaptation. Unlike static or purely retrieval-based approaches, EvoSpec employs a context-aware mechanism that retrieves critical long-tail tokens via efficient semantic and statistical indexing. Furthermore, we propose a lightweight online alignment strategy utilizing curriculum learning to continually minimize the distributional gap between the draft and target models. Extensive evaluations across specialized domains (coding, law, and medicine) confirm that EvoSpec overcomes the limitations of static baselines. On EAGLE-3, it achieves a 1.13x speedup in these settings over the state-of-the-art static baseline FR-Spec, with 27\% lower memory overhead than standard online adaptation.

AI.tldr: EvoSpec提出了一种动态进化草稿模型的框架，通过实时词汇和参数自适应来解决静态剪枝方法在专业领域和话题切换场景中接受率骤降的问题，在EAGLE-3上相比最先进静态基线FR-Spec实现1.13倍加速，内存开销降低27%。
AI.motivation: 现有静态剪枝方法在专业领域或话题切换场景中无法捕捉动态分布偏移，导致接受率急剧下降，而输出投影层随词表规模扩大成为推理瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出EvoSpec框架，包含：(1) 上下文感知机制，通过高效的语义和统计索引检索关键长尾词元；(2) 轻量级在线对齐策略，利用课程学习持续最小化草稿模型与目标模型之间的分布差距。
AI.result: 在编码、法律、医学等专业领域评估中，EvoSpec在EAGLE-3上比FR-Spec实现1.13倍加速，且比标准在线适应方法内存开销低27%。
AI.conclusion: EvoSpec通过动态词汇和参数自适应有效克服了静态方法的局限性，在专业领域推理加速方面取得了显著提升，同时保持了较低的内存开销。

title: HEAL: Resilient and Self-* Hub-based Learning
summary: Decentralized learning enhances privacy, scalability, and fault tolerance by distributing data and computation across nodes. A popular approach is Federated learning, which relies on a central aggregator, yet faces challenges such as server vulnerabilities, scalability issues, privacy risks and most importantly, the single point of failure. Alternatively Gossip Learning and Epidemic Learning offer fully decentralization through peer-to-peer exchanges of model updates, ensuring robustness and privacy, at the price of slower model convergence. In this work, we introduce a novel decentralized learning framework called HEAL. HEAL is the first cross-layer decentralized learning framework that exploits an optimized self-organizing and self-healing underlying P2P overlay combining the strengths of Federated Learning, Gossip and Epidemic Learning. Leveraging the recently proposed Elevator algorithm, HEAL promotes dynamically chosen nodes to act as aggregators. Through simulations, we demonstrate that HEAL has similar performances to that of Federated Learning in crash-free settings, while being fully decentralized and fault-tolerant. In crash and churn prone environments HEAL outperforms Gossip and Epidemic Learning.

AI.tldr: HEAL是一种跨层去中心化学习框架，结合了联邦学习、Gossip和Epidemic学习的优势，通过动态提升节点为聚合器，在无故障时性能接近联邦学习，在有节点故障时优于Gossip和Epidemic学习。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习依赖中心聚合器，存在单点故障、可扩展性差、隐私风险等问题；而Gossip和Epidemic学习虽完全去中心化但收敛速度慢。作者希望设计一种既保持完全去中心化鲁棒性，又具备接近联邦学习性能的框架。
AI.method: 提出HEAL框架：利用Elevator算法动态选择节点作为聚合器，构建自组织、自修复的对等网络覆盖层，融合联邦学习、Gossip和Epidemic三种学习范式的优势，实现跨层去中心化学习。
AI.result: 在无故障场景下，HEAL性能接近联邦学习；在节点崩溃和高变动（churn）环境中，HEAL性能优于Gossip学习和Epidemic学习。
AI.conclusion: HEAL成功实现了完全去中心化与高容错性，同时保持了良好的学习性能，为解决去中心化学习中的收敛速度与鲁棒性权衡提供了有效方案。

title: You Are in Control of Your State: Why Human Outcomes Are Controllable Through Causal State Intervention
comment: 20 pages, 12 figures, 37 references. Companion to a prior SSRN preprint on causal architecture for human modelling
summary:
A central puzzle for the behavioural sciences and for human-facing artificial intelligence is the persistence of within-person variability. The same individual, presented with the same observable input, produces different outcomes on different occasions, and different individuals produce divergent outcomes that no observable covariate fully predicts. We argue that this variability belongs in the dynamic latent state of the person, and that human outcomes are controllable in a precise and operational sense through interventions that target the state and its weighting at the moment a decision is being formed.
  We define a state as the time-indexed weighting vector over the dimensions that govern how an individual's biology, physiology, and neuropsychology process the next event into a decision and an outcome. The relationship between state, decision, and outcome is causal rather than correlational. The weighting vector is dynamic at sub-daily timescales. The conscious channel through which outcomes are reportable is a narrow attentional bottleneck whose contents are themselves state-dependent.
