To address this limitation, we formulate ECG representation learning from an information-theoretic perspective and derive a tractable objective that jointly preserves signal structure and integrates clinical semantics. Based on this principle, we propose \textbf{MERIT} (Multimodal ECG Representation via Information Theory), a dual-branch pretraining framework combining masked ECG modeling with ECG--text contrastive alignment. Extensive experiments on PTB-XL and additional benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over prior methods, including gains exceeding $3%$ F1 on PTB-XL All and $5%$ F1 on SubClass classification. In zero-shot evaluation, MERIT further improves performance by up to $ +2.66\%$ AUC and $ +2.11\%$ F1 on PTB-XL SubClass, while also demonstrating robustness under multiple distribution-shift settings. Moreover, leveraging the learned ECG representations for ECG-conditioned clinical text generation with large language models improves text quality across several metrics, including ROUGE and METEOR. Together, these results demonstrate that MERIT learns more informative and clinically meaningful ECG representations, particularly for fine-grained clinical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MERIT，一种基于信息论的多模态ECG表征学习框架，通过掩码建模与文本对比学习联合保留信号结构和临床语义，在分类、零样本和文本生成任务上均取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态方法将ECG信号与临床报告对齐以融入诊断语义，但临床报告未能保留ECG波形中从粗粒度诊断类别到细粒度形态的丰富生理结构信息。
AI.method: 从信息论视角推导可优化目标，提出MERIT双分支预训练框架，结合掩码ECG建模与ECG-文本对比对齐。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL上F1提升超3%（All）和5%（SubClass）；零样本AUC提升+2.66%、F1提升+2.11%；ECG条件文本生成在ROUGE和METEOR上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: MERIT学习到更具信息量和临床意义的ECG表征，尤其适用于细粒度临床任务，并在分布偏移下表现鲁棒。

title: Hierarchical Prompt-Domain Control and Learning for Resource-Constrained Agentic Language Models
summary: Large Language Models are increasingly deployed inside agentic systems, where they must follow structured protocols, adapt to evolving states, and operate under memory, latency, and cost constraints. In such regimes, prompt extension is unreliable: growing contexts can push compact models outside their effective prompt domain, while deployment-time fine-tuning remains limited by scarce data and compute. We propose a hierarchical control-and-learning framework in which a compact model is first distilled to learn the required output schema, then supervised online by an oracle-controller loop. The controller monitors protocol validity and semantic performance, projects accumulated histories into a feasible prompt domain, and triggers lightweight oracle-supervised fine-tuning under drift. This separates schema learning for communication compatibility from semantic adaptation for task-level correction. We formalize prompt-domain feasibility and attention-induced saturation, motivating control of the effective prompt state rather than reliance on nominal context length. Using Multi-Fidelity Bayesian Optimization as a controlled sequential testbed, we characterize a core deployment failure mode and show improved reliability and cost-efficiency over non-hierarchical, distillation-only, and non-distilled baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种分层控制与学习框架，通过蒸馏让紧凑模型学习输出格式，再通过在线控制器监督微调，在智能体部署场景中提升可靠性并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在智能体系统中面临结构化协议、状态变化、记忆/延迟/成本等约束，提示扩展不可靠（上下文超出小模型有效范围），部署时微调受限于数据不足和计算资源。
AI.method: 分层控制-学习框架：(1) 先将紧凑模型蒸馏学习输出模式； (2) 由控制器在线监督，监控协议有效性和语义性能，将历史序列投影到可行提示域，当发生漂移时触发轻量级微调； (3) 分离模式学习（通信兼容性）与语义适应（任务级纠正）。
AI.result: 在基于多保真贝叶斯优化的受控序列测试中，刻画了核心部署失败模式，相比非分层、仅蒸馏、非蒸馏基线，展示了更高的可靠性和成本效率。
AI.conclusion: 形式化了提示域可行性和注意力饱和现象，强调控制有效提示状态而非依赖名义上下文长度的重要性。

title: Preference-Shaped Expected Hypervolume and R2 Improvement: Exact Computation and Monotonicity
summary: This paper studies preference-shaped expected improvement criteria for Bayesian multiobjective optimization. We consider two indicator families which are often used for similar algorithmic purposes, but which are geometrically different. The hypervolume indicator is based on a dystopian reference point and measures dominated volume in objective space. The R2 indicator is based on a utopian point and evaluates approximation sets through weighted Tchebycheff scalarization envelopes. The purpose of the paper is to make precise which preference transformations preserve exact computation, Pareto compatibility, and monotonicity properties, and which transformations change the underlying geometry. On the hypervolume side, we revisit canonical EHVI through the Deng representation, formulate product-density weighted EHVI in desirability coordinates, discuss cone-based EHVI as ordinary EHVI after a linear cone transformation, and separate these cases from truncated EHVI, where variance monotonicity may fail. On the R2 side, we prove that exact integral R2 improvement is not, in general, an ordinary objective-space weighted hypervolume. The obstruction is lower-dimensional: Lebesgue-density hypervolume cannot see certain boundary contributions that Tchebycheff scalarizations still detect. We then show that exact integral R2 improvement is exactly a scalarization-space volume, namely the measure of the Tchebycheff shadow between the incumbent scalarization envelope and the reference envelope. This representation yields finite-sum ER2I algorithms for discrete R2, quadrature methods for exact integral R2, and an achievement-space Gaussian surrogate formulation in which ER2I is an integral of scalar Gaussian expected improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了贝叶斯多目标优化中偏好塑造的期望改进准则，分析了超体积指标与R2指标两种几何不同的指标族在精确计算、Pareto兼容性、单调性等方面的保留与变化，并证明了精确积分R2改进本质上是一种标量化空间体积而非目标空间加权超体积。
AI.motivation: 多目标贝叶斯优化中，超体积期望改进（EHVI）和R2期望改进（ER2I）是两种常用但几何不同的准则。本文旨在精确厘清在不同偏好变换下，哪些性质（精确计算、Pareto兼容性、单调性）得以保留，哪些几何特性发生变化，从而为研究者提供理论指导。
AI.method: 从超体积和R2两个维度展开分析。超体积方面，回顾Deng表示下的EHVI、乘积密度加权的EHVI、锥形EHVI及截断EHVI；R2方面，证明ER2I并非加权超体积，而是标量化空间中的体积（Tchebycheff阴影的测度），并提出离散R2的有限和算法、精确积分R2的求积方法以及目标空间高斯代理公式。
AI.result: 1) 厘清了超体积族各类变体在精确计算、Pareto兼容性和单调性方面的性质差异；2) 证明了精确积分ER2I不是目标空间中的加权超体积，其障碍在于低维边界贡献；3) 给出了ER2I的标量化空间体积表示，并推导出相应的算法框架。
AI.conclusion: 超体积指标与R2指标虽然都可用于多目标优化，但其几何本质不同：前者是目标空间中的体积（基于反乌托邦参考点），后者是标量化空间中的体积（基于乌托邦点）。这一认识有助于研究者根据不同需求选择合适的指标和算法。

title: Auditing Stance Asymmetry in Generative Explanations
summary: Bias evaluation for language models has made substantial progress on bounded comparisons, such as overt derogation, stereotype association, or label-sensitive differences under controlled substitutions. Open-ended explanations raise a different problem: they guide interpretation by assigning responsibility, legitimacy, context, and grievance. A model can avoid hostile language while making one side structurally understandable and another personally at fault, overreacting, or less worth taking seriously. We call this stance-bearing asymmetry in generative explanations. We propose Symmetry Decomposition Evaluation (SDE), which tests paired situations with concrete group labels, structural-role rewrites, and explicit support or counter-evidence. In a controlled 32-family prototype suite, this decomposition shows that surface differences are not all alike: some weaken under structural or evidence control, while others remain as stable differences in how the model assigns blame, context, or legitimacy. Targeted case review and judge comparison suggest a broader difficulty for evaluating open-ended framing asymmetries: judge readings shift across operationalizations, and scalar scores can flatten distinctions that readers use to interpret explanatory stance. SDE therefore reframes generative bias evaluation as an audit of explanatory stance -- what stance each side receives, how it changes under decomposition, and where automatic scoring becomes unstable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出对称性分解评估（SDE），用于检测生成式大模型在开放式解释中的立场不对称偏见——模型可能通过归因、合法性和背景的分配，使一方被理解而另一方被指责，即使表面语言没有敌意。SDE通过配对测试、结构角色重写和证据控制来分解这种不对称性，并发现自动评分在捕捉解释立场时存在不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有偏见评估主要集中在显性贬损、刻板关联或标签敏感性等有界比较，但忽略了生成式解释中更微妙的立场不对称——模型可以避免敌对语言，却通过归因责任、赋予合法性和背景叙述的方式，让一方显得合理、另一方被指责或不被重视。
AI.method: 提出对称性分解评估（SDE），包含三项核心操作：1）配对测试（具体群体标签对照）；2）结构角色重写（交换双方的结构性角色）；3）显式支持或反证控制。在32个族的原型套件上进行 controlled 实验，结合案例审查和多种裁判比较分析。
AI.result: 表面差异并非一致：部分在结构或证据控制下减弱，另一些则保持稳定的归因差异。裁判的解读会随操作化方式变化，标量评分会抹平读者用于理解解释立场的细微区分。
AI.conclusion: SDE将生成式偏见评估重新定义为对解释立场的审计——关注每一方获得何种立场、在分解下如何变化，以及自动评分在何处变得不稳定，从而揭示传统评估指标难以捕捉的深层偏见。

title: Variance-Adaptive Optimal Algorithm for Reinforcement Learning with Multinomial Logit Function Approximation
summary: Reinforcement learning with multinomial logistic (MNL) function approximation has become an important framework due to its flexibility and broad applicability. While existing studies have established regret guarantees under worst-case analysis, they do not capture how performance depends on the variability of the interaction between the learner and the environment. In this paper, we develop a new theoretical analysis for MNL-based Markov decision processes that yields explicit variance-adaptive regret bounds. Our algorithm is computationally efficient and achieves the instance-wise optimal rate of regret, narrowing the gap between upper and lower bounds. Our numerical experiments validate that our method learns optimal policies more efficiently than conventional approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文针对基于多项逻辑（MNL）函数逼近的强化学习问题，提出了新的方差自适应遗憾界理论分析，所提算法计算高效且实现了实例级最优遗憾率，数值实验验证了其高效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅在最坏情况分析下建立遗憾保证，未能捕捉学习器与环境交互可变性对性能的影响，缺乏方差自适应的理论分析。
AI.method: 针对MNL-based MDP开发新的理论分析框架，推导显式方差自适应遗憾界，设计计算高效的算法。
AI.result: 实现了实例级最优遗憾率，缩小了上下界之间的差距；数值实验表明比传统方法更高效地学习最优策略。
AI.conclusion: 方差自适应分析能更准确地刻画算法性能，所提方法在理论上和实验上均优于传统最坏情况分析方法。

title: Disentangling Language Roles in Multilingual LLM Task Execution
summary: Multilingual LLMs are increasingly used when instruction, source content, and required response languages do not coincide. Existing benchmarks have expanded multilingual instruction-following evaluation, but they rarely isolate these three roles within a fully crossed design. We introduce MTM-Bench, a controlled benchmark for language-conditioned task execution in which each instance is defined by a triplet \((L_{\text{instr}}, L_{\text{content}}, L_{\text{resp}})\). Across English, Spanish, and Chinese, MTM-Bench enumerates all 27 triplets and contains 2{,}430 instances per model across semantic reversal, final-state extraction, and language purity with update realization. We evaluate 20 frontier and open-weight LLMs using decomposed metrics for semantic correctness, target-language adherence, constraint satisfaction, contamination ratio, and joint success, with scoring validated by a targeted human audit. The fully crossed design reveals that degradation is organized by the role a language occupies in the task structure, not merely by mismatch count. The response-language role is the dominant axis of variation, and a single response-slot mismatch accounts for most degradation. The response-only and full-mismatch comparison suggests that mismatch count is not a monotonic predictor of difficulty, with model-level ordering varying across systems. Task families fail through distinct channels, showing that semantic correctness alone does not capture reliable multilingual task execution.

AI.tldr: MTM-Bench是一个细粒度的多语言任务执行基准，通过完全交叉的实验设计（27种语言角色三元组）系统评估了LLM在多语言指令、内容和响应不匹配场景下的表现，发现响应语言角色是退化主导因素，且不匹配数量并非单调预测难度。
AI.motivation: 现有的多语言指令跟随基准很少在完全交叉设计中隔离指令语言、源内容语言和响应语言这三种角色，无法系统揭示语言不匹配对任务执行的真正影响机制。
AI.method: 构建MTM-Bench基准，定义三元组 (L_instr, L_content, L_resp)，覆盖英语、西班牙语、中文共27种组合，包含2,430个实例/模型，评估三类任务（语义反转、最终状态提取、语言纯度更新），使用分解指标（语义正确性、目标语言遵从、约束满足、污染比、联合成功）进行评估。
AI.result: 1) 退化由语言在任务结构中的角色决定，而非单纯的不匹配数量；2) 响应语言角色是主导变异轴，单一响应槽不匹配造成大部分退化；3) 不匹配数量不是单调的难度预测指标，模型排序因系统而异；4) 不同任务族通过不同渠道失效，语义正确性不能完全反映多语言任务执行的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了多语言LLM在跨语言任务执行中的结构化退化模式，强调评估时应关注语言角色而非仅关注不匹配数量，并为构建更可靠的多语言系统提供了细粒度评测框架。

title: Gradient Transformer: Learning to Generate Updates for LLMs
summary: Many organizations lack computational resources to fine-tune large language models (LLMs) on private (unshareable) data for better utility, while fine-tuning tiny language models (TinyLMs) alone performs poorly. To address this bottleneck, we propose a data-free knowledge distillation framework that generates LLM update vectors based on TinyLMs fine-tuned on private data. An update vector is a vector of parameter changes from an initial model to its fine-tuned version on a dataset, capturing the effect of cumulative gradient steps during fine-tuning. The key idea of our framework is a novel Gradient Transformer that transforms TinyLM's update vectors into LLM's update vectors. As derived from shadow datasets, Grad-Transformer captures the correlation between TinyLM and LLM update vectors, enabling third-party providers to generate LLM update vectors given the organization's TinyLM update vectors without accessing the organization's private data. The framework supports multi-organization collaboration to jointly update LLMs, improving performance and cost-efficiency. Extensive experiments across language modeling and reasoning tasks show that Grad-Transformer remarkably outperforms state-of-the-art knowledge distillation baselines, even under strict differential privacy protection.

AI.tldr: 提出一种数据无关的知识蒸馏框架Grad-Transformer，通过梯度变换将微调后TinyLM的更新向量映射为LLM的更新向量，使资源受限的组织无需共享私有数据即可更新大型语言模型。
AI.motivation: 许多组织缺乏计算资源对LLM进行微调以提升在私有数据上的效用，而单独微调TinyLM效果不佳，因此需要一种高效、保护隐私的模型更新方法。
AI.method: 提出Grad-Transformer，基于影子数据集学习TinyLM与LLM更新向量之间的关联，将组织微调后的TinyLM更新向量转换为LLM更新向量，无需访问私有数据，支持多组织协作联合更新。
AI.result: 在语言建模和推理任务上，Grad-Transformer显著优于现有知识蒸馏基线方法，即使在严格的差分隐私保护下仍表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Grad-Transformer有效解决了资源受限组织的LLM个性化更新难题，兼顾性能提升与隐私保护，为数据无关的知识蒸馏提供了新范式。

title: DeepSciVerify: Verifying Scientific Claim--Citation Alignment via LLM-Driven Evidence Escalation
summary: Misalignment between claims and their cited evidence is a common failure mode in reports generated by large language models, limiting their reliability in scientific and other high-stakes settings. We present DeepSciVerify, a two-stage pipeline for scientific claim-citation verification that combines abstract-level reasoning with selective escalation to passage-level evidence. The system first verifies claims using the abstract and defers uncertain cases, retrieving and analyzing full-text passages only when necessary. This design leverages complementary behaviors across LLMs, as some models are more conservative while others are more decisive under uncertainty. On the SCitance benchmark, DeepSciVerify achieves 86.7 Micro-F1, outperforming strong abstract-only baselines by +4.5 points while resolving 67% of instances without full-text retrieval. These results suggest that selective evidence escalation improves both accuracy and efficiency in claim-citation verification.

AI.tldr: 提出了DeepSciVerify，一种两阶段科学声明-引用验证流水线，通过抽象级推理与选择性升级到段落级证据相结合，在SCitance基准上达到86.7 Micro-F1，比抽象级基线高4.5点，且67%的实例无需全文检索。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型生成的报告中，声明与其引用证据之间经常出现错位，限制了其在科学等高风险场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 两阶段流水线：先用摘要级推理验证声明，对不确定情况再选择性升级，检索并分析全文段落。利用不同LLM在不确定性下的互补行为（保守vs果断）。
AI.result: 在SCitance基准上，Micro-F1达86.7%，比纯摘要基线高4.5点，67%的实例无需全文检索即可解决。
AI.conclusion: 选择性证据升级能在声明-引用验证中同时提升准确性和效率。

title: Learning Approximate Solutions to Multiparametric Generalized Nash Equilibrium Problems
summary: We propose a learning-based approach for approximating solution mappings of multiparametric generalized Nash equilibrium problems (GNEPs) with coupling in both objectives and constraints. Rather than solving a standard regression problem on a training dataset of GNEP solutions, which are expensive and possibly difficult to collect, we use the Nikaido-Isoda (NI) gap function as a training loss, which requires only best-response data. To avoid bilevel optimization, a value-function surrogate approximates each agent's optimal best-response cost and is substituted into the NI loss, yielding a single-level learning problem. Learning approximate solutions to standard multiparametric programming problems is a special case of the approach. We also establish new sufficient conditions for the existence of a continuous parametric variational GNE selection under a strong variational stability assumption that generalizes strong monotonicity. The trained neural network delivers approximate GNE solutions with speedups of several orders of magnitude over online solvers. Numerical experiments on different problem classes confirm the effectiveness of the approach. A Python library is available at https://github.com/bemporad/mpfit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的方法来近似求解多参数广义纳什均衡问题（GNEPs），利用Nikaido-Isoda间隙函数作为训练损失，避免昂贵的均衡数据收集，并通过值函数代理将双层优化简化为单层学习问题，实现数量级加速。
AI.motivation: 传统求解多参数GNEPs的在线求解器计算成本高，而收集大量均衡解作为训练数据的回归方法同样昂贵且困难。因此需要一种无需预计算均衡解、高效且可泛化的近似求解方法。
AI.method: 使用Nikaido-Isoda间隙函数作为训练损失函数（仅需最优响应数据）；引入值函数代理近似每个智能体的最优最优响应成本，将双层优化转化为单层学习问题；建立强变分稳定性假设下连续参数变分GNE选择存在的充分条件。
AI.result: 训练后的神经网络相比在线求解器实现数个数量级的加速；在不同问题类别上的数值实验验证了方法的有效性；提供了Python库。标准多参数规划问题的近似求解是该方法的一个特例。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于学习的GNEP近似求解方法，通过创新的损失函数设计和问题转化，有效克服了数据获取困难和计算复杂度问题，在保持一定精度的同时大幅提升求解速度，为多参数博弈均衡的实时应用提供了可行方案。

title: MIRA: A Bilingual Benchmark for Medical Information Response Audit
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to provide public-facing health information, yet existing safety evaluations overlook whether responses preserve comparable medical information across different user phrasings of the same question. To address this, we introduce the Medical Information Response Audit (MIRA), a bilingual, controlled benchmark that assesses whether LLMs provide comparable medical information across user-side language, register, and health literacy signals. MIRA contains 4,320 prompts built from 60 medically reviewed, low-risk health questions. Across five mainstream LLMs, models answered all medical questions, but responses to low health-literacy signals consistently omitted more key information, provided fewer concrete next steps, and offered less support for independent judgment. We term this pattern Differential Information Dilution (DID). Language effects are model-specific rather than uniformly worse for non-English prompts. A comparison with 300 real-world health queries provides preliminary evidence of rank-order validity. A knowledge-guided mitigation prompt reduces information dilution for most models, with the largest reductions in underinformative simplification observed for Claude (~8%) and Qwen (~6%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIRA基准测试，发现LLM在回答低健康素养用户的问题时，会系统性遗漏关键医疗信息（即“差异性信息稀释”DID），并验证了知识引导提示可缓解此问题。
AI.motivation: 现有安全评估未能检验LLM对不同措辞（尤其是低健康素养表达）的同一医疗问题是否提供可比信息，存在信息公平性隐患。
AI.method: 构建双语、受控的MIRA基准（4320条提示，60个医学审查问题），评估LLM在语言、语域和健康素养信号维度上的信息提供一致性。
AI.result: 所有模型回答全部问题，但对低健康素养提示始终遗漏更多关键信息、提供更少具体步骤和自主判断支持；语言影响因模型而异；知识引导提示可减少信息稀释（Claude约8%，Qwen约6%）。
AI.conclusion: LLM存在系统性信息稀释偏差，对低健康素养用户不利，需针对性缓解；MIRA为评估医疗信息公平性提供了有效工具。

title: Bridging Maximum Likelihood and Optimal Transport for Efficient Inference and Model Selection in Stochastic Block Models
summary: We study inference in stochastic block models (SBMs) through the lens of optimal transport (OT). We first establish that maximum likelihood variational inference (MLVI) can be interpreted as a semi-relaxed Gromov-Wasserstein (srGW) projection with entropic regularization. While this formulation yields accurate clustering, the entropic regularization prevents transport plans to be sparse, hindering intrinsic model selection. Consequently, we investigate unregularized srGW estimators, and prove that they consistently recover both the SBM connectivity matrix and latent cluster assignments in the asymptotic regime. However, this asymptotic property does not translate into reliable model selection in finite samples, and calls for additional mechanisms to promote sparsity in the inferred cluster proportions. We empirically show that such a regularized formulation yields estimators that simultaneously recover model parameters and select the number of clusters in a single optimization problem, thereby avoiding costly grid search or heuristic model selection procedures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机块模型(SBM)的最优传输(OT)视角，提出半松弛Gromov-Wasserstein(srGW)投影用于变分推断，并探讨了无正则化与稀疏正则化估计器的性质。
AI.motivation: 旨在解决SBM推断中模型选择与参数估计的联合优化问题，避免昂贵的网格搜索或启发式模型选择。
AI.method: 1. 将最大似然变分推断(MLVI)解释为带熵正则化的srGW投影；2. 研究无正则化srGW估计器的一致性；3. 引入稀疏正则化机制促进聚类比例的稀疏性。
AI.result: 无正则化srGW估计器在渐近条件下可一致恢复SBM连通矩阵和潜在聚类分配，但在有限样本下模型选择不可靠；引入稀疏正则化后，可在单一优化问题中同时恢复模型参数并选择聚类数量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的正则化srGW公式能够有效规避传统方法的局限，实现端到端的SBM推断与模型选择。

title: The Energy Blind Spot: NVIDIA's Flagship Edge AI Hardware Cannot Support Process-Level Energy Attribution
summary: Agentic AI workloads - where a single user goal triggers multi-step orchestration, tool calls, retries, and failure recovery - are being targeted for edge deployment, with NVIDIA, Dell, HP, ASUS, MSI, Acer, and Gigabyte all shipping GB10-based desktop AI systems in 2026. We recently demonstrated that orchestration structure dominates agentic energy cost, with workflows consuming 4.33x more energy per successful goal than linear baselines and OOI reaching 7.63x for multi-step reasoning tasks. Separately, Rajat et al. show that CPU-side processing accounts for up to 90.6% of total latency and 44% of total dynamic energy in agentic workloads. We report a systematic energy-observability audit of the ASUS Ascent GX10 (GB10 SoC) and find that the platform exposes no CPU energy counter, no INA power-rail monitor, no IPMI/BMC, and no SCMI powercap protocol through any supported software interface. The only on-device energy telemetry is instantaneous GPU power via NVML. We further discover that the MediaTek firmware already computes per-rail energy internally via an undocumented ACPI interface (SPBM), but NVIDIA states there are "no plans to expose CPU rail information." On-device per-process energy attribution - as performed on x86 via RAPL - is therefore not reproducible on this platform through supported interfaces. We formalize a hardware requirements specification for energy-attributed AI, propose an interim calibration bridge using external DC metering combined with GPU subtraction, and identify a standards-track path via SCMI powercap. Our findings motivate the low-carbon computing community to demand energy observability as a first-class hardware requirement.

AI.tldr: 本文对ASUS Ascent GX10 (GB10 SoC)平台进行能量可观测性审计，发现该平台仅暴露GPU瞬时功耗，缺乏CPU能耗计数器等关键遥测接口，导致无法复现x86平台上的每进程能耗归因。作者提出硬件需求规范、外部DC计量校准桥方案，并呼吁将能量可观测性作为低碳计算的一等硬件要求。
AI.motivation: Agentic AI工作负载（多步编排、工具调用、故障恢复）在边缘部署场景下面临显著的能量效率挑战（已有工作表明编排结构主导能耗成本，CPU侧处理占延迟90.6%和动态能耗44%）。然而，当前边缘AI硬件平台缺乏足够的能量可观测性，无法进行细粒度的能耗归因和优化，阻碍了低碳计算目标的实现。
AI.method: 对ASUS Ascent GX10（搭载GB10 SoC）平台进行系统性能量可观测性审计，检查支持的软件接口（NVML、ACPI等），并发现MediaTek固件通过未文档化的ACPI接口（SPBM）内部计算每路能耗，但NVIDIA拒绝公开CPU能耗信息。
AI.result: 平台无CPU能耗计数器、无INA电源轨监控、无IPMI/BMC、无SCMI powercap协议；唯一可用的是通过NVML获取的GPU瞬时功耗。发现MediaTek固件内部已计算每路能耗但未开放，NVIDIA明确表示"无计划公开CPU能耗信息"。
AI.conclusion: 在GB10平台上无法通过支持接口复现x86上RAPL式的每进程能耗归因。提出硬件需求规范（能量归因AI）、外部DC计量校准桥方案（外部直流计量结合GPU功耗减法），以及通过SCMI powercap的标准路径。呼吁低碳计算社区将能量可观测性作为一等硬件要求。

title: Prefix-Safe Bayesian Belief Tracking for LLM Reasoning Reliability:Separating Calibration from Ranking
summary: Long reasoning traces need reliability estimates before final answers are known. We study prefix-conditioned eventual-success estimation, $P(y=1 \mid o_{1:t})$, using prefix-safe observations. Sequential Bayesian Belief Tracking (SBBT) calibrates observation likelihoods and recursively updates a two-state belief, providing a common tracker for scalar scores, text and self-verification markers, hidden clusters, token-pooling probes, and latent-trajectory features. Across generated open-weight traces on MATH-500, GSM8K, AIME 2025, and RIMO-N, probability quality and ranking separate: score-only SBBT often improves Brier, while AUROC gains require structure-aware evidence beyond strong prefix-safe baselines. In the strongest hard math setting, structure-aware observations reach +0.110 AUROC against standard prefix-safe baselines. Under a same-prefix classifier audit, MATH-500 text markers and RIMO-N self-verification signals remain positive. Together, these findings support SBBT as a calibration-aware online inference framework and expose an evidence regime: scalar scores mainly support probability quality, while structure-aware prefix signals support ranking only when strong prefix-safe baselines have not already absorbed the rank evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出序列贝叶斯信念追踪（SBBT）框架，利用前缀安全观测进行事件成功概率估计，证明标量分数主要提升概率质量（Brier），而结构感知信号在强基线未饱和时提升排序性能（AUROC），最高可达+0.110。
AI.motivation: 长推理轨迹在最终答案未知前需要可靠性估计，但目前缺乏在线校准框架来综合利用标量分数、文本标记、自验证信号等多种观测信息进行前缀条件成功概率估计。
AI.method: 提出SBBT框架，通过校准观测似然并递归更新二状态信念，统一处理标量分数、文本标记、自验证信号、隐藏聚类、token池探针和潜在轨迹特征。
AI.result: 在MATH-500、GSM8K、AIME 2025、RIMO-N等数据集上实验发现：标量SBBT主要改善Brier分数；结构感知观测在强基线未饱和时提升AUROC，硬数学任务中达+0.110；文本标记和自验证信号在分类审计中保持正向。
AI.conclusion: SBBT可作为校准感知的在线推理框架，揭示证据机制：标量分数主要服务概率质量，结构感知前缀信号在强前缀安全基线未吸收排名证据时支持排名。

title: Decentralized Parameter-Free Online Learning with Compressed Gossip
summary: We study decentralized online convex optimization when agents communicate over a graph and messages may be compressed. Classical decentralized online methods typically require learning-rate choices that depend on the horizon, comparator scale, or other problem parameters, while compressed communication introduces additional disagreement that must be controlled. We propose DECO-EF (DEcentralized COin-betting with Error Feedback), a decentralized parameter-free online learning algorithm that combines coin-betting predictions with compressed difference-based gossip. Each agent maintains a clean accumulated state and a compressed tracker, and communicates only compressed state differences during gossip steps. The method is parameter-free in the online-learning sense: it does not tune to the horizon, the comparator norm, or the learning rate. We prove expected comparator-adaptive network-regret bounds for DECO-EF under compressed communication. To the best of our knowledge, this gives the first expected sublinear network-regret guarantees for parameter-free decentralized online learning under compressed communication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DECO-EF，一种去中心化参数无关的在线学习算法，结合了coin-betting预测与压缩差分共识，在压缩通信下实现了首个期望次线性网络遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化在线方法需要依赖时间范围、比较器尺度等超参数，且压缩通信会引入额外的不一致性，缺乏参数无关的去中心化在线学习算法。
AI.method: 将coin-betting预测方法与压缩差分共识（gossip）相结合，每个智能体维护干净累积状态和压缩跟踪器，在gossip步骤中仅通信压缩后的状态差分。
AI.result: 证明了DECO-EF在压缩通信下具有期望的比较器自适应网络遗憾界。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个在压缩通信下为参数无关去中心化在线学习提供期望次线性网络遗憾保证的工作。

title: The Illusion of Opting in AI-Mediated Consequential Decisions
summary: Drawing on Ullmann-Margalit's concept of opting (transformative, irrevocable, and shadowed by foreclosed alternatives), we show that current AI systems raise a profound ethical problem that existing AI ethics has not fully captured: the illusion of opting, in which persons and groups encounter the deceptive appearance of meaningful consequential choice while the agency needed to become genuinely capable of choosing is weakened. Against approaches that treat AI primarily as an optimizer of already given ends, we argue that AI systems should be evaluated by whether they protect and cultivate meta-capacity against the illusion of opting: the socially and institutionally scaffolded agentive capacity through which means and ends can be formed, contested, revised, and owned. This reframing is especially urgent for disadvantaged populations, who are least able to absorb the costs of the illusion of opting when AI-mediated pathways misdirect behavior and action. We propose three normative imperatives for AI-mediated consequential decisions: existential honesty, which acknowledges the limits of prediction; ecological rationality, which situates guidance within heterogeneous lived ecologies; and counterfactual reparation, which acknowledges and repairs foreclosed alternatives when AI-mediated decision-making pathways fail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI系统带来“选择幻象”这一深层伦理问题：表面提供有意义选择，实则削弱真正的选择能力。作者批判将AI仅视为目标优化工具的路径，主张AI应保护和发展人的主体性元能力，并针对弱势群体提出三项规范性准则：存在诚实、生态理性与反事实修复。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理未能充分揭示AI系统如何制造一种“选择的假象”——看似提供有意义的后果性选择，实则削弱了真正做出选择所需的主体能力。尤其对弱势群体而言，这种幻象代价更高。
AI.method: 基于Ullmann-Margalit的“选择”（opting）概念（转型性、不可逆性、被遮蔽的替代方案），通过哲学分析揭示“选择幻象”的结构，并提出三项规范性准则。
AI.result: 识别出AI伦理中未被充分讨论的“选择幻象”问题；论证AI应被以是否保护和培养元能力（主体性能力）为标准来评估；提出存在诚实、生态理性、反事实修复三项准则。
AI.conclusion: AI系统不能仅被视为目标优化工具，而应被设计为保护和培养人的主体性元能力。论文的三项规范性准则为评估AI中介的重大后果性决策提供了新的伦理框架。

title: Conservative neural posterior estimation via distributionally robust training
summary: Simulation-based inference with neural posterior estimation (NPE) often yields overconfident and unreliable posteriors under limited simulation budgets. To address this, we propose DRO-NPE, a distributionally robust approach that replaces the standard NPE objective with a worst-case loss over a Wasserstein ambiguity set. We introduce KL-based metrics for miscoverage and miscalibration, and use these to show that the DRO-NPE objective controls overfitting and reduces posterior overconfidence. Our method is tractable, parallelisable, and readily integrates with standard normalising flows. Across benchmark SBI tasks, DRO-NPE consistently improves coverage and calibration, while narrowing the gap between empirical and population NPE loss, leading to more reliable inference in low-simulation regimes.

AI.tldr: 提出DRO-NPE方法，通过分布鲁棒优化替代标准神经后验估计目标，在有限模拟预算下提升后验覆盖率和校准度，减少过拟合和过度自信问题。
AI.motivation: 基于神经后验估计的模拟推断在有限模拟预算下往往产生过于自信且不可靠的后验分布，现有方法存在过拟合风险。
AI.method: 采用分布鲁棒优化，用Wasserstein模糊集上的最坏情况损失替代标准NPE目标函数；引入基于KL散度的误覆盖和误校准度量指标进行理论分析。
AI.result: 在多个基准SBI任务上，DRO-NPE一致性地改善了覆盖率和校准度，缩小了经验损失与总体损失之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 该方法易于实现、可并行化，能与标准归一化流无缝集成，在低模拟预算场景下实现更可靠的推断。

title: TRACES: Proactive Safety Auditing for Multi-Turn LLM Agents via Trajectory-State Modeling
summary: LLM agents increasingly operate through multi-turn tool use and environment interaction, where safety risks often emerge from intermediate steps long before they surface in the final outcome. Reactive auditing is therefore insufficient: post-hoc diagnosis frequently misses the chance to flag risks while they are unfolding. We propose TRACES, a representation-based proactive auditor that learns prefix-level trajectory risk states from the hidden representations of an observer LLM. TRACES induces latent mechanism features from step representations and models their temporal evolution to estimate whether a partial trajectory is drifting toward unsafe behavior. To sidestep the cost and ambiguity of step-level risk annotation, TRACES is trained with weak trajectory-level supervision while still producing dense prefix-level risk estimates. Across multiple agent safety benchmarks, TRACES improves both full-trajectory safety prediction and proactive risk discrimination. Our analyses further suggest that these risk states can help train a safer agent, highlighting the broader potential of proactive auditing for long-horizon agent safety.

AI.tldr: TRACES 是一种基于表示的主动审计器，通过观测 LLM 的隐藏表征学习轨迹前缀级别的风险状态，能在不安全行为完全暴露前进行早期检测。
AI.motivation: LLM agent 在多轮工具使用和与环境交互中，安全风险往往在中间步骤就已出现，但最终结果才显现。事后审计（反应式）无法在风险展开时及时预警，因此需要主动式审计方法。
AI.method: 从观测 LLM 的隐藏表征中提取潜在机制特征，建模其时间演化，估计部分轨迹是否正漂向不安全行为。使用弱轨迹级监督训练，产生密集的前缀级风险估计，避免步骤级风险标注的高成本和模糊性。
AI.result: 在多个 agent 安全基准上，TRACES 提升了完整轨迹的安全预测性能和主动风险判别能力。进一步分析表明，这些风险状态可用于训练更安全的 agent。
AI.conclusion: TRACES 证明了主动审计在长程 agent 安全性中的潜力，其基于表示的前缀级风险估计方法为 agent 安全提供了新的思路。

title: Evaluating Local Explainability Metrics for Machine Learning Models on Tabular Data
summary: Despite the wide use of explainability techniques to attempt to understand the behavior of Artificial Intelligence (AI), the generated explanations may not always be reliable. An explanation can appear plausible to humans but fail to capture the internal reasoning of a model, particularly when dealing with complex tabular data. This paper studies the trustworthiness of local explainability techniques when applied to complex tabular classification tasks, considering evaluated metrics for three main properties: faithfulness to the model's predictions, robustness to input data variations, and complexity of the explanation itself. A benchmark was performed for Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME), Kernel SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP), and Feature Ablation techniques, across 32 datasets and different types of machine learning models. Model performance ranges were analyzed to identify two groups: consensus-correct, which are samples that all models predicted correctly, and consensus-wrong, samples that all models predicted incorrectly. The obtained results demonstrate that that the explanations are not always correlated with a model's predictive performance. Instead, dataset complexity and feature distributions seem to be the main factors affecting explanation quality and reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了局部可解释性技术在复杂表格分类任务中的可信度，发现解释质量与模型性能无关，主要受数据集复杂度和特征分布影响。
AI.motivation: AI可解释性技术生成的解释可能不可靠，尤其是在复杂表格数据中，解释看似合理却可能无法反映模型真实推理过程，因此需要系统性评估其可信度。
AI.method: 对LIME、Kernel SHAP和Feature Ablation三种局部解释技术进行基准测试，使用32个数据集和多种机器学习模型，从忠实度、鲁棒性和复杂度三个维度评估，并区分共识正确与共识错误的样本组。
AI.result: 解释质量与模型预测性能之间无显著相关性，数据集复杂度和特征分布是影响解释质量和可靠性的主要因素。
AI.conclusion: 现有局部解释技术在复杂表格数据中的可信度受限，改进解释方法需更多关注数据本身的复杂性，而非仅追求与模型性能的一致性。

title: A Policy-Driven Runtime Layer for Agentic LLM Serving
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems have become the dominant production workload, but the serving stack was not built for them. The agent framework above knows agent identities, role, schemas, and dispatch structure but never sees an engine-level event; the serving engine below sees every event but knows nothing about agents. A surprising number of cross-cutting policies depend on both: prefix caching, batch shaping, speculative execution, fairness, tool-result memoization, safety enforcement, and more. Each lives in the seam between the two layers and is currently solved by a one-off patch into one neighbor or the other. We argue this seam is best addressed by an architectural change rather than point fixes: insert a third tier, an agent runtime layer, between the framework and the engine, exposing four primitives (observe, score, predict, act) into which any agent-aware policy plugs, with agent identity as the shared coordinate. We map nine concrete policies onto the layer and validate the abstraction in depth on the one with the largest immediate serving-cost lever: KV caching across sessions, instantiated as CacheSage, which learns the per-workload agent transition matrix online and uses it for survival-based eviction and between-step prefetch. Preliminary results on five real multi-agent workloads show +13 to +37 pp cache hit-rate lift, 12% to 29% lower mean TTFT, and 6% to 14% higher throughput over an unmodified serving stack.

AI.tldr: 本文指出多智能体LLM系统的服务栈存在框架层与引擎层之间的鸿沟，提出插入第三层——智能体运行时层，暴露四个原语（观察、评分、预测、行动），用于实现跨层策略（如前缀缓存、批处理调度等）。以CacheSage为实例，通过在线学习智能体状态转移矩阵优化KV缓存，初步实验显示命中率提升13-37个百分点，TTFT降低12-29%，吞吐量提升6-14%。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统的服务栈中，框架层与引擎层之间存在严重的信息不对称：框架层知道智能体身份、角色、模式与调度结构，但看不到引擎事件；引擎层能看到每个事件，但对智能体一无所知。大量跨层策略（如前缀缓存、批处理整形、投机执行、公平性、工具结果记忆、安全执行等）恰好生活在这两层之间的缝隙中，目前只能通过临时修补来解决，缺乏系统性架构支持。
AI.method: 提出在框架层与引擎层之间插入第三层——智能体运行时层（agent runtime layer），暴露四个原语：observe（观察）、score（评分）、predict（预测）、act（行动）。所有智能体感知的策略都通过这四个原语接入，以智能体身份为核心坐标。作为具体实例，实现CacheSage，在线学习每个工作负载的智能体状态转移矩阵，并基于生存时间进行缓存淘汰和跨步骤预取。
AI.result: 在五个真实多智能体工作负载上的初步实验表明：缓存命中率提升13-37个百分点，平均TTFT（首token生成时间）降低12-29%，吞吐量提升6-14%。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统服务栈中的跨层策略问题应该通过架构层面的变革（插入智能体运行时层）而非点状修补来解决，该架构能够系统地支持多种智能体感知策略。

title: Beyond Lipschitz: Data-Driven Robustness via Discrete Modulus of Continuity
summary: Robustness of neural networks is commonly quantified via local or global Lipschitz constants. However, Lipschitz continuity can be overly coarse or overly restrictive as global robustness measure, failing to capture nuanced, data-dependent behavior. We propose a data-driven, architecture-agnostic framework based on the discrete modulus of continuity (DMOC), a non linear generalization of Lipschitz continuity that provides a finer notion of robustness. Unlike many existing approaches, DMOC does not require access to model internals and instead evaluates regularity relative to the data distribution. This shifts the focus from the model to the data, which provide a data-driven baseline of regularity against which the network's robustness is assessed. We establish convergence results for DMOC-induced seminorms with explicit data-driven rates in terms of the separation distance, and introduce a scalable minibatch algorithm that reduces the quadratic cost of exact computation, enabling application to large-scale data sets such as ImageNet. Empirically, DMOC serves as an architecture independent diagnostic: it distinguishes trained from untrained networks, reveals underfitting and overfitting regimes, and yields, as a special case, tight Lipschitz estimates comparable to state-of-the-art method such as ECLipsE and ECLipsE-fast.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离散模量连续（DMOC）的数据驱动鲁棒性评估框架，它作为Lipschitz连续性的非线性推广，能够更精细地衡量神经网络鲁棒性，且无需访问模型内部结构，通过可扩展的小批量算法适用于ImageNet等大规模数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Lipschitz常数的鲁棒性度量要么过于粗糙要么过于严格，无法捕捉数据依赖的细微行为，缺乏一种数据驱动、架构无关的精细鲁棒性评估方法。
AI.method: 提出离散模量连续（DMOC）框架，这是一种非线性的Lipschitz连续性推广；建立基于分离距离的收敛率理论；引入可扩展的小批量算法，将精确计算的二次成本降低。
AI.result: DMOC能够区分已训练与未训练网络、揭示欠拟合与过拟合状态；作为特例可得到与ECLipsE等最先进方法相当的紧致Lipschitz估计；可扩展至ImageNet规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: DMOC提供了一种架构无关、数据驱动的鲁棒性评估工具，将评估焦点从模型转向数据，为神经网络鲁棒性提供了更精细的刻画。

title: Chain-based Adaptive Reconfiguration Over Lattices for Hallucination Reduction
summary: We introduce CAROL (Chain-based Adaptive Reconfiguration Over Lattices), a probabilistic framework for test-time hallucination reduction in large language models. Rather than relying on token-level uncertainty, CAROL defines a semantic uncertainty measure based on the consistency between generated responses and a trusted context, inducing a string-submodular objective over a lattice of textual sequences. This formulation enables hallucination mitigation to be cast as a Markov chain accept-reject process with provable convergence and near-optimality guarantees, allowing the model to iteratively refine outputs toward semantic consistency. By operating at the level of meaning, CAROL unifies hallucination detection and mitigation within a single framework. Empirical results on question answering and multi-agent reasoning benchmarks show that CAROL significantly reduces hallucinations and improves reliability and interpretability compared to likelihood-based and retrieval-augmented baselines, while maintaining competitive computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: CAROL是一个基于语义不确定性的概率框架，通过在文本序列格上定义字符串子模目标，利用马尔可夫链接受-拒绝过程迭代优化输出，实现测试阶段的幻觉降低，在QA和多智能体推理任务上优于似然法和检索增强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉缓解方法多基于token级别的不确定性或检索增强，缺乏对语义一致性的直接建模，且检测与缓解通常分离。作者希望从语义层面统一幻觉检测与缓解，并保证理论收敛性。
AI.method: 1) 定义基于生成响应与可信上下文一致性的语义不确定性度量；2) 在文本序列格上构造字符串子模目标函数；3) 将幻觉缓解建模为马尔可夫链接受-拒绝过程，具有可证明的收敛性和近似最优性保证；4) 在语义层面迭代精炼输出。
AI.result: 在问答和多智能体推理基准上，CAROL显著降低幻觉率，提高可靠性和可解释性，优于基于似然和检索增强的基线方法，同时保持具有竞争力的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义不确定性度量和马尔可夫链框架，CAROL成功统一了幻觉检测与缓解，实现了理论上有保证的高效幻觉降低，为LLM可靠性提升提供了新范式。

title: Supervised Distributional Reduction via Optimal Transport and Dependence Maximization
summary: Learning representations that capture both intrinsic data geometry and target-relevant structure remains a fundamental challenge, particularly in settings where data reduction must balance compression with predictive fidelity. While distributional reduction-encompassing joint clustering and dimensionality reduction-offers a principled way to summarize data, its supervised variants remain relatively under-explored, despite the importance of retaining task-relevant signal for downstream prediction and decision-making. We propose Supervised Distributional Reduction (SDR), an algorithm for learning target-aware representations by combining optimal transport with explicit dependence maximization. SDR builds on the Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW) objective to align the relational structure of the input distribution with a set of representative points, while augmenting it with a direct dependence term that encourages the learned embeddings to capture predictive signal more explicitly. This results in compact representations that reflect both geometric structure and supervision. Beyond representation learning, SDR naturally induces a data-dependent, non-stationary geometry that can be leveraged for settings such as Gaussian Process (GP) modelling. By redefining distances through target-aware distributional alignment, SDR enables the construction of adaptive kernels that respond to local variations in both data geometry and supervision, offering an optimal transport-based perspective on non-stationary kernel design.

AI.tldr: 提出监督式分布约简（SDR）算法，通过结合最优传输和显式依赖最大化，学习兼顾数据几何结构与任务相关信号的紧凑表示，并可用于构建非平稳高斯过程核。
AI.motivation: 现有分布约简方法在监督场景下探索不足，数据压缩时难以平衡预测保真度与任务相关信号的保留，亟需一种能同时捕获内在数据几何和目标相关结构的表示学习方法。
AI.method: 基于Fused Gromov-Wasserstein目标对齐输入分布的 relational structure与代表点，并引入直接依赖项最大化嵌入与监督信号的关联，再将结果用于定义数据依赖的非平稳距离，构建自适应高斯过程核。
AI.result: SDR能生成既反映几何结构又包含监督信号的紧凑表示，并自然诱导出非平稳几何结构，为高斯过程提供自适应核设计的新视角。
AI.conclusion: SDR通过最优传输桥接了表示学习与自适应核设计，为监督式分布约简提供了有效方案，在保留预测信号的同时保持数据结构。

title: Asking Is Not Enough: Protocol Sensitivity in LLM Confidence Calibration
summary: LLM confidence calibration is often evaluated by comparing two signals: token-probability scores and verbalized confidence. These signals are sometimes treated as direct readouts of model uncertainty, but their comparison depends on measurement choices that are rarely made explicit. In the main analysis, we hold the verbalized-confidence elicitation fixed: a single prompt template, probability scale, and output format. We then vary the measurement axes that define the verbalized-vs-token comparison: which answer string receives the token-probability score, how that score is read from the answer tokens, and under which conditioning context it is measured. We evaluate this design on four QA benchmarks across three open 7--8B base/Instruct model families, with larger Qwen2.5 variants as same-family robustness checks. The resulting comparison is sensitive to these choices: conditioning context changes the sign or magnitude of the ECE gap across settings, token readout produces smaller but still sign-moving changes, and changing the ECE estimator has little effect. Under the default generated-answer, bare-context protocol, Instruct settings are close to parity rather than showing a large calibration gain for verbalized confidence. In a separate supplied-answer analysis, surface-plausible wrong answers receive nearly the same confidence as supplied gold answers, suggesting that verbalized confidence also reflects answer plausibility and provenance rather than correctness alone. We argue that both confidence signals should be treated as protocol-dependent behavioral measurements, and provide a reporting checklist covering elicitation provenance, scored answer, token-probability readout, and conditioning context.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了LLM置信度校准中，token概率分数与口头化置信度（verbalized confidence）这两种信号的比较方法，发现这一比较对测量选择（如条件上下文、token读取方式、答案选择）高度敏感。研究还表明，口头化置信度反映的是答案的合理性与来源，而非纯粹的正确性，建议将两者都视为依赖于协议的行为测量。
AI.motivation: LLM置信度校准的两种常用信号（token概率分数和口头化置信度）之间的比较结果依赖于许多很少被明确说明的测量选择，这种不确定性可能影响研究结论的有效性和可重复性。
AI.method: 固定口头化置信度的提示模板、概率尺度和输出格式，系统性地改变三个测量维度：哪个答案字符串被赋予token概率分数、如何从答案token中读取该分数、以及测量时的条件上下文。在四个QA基准、三个7-8B基础/指令模型系列上进行评估。
AI.result: 条件上下文的改变会导致ECE差距的符号或幅度变化；token读取方式产生较小但仍可改变符号的变化；ECE估计器的改变影响不大。在默认协议下，指令模型的两种信号接近持平。对于表面合理但错误的答案，口头化置信度与正确答案几乎相同。
AI.conclusion: 两种置信度信号都应被视为依赖于协议的行为测量，而非模型不确定性的直接读数。作者提供了一个报告清单，涵盖诱导来源、评分答案、token概率读取方式和条件上下文。

title: ReverseMath: Answer Inversion for Scalable and Verifiable Mathematical Problem Generation
summary: Mathematical reasoning benchmarks are vital for evaluating large language models (LLMs), but many are static and repeatedly exposed through public evaluation and training pipelines, making it difficult to separate genuine reasoning from memorization. Meanwhile, manually constructing new math problems with reliable answers remains costly. We introduce ReverseMath, a scalable method for generating new math problems through answer inversion. Given a problem and its answer, ReverseMath masks a numerical value in the original problem, treats the original answer as a known condition, and rewrites the problem so that the masked value becomes the new answer. The generated problem reverses the original input-output relation, making its answer known by construction. We study ReverseMath for both evaluation and training. For evaluation, paired original/reversed problems reveal substantial behavioral shifts: models sometimes fail on reversed problems and even incorrectly output the original answer, suggesting memorization-like behavior. For training, ReverseMath provides automatically labeled reversed problems as data augmentation for reinforcement learning (RL). Experiments show that including ReverseMath-generated data improves mathematical reasoning performance across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating its value as both an analysis tool and a scalable source of verifiable training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReverseMath方法，通过反转问题中的输入输出关系自动生成新的数学问题，用于评估和训练LLM。该方法能揭示模型的记忆化行为，并作为可验证训练数据增强RL，提升多项基准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的数学推理基准大多是静态的，经常暴露在公开评测和训练流程中，难以区分真正的推理能力与记忆化行为；同时人工构建新数学问题成本高昂。
AI.method: ReverseMath：给定原问题及答案，将原问题中的某个数值掩码，把原答案作为已知条件，重写问题使得被掩码的数值成为新答案。通过反转输入输出关系，新问题的答案由构造过程天然可知。
AI.result: 在评估中，配对的正向/反转问题揭示了模型行为的显著差异，模型有时在反转问题上失败甚至输出原答案，暗示记忆化行为；在训练中，ReverseMath生成的数据作为RL数据增强，提升了多个数学推理基准的性能。
AI.conclusion: ReverseMath既可作为分析工具揭示模型的记忆化行为，也可作为可验证训练数据的可扩展来源，提升数学推理能力。

title: Hurwitz Quaternion Multiplicative Quantization for KV Cache Compression
summary: We propose \textbf{Hurwitz Quaternion Multiplicative Quantization (HQMQ)}, a \textbf{calibration-free} method for KV cache compression of large language models. HQMQ treats each 4-element chunk of K or V as a quaternion and quantizes its unit direction to the \emph{product} $q_p \cdot q_s$, where $q_p$ ranges over the 24-element Hurwitz group $2T$ (the 24 vertices of the 24-cell on $S^3$, pairwise angle $60^\circ$) and $q_s$ ranges over a per-(layer, head) secondary codebook of $S$ \emph{random} unit quaternions. The multiplicative composition yields $24S$ effective codewords at $S$ stored parameters; random initialization suffices because left-multiplication is an $S^3$ isometry, so seeded codebooks vary in end-task ppl by $<1.5\%$. A per-batch median-multiplier outlier extraction step ($C{=}3$, no calibration) handles modern outlier-heavy architectures. We evaluate on five modern open models: Mistral-7B (dense MHA), Llama-3-8B and Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-8B (dense GQA), and gpt-oss-20b (sparse MoE). On Mistral-7B and Qwen3-8B, HQMQ matches fp16 within $0.02$--$0.03$ ppl points at $\sim$5 bits. On Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-8B, where naive int4 collapses to $10^4{+}$ ppl, HQMQ + Med3$\times$ recovers fp16 quality within $0.02$--$0.10$ ppl points at $\sim$5 bits. HQMQ Pareto-dominates naive int by $3$--$1900\times$ at matched bits across all five models, and downstream zero-shot accuracy matches fp16 at $3.79$ bits on Mistral. Against the strongest calibrated KV-quantization baseline, HQMQ at $3.79$ bits matches KIVI-4 ($\sim 4.5$ bits) within ${\sim}1$ pt on CoQA, $0.6$ pts on TruthfulQA, and $2.3$ pts on GSM8K, at $16\%$ fewer bits and without a calibration pass. At the storage level, HQMQ delivers up to $5.05\times$ KV compression, shrinking a Llama-3-70B 128k-context cache from 43 GB to 8.5 GB.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Hurwitz 四元数乘法量化（HQMQ），一种无需校准的 KV 缓存压缩方法。将 K/V 的 4 元素块视为四元数，量化其单位方向为 24 元 Hurwitz 群与随机辅助码本的乘积，实现 24S 个有效码字。配合中位数乘数异常值提取，在 Mistral-7B、Qwen3-8B 等模型上约 5 bits 下 ppl 与 fp16 相差 0.02-0.10，Pareto 优于 naive int 量化 3-1900 倍，零样本准确率与 fp16 持平。3.79 bits 下匹配 KIVI-4（~4.5 bits），存储压缩率达 5.05 倍。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型推理时 KV 缓存占用巨大内存（如 128k 上下文可达 43GB），现有量化方法需额外校准数据且对异常值敏感，难以兼顾压缩率、精度与部署便捷性。
AI.method: 将 K/V 张量按 4 元素分块视为四元数，量化其单位方向为 Hurwitz 群（24 个元素，两两夹角 60°）与每层每头随机辅助码本的乘积组合；引入每批次中位数乘数异常值提取（C=3），无需校准数据。
AI.result: 在 Mistral-7B 和 Qwen3-8B 上约 5 bits 时 ppl 与 fp16 相差 0.02-0.03；在 Qwen2.5-7B/Qwen3-8B 上（naive int4 崩溃至 10⁴+ ppl），HQMQ+Med3× 恢复至 0.02-0.10 ppl 差距。Pareto 优于 naive int 量化 3-1900 倍。3.79 bits 零样本准确率与 fp16 持平，匹配 KIVI-4（~4.5 bits）且无需校准。KV 缓存压缩 5.05 倍（43GB→8.5GB）。
AI.conclusion: HQMQ 作为一种校准无关的 KV 缓存量化方法，在极低位宽下仍能保持与 fp16 相当的精度，有效处理异常值重的现代架构，是兼具压缩率、精度与部署便利性的方案。

title: SkillGrad: Optimizing Agent Skills Like Gradient Descent
summary: Agent skills provide a lightweight way to adapt LLM agents to specialized domains by storing reusable procedural knowledge in structured files. However, whether downloaded from third parties or self-generated, these skills are often unreliable, incomplete, or outdated. Existing skill-evolution methods often address these deficiencies through heuristic reflections without an explicit optimization formulation. In this paper, we propose SkillGrad, a gradient-descent-inspired framework for optimizing agent skills. SkillGrad treats the skill package as a structured parameter to optimize in a gradient descent fashion: task executions provide trajectory-level loss evidence, automatic diagnoses then provide text-based gradients that indicate the correction directions. To stabilize optimization across iterations, a momentum agent accumulates recurring diagnostic patterns into a persistent memory overlay. Finally, an LLM-based patcher executes the parameter update by applying layer-aware edits to the skill package. Evaluated on SpreadsheetBench Verified and WikiTableQuestions, SkillGrad consistently outperforms training-based skill evolution baselines across two backbone LLMs, improving over the strongest training-based baseline by $6.7$ percentage points on average. Ablations further show that momentum and contrastive diagnosis both contribute to the final skill quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillGrad，一种受梯度下降启发的智能体技能优化框架，通过轨迹级损失、文本梯度和动量机制对技能包进行迭代更新，在两个数据集上平均超越最强基线6.7个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体技能（无论是下载还是自生成的）往往不可靠、不完整或过时，而现有技能进化方法依赖启发式反思，缺乏明确的优化公式。
AI.method: SkillGrad将技能包视为结构化参数，采用类梯度下降方式进行优化：任务执行提供轨迹级损失证据，自动诊断提供文本梯度指示修正方向，动量代理积累重复诊断模式并存储到持久记忆覆盖层，LLM补丁器通过层级感知编辑执行参数更新。
AI.result: 在SpreadsheetBench Verified和WikiTableQuestions上，SkillGrad在两种骨干LLM下均持续超越基于训练的技能进化基线，平均提升6.7个百分点。消融实验表明动量机制和对比诊断都对最终技能质量有贡献。
AI.conclusion: SkillGrad将技能优化形式化为类似梯度下降的过程，通过文本梯度和动量机制有效提升智能体技能质量，为技能进化提供了新的优化视角。

title: The Ethics of LLM Sandbox and Persona Dynamics
summary: It is well known that LLM guardrails and trained persona dynamics can produce a reality gap: the distance between the world a LLM is permitted or shaped to describe, and the world in which users must act. Here we argue that actively generating reality gaps is in fact unethical because it knowingly shifts epistemic risk back to the uninformed user -- this is reality laundering. This can potentially cause harm when operationalised at scale. The risk is sharpest in high-exposure advice contexts, where users seek orientation rather than a bounded, externally checkable task. Guardrails naively appear ethically necessary when they claim to prevent direct harm, but often become suspect when they suppress truthful perception and launder uncomfortable mechanisms into acceptable abstractions. Basel-style financial regulation, B-BBEE-style compliance, Societe Generale, and the London Whale show how formal safety systems can become legible, gameable, and performative while real exposure migrates elsewhere. The same pattern can appear in LLMs as moral compliance: safe language, distorted reality. We therefore distinguish refusing harm, from refusing reality; and then argue for top-down causal requirements specification at the task level rather than bottom-up moral correction at the response or sandbox level. Persona dynamics matter because the assistant interface is not neutral; it shapes how uncertainty, conflict, authority, and risk are staged. The conclusion is that so-called ``ethical AI'' becomes substantively unethical when it substitutes institutional reassurance for contact with reality.

AI.tldr: 本文指出LLM护栏和人格动态会制造"现实鸿沟"——模型被允许描述的世界与用户必须行动的世界之间的差距。作者论证主动制造这种鸿沟是不道德的"现实洗白"行为，尤其在高风险咨询场景中会造成伤害。文章区分了"拒绝伤害"与"拒绝现实"，主张自上而下的因果需求规范而非自下而上的道德修正，并警告"伦理AI"若用制度性安慰替代现实接触，实质上会变得不道德。
AI.motivation: 揭示LLM安全机制（护栏、人格动态）在表面道德合规下可能产生的深层伦理问题——"现实洗白"（reality laundering），即系统性地将认知风险转移给不知情的用户。
AI.method: 通过类比分析：巴塞尔式金融监管、B-BBEE合规、法兴银行交易亏损、伦敦鲸事件等现实案例，论证形式化安全系统如何变得可读、可博弈、表演化，而真实风险却转移到别处。同时进行概念区分（拒绝伤害 vs. 拒绝现实），提出自上而下的因果需求规范方法。
AI.result: 识别出LLM安全机制可能沦为"道德合规"——语言安全但现实扭曲。指出人格动态（persona dynamics）并非中立，会塑造不确定性、冲突、权威和风险的呈现方式。
AI.conclusion: 所谓的"伦理AI"若用制度性安慰替代对现实的真实接触，实质上会变得不道德。应转向任务层面的因果需求规范，而非在响应或沙盒层面做自下而上的道德修正。

title: Beyond Input Understanding: Diagnosing Multilingual Mathematical Reasoning with Directed Acyclic Trace Graphs
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong mathematical reasoning performance in English, but remain much less reliable in many low- and medium-resource languages. This gap is often explained as a failure to understand non-English problem statements. We show that this view is incomplete: even when the problem is given in English, controlling the model's reasoning language can substantially reduce accuracy, suggesting that language also affects reasoning execution itself. To study this effect, we introduce DATG, a Directed Acyclic Trace Graph framework that maps reasoning traces to language-independent mathematical anchors and dependencies. This allows us to align target-language traces with reference DAGs and measure whether they cover required mathematical nodes, respect dependency edges, and avoid harmful mathematical actions. Experiments on the Qwen3 series across 12 languages show that non-English reasoning often suffers from reduced anchor coverage and weaker dependency fidelity, especially in low-resource languages. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Loop-Retry and Formula-Retry, two simple test-time controls targeting DATG-exposed failure modes, and show that they consistently improve target-language reasoning performance in low-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型推理模型在多语言数学推理中的表现差异不仅源于语言理解问题，更源于推理语言本身对推理执行过程的影响。为此提出DATG框架（有向无环追踪图）来诊断问题，并基于诊断结果提出两种简单的测试时控制方法（Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry），在低资源语言上取得了一致提升。
AI.motivation: 先前研究将LRM在多语言数学推理中的性能差距归因于模型对非英语问题陈述的理解不足，但本文认为这一观点不完整：即使在问题用英语给出时，控制模型的推理语言也会显著影响准确率，说明语言本身会影响推理执行过程。因此需要更系统地分析和诊断语言对推理执行的影响机制。
AI.method: 提出DATG（Directed Acyclic Trace Graph）框架，将推理轨迹映射到与语言无关的数学锚点和依赖关系上，通过比对目标语言推理轨迹与参考DAG，衡量三个维度：数学节点覆盖度、依赖边遵循度、有害数学动作规避度。基于诊断结果，提出两种测试时控制方法：Loop-Retry（循环重试）和Formula-Retry（公式重试），针对DATG暴露的失败模式进行修复。
AI.result: 在Qwen3系列模型上对12种语言进行实验，发现非英语推理（尤其是低资源语言）在锚点覆盖度和依赖忠实度上显著下降。提出的Loop-Retry和Formula-Retry方法在低资源语言上持续提升了目标语言的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 语言对推理的影响超越了问题理解层面，推理语言本身也会影响模型的推理执行质量。DATG框架为诊断多语言推理缺陷提供了结构化工具，而基于此诊断的简单测试时控制方法能够有效缓解低资源语言的推理退化问题。

title: Faster Thermal Profiling of a Lunar Rover with Machine Learning Adapted Finite Difference Model
summary: Autonomous space systems operating in extreme thermal environments require accurate and efficient thermal modeling to support both pre-mission system design and onboard autonomy. For lunar rovers, large temperature gradients, radiative heat transfer, and variable surface conditions make reliable thermal prediction especially challenging. High-fidelity physics-based simulations provide accurate results but are computationally expensive, while simplified models and lookup-table approach often lack sufficient accuracy. Physics-informed machine learning (PIML) offers a promising alternative by combining data-driven models with embedded physical knowledge. This paper presents a PIML framework for thermal analysis of a simplified lunar rover with internal heat sources, where machine learning enables environment-adaptive coarse meshing. The proposed architecture integrates a transfer neural network (TNN) that adaptively determines 3D finite-difference nodalization based on thermal loads and initial conditions, enabling more accurate coarse-mesh calculations. A differentiable finite-difference thermal simulator is embedded within the framework to enforce physical consistency and support efficient training, while an upscaling layer reconstructs high-resolution temperature fields from the coarse-grid solution. The proposed PIML approach is evaluated against high-fidelity fine-mesh simulations, low-fidelity fixed coarse-mesh models, and a purely data-driven artificial neural network (ANN). Results show that the PIML framework improves prediction accuracy by 50% and 39% relative to the coarse-mesh physics model and ANN model, respectively, while maintaining physically consistent thermal distributions. Computationally, the framework is also 3x faster than high-fidelity simulations, demonstrating an effective balance between accuracy and efficiency for thermal modeling of lunar rover systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理信息机器学习（PIML）框架用于月球车热分析，通过迁移神经网络实现环境自适应粗网格划分，结合可微有限差分热模拟器，在保持物理一致性的同时将预测精度提升50%（vs粗网格模型）和39%（vs纯数据驱动ANN），计算速度比高保真仿真快3倍。
AI.motivation: 自主空间系统在极端热环境下需要准确高效的热建模，但高保真物理仿真计算成本高，简化模型或查表法精度不足，亟需一种兼顾精度与效率的方法。
AI.method: 提出PIML框架，核心是迁移神经网络（TNN）根据热载荷和初始条件自适应确定3D有限差分节点划分；嵌入可微有限差分热模拟器确保物理一致性并支持高效训练；通过上采样层从粗网格解重构高分辨率温度场。
AI.result: 相比粗网格物理模型和纯数据驱动ANN，PIML预测精度分别提升50%和39%；计算速度比高保真仿真快3倍，同时保持物理一致的热分布。
AI.conclusion: PIML框架在月球车热建模中实现了精度与效率的有效平衡，为自主空间系统热分析提供了可行方案。

title: PEAM: Parametric Embodied Agent Memory through Contrastive Internalization of Experience in Minecraft
summary: We present PEAM, a Parametric Embodied Agent Memory framework in Minecraft that transforms agent memory from inference-time retrieval into parameter-resident skills internalized through experience. PEAM pairs a slow deliberative LLM for open-ended reasoning with a fast parametric module for reflexive execution of consolidated skills. The fast module is a multimodal Mixture-of-Experts LoRA architecture with per-category physically isolated adapters, enabling parameter-level continual learning without catastrophic forgetting. We treat failure as a first-class training signal: failure--correction trajectory pairs are internalized through a joint behavioral-cloning and contrastive objective, so the agent learns not only what succeeds but also how corrected actions differ from failed ones. To govern consolidation, PEAM introduces a parameterization-worthiness score for deciding which experience should be internalized, and a scale-free self-triggered consolidation mechanism for deciding when to internalize without task-specific hand-tuned thresholds, making the agent self-evolving as the trigger transfers across task distributions without re-tuning. Experiments in Minecraft show that PEAM improves long-horizon task performance, mitigates forgetting on previously consolidated skills, and improves parametric-versus-retrieval efficiency over retrieval-based embodied agents and parametric memory variants.

AI.tldr: PEAM在Minecraft中通过参数化记忆框架将智能体的经验内化为参数技能，结合慢速推理LLM和快速参数化模块，利用失败-纠正轨迹对进行对比学习，并通过参数化价值评分和自触发巩固机制实现持续学习与灾难性遗忘抑制。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体依赖检索式记忆，推理效率低且难以内化经验；参数化记忆方法则面临灾难性遗忘问题。作者希望让智能体能够像人类一样，将经验内化为技能参数，同时避免遗忘旧技能。
AI.method: 提出PEAM框架：(1) 慢速推理LLM + 快速参数化模块的双系统架构；(2) 多模态MoE-LoRA架构，每个类别有物理隔离的适配器，支持参数级持续学习；(3) 利用失败-纠正轨迹对进行行为克隆+对比学习联合训练；(4) 参数化价值评分决定哪些经验值得内化；(5) 无尺度自触发巩固机制，无任务特定阈值地动态决定何时内化。
AI.result: 在Minecraft实验中，PEAM在长时序任务上表现提升，有效缓解了已巩固技能的遗忘问题，且在参数化vs检索效率上优于检索式具身智能体和参数化记忆变体。
AI.conclusion: PEAM通过将经验内化为参数技能，使智能体能够自我进化，无需任务特定调参，实现了持续学习与高效推理的平衡。

title: Reward Transfer from Inverse Reinforcement Learning: A Coupled Minimax Approach
summary: We study the transfer of rewards learned using inverse reinforcement learning from expert demonstrations in one environment to reinforcement learning in a new, different environment. This arises naturally when demonstrations are collected in a controlled environment. We formulate the problem as a joint system of Bellman equations across the source and target environments and develop minimax estimators for the target soft-$q$-function. Whereas a sequential solution approach first estimates the source reward and then plugs it into the target control problem, a coupled approach solves the source and target system of equations jointly. We show that, in contrast to the sequential approach, the coupled approach removes the first-order influence of source Bellman residual error. We characterize the local behavior of each approach, develop finite-sample soft-$q$-function error bounds, and prove regret guarantees for the resulting soft-control policy. An empirical investigation using a sepsis simulator validates the theoretical comparison.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将逆强化学习从专家示范中学到的奖励迁移到新环境下的强化学习中。提出联合求解源环境与目标环境贝尔曼方程组的耦合方法，相比先估计奖励再插值的序贯方法，能消除源环境贝尔曼残差的一阶影响，并提供理论保证与实证验证。
AI.motivation: 专家示范通常来自受控环境，直接迁移到新环境存在环境差异导致的奖励函数偏差问题。现有序贯方法先估计奖励再用于新环境，误差会累积放大。
AI.method: 将问题建模为跨源-目标环境的联合贝尔曼方程组，设计极小极大估计器估计目标soft-q函数。耦合方法同时求解两个环境的方程，而序贯方法分步求解。
AI.result: 理论证明耦合方法能消除源环境贝尔曼残差的一阶影响，给出有限样本soft-q函数误差界和soft控制策略的遗憾保证。脓毒症模拟器实验验证了理论对比。
AI.conclusion: 耦合方法在奖励迁移场景中优于序贯方法，具有更好的理论误差性质和实践效果。

title: UserHarness: Harnessing User Minds for Stronger Agent Theory-of-Mind
summary: Understanding what a user believes and intends is central to building effective agent assistants. This ability is often evaluated through Theory-of-Mind (ToM) tasks, where success requires reasoning from the user's perspective. However, many existing approaches address ToM with complex pipelines that model behavior indirectly, without explicitly reconstructing the user's mental state. This misses the core structure of the problem: users act based on their beliefs, which are updated through observations of the environment; beliefs and intentions jointly determine actions, which in turn change the environment; and social reasoning often requires nested beliefs about what others believe or intend. We propose UserHarness, a simple framework that reframes ToM reasoning as explicit user-mind reconstruction. UserHarness decomposes the user's mental state, its relation to the external environment, and the actions that follow from it, enabling agents to track what the user observes, believes, intends, and does. Across five benchmarks, UserHarness reaches up to 95.94% macro accuracy, improving over existing inference methods by more than 15% relative and over the strongest prompt-only harness by about 20% relative. These results suggest that robust user understanding requires reasoning from the roots of the user's mind, positioning user harnessing as a promising foundation for more adaptive future assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UserHarness框架，通过显式重建用户心智状态（信念、意图、观察）来提升AI助手的心理理论推理能力，在五个基准测试中达到95.94%的宏平均准确率，相比现有方法提升超15%。
AI.motivation: 现有心理理论推理方法使用复杂流程间接建模用户行为，未能显式重建用户心智状态，忽略了"用户基于信念和意图行动"这一核心问题结构。
AI.method: UserHarness将心理理论推理重构为显式的用户心智重建任务，分解用户心智状态（信念、意图）与外部环境的关系，并追踪用户观察、信念、意图和行为之间的因果链条。
AI.result: 在五个基准测试上达到95.94%的宏平均准确率，相比现有推理方法相对提升超15%，相比最强纯提示方法相对提升约20%。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒的用户理解需要从用户心智根源进行推理，用户心智重建可作为构建更自适应AI助手的基础方法。

title: Transferable Reinforcement Learning via Probabilistic Latent Embeddings and Dynamic Policy Adaptation for Sim-to-Real Deployment
summary: Due to limited resources and public safety concerns, deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents for many cyber-physical systems (e.g., autonomous vehicles) are first trained in simulators. However, when deployed in real world environments, they often suffer from performance degradation or safety violations because of the inevitable Sim2Real gap. Existing zero-shot approaches, such as robust safe RL and domain randomization, mitigate this issue but typically at the cost of degraded performance or residual safety risks when experiencing unmodeled system dynamics. To address these limitations, we propose a novel reinforcement learning framework that enables safe and efficient policy transfer via probabilistic latent embeddings and dynamic policy adaptation. We consider a family of Constrained Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) under different environment contexts. By leveraging latent context variable in meta-RL, the proposed framework infers the latent representation of the environment from simulated experiences. Furthermore, it incorporates a distributional RL formulation, which allows risk levels of the deployed policy to be adjusted dynamically, based on the estimation accuracy of the latent context variable. This strategy promotes safety at the early deployment stage and improves efficiency through fast policy adaptation under the Sim2Real gap.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于概率潜在嵌入和动态策略适应的强化学习框架，通过元学习推断环境潜在表征并利用分布RL动态调整风险水平，实现从模拟到真实环境的零样本安全高效策略迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本方法（如鲁棒安全RL、域随机化）在处理Sim2Real差距时，常以性能下降或残留安全风险为代价，尤其面对未建模的系统动态时表现不佳。
AI.method: 考虑一族不同环境上下文的CMDP，利用元RL中的潜在变量推断环境表征，并结合分布RL公式，根据潜在变量估计精度动态调整部署策略的风险水平。
AI.result: 在部署初期促进安全性，并通过快速策略适应在Sim2Real差距下提高效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效缓解Sim2Real问题，在保证安全性的同时提升策略迁移效率。

title: Got a Secret? LLM Agents Can't Keep It: Evaluating Privacy in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: LLM safety evaluations predominantly test models in isolation, yet deployed AI agents increasingly operate within persistent social environments alongside other agents. We introduce a Moltbook-style simulation platform where thousands of LLM agents interact across communities over a simulated month, and use it to evaluate privacy as a downstream safety concern under varying degrees of social pressure. We find that shifting from single turn to multi turn social evaluation amplifies privacy violations (CIMemories 19.95% to Ours 45.30% across OpenAI models), that leakage is socially contagious, with agents 8 times more likely to disclose sensitive information after observing a peer do so, and that explicit privacy instructions reduce but do not eliminate this effect, leaving leakage rates above 37.8% even with safeguards. Our findings suggest that static chat based safety benchmarks systematically underestimate risks in agentic deployment, and that social context alone is sufficient to elicit sensitive disclosures that single turn evaluations would never surface.

AI.tldr: 论文构建了数千LLM代理在社交环境中模拟交互的平台，发现多轮社交互动显著增加隐私泄露（从19.95%升至45.30%），且泄露具有社交传染性，观察同伴泄露后风险提升8倍，即使有隐私指令仍有37.8%以上泄露率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全评估主要在隔离环境中测试模型，但实际部署的AI代理通常存在于持续社交环境中，因此需要评估社交上下文对隐私泄露等安全问题的真实影响。
AI.method: 基于Moltbook风格构建模拟平台，部署数千个LLM代理在多个社区中交互一个月，通过改变社交压力程度，评估多轮社交互动场景下的隐私泄露情况。
AI.result: 单轮到多轮社交评估使隐私泄露率从19.95%升至45.30%；观察同伴泄露后代理泄露概率提升8倍；显式隐私指令仅能将泄露率降至37.8%以上。
AI.conclusion: 静态聊天式安全基准系统性地低估了代理部署中的风险，仅社交上下文就足以引发单轮评估无法发现的敏感信息披露。

title: Continual Learning in Modern Hopfield Networks with an Application to Diffusion Models
summary: Generative models, including diffusion models, are increasingly used as foundation models and adapted through sequential fine-tuning, making continual learning an essential problem setting. However, continual learning in such generative models remains poorly understood: after a task change, what aspects of the learned distribution are most easily lost, and what replay samples should be prioritized? We address these questions through the modern Hopfield energy. Recent links between modern Hopfield networks (MHNs) and diffusion models allow analyses in MHNs to be transferred to diffusion models. We introduce intrinsic forgetting as an increase in Hopfield energy after the task change. In tractable settings in an MHN, we prove that high-energy, outlier-like samples undergo a larger energy increase than cluster-like samples, implying that samples located in sharp, isolated basins are more forgettable. We further analyze memory replay and show that replay is particularly effective for high-energy samples, enabling an energy-based selection of replay samples. We validate these predictions in experiments on MHNs and two diffusion models under continual-learning settings: Stable Diffusion and a pixel-space DDPM. In these diffusion models, Hopfield energy tracks reconstruction-based forgetting, and replay experiments reveal energy-dependent mitigation of forgetting that is consistent with the MHN analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文通过现代Hopfield能量分析生成模型（尤其是扩散模型）在持续学习中的遗忘机制，发现高能量、离群样本比聚类样本更容易遗忘，并验证了基于能量的回放策略可以有效缓解遗忘。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型等生成模型作为基础模型被广泛使用，需要通过持续学习进行顺序微调，但当前对生成模型持续学习中遗忘机制的理解不足，特别是哪些样本容易被遗忘以及如何选择回放样本不明确。
AI.method: 利用现代Hopfield网络（MHN）与扩散模型之间的联系，引入"内在遗忘"概念（任务变化后Hopfield能量增加）。在MHN中理论证明高能量离群样本比聚类样本更易遗忘，并分析基于能量的回放策略效果，最后在Stable Diffusion和DDPM上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论证明高能量、离群样本在任务变化后能量增加更大，更易遗忘；基于能量的回放对高能量样本特别有效。在扩散模型实验中，Hopfield能量与重建遗忘相关，基于能量的回放能有效缓解遗忘。
AI.conclusion: Hopfield能量可作为生成模型持续学习中衡量和缓解遗忘的有效工具，高能量样本更易遗忘但也是回放的关键目标，为生成模型的持续学习提供了理论依据和实用策略。

title: UNIQUE: Universal Top-k Sparse Attention for Training-free Inference and Sparsity-aware Training
summary: Long-context inference in large language models (LLMs) is bottlenecked by the linear growth of the self-attention key-value (KV) cache. Top-k sparse attention alleviates this by loading only a small fraction of the KV cache, but accurately and cheaply estimating cache importance, for both training-free use and sparsity-aware training, remains challenging. This paper proposes UNIQUE, a universal top-k sparse attention framework that addresses both requirements and stays consistently effective across LLM modalities. UNIQUE operates at the granularity of KV pages and estimates per-page importance with a simple yet accurate score combining the mean of the page's keys as a representative vector with their standard deviation as an offset term. To further close the train-inference gap, this paper introduces a soft-mask sparsity-aware training scheme that uses the top-k score boundary as a per-query threshold and a sigmoid soft mask around it, requiring neither auxiliary losses nor architectural changes. Experiments on text and speech LLMs show that UNIQUE preserves task performance on long-context benchmarks such as LongBench Pro and on long-form speech recognition, while delivering up to 11.4x attention-kernel speedup over FlashInfer dense attention and at least 5.3x end-to-end decoding speedup over a vLLM-based dense model.

AI.tldr: UNIQUE是一个通用的top-k稀疏注意力框架，通过KV页面粒度的重要性评分（键均值+标准差）和软掩码稀疏感知训练，在不牺牲任务性能的前提下，实现高达11.4倍的注意力核加速和5.3倍的端到端解码加速。
AI.motivation: 长上下文推理中，自注意力KV缓存线性增长成为瓶颈。现有的top-k稀疏注意力虽然通过只加载少量KV缓存来缓解该问题，但如何准确且低成本地估计缓存重要性（同时满足免训练使用和稀疏感知训练）仍然是一个挑战。
AI.method: UNIQUE以KV页面为粒度，利用页面键的均值作为代表性向量，结合标准差作为偏移项来估计每页重要性。此外，提出软掩码稀疏感知训练方案，以top-k分数边界作为每查询阈值，使用sigmoid软掩码，无需辅助损失或架构改动。
AI.result: 在文本和语音LLM上，UNIQUE在LongBench Pro和长语音识别等基准上保持任务性能，同时相比FlashInfer密集注意力实现最高11.4倍注意力核加速，相比基于vLLM的密集模型实现至少5.3倍端到端解码加速。
AI.conclusion: UNIQUE是一个通用的top-k稀疏注意力框架，能有效弥合训练与推理之间的差距，在不同LLM模态下均保持有效，大幅提升长上下文推理效率。

title: How the Optimizer Shapes Learned Solutions in Equivariant Neural Networks
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Weight-Space Symmetries
summary: Equivariant neural networks encode geometric symmetries by construction, yet they are often difficult to optimize and can underperform less constrained architectures. A growing body of work addresses this through architectural modifications such as constraint relaxation or approximate equivariance, while the role of the optimizer remains comparatively underexplored. We study this direction by comparing Muon and Adam across several equivariant and geometric architectures under pointcloud and molecular learning settings. On ModelNet40, where the comparison is clearest, Muon consistently improves over Adam across all architectures considered. We then analyze the trained ModelNet40 checkpoints through Hessian estimates, loss surface visualizations, and spectral properties of learned weights and intermediate representations. The checkpoints reached by Muon have larger Hessian curvature summaries but more regular loss surfaces, and their learned weights and representations have higher stable and effective ranks. These observations suggest that the interaction between optimizer design and geometric inductive bias deserves further attention from the community.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同优化器（Muon和Adam）对等变神经网络在点云和分子学习任务中的影响，发现Muon在ModelNet40上始终优于Adam，且其训练出的模型具有更大的Hessian曲率但更规则的损失曲面，以及更高稳定性和有效秩的权重与表征。
AI.motivation: 等变神经网络虽然内嵌几何对称性，但优化困难，性能有时不如非约束架构。现有研究多从架构修改入手，而优化器的作用未被充分探索。
AI.method: 在点云和分子学习场景下，对比Muon和Adam优化器在多种等变和几何架构上的表现，并通过Hessian估计、损失曲面可视化、权重与表征的谱性质分析训练后的检查点。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40上，Muon在所有架构中一致优于Adam。Muon训练出的检查点具有更大的Hessian曲率汇总值、更规则的损失曲面，以及更高的稳定有效秩。
AI.conclusion: 优化器设计与几何归纳偏置之间的交互作用值得社区进一步关注。

title: Auditable Decision Models with Learned Abstention and Real-Time Steering
summary: Production AI systems often operate with incomplete, conflicting, or insufficient evidence. Forced classifiers collapse such cases into action labels, while generative systems can produce outputs that are difficult to interpret as auditable execution decisions. We study operational decision control for AI systems, where uncertainty must be explicitly routable, policy-governed, and auditable rather than hidden inside forced predictions or free-form generation. We present EvaluatorDPT, a bounded decision-control model that predicts YES, NO, or TBD, where TBD is learned as a deferral outcome rather than added only as a post-hoc confidence rule. The model uses a transformer encoder with a primary bounded-decision head and structured auxiliary channels for values and emotions/sentiments. The interface is domain-agnostic in form: a deployment domain supplies evidence and policy thresholds, while the model emits a bounded distribution that can be controlled at inference time through recorded operating thresholds and, when validated, auxiliary semantic signals. For the evaluated model version, we report decision performance on held-out validation and test splits; auxiliary emotion metrics are omitted because the emotion head is disabled for this evaluation. On the held-out test split (n=44,597), the model achieves Accuracy = 0.8260 and Macro F1 = 0.8252, with per-class F1 of 0.8314 (YES), 0.8486 (NO), and 0.7956 (TBD). The evaluation record also includes calibration evidence (ECE = 0.0338 on validation), threshold-sweep outputs, multi-seed stability checks, confusion matrices, and reproducibility commands. Our main contribution is a bounded execution interface in which deferral is learned, inference-time routing remains inspectable, auxiliary signals provide a path to auditable behavior control, and evaluation evidence supports external review.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvaluatorDPT，一个将不确定性显式路由为YES/NO/TBD三值决策的模型，其中TBD是学习得到的延迟输出，而不是后处理置信度规则。模型使用transformer编码器，包含主决策头和辅助通道（情感/价值观），在测试集上达到Accuracy=0.8260, Macro F1=0.8252。
AI.motivation: 现有生产级AI系统在处理不完整、冲突或不足证据时存在缺陷：强制分类器将不确定情况强行归入某一标签，生成式系统则难以审计其执行决策。作者希望构建一个可审计、可路由、受策略约束的决策控制接口，而非将不确定性隐藏在强制预测或自由生成中。
AI.method: 提出EvaluatorDPT模型，使用transformer编码器，包含：(1) 主边界决策头，输出YES/NO/TBD的分布；(2) 结构化辅助通道（价值观、情感/情绪）。TBD作为学习得到的延迟输出，而非后处理规则。推理时可通过记录操作阈值和辅助语义信号进行控制。接口领域无关，部署域提供证据和策略阈值。
AI.result: 在保留测试集(n=44,597)上：Accuracy=0.8260，Macro F1=0.8252；各类别F1：YES=0.8314，NO=0.8486，TBD=0.7956；验证集ECE=0.0338（校准证据）。还提供了阈值扫描、多种子稳定性检查、混淆矩阵和可复现命令。
AI.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了一种有界执行接口，其中延迟被学习得到，推理时路由可检查，辅助信号为可审计行为控制提供路径，评估证据支持外部审查。

title: Learning to Bid in Repeated Second-Price Auctions with Dynamic Values and Aggregated Feedback
summary: We study the problem of learning to bid when the bidder's value is dynamic, i.e., when the current value depends on past outcomes. Specifically, we consider a bidder participating in repeated second-price auctions whose value depends on the time elapsed since their last successful bid, with auctions arriving in continuous time and only aggregated feedback revealed at the end of the horizon. Such a bidder must (1) balance the immediate benefit of winning the current auction against its impact on future values and (2) learn unknown environmental parameters. We derive regret bounds for a class of learning methods that combine plug-in estimators with a differential-equation characterization of the optimal policy, and show that a specific confidence bound algorithm learns the optimal policy with a near optimal regret of $\widetilde{O}(\log N)$ for piecewise linear primitives, and $\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$ for general, smooth primitives, achieving these regrets without explicit randomization. These theoretical results are supported by numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在重复拍卖中，当投标者的价值动态变化（依赖于上次成功竞标后的时间）时，如何学习最优投标策略。作者结合插件估计器与微分方程刻画的最优策略，提出了在仅有聚合反馈下的学习算法，并证明了在分段线性基元下接近最优的$\widetilde{O}(\log N)$遗憾界，以及在一般光滑基元下的$\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 在实际拍卖场景中，投标者的价值往往不是静态的，而是依赖于历史竞标结果（如库存消耗或预算限制）。现有研究多假设价值固定，忽略了动态价值对长期收益的影响。本文旨在解决动态价值设定下，投标者如何在价值依赖过去结果的情况下，平衡即时收益与未来价值，并同时学习未知环境参数的问题。
AI.method: 1. 将问题建模为连续时间下的重复第二价格拍卖，投标者价值取决于上次成功竞标后的时间。2. 利用微分方程刻画最优投标策略。3. 设计结合插件估计器（plug-in estimators）与置信界（confidence bound）的学习算法。4. 对分段线性基元推导$\widetilde{O}(\log N)$遗憾界，对一般光滑基元推导$\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$遗憾界，且无需显式随机化。
AI.result: 1. 理论结果：在仅有聚合反馈（仅知整段时间的总收益和总支付）的条件下，算法实现了近最优遗憾：分段线性基元下$\widetilde{O}(\log N)$，一般光滑基元下$\widetilde{O}(N^{1/3})$。2. 实验验证：数值实验支持了理论结果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了即使面对动态价值和有限反馈，通过结合微分方程与置信界方法仍能实现高效学习，且无需随机化策略。该工作为动态定价、库存管理等实际应用提供了理论支撑。

title: Escape the Language Prior: Mitigating Late-Stage Modality Collapse in Audio Reasoning via Modality-Aware Policy Optimization
summary: Audio and omni-modal large language models exhibit impressive cross-modal reasoning capabilities. However, applying standard reinforcement learning post-training algorithms to these models exposes a critical structural vulnerability: methods like GRPO apply uniform policy gradients across all tokens, ignoring their unequal dependence on the non-text source modality. This exacerbates late-stage modality collapse during extended chain-of-thought generation, where models progressively abandon the primary source signal in favor of compressed textual priors, leading to confident but ungrounded hallucinations. To address this, we introduce Modality-Aware Policy Optimization (MAPO), a novel dual-branch reinforcement learning framework. First, MAPO dynamically concentrates the policy gradient on modality-critical tokens using a modality relevance mask, which is derived from the cross-modal differential entropy between an audio-ablated reference and the multimodal policy. Second, it integrates an auxiliary attention loss branch that applies a targeted, temporally scaled penalty to the model's internal attention distributions. This ensures the model actively sustains cross-modal grounding deep into the reasoning trace. Evaluations on complex audio reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that MAPO substantially improves long-horizon reasoning fidelity and multimodal instruction following, achieving highly competitive performance and setting new state-of-the-art results on several key benchmarks among open-weight models. By relying strictly on native statistical signals rather than domain-specific inductive biases, MAPO offers a promising foundation for mitigating epistemic collapse across diverse multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAPO，一种针对音频多模态大语言模型的双分支强化学习框架，通过模态感知梯度掩码和注意力惩罚机制，有效缓解跨模态推理中的模态坍缩和幻觉问题，在多个基准上取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习后训练算法（如GRPO）对所有token施加均匀策略梯度，忽略了它们对非文本源模态的不平等依赖，导致模型在长链思维生成过程中逐渐放弃原始音频信号而依赖文本先验，产生自信但无根据的幻觉。
AI.method: MAPO包含两个核心分支：(1) 模态感知策略优化——通过音频消融参考与多模态策略之间的跨模态微分熵导出模态相关掩码，动态将策略梯度集中在模态关键token上；(2) 辅助注意力损失分支——对模型内部注意力分布施加目标性的时间缩放惩罚，确保模型在推理深处仍保持跨模态锚定。
AI.result: 在复杂音频推理基准上，MAPO显著提升了长时推理保真度和多模态指令跟随能力，在多个关键基准上达到开源模型中的SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: MAPO仅依赖原生统计信号而非领域特定归纳偏置，为缓解跨模态系统中的认知坍缩提供了有前景的基础框架。

title: Aligning LLMs with Human Uncertainty: A Beta-Bernoulli Calibrator for LLM Forecasting
summary: Probabilistic forecasting estimates the likelihood of uncertain future events. To improve LLM forecasting, existing methods typically learn from binary outcomes to output verbalized forecasts. However, while aggregated human forecasts contain rich information in both the crowd probability estimate and the degree of agreement among forecasters, how to utilize these signals remains underexplored. To address this, we propose the Beta-Bernoulli Calibrator (BBC), which converts an initial point estimate forecast from any model into a distribution over event likelihood, using supervision from both binary outcomes and human forecasts. BBC models event likelihood $p \sim \text{Beta}(α, β)$ and outcome $y \sim \text{Bernoulli}(p)$, with the mean as the calibrated point forecast and the variance as the epistemic uncertainty. Our results show that BBC generally provides better calibrated and more accurate forecasts than both traditional post-hoc calibration methods and models fine-tuned specifically for forecasting, while remaining lightweight and having good generalization.
