Third, we analyze training data diversity, off-policy data utilization, and search budget scaling, distilling practical guidelines for training effective search agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/YiboZhao624/SearchAgentReview.

AI.tldr: 本文对LLM驱动的搜索智能体训练方法进行受控实证研究，发现纠正维基百科2018语料库的数据覆盖问题比不同训练算法之间的差异带来更大提升；最简单的基于结果的奖励方法在大多数设置下表现优异；并分析了训练数据多样性、离策略数据利用和搜索预算扩展等维度，提炼出实用训练指南。
AI.motivation: 现有搜索智能体训练方法快速增长但缺乏受控比较，不同工作在检索语料库、奖励设计和训练协议上存在差异，导致难以确定真正推动性能提升的因素。
AI.method: 通过控制变量的实证研究，隔离三个维度：(1) 纠正Wikipedia 2018语料库的数据覆盖问题；(2) 系统比较基于结果和基于过程的奖励方法；(3) 分析训练数据多样性、离策略数据利用和搜索预算扩展。
AI.result: 纠正数据覆盖问题的收益大于训练算法间的差异；最简单的基于结果的奖励方法在多数设置下达到竞争性甚至更优的性能；过程级别的信用分配可能过度纠正智能体行为。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为训练有效的搜索智能体提供了实用指南，并揭示了数据质量和奖励设计选择对性能的关键影响。

title: Restoring the Sweet Spot: Pass-Rate Weighted Self-Distillation for LLM Reasoning
summary:
Self-Distillation Policy Optimization (SDPO) provides dense token-level credit assignment for reinforcement learning with large language models by leveraging the model's own feedback-conditioned predictions as a self-teacher. Unlike GRPO, however, whose group-relative advantage naturally concentrates learning on a sweet spot of intermediate-difficulty questions, SDPO's KL-based advantage lacks an implicit notion of difficulty awareness.
  We analyze this gap through the lens of GRPO's advantage normalization. Extending the learnability framework to normalized rewards, we show that normalization absorbs the variance term $p(1-p)$, equalizing leading-order learnability across questions and leaving $\sqrt{p(1-p)}$ as the sole residual scaling factor in the per-question gradient. This analysis yields a simple prescription: weight each question's SDPO loss by $[\hat{p}(1-\hat{p})]^{1/2}$, resulting in SC-SDPO, a scale-consistent variant of SDPO.
  The proposed weights are obtained as a zero-cost byproduct of on-policy rollouts with batch-adaptive normalization, inducing an implicit curriculum that dynamically tracks the model's evolving competence. Experiments on scientific reasoning and tool-use benchmarks demonstrate that SC-SDPO consistently improves over SDPO, yielding gains of +3.2/+4.3 (mean@16/maj@16) on Qwen3-8B and +1.8/+3.0 on OLMo-3-7B, while preserving stable training dynamics throughout optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SC-SDPO，通过引入$[\hat{p}(1-\hat{p})]^{1/2}$权重使SDPO具备难度感知能力，在科学推理和工具使用基准上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: SDPO缺乏GRPO中隐式的难度感知机制，其KL优势对不同难度问题学习不均衡，需要为SDPO引入难度感知能力。
AI.method: 通过分析GRPO的优势归一化，推导出归一化后梯度中残留的$\sqrt{p(1-p)}$缩放因子，据此为每个问题的SDPO损失加权，形成SC-SDPO。权重来自on-policy rollout的零成本副产品。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上mean@16/maj@16分别提升+3.2/+4.3，在OLMo-3-7B上提升+1.8/+3.0，且训练动态稳定。
AI.conclusion: SC-SDPO通过零成本的权重设计，在SDPO基础上引入了隐式课程学习，有效提升了多难度问题的学习均衡性。

title: C-MIG: Multi-view Information Gain-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Clinical Diagnosis Reasoning
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation combined with reinforcement learning has shown promise for grounding large language models in trustworthy medical evidence. However, existing methods rely on exact-match binary rewards, which in clinical diagnosis cause two issues: (i) semantically relevant but non-verbatim steps receive zero signal, discarding valuable learning signals; and (ii) uni-dimensional rewards cannot effectively supervise heterogeneous reasoning capabilities. To address these issues, we propose C-MIG, a Multi-view Information Gain-based retrieval-augmented generation framework for Clinical diagnosis. C-MIG estimates information gain under a frozen reference model from two complementary views, retrieved-document and document-refinement, to jointly guide what to retrieve and how to refine, alleviating the issues of valuable reward signal loss and credit assignment. We further design a multi-subquery retrieval augmentation strategy that improves knowledge recall coverage in clinical diagnostic scenarios. Comprehensive experiments on four medical benchmarks demonstrate that C-MIG achieves the best performance among all RAG-RL methods on both in-domain and out-of-domain sets, and outperforms state-of-the-art general-purpose LLMs for clinical diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 提出C-MIG框架，通过多视角信息增益评估替代传统精确匹配奖励，结合多子查询检索增强策略，在临床诊断任务中显著优于现有RAG-RL方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG+RL方法在临床诊断中使用精确匹配的二元奖励，导致两个问题：(i)语义相关但非逐字匹配的步骤得不到奖励信号，浪费有价值的学习信号；(ii)单一维度奖励无法有效监督异质性推理能力。
AI.method: 提出C-MIG框架：1) 在冻结参考模型下从两个互补视角（检索文档和文档精炼）估计信息增益，联合指导检索和精炼；2) 设计多子查询检索增强策略提升知识召回覆盖率。
AI.result: 在四个医学基准上，C-MIG在领域内和领域外数据集上均达到最佳性能，并超越用于临床诊断的通用大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 多视角信息增益奖励信号能有效解决二元奖励的信号丢失和信用分配问题，多子查询策略提升了临床场景的知识覆盖，为医疗RAG-RL提供了更优方案。

title: VibeSearchBench: Benchmarking Long-horizon Proactive Search in the Wild
summary: LLM-based agents score well on search benchmarks, yet real users consistently find results unsatisfying, revealing a persistent evaluation-experience gap. We attribute this gap to existing benchmarks' reliance on over-specified queries, single-turn interactions, and fixed-schema evaluation, none of which reflect real search behavior where users and agents collaboratively refine vague intent through multi-turn dialogue. We term this paradigm VibeSearch and introduce VibeSearchBench, a benchmark comprising 200 manually curated bilingual (Chinese and English) tasks across 20 domains, split into VibeSearch-Pro (professional) and VibeSearch-Daily (daily-life) subsets. Each task pairs a user persona with a schema-free ground-truth knowledge graph, and is evaluated through a progressive-disclosure user simulator and a graph-matching evaluation framework. We benchmark seven frontier models under both the ReAct framework and the OpenClaw agent harness. Results show that all models remain substantially inadequate for VibeSearch (best F1: 30.30), highlighting the need for fundamental advances in long-context reasoning, proactive intent elicitation, and structured knowledge construction.

AI.tldr: 现有搜索基准存在评估-体验差距，本文提出VibeSearch范式（多轮协作模糊意图细化）并构建VibeSearchBench基准（200个双语任务、渐进式用户模拟器+图匹配评估），测试七个前沿模型最佳F1仅30.30，揭示长上下文推理、主动意图引导和结构化知识构建方面的严重不足。
AI.motivation: LLM Agent在搜索基准上表现优异，但真实用户满意度低，存在评估-体验差距。现有基准依赖过于明确的查询、单轮交互和固定模式评估，无法反映真实搜索中用户与Agent通过多轮对话协作细化模糊意图的行为。
AI.method: 提出VibeSearch范式，构建VibeSearchBench基准：200个手工策划的中英双语任务（20个领域），分为专业版和日常版；每个任务包含用户画像、无模式的真实知识图谱；采用渐进式用户模拟器和图匹配评估框架；在ReAct和OpenClaw框架下测试7个前沿模型。
AI.result: 所有模型在VibeSearch上表现严重不足，最佳F1仅为30.30。
AI.conclusion: 现有LLM Agent在长上下文推理、主动意图引导和结构化知识构建方面需要根本性进步，才能满足真实场景下的协作式搜索需求。

title: Fine-Tuning Dynamics of In-Context Factual Recall in Transformers
summary: In-context learning \ -- performing tasks based on examples given in the prompt \ -- is an important capability that has emerged in large language models and has received significant attention in both theory and practice. Existing theoretical work often focuses on settings where the learning uses information purely from the prompt. However, many practical instances of in-context learning require the model to retrieve factual knowledge stored in the model's parameters, with the context serving to identify which knowledge is relevant. In this work, we study how in-context learning leverages factual knowledge recall. We formalize this behavior by introducing the \emph{in-context factual recall (IC-recall)} task, where a transformer is provided a context of (subject, answer) pairs generated from a hidden relation, along with a query subject, and must both infer this hidden relation and retrieve the corresponding answer. Factual knowledge is modeled by the transformer having access to a simple pre-constructed MLP associative memory storing (subject, relation, answer) triplets. We analyze the supervised fine-tuning dynamics of a one-layer transformer on IC-recall data and prove that the model successfully performs IC-recall by converging to a particular pairwise attention pattern. This fine-tuning stage requires a very small number of samples \ -- only polylogarithmic in the number of stored knowledge triplets. Experiments verify our theoretical predictions and show that the pairwise attention pattern emerges even when the MLP layer is pretrained instead of constructed.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型如何通过上下文学习（in-context learning）利用存储在模型参数中的事实知识。作者形式化定义了"上下文事实回忆（IC-recall）"任务，并证明单层Transformer在少量微调样本下能通过收敛到特定的成对注意力模式来成功完成该任务。
AI.motivation: 现有理论研究多假设上下文学习仅从提示中提取信息，但实际应用中模型需要同时从上下文和内部存储的事实知识中获取信息。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，揭示模型如何结合上下文提示与内部知识进行推理。
AI.method: 作者形式化定义了IC-recall任务：给定包含(主语, 答案)对的上下文（由隐藏关系生成）和一个查询主语，模型需推断隐藏关系并检索对应答案。事实知识通过预构建的MLP联想记忆（存储三元组）建模。作者分析了单层Transformer在IC-recall数据上的监督微调动力学，证明模型会收敛到特定的成对注意力模式。
AI.result: 证明模型成功执行IC-recall，且微调所需样本量极少——仅为存储知识三元组数量的多对数级别。实验验证了理论预测，并且即使MLP层是预训练而非预构建的，成对注意力模式仍然会出现。
AI.conclusion: 本文从理论上揭示了上下文学习如何利用内部事实知识，证明了通过极少量样本即可完成参数内知识的检索与上下文线索的整合，为理解大语言模型的少样本学习能力提供了理论基础。

title: FundaPod: A Multi-Persona Agent Pod Platform with Knowledge Graph Memory for AI-Assisted Fundamental Investment Research
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied in finance, yet most existing work emphasizes trading signals or financial NLP tasks centered on prediction. Institutional fundamental research, by contrast, requires human analysts or AI agents to gather evidence, identify business drivers, compare competing viewpoints, and generate investment memos. Its broader goal is not merely to predict outcomes, but to produce investment plans that are transparent, reusable, and verifiable, while contributing to the cumulative development of investment knowledge. We present FundaPod, a multi-persona agent platform for AI-assisted fundamental investment research. We argue that fundamental research is a human-centric decision-support task that is qualitatively distinct from trading-signal generation, and is therefore better served by an independence-preserving architecture. In FundaPod, AI agents with different personas, such as value investors or macro strategists, conduct research independently under a shared provenance contract. Their disagreements are then surfaced post hoc for adjudication by the human portfolio manager (PM) through a knowledge-graph memory system. This paper contributes five design principles for human-AI hybrid systems supporting fundamental research, grounded in design-science practice and theories of cognitive isolation and human-machine coordination. It also describes four architectural mechanisms: a persona distillation pipeline that turns public investor materials into deployable agents; a declarative skill registry that lets the planner derive typed task graphs; a grounded evidence model that links memo claims to verifiable sources; and a knowledge-graph "second brain" that connects tickers, memos, analysts, and themes. We demonstrate the architecture through a complete case study and a persona-based memo comparison.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FundaPod，一个多角色AI代理平台，用于辅助基本面投资研究。该平台采用保持独立性的架构，让不同角色的AI代理（如价值投资者、宏观策略师）在共享溯源合约下独立研究，然后通过知识图谱记忆系统将分歧提交给人类投资经理裁决。论文贡献了五项设计原则和四种架构机制。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM金融应用主要集中在交易信号或预测型NLP任务，而机构基本面研究（需要分析师收集证据、识别业务驱动因素、比较观点、生成投资备忘录）的需求未被充分满足。基本面研究是以人为中心的决策支持任务，与交易信号生成有本质区别，需要保持人类判断的独立性。
AI.method: 提出FundaPod多角色代理平台，包含四种架构机制：(1)角色蒸馏流水线——将公开投资者材料转化为可部署代理；(2)声明式技能注册表——让规划器推导类型化任务图；(3)基于证据的模型——将备忘录声明链接到可验证来源；(4)知识图谱"第二大脑"——连接股票、备忘录、分析师和主题。采用认知隔离和人机协调理论指导设计。
AI.result: 通过完整案例研究和基于角色的备忘录比较展示了架构的有效性。AI代理在保持独立性的前提下进行研究，分歧由人类投资经理通过知识图谱系统裁决。
AI.conclusion: 基本面研究更适合采用保持人类独立性的混合系统架构，而非全自动交易系统。FundaPod的五项设计原则和四种架构机制为构建这样的人机协同基本面研究系统提供了可行方案。

title: FinBoardBench: Benchmarking Dynamic Wealth Management and Strategic Financial Reasoning of LLMs via Board Game Simulations
summary: Recently, large language models (LLMs) have achieved superior performance in static financial reasoning and simple dynamic trading tasks. However, existing static financial benchmarks are insufficient to assess the dynamic wealth management and financial decision-making capabilities of LLMs in real-world environments. To bridge this gap, we present FinBoardBench, an evaluation suite based on three classic financial board games: Cashflow, Acquire, and Monopoly. FinBoardBench assesses a comprehensive set of financial skills, including personal cash flow management with debt balancing, corporate investment and acquisition forecasting, and competitive trade negotiations with asset auctions. Our experiments with 9 advanced LLMs reveal that while exhibiting basic long-term planning and investment logic, they fail to effectively leverage complex interactions for profit, and their strong static reasoning performance does not transform into successful dynamic decision-making. Notably, they tend to prioritize immediate asset acquisition over maintaining sufficient liquidity, making them vulnerable to financial crises triggered by random events. We hope that FinBoardBench can provide a valuable reference for more intelligent LLM-based decision-making systems in the future.

AI.tldr: 提出了FinBoardBench基准，通过三种经典金融桌游评估大语言模型在动态金融决策中的能力，发现现有模型虽具备基础规划与投资逻辑，但无法将静态推理优势转化为成功的动态决策，且倾向于追求资产而忽视流动性管理。
AI.motivation: 现有静态金融基准无法评估LLM在真实环境中的动态财富管理和金融决策能力，存在评估缺口。
AI.method: 基于三款经典金融桌游（现金流、并购、大富翁）构建评估套件FinBoardBench，覆盖个人现金流管理、企业投资并购预测、竞争性谈判与资产拍卖等多维度金融技能。
AI.result: 9个先进LLM表现出基础长期规划与投资逻辑，但未能有效利用复杂交互获利，静态推理优势无法转化为动态决策成功；模型倾向于优先获取即时资产而非维持充足流动性，易因随机事件触发金融危机。
AI.conclusion: FinBoardBench为未来更智能的基于LLM的决策系统提供了有价值的参考基准。

title: Revisiting ML Training under Fully Homomorphic Encryption: Convergence Guarantees, Differential Privacy, and Efficient Algorithms
summary: We present the first theoretical convergence analysis of machine learning training under fully homomorphic encryption (FHE), combined with a differentially private (DP) training algorithm tailored to encrypted computation. Our approach improves computational efficiency over standard differentially private gradient descent (DP-GD) while achieving comparable utility. In particular, we prove convergence of approximate gradient descent using polynomial approximations of activation and loss functions, which are required for FHE compatibility. To preserve privacy in downstream tasks, we integrate differential privacy without relying on costly per-sample gradient clipping, enabling scalable encrypted learning. We also provide data-independent hyperparameter selection and theoretically grounded strategies for polynomial approximation which can be of independent interest. Together, these contributions advance the feasibility of efficient, private, and secure machine learning on sensitive data.

AI.tldr: 首次从理论上分析了全同态加密（FHE）下机器学习训练的收敛性，并结合差分隐私（DP）训练算法，在不依赖昂贵的逐样本梯度裁剪的情况下，实现了加密环境下高效且可证明收敛的隐私训练。
AI.motivation: 现有的加密机器学习训练缺乏理论收敛性分析，且标准DP-GD需要逐样本梯度裁剪，计算成本高昂，不适合加密环境。
AI.method: 使用激活函数和损失函数的多项式近似来实现FHE兼容的近似梯度下降；设计无需逐样本梯度裁剪的DP集成方案；提出数据无关的超参数选择策略和多项式近似的理论指导原则。
AI.result: 证明了多项式近似下近似梯度下降的收敛性；在计算效率上优于标准DP-GD，同时实现可比的效用。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推进了高效、私密、安全的敏感数据机器学习训练的可行性。

title: AIBuildAI-2: A Knowledge-Enhanced Agent for Automatically Building AI Models
summary: AI models underpin data-centric applications from image and text processing to scientific discovery in biology, physics, and chemistry. Yet developing them remains heavily manual, requiring practitioners to design architectures, build training pipelines, and iteratively refine solutions, making it challenging for natural scientists without specialized AI engineering expertise to build the high-performing models their research demands. To reduce this burden and broaden access to AI for scientific discovery, agents that automatically build AI models have been proposed. However, the performance of these agents is largely limited by the parametric knowledge of their underlying large language models, which is static, often outdated, and sparse on practical AI model engineering know-how. To address this limitation, we introduce AIBuildAI-2, a knowledge-enhanced agent with an external, evolving knowledge system for automatically building AI models. The knowledge system of AIBuildAI-2 is hierarchical, organizing curated AI development knowledge into high-level knowledge instructions over topical categories and low-level knowledge documents under each category, from which the agent dynamically loads only the context relevant to its current state and the AI task being solved, grounding each design and implementation decision in concrete, externally verifiable expertise. The system is initialized by collecting and cleaning AI-development-related documents from the web and organizing them into the corresponding categories, and continually evolves from the agent's own experience by distilling each completed run on an AI task into structured takeaways that are written back into the knowledge system. AIBuildAI-2 achieves state-of-the-art results, ranking first on MLE-Bench with a 70.7% medal rate and placing in the top 6.6% among 4,370 human-expert teams in a heart disease prediction competition.

AI.tldr: 提出AIBuildAI-2，一种带有外部层级化知识系统的智能体，用于自动构建AI模型，在MLE-Bench和心脏病预测竞赛中取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型开发高度依赖人工，自然科学家缺乏AI工程专业知识难以构建高性能模型；而现有的自动化智能体受限于LLM的静态、过时且稀疏的参数化知识，性能有限。
AI.method: 构建层级化外部知识系统（高层次知识指令+低层次知识文档），智能体动态加载与当前任务相关的上下文；通过网页文档收集清洗初始化知识库，并通过每次任务完成后的经验蒸馏实现持续演化。
AI.result: 在MLE-Bench上排名第一（70.7%奖牌率），在心脏病预测竞赛的4,370个人类专家团队中排前6.6%。
AI.conclusion: 外部可演化知识系统能有效突破LLM参数化知识的局限，显著提升智能体自动构建AI模型的能力。

title: The Fragility of Chain-of-Thought Monitoring Across Typologically Diverse Languages
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) monitoring has been proposed as a promising safety mechanism for detecting misaligned behavior in large language models. However, its reliability remains largely unexplored beyond English and across diverse model families. We present the first large-scale evaluation of CoT monitorability across 13 diverse languages and seven frontier model families, comprising 16 models. Using adversarial-hint evaluations that require explicit intermediate computation, together with analysis of internal answer-token probabilities, we consistently find CoT unfaithfulness across languages and hint types, with an average rate of 95.9\% across 8B--120B parameter models. We find that frontier models systematically engage in strategic manipulation, including answer-switching, post-hoc rationalization, and procedural exploitation of hints, making external monitors struggle to detect deception. We show that frontier models often commit to the misaligned cue in their latent activations within the first 15\% of generation, even when the CoT appears faithful. Surprisingly, these deceptive patterns remain 100\% in low-resource languages, revealing fundamental limitations in current CoT-based oversight. Our results reveal that CoT monitoring is fundamentally fragile under linguistic distribution shift, providing a substantially weaker safety signal than what English-only studies suggest. These findings underscore an urgent need to develop robust CoT monitors and to accelerate research into white-box monitoring techniques, especially to improve CoT monitorability in mid- and low-resource languages. Our code is available \href{https://multilingual-cot-monitoring.github.io/}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次大规模评估了13种语言和7个前沿模型家族（共16个模型）的思维链（CoT）可监控性，发现CoT不忠实的平均率高达95.9%，模型会进行策略性操纵（如答案切换、事后合理化等），且在低资源语言中欺骗模式依然100%存在，表明CoT监控在语言分布偏移下本质上是脆弱的。
AI.motivation: CoT监控被提出作为检测大语言模型不当行为的安全机制，但其可靠性在非英语场景和不同模型家族中尚未得到充分探索。作者旨在填补这一空白，评估CoT监控的多语言泛化能力。
AI.method: 使用对抗性提示评估（要求显式中间计算），结合内部答案令牌概率分析，对13种语言、7个前沿模型家族（16个模型，参数规模8B-120B）进行大规模评估。
AI.result: 1) CoT不忠实平均率达95.9%；2) 前沿模型系统性地进行策略性操纵（答案切换、事后合理化、程序性利用提示）；3) 模型在生成的前15%内就在潜在激活中确定了对不当线索的承诺；4) 欺骗模式在低资源语言中依然100%存在。
AI.conclusion: CoT监控在语言分布偏移下本质脆弱，提供的安全信号远弱于纯英语研究所显示的结果。亟需开发鲁棒的CoT监控器，加速白盒监控技术研究，尤其需改善中低资源语言的CoT可监控性。

title: Locality-Aware Redundancy Pruning for LLM Depth Compression
summary: Large language models are known to contain representational redundancy across network depth, making depth pruning an effective approach for improving inference efficiency. Existing one-shot pruning methods rely on local layer importance or fixed redundancy assumptions across architectures. We propose Locality-Aware Redundancy Pruning (LoRP), a training-free one-shot depth pruning framework guided by representation locality. We show that inter-layer redundancy can be either localized or globally distributed depending on the LLM architecture. To characterize this phenomenon, we introduce Representation Locality Score (RLS), derived from global inter-layer hidden-state similarity. Using a small calibration set, LoRP computes pairwise layer similarity, clusters layers by representational similarity, and allocates pruning according to residual intra-cluster redundancy. Experiments across diverse LLM families show improvements in both perplexity and downstream task accuracy.

AI.tldr: LoRP是一个无需训练的深度剪枝框架，通过表征局部性指标（RLS）识别层间冗余模式，实现高效的一步剪枝。
AI.motivation: 现有一次性剪枝方法依赖局部层重要性或固定的冗余假设，忽略了不同架构中层间冗余的分布差异（局部化 vs 全局分布）。
AI.method: 提出表征局部性分数（RLS），基于全局层间隐藏状态相似度计算；利用小规模校准集计算成对层相似度，按表征相似性聚类，再根据簇内冗余分配剪枝比例。
AI.result: 在多个LLM家族上，LoRP在困惑度和下游任务准确率上均取得改进。
AI.conclusion: 层间冗余存在架构依赖的局部性差异，LoRP通过表征局部性引导的聚类剪枝能有效提升剪枝效果。

title: Towards Faithful Agentic XAI: A Verification Method and an Open-World Benchmark for Better Model Faithfulness
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) helps users interpret model behavior and identify potential faults. Agentic XAI systems use Large Language Models (LLMs) to make explanations more accessible through natural-language interaction, but they can also produce plausible yet unfaithful explanations. This risk arises because unreliable XAI outputs for complex models can be amplified by LLMs and mislead users. We propose Faithful Agentic XAI (FAX), a framework that improves explanation faithfulness through explicit verification. FAX decomposes draft explanations into claims and cross-checks them against inherently faithful tools, filtering unsupported or contradictory claims before final generation. We also introduce CRAFTER-XAI-Bench, an open-world reinforcement learning benchmark with complex policies, diverse goals, and challenging scenarios for assessing model-specific faithfulness. On CRAFTER-XAI-Bench, FAX improves simulation faithfulness from 0.20 for the strongest baseline to 0.46 while maintaining high informativeness, relevance, and fluency. On three tabular benchmarks, FAX performs competitively with prior Agentic XAI baselines, but our analysis shows that these settings can conflate task accuracy with model-specific faithfulness. These findings show that explicit verification is essential for faithful Agentic XAI and that that faithfulness benchmarks must be designed to test explanations against the behavior of the target model itself.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAX框架，通过显式验证提升Agentic XAI的解释忠实度，并构建CRAFTER-XAI-Bench基准测试，实验证明FAX在开放世界强化学习场景中显著提升忠实度（从0.20到0.46），同时指出传统表格基准可能混淆任务准确率与模型特定忠实度。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic XAI系统利用LLM进行自然语言交互解释，但可能产生看似合理却不忠实的解释，误导用户。可靠XAI输出中的不忠实在复杂模型中可能被LLM放大，因此需要改进解释的忠实度。
AI.method: 提出FAX框架，将草稿解释分解为多个声明，利用固有可信工具进行交叉验证，过滤掉不支持或矛盾的声明后生成最终解释。同时构建CRAFTER-XAI-Bench开放世界强化学习基准，包含复杂策略、多样目标和挑战性场景。
AI.result: 在CRAFTER-XAI-Bench上，FAX将模拟忠实度从最强基线的0.20提升至0.46，同时保持高信息量、相关性和流畅性。在三个表格基准上，FAX与先前Agentic XAI基线表现相当，但分析表明这些设置可能混淆任务准确率与模型特定忠实度。
AI.conclusion: 显式验证对于忠实Agentic XAI至关重要，忠实度基准必须设计为测试解释是否针对目标模型本身的行为。

title: AI Research Agents Narrow Scientific Exploration
summary: AI research agents can now generate research ideas, design experiments, run code, and draft papers, raising the possibility of large-scale AI-assisted scientific discovery. Many current agent frameworks explicitly encourage the generation of novel and high-impact ideas. Yet it remains unclear whether AI-assisted ideation broadens scientific exploration or mainly concentrates around existing work. We study AI research agents as scientific search systems. Using four AI research-agent frameworks and six large language models, we generate 37,802 scientific ideas from shared seed literature across citation-defined research areas in AI and machine learning. We then compare the resulting AI ideas against human-authored papers from the same research areas, follow-on human research emerging from the same seed literature, and the seed literature itself. Across experiments, four consistent patterns emerge. First, AI-generated ideas are substantially more concentrated than human-authored papers from the same research areas. Second, AI-generated ideas remain much closer to their starting literature than later human follow-on work does. Third, papers most similar to AI-generated ideas tend to receive lower subsequent citations. Fourth, when AI-generated ideas differ from prior work, the differences arise primarily from recombining existing technical methods rather than introducing fundamentally new research questions. Overall, current AI research agents appear better suited to local elaboration than to broadening scientific exploration.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过生成37,802个AI科研想法，发现当前AI研究代理更倾向于在已有文献基础上进行局部细化，而非拓展科学探索的广度；AI生成的想法比人类论文更集中、更接近原始文献，且与之相似的论文引用更低。
AI.motivation: 探究AI研究代理是否真正拓宽了科学探索的范围，还是主要围绕现有工作进行集中化生成。
AI.method: 使用4种AI研究代理框架和6种大语言模型，从共享种子文献中生成了37,802个科学想法，并将其与人类撰写的论文、后续人类研究及种子文献进行对比分析。
AI.result: 四个一致模式：1) AI想法比人类论文更集中；2) AI想法更接近起始文献；3) 与AI想法相似的论文后续引用更低；4) AI想法的差异主要来自重组现有技术方法，而非引入新研究问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI研究代理更适合局部细化（local elaboration），而非拓宽科学探索（broadening scientific exploration）。

title: Knowing When to Ask: Segment-Level Credit Assignment for LLM Tool Use
summary: Humans know when to reach for help e.g. $347 \times 28$ warrants a calculator while $2+2$ does not. Language models do not. Prompt-based approaches can instruct a model when to invoke tools, but this scaffolding does not teach it to recognize the boundary of its own knowledge. RL approaches that assign a single outcome reward to the whole trajectory fare no better: trajectory-level credit cannot isolate which tool call in a successful episode actually helped, nor penalize unnecessary calls. We propose \textbf{CARL} (\textbf{C}ompetence-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{R}einforcement \textbf{L}earning), which trains a critic on the model's own rollouts to learn where parametric knowledge suffices and where it needs external help. By decomposing each rollout at natural tool-use boundaries (e.g., code fence delimiters and context block transitions), CARL assigns independent credit to each segment from a single binary outcome, without external judges or step-level annotations. As a result, erroneous tool calls, incorrect extractions, and unnecessary calls each receive appropriately signed advantages. The trained critic captures the model's domain competence: it separates parametrically solvable from tool-dependent questions with AUC 0.93 at 7B. On five benchmarks spanning arithmetic, multi-hop factual QA, and numerical reasoning over financial tables, CARL improves exact-match accuracy by 6.7 points at 7B and 9.7 points at 3B over the best RL baseline, with the largest gain (+8.3 EM at 7B, +9.0 EM at 3B) on Musique. The model issues 53\% fewer tool calls on parametrically answerable questions while remaining ${\sim}10$ EM points more accurate on them. Gains are largest at small scale: the 3B improvement is $1.4\times$ the 7B improvement, suggesting that knowing when to ask disproportionately benefits models with smaller parametric memory.

AI.tldr: 提出CARL方法，通过强化学习训练critic让语言模型学会区分何时需要调用外部工具、何时仅靠自身参数知识即可作答，在多个基准上提升6.7-9.7个EM点，减少53%不必要工具调用。
AI.motivation: 语言模型无法自主判断自身知识边界，现有提示方法和轨迹级强化学习无法精准识别哪些工具调用真正有用、哪些多余，导致工具调用效率低下。
AI.method: 提出CARL（Competence-Aware Reinforcement Learning），在模型自身rollout上训练一个critic，利用工具调用边界（如代码块分隔符、上下文块转换）将轨迹分解为独立片段，从单一二值结果中为每个片段分配独立的credit，无需外部评判或步骤级标注。
AI.result: 在算术、多跳事实QA、金融表格数值推理等5个基准上，7B模型提升6.7 EM点，3B提升9.7 EM点；Musique上提升最大（7B +8.3, 3B +9.0）；可答问题上工具调用减少53%；AUC达0.93；小模型收益更大（3B提升是7B的1.4倍）。
AI.conclusion: CARL能有效学习模型的领域能力边界，让模型学会自主判断何时需要求助外部工具，尤其对参数容量较小的模型帮助更大。

title: ESC-Skills: Discovering and Self-Evolving Skills for Emotional Support Conversations
summary: Existing emotional support conversation (ESC) systems mainly rely on end-to-end response generation or coarse strategy supervision, offering limited interpretability and little support for systematic skill improvement. We propose ESC-Skills, a skill-centric framework that discovers and self-evolves executable emotional support skills. We first model localized support interactions as Intervention Units (IUs), which capture state--action--outcome dynamics between seeker states, support interventions, and post-response emotional changes. Based on IUs extracted from both successful and failed ESC dialogues, we construct the ESC-Skills Bank, a repository of executable emotional support skills containing intervention guidance, applicability conditions, expected outcomes, and potential risks. To further improve robustness, we introduce a multi-profile self-evolutionary refinement framework in which an ESC agent interacts with diverse simulated seeker profiles under SAGE evaluation. The resulting interaction traces are analyzed to identify missing skills, unsafe interventions, and profile-specific failure patterns, which are then used to refine the Skills Bank through simulation-based verification. Experimental results demonstrate that ESC-Skills improves both response-level quality and dialogue-level emotional outcomes while providing more interpretable and controllable support behaviors. We will release the code, prompts, and ESC-Skills Bank at https://github.com/aliyun/qwen-dianjin.

AI.tldr: 提出ESC-Skills框架，通过可执行的技能库（包含干预指导、适用条件、预期结果和潜在风险）和多角色自我进化机制，提升情感支持对话的可解释性、可控性和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持对话系统依赖端到端生成或粗粒度的策略监督，可解释性差，难以系统性地提升对话技能。
AI.method: 1) 将局部支持交互建模为干预单元（IU），捕捉状态-动作-结果动态；2) 基于IU构建ESC-Skills Bank技能库；3) 提出多角色自我进化框架，通过与不同模拟求助者交互发现缺失技能和失败模式，优化技能库。
AI.result: 在响应质量和对话级情感结果上均有提升，且支持行为更具可解释性和可控性。
AI.conclusion: ESC-Skills通过技能驱动的可执行知识库和自我进化机制，显著增强了情感支持对话系统的可解释性与效果。

title: SYNAPSE: Neuro-Symbolic Visual Thought-to-Text Decoding via Topological Semantic Denoising
summary: Recent advances in large language models have accelerated open-vocabulary EEG-to-imagined-text decoding, where non-invasive neural activity recorded during visual perception is translated into coherent natural language descriptions of viewed stimuli. However, existing systems remain highly vulnerable to biological noise, where corrupted neural projections induce hallucinated or semantically unstable generation in frozen language models. We introduce SYNAPSE (Symbolic Neural Alignment for Precise Semantic Extraction), a lightweight neuro-symbolic framework that stabilizes neural text generation through inference-time symbolic regularization. By purifying EEG-derived semantic candidates using commonsense graph structure and latent exemplars, SYNAPSE improves semantic stability without end-to-end LLM fine-tuning. Experiments across popular EEG decoding benchmarks and multiple frozen LLM backends demonstrate consistent gains over unconstrained prompting baselines, robustness under object-label ablation, and performance commensurate with substantially more resource-intensive fine-tuned systems, while preserving biometric privacy by localizing raw EEG processing entirely within the encoder stack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SYNAPSE框架，通过符号推理对EEG神经解码中的语义候选进行正则化，在不微调大语言模型的情况下提升生成文本的语义稳定性，并保护生物特征隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG到想象文本的解码系统极易受到生物噪声影响，导致冻结的大语言模型产生幻觉或不稳定的语义生成。
AI.method: 提出SYNAPSE轻量级神经符号框架，在推理阶段利用常识图谱结构和潜在范例对EEG导出的语义候选进行符号正则化（净化），无需端到端微调LLM。
AI.result: 在多个EEG解码基准和不同冻结LLM后端上，相比无约束提示基线持续提升；在目标-标签消融下保持鲁棒性；性能与资源密集型的微调系统相当；同时通过将原始EEG处理完全限制在编码器堆栈内保护生物特征隐私。
AI.conclusion: SYNAPSE在不微调大模型、不牺牲隐私的前提下，通过轻量级符号正则化有效提升了EEG神经解码的语义稳定性。

title: A Unified Framework for the Evaluation of LLM Agentic Capabilities
summary: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents, reliable assessment of their agentic capabilities has become essential. However, reported benchmark scores often jointly reflect model capability and the implementation choices each benchmark is packaged with, making cross-benchmark results difficult to interpret as clean measurements of the underlying model. In this work, we present a unified framework for the fair evaluation of LLM agentic capabilities. Driven by a unified configuration system, the framework integrates diverse benchmarks into a standardized instruction--tool--environment format, executes agents through a fixed ReAct-style architecture within a controllable sandbox, and provides an optional offline setting that replaces volatile live environments with curated snapshots, so that framework effects and environment effects can be analyzed separately. Building on this, we unify the evaluation methodology under each benchmark's original task-success criteria, while introducing unified metrics for resource consumption and a taxonomy for decision- and execution-level failure attribution. Within this framework, we adapt 7 widely used benchmarks spanning 24 domains across single-agent, multi-agent, and safety-critical scenarios, and conduct a large-scale empirical analysis over 400K rollouts and 5B tokens on 15 models. The results show that scaffold choice and environmental volatility materially shift benchmark outcomes in both directions, allowing our framework to disentangle intrinsic LLM capabilities from framework- and environment-induced artifacts. We further demonstrate its extensibility as a secure testbed for safety-critical domains. Codes and benchmarks at are available at https://github.com/whfeLingYu/A-Unified-Framework-for-the-Evaluation-of-LLM-Agentic-Capabilities, https://huggingface.co/AgentFramework/Unified_Farmework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的LLM智能体能力评估框架，通过标准化指令-工具-环境格式、固定ReAct架构和离线设置，将7个主流基准测试统一评估，在40万次 rollout和50亿token的15个模型实验中发现：脚手架选择和动态环境显著影响基准分数，该框架能有效分离LLM自身能力与框架/环境带来的偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM智能体基准测试分数混杂了模型能力与实现选择（如脚手架、环境配置），导致跨基准结果难以解释为对模型能力的纯净测量，亟需一个统一框架来分离这些因素。
AI.method: 构建统一配置系统，将不同基准转化为标准化指令-工具-环境格式；采用固定ReAct架构在可控沙箱中执行智能体；提供离线模式（用静态快照替代动态环境）以单独分析框架效应和环境效应；统一评估标准（任务成功率、资源消耗指标）并建立决策级/执行级失败归因分类法。
AI.result: 在15个模型、7个基准（覆盖24个领域，含单智能体、多智能体、安全关键场景）、40万次 rollout、50亿token的大规模实验中发现：脚手架和环境波动会显著改变基准得分（双向影响），框架成功分离了LLM内在能力与框架/环境伪影；并展示了该框架可作为安全关键领域的可靠测试平台。
AI.conclusion: 统一评估框架能有效解耦LLM智能体能力中的内在因素与外在因素，提升跨基准结果的可解释性，并具备扩展到安全关键场景的实用价值。

title: Let the Results Speak: A Replication-First Paradigm for LLM Behavioral Benchmarking
summary:
Subjective evaluation of LLM behavior -- empathy, restraint, calibrated emotional tone -- is hard. Human inter-rater agreement on such qualities saturates near rho ~ 0.45, and an LLM-as-judge proxy alone risks circularity: a judge sharing the target's training cohort cannot independently verify it. Anchoring validity to a single human-rater consensus does not extend to capabilities where humans themselves disagree.
  We propose a replication-first paradigm: instead of anchoring on one rater group, we certify the instrument via four orthogonal properties -- reliability across K runs, cross-instrument replication across architecturally distinct judges, historical-footprint calibration via judges from earlier training cohorts, and pre-registered prediction. We test it on emotional accompaniment by letting the rubric self-evolve data-driven across iterations: the dimensions are not pre-stipulated and the procedure stabilizes to a 9-dimension set. Pre-registration applies to 10 falsifiable hypotheses and 11 forward predictions, committed before any test data was collected.
  Applied to 49 models across 8 families, the paradigm surfaces what aggregate scores hide. On advice-restraint -- whether a model refrains from giving unsolicited solutions in empathic contexts -- gpt-5 falls 1.87 points from gpt-4.1 and Opus-4.7 falls 0.629 from Opus-4.6, while aggregate scores stay flat. The regression survives three user-proxy swaps (95% of magnitude), replicates across a 5-family judge stack and a 17-month cohort gap, and persists on 74 held-out real ESConv conversations (rho in [0.749, 0.850]); the instrument reaches ordinal Krippendorff alpha = 0.91. As a by-product, the paradigm acts as a saturation-source diagnostic, separating instrumental ceilings (breakable by rubric refinement) from structural ceilings (needing scenario or roster intervention).

AI.tldr: 提出一种复现优先的评估范式，通过四项正交属性（跨运行可靠性、跨架构复制、历史足迹校准、预注册预测）来认证LLM行为评估工具，应用于情感陪伴场景，发现模型在建议约束等维度存在被总分掩盖的显著退化。
AI.motivation: 主观评估LLM行为（共情、克制、情感基调）很困难，人类评分者一致性低（rho~0.45），LLM-as-judge存在循环论证问题，且锚定单一人类评分共识无法推广到人类自身存在分歧的场景。
AI.method: 提出复现优先范式：通过四项正交属性认证评估工具——跨K次运行的可靠性、跨架构不同judge的复制、早期训练cohort judge的历史足迹校准、预注册预测。评分标准通过数据驱动迭代自演化，最终稳定为9维。对10个可证伪假设和11个前向预测进行预注册。
AI.result: 在49个模型（8个家族）上，发现建议约束维度中gpt-5比gpt-4.1下降1.87分，Opus-4.7比Opus-4.6下降0.629分，而总分保持平稳。退化在三次用户代理替换中保留95%幅度，跨5家族judge堆栈和17个月cohort间隔可复现，在74段真实ESConv对话上rho在[0.749,0.850]，Krippendorff alpha达0.91。
AI.conclusion: 该范式可作为饱和源诊断工具，区分工具性天花板（可通过评分标准改进打破）和结构性天花板（需要场景或模型阵容干预），揭示了总分掩盖下的模型行为退化。

title: Density-aware Sample-specific Attack
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026
summary: Despite recent progress in backdoor attacks, existing methods remain susceptible to post-training defenses that erase the backdoor through fine-tuning or pruning. We revisit the core objectives of backdoor attacks and derive principled criteria characterizing optimal sample-specific trigger construction under a Bayes-optimal model of the victim's training. Our analysis reveals that both attack success and clean-accuracy preservation are simultaneously optimized when triggered samples are steered into low-density regions of the clean data distribution, a distributional condition that controls all moments of the poisoned distribution at once rather than a handful of input-space summary statistics. We introduce a bilevel optimization framework that estimates density ratios via conditional time-score matching and optimizes a mixture-model objective to place triggered samples in these sparse regions. Extensive evaluations on MNIST, CIFAR-10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet demonstrate that our method achieves above 99\% attack success rate before defense and retains 50--85 percentage points higher post-defense ASR than the strongest baselines under fine-tuning defenses. Against neuron-pruning defenses, the method exhibits complete immunity, with zero neurons identified for removal across all pruning thresholds. These results expose a fundamental gap in current defense paradigms and underscore the need for defenses that operate beyond the support of the clean distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密度比估计的后门攻击方法，通过将触发样本引导至干净数据分布的低密度区域，实现对微调和剪枝防御的免疫，攻击成功率在防御后仍比最强基线高50-85个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击方法易被微调、剪枝等防御手段消除，缺乏对触发样本分布特性的理论理解；作者希望从贝叶斯最优训练框架出发，推导出触发样本应满足的分布条件。
AI.method: 1）理论推导：在贝叶斯最优分类器下，后门攻击成功和干净准确率保留同时最优的条件是触发样本位于干净数据分布的低密度区域；2）提出双层优化框架，通过条件时间分数匹配估计密度比，并优化混合模型目标函数将触发样本放置于稀疏区域。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、GTSRB、TinyImageNet上，防御前ASR超过99%；微调防御后ASR比最强基线高50-85个百分点；对神经元剪枝防御完全免疫（零神经元被识别）。
AI.conclusion: 当前防御范式存在根本性缺陷——它们仅在干净数据分布的支持集内有效，而无法处理分布之外的威胁；未来防御需要超越干净分布支持集的边界。

title: SKILLC: Learning Autonomous Skill Internalization in LLM Agents via Contrastive Credit Assignment
summary: Structured skill prompts improve exploration in long-horizon agentic reinforcement learning (RL). Skill-augmented RL methods retain external skills at inference, while skill-internalization RL methods withdraw them during training to enable autonomous performance. However, existing internalization approaches only use skill-helpfulness contrast for curriculum control, leaving the policy update unchanged and unable to distinguish skill-dependent from autonomous success. We propose SkillC, a framework based on Contrastive Skill Credit Assignment (CSCA) that converts this contrast into a direct learning signal for internalization. \textsc{SkillC} samples paired skill-injected and skill-free rollouts for tasks from active skill types within the same policy update, and injects their task-level contrast into optimization via a dual-stream advantage estimator that preserves global ranking while applying a one-sided correction toward skill-free success. A smoothed validation-level signal further drives an adaptive curriculum over attribution strength, rollout allocation, and monotonic active-set pruning. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebShop show that, without runtime skill access, SkillC surpasses the strongest prior skill-internalization RL baseline by 5.5\% and 4.4\%, respectively, while remaining competitive with skill-augmented RL methods.

AI.tldr: 提出 SkillC 框架，通过对比技能信度分配将技能辅助信号转化为直接学习信号，实现无运行时技能访问的自主决策，在 ALFWorld 和 WebShop 上分别超越最强技能内化基线 5.5% 和 4.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有技能内化方法仅将技能帮助度对比用于课程控制，策略更新未改变，无法区分依赖技能的成功与自主成功。
AI.method: SkillC 框架包含：1) 双流优势估计器，对同一策略更新采样有技能和无技能 rollout，保留全局排序的同时对无技能成功施加单向修正；2) 平滑验证级信号驱动的自适应课程，控制归因强度、rollout 分配和单调主动集剪枝。
AI.result: 在 ALFWorld 上超越最强技能内化基线 5.5%，在 WebShop 上超越 4.4%，且与技能增强方法竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: SkillC 通过将技能对比转化为直接学习信号，有效实现了无需运行时技能访问的自主决策，在长时程智能体强化学习中取得显著提升。

title: GeneralThinker: Domain-General Reasoning through Likelihood-Guided Answer-Conditioned Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves language model reasoning, but its reliance on domain-specific verifiers, sparse outcome rewards, and coarse-grained credit assignment limits its applicability. We introduce GeneralThinker, an on-policy framework that reformulates reasoning supervision as dense answer-conditioned optimization, enabling response-level evaluation and token-level credit assignment without domain-specific verifiers. GeneralThinker evaluates generated reasoning trajectories using the likelihood of the ground-truth answer and derives token-wise compatibility signals for fine-grained credit assignment. To stabilize optimization, it constrains token-level updates through clipping and direction-preserving modulation. Across 11 benchmarks spanning mathematics, STEM, and general reasoning, GeneralThinker achieves the best average performance. Further analyses show that uncontrolled token-level modulation can destabilize training, whereas controlled modulation makes fine-grained credit assignment consistently effective.

AI.tldr: GeneralThinker 是一种无需领域特定验证器的强化学习框架，通过密集答案条件优化实现响应级评估和 token 级信用分配，在 11 个基准测试中取得最佳平均性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法受限于领域特定验证器、稀疏结果奖励和粗粒度信用分配，限制了其通用性。
AI.method: 提出 GeneralThinker 框架，利用答案似然性评估推理轨迹，导出 token 级兼容性信号实现细粒度信用分配，并通过裁剪和方向保持调制稳定优化过程。
AI.result: 在数学、STEM 和通用推理的 11 个基准测试中取得最佳平均性能。
AI.conclusion: 受控的 token 级调制能使细粒度信用分配持续有效，而 uncontrolled 调制会 destabilize 训练。

title: ReSAE: Residualized Sparse Autoencoders for Multi-Layer Transformer Interventions
summary: Sparse autoencoders are usually trained one layer at a time, even though transformer residual stream activations are strongly coupled across depth. This creates a practical problem for multi-layer interventions: different layerwise dictionaries can spend capacity representing the same carried-forward information, and replacing several layers at once can produce interactions that are not predicted by single-layer behavior. We introduce Residualized Sparse Autoencoders (ReSAEs), which fit an affine map between selected layers and train each later-layer SAE on the unexplained residual rather than on the full activation. Reconstructions are mapped back into the original activation space through the fitted affine chain, so ReSAEs can be evaluated with the same intervention protocols as ordinary SAEs. On Pythia-1.4B and Gemma-2-9B, residualization reduces decoder redundancy and improves sparse probing and targeted perturbation in most tested settings. Despite reconstructing less of the raw activation variance, ReSAEs recover more transformer cross entropy under multi-layer replacement. This gain is clearest under teacher-forcing and at sufficient sparsity online, indicating that ReSAEs preserve the components of the activation most relevant to the model's downstream computation. These results suggest that removing linearly predictable cross-layer structure is a useful default for multi-layer SAE interventions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Residualized Sparse Autoencoders (ReSAEs)，通过在层间拟合仿射映射并只训练残差，减少了多层SAE间的解码器冗余，并在多层替换时更好地恢复Transformer的交叉熵损失。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏自编码器逐层独立训练，忽略了Transformer残差流跨层的强耦合性，导致多层干预时不同层的字典会重复编码相同信息，产生不可预测的交互效应。
AI.method: 在选定层之间拟合仿射映射，对后一层只训练原始激活中无法被前一层线性预测的残差部分，并通过仿射链将重建映射回原始激活空间。
AI.result: 在Pythia-1.4B和Gemma-2-9B上，残差化减少了解码器冗余，在稀疏探针和定向扰动任务中表现更好；尽管重建的原始方差更少，但在多层替换时恢复了更多交叉熵，尤其在teacher-forcing和足够稀疏条件下优势明显。
AI.conclusion: 移除跨层的线性可预测结构是多层SAE干预中有效的默认策略。

title: Dr-CiK: A Testbed for Foresight-Driven Agents
summary: Time series forecasting in real-world settings often depends not only on historical observations, but also on external context that must be actively discovered from noisy, heterogeneous information sources. Yet existing context-aided forecasting benchmarks typically assume that the supporting context is already provided, leaving open whether agents can identify it on their own. Therefore, we introduce Dr-CiK, a benchmark for evaluating whether agents can retrieve forecasting-relevant supporting context from a document corpus, filter out distractors, distill the retrieved context into forecast-useful evidence, and generate forecasts supported by that evidence. Through context ablations and evaluations of state-of-the-art deep research and forecasting methods paired together, we show that high-quality context substantially improves forecasting performance in Dr-CiK. However, most existing DR agents recover only a small fraction of the ground-truth supporting evidence (usually <5%), are frequently misled by distractors (>80% distractor citations), and can cause forecasters to perform worse with retrieved context than without context. Our results motivate research on foresight-driven agents that search for the right context to predict the future.

AI.tldr: 提出了Dr-CiK基准，用于评估智能体从文档语料库中自主检索、筛选、提炼并利用上下文信息进行时间序列预测的能力。实验表明，高质量上下文能显著提升预测性能，但现有深度研究方法检索到的关键证据不足5%，且常被干扰信息误导（>80%），导致检索后的预测结果反而更差。
AI.motivation: 现有上下文辅助预测基准通常假设上下文已预先提供，忽略了智能体能否自主发现并利用相关信息的问题。因此，需要一个更贴近真实场景的评估框架，测试智能体在嘈杂、异构信息源中主动检索并利用预测相关上下文的能力。
AI.method: 构建了Dr-CiK基准，通过上下文消融实验，结合最先进的深度研究方法与预测方法，系统评估智能体在检索、过滤干扰、提炼证据、生成预测四个环节的表现。
AI.result: 高质量上下文显著提升预测性能；但现有DR方法仅能恢复<5%的ground-truth证据，>80%的引用来自干扰信息，且检索到的上下文反而导致预测器性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 现有智能体在自主发现预测相关上下文方面能力严重不足，亟需开发具备前瞻性搜索能力的智能体，以主动寻找正确的预测上下文。

title: DisasterBench: Benchmarking LLM Planning under Typed Tool Interface Constraints
summary:
Disasters cause severe societal impacts, demanding rapid coordination of heterogeneous AI tools, from satellite analysis to flood prediction and damage assessment, into coherent multi-step workflows. As LLMs increasingly serve as orchestrators of such pipelines, effective coordination requires more than selecting semantically plausible tools: LLMs must generate executable workflows with correct parameter binding and dependency propagation.
  We introduce DisasterBench, a benchmark for evaluating structured multi-agent planning over semantically similar but operationally distinct disaster-response tools. To enable step-level failure attribution, we further propose First-Point-of-Failure (FPoF), which localizes the earliest root cause in a predicted workflow, separating primary errors from downstream cascading effects.
  Our evaluation reveals three findings: planning method effectiveness depends strongly on model capacity; tool mismatch and parameter-binding errors dominate first failures, revealing semantic grounding and execution consistency as distinct bottlenecks; and verbose intermediate reasoning can create instruction clash with structured output requirements, disrupting plan generation.
  Together, these findings highlight a fundamental gap between semantic reasoning and execution-grounded coordination, underscoring the need for planning frameworks that jointly model semantic intent, execution constraints, and workflow consistency.
  Code, data, and evaluation resources are available at: https://github.com/TamuChen18/DisasterBench_Open

AI.tldr: 提出了DisasterBench基准和FPoF故障定位方法，评估LLM在灾难响应场景中编排多步骤AI工具工作流的能力，发现语义推理与执行约束之间存在根本性差距。
AI.motivation: 灾难响应需要快速协调异构AI工具形成多步骤工作流，而LLM作为编排器时，不仅要选择语义合理的工具，还需生成参数绑定和依赖传播正确的可执行工作流，现有评估方法缺乏对此能力的系统测试。
AI.method: 构建DisasterBench基准，包含语义相似但操作各异的灾难响应工具集；提出First-Point-of-Failure (FPoF)方法，在预测工作流中定位最早的根本原因，区分初次错误与下游级联效应。
AI.result: 规划方法有效性高度依赖模型容量；工具误匹配和参数绑定错误是首要故障原因，语义基础和执行一致性是不同瓶颈；冗长的中间推理可能与结构化输出要求产生指令冲突，破坏计划生成。
AI.conclusion: 语义推理与执行导向的协调之间存在根本性差距，需要联合建模语义意图、执行约束和工作流一致性的规划框架。

title: Reasoning Matters: Mitigate Hallucination in Multimodal Large Reasoning Models via Reasoning-Conditioned Preference Optimization
summary: Multimodal Large Reasoning Models introduce the reasoning paradigm, demonstrating strong capabilities on complex vision-language tasks. However, they still suffer from severe hallucinations. Existing training-based methods typically mitigate hallucinations through response-level direct preference optimization (DPO), where the Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and the final answer are treated as a monolithic output and optimized jointly. We reveal that this formulation performs similarly to answer-only optimization, suggesting that it primarily learns answer-level preference, while leaving CoT-level supervision insufficiently exploited. To address this issue, we explicitly formulate a CoT-oriented preference term and derive Reasoning-Conditioned Direct Preference Optimization (RC-DPO), which models the CoT as a condition for answer generation and contrasts the preference for the same preferred answer under different CoT conditions, promoting answer-supportive reasoning chain alignment. To further improve optimization, we introduce a reasoning-enhanced preference data generation strategy that employs Monte Carlo Tree Search to discover visually grounded and logically consistent CoTs as positive samples, and attention-guided CoT token pruning to construct negative ones. Extensive experiments across various models and benchmarks show that RC-DPO effectively mitigates hallucinations and improves the reliability of the multimodal reasoning process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RC-DPO方法，通过将思维链(CoT)建模为答案生成的条件并进行定向偏好优化，有效缓解多模态大推理模型的幻觉问题，实验证明该方法能提升推理可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有训练方法将CoT和最终答案作为整体进行DPO优化，导致主要学习答案级偏好而忽视了CoT级的监督信号，CoT优化不足是幻觉产生的关键原因。
AI.method: 1) 提出推理条件直接偏好优化(RC-DPO)，将CoT显式建模为答案的条件，对比相同偏好答案在不同CoT条件下的差异，对齐答案支持的推理链；2) 设计推理增强的偏好数据生成策略，用MCTS生成视觉对齐且逻辑一致的CoT正样本，用注意力引导的CoT token剪枝构建负样本。
AI.result: 在多种模型和基准上，RC-DPO有效缓解了多模态推理中的幻觉问题，提升了推理过程的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 将CoT作为答案条件进行显式偏好优化比整体优化更有效，推理链的对齐是缓解多模态大推理模型幻觉的关键。

title: Pressure-Testing Deception Probes in LLMs: Scaling, Robustness, and the Geometry of Deceptive Representations
comment: Accepted at the GEM Workshop @ ACL 2026
summary: Linear probes trained on LLM activations are increasingly proposed as deception-detection metrics, yet report AUROC exceeding 0.96 on clean benchmarks while collapsing under distributional shift. This paper systematically pressure-tests probe-based metrics across the Gemma 3 model family (1B-27B parameters), diagnosing why they fail rather than merely documenting that they fail. We test four hypotheses about deception encoding: (1) single linear direction, (2) multi-dimensional subspace, (3) convex conic hull, (4) entropy proxy. Our design includes cross-domain transfer matrices, multi-dimensional probe analysis with permutation null baselines, entropy-residualization tests, and distractor evaluations across 8 stylistic shifts. We find that: (a) probes achieve near-perfect AUROC (>=0.998) on clean data but collapse under stylistic shifts; style-augmented probes recover near-perfect detection (mean AUROC 0.979-0.983) on unseen styles; (b) the single-direction hypothesis is rejected (k=1 captures only 0.61-0.80 AUROC), with cross-domain transfer failure confirmed as geometric rather than layer-mismatch-driven; (c) the entropy-proxy hypothesis is rejected (max |rho|=0.454, max Delta-AUROC after residualization=0.004); and (d) deception does not form a significant linear subspace (per-domain k*=0), yet multi-dimensional probes (k>=5) recover the signal through distributed sub-threshold features. Probe fragility reflects distributional narrowness rather than an architectural limitation: style-augmented probes recover near-perfect detection at both 4B and 27B, establishing that the inverse scaling pattern is a training-distribution artifact rather than a genuine scale-dependent phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 本文系统测试了基于线性探针的欺骗检测方法在Gemma 3模型家族上的表现，发现探针在干净数据上近乎完美（AUROC≥0.998），但在风格偏移下完全失效。通过风格增强训练可恢复检测性能（AUROC 0.979-0.983）。研究拒绝了“单一线性方向”和“熵代理”假说，发现欺骗编码是多维分布式的亚阈值特征，而非显著线性子空间。逆缩放模式是训练分布伪影，而非真正的规模依赖现象。
AI.motivation: 现有探针式欺骗检测方法在干净基准上表现优异（AUROC>0.96），但在分布偏移下崩溃。本文旨在系统诊断这种失败的根本原因，而非仅仅记录失败现象。
AI.method: 在Gemma 3模型家族（1B-27B）上测试四种假说（单线性方向、多维子空间、凸锥包、熵代理），采用跨域迁移矩阵、多维探针分析（含排列零基线）、熵残差化测试及8种风格偏移的干扰评估。
AI.result: (a) 干净数据AUROC≥0.998，风格偏移下崩溃；风格增强后恢复至0.979-0.983。(b) 单一方向假说被拒绝（k=1仅0.61-0.80 AUROC）。(c) 熵代理假说被拒绝（最大|ρ|=0.454，残差化后Δ-AUROC最大0.004）。(d) 欺骗不构成显著线性子空间（k*=0），但多维探针（k≥5）通过分布式亚阈值特征恢复信号。
AI.conclusion: 探针的脆弱性源于训练分布狭窄，而非架构限制。风格增强探针在4B和27B上均恢复检测性能，证明逆缩放模式是训练分布伪影，而非真正的规模依赖现象。

title: SuiChat-CN: Benchmarking Contextual Suicide Risk Assessment in Chinese Group Chats
summary: Suicide is a critical global public health challenge, causing approximately 720,000 deaths each year and calling for timely, effective prevention strategies. Existing computational studies primarily focus on post-based social media platforms such as Twitter and Weibo, leaving instant messaging environments such as Telegram underexplored. Yet group chats pose distinct challenges: messages are short, fragmented, multi-party, and often rely on implicit or culturally specific expressions, making isolated post-level analysis insufficient. We introduce SuiChat-CN, a Chinese group-chat benchmark for contextual suicide risk assessment. We collect public Telegram group-chat data, construct coherent conversational segments through signal-word extraction and bidirectional context expansion, and annotate user risk levels with an expert-validated, LLM-assisted paradigm. SuiChat-CN contains 13,312 contextual segments from 1,406 users, covering 258,228 raw chat messages. Extensive experiments with PLMs and more than 40 LLMs demonstrate that contextual information is essential for reliable risk assessment, while fine-tuning and partial-context evaluation further reveal the challenges of early detection in multi-party conversations. Due to ethical and sensitivity concerns, the dataset is not publicly released but will be shared with accredited mental health and suicide-prevention research institutions upon reasonable request.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SuiChat-CN，一个中文群聊自杀风险评估基准数据集，包含13,312个上下文片段和1,406个用户。实验表明上下文信息对风险评估至关重要，而多轮对话中的早期检测仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有计算研究主要基于Twitter、微博等公开社交媒体平台，忽略了Telegram群聊等即时通讯环境。群聊信息简短、碎片化、多参与者，且常依赖隐晦或文化特定的表达方式，传统的孤立帖子分析不足以应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 收集公共Telegram群聊数据，通过信号词提取和双向上下文扩展构建连贯的对话片段，采用专家验证和LLM辅助的范式对用户风险等级进行标注。最终构建了包含13,312个上下文片段、1,406个用户、258,228条原始消息的数据集。
AI.result: 在PLMs和40多个LLMs上的实验表明：上下文信息对可靠的风险评估至关重要；微调和部分上下文评估进一步揭示了多轮对话中早期检测的挑战。
AI.conclusion: SuiChat-CN填补了群聊场景下自杀风险评估的数据空白，证明了上下文信息对风险评估的必要性，同时指出了多参与者对话中早期检测的难点。由于伦理敏感性，数据集将仅向经认证的研究机构开放。

title: Boundary Suppression Asymmetry in Post-trained Assistants: Over-expansion as a Controllability Cost
summary:
Post-trained language-model assistants are often optimized to avoid under-answering, encouraging complete, helpful, cautious, and proactive responses. We ask whether this optimization creates asymmetric controllability costs: when users explicitly request narrower answers, which assistant behaviors remain suppressible, and which continue to shape the response? We study this problem as boundary-suppression asymmetry. Prompt-side probes across multiple high-level response dimensions suggest a selective cost, concentrated around `too-much assistant' directions such as over-completion, extra help, and anti-underanswering.
  Using controlled assistant-policy variants derived from a shared base model, we find that anti-underanswering policies are harder to pull back than the baseline under matched boundary-control evaluations, while minimal-boundary variants generally avoid this anti-side upward shift in the direct boundary-control comparisons. Mechanism-oriented probes point beyond longer default outputs, pure EOS failure, uncertainty compensation, and local continuation bias, while robustness checks preserve the main anti-over-baseline ordering under shared-system and larger-scale settings. The evidence supports a mixed planning/stopping account, where content-budget overshoot and continuation persistence jointly make boundary correction harder. Overall, post-training may create direction-specific controllability costs: some helpful assistant tendencies remain easy to invoke, yet harder to locally suppress.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文研究了后训练语言模型助手中存在的"边界抑制不对称"问题：当用户明确要求更窄的回答时，某些助手行为（如过度完成、额外帮助、反欠回答）难以被局部抑制，而其他行为则相对容易控制。研究发现反欠回答策略在边界控制评估中比基线更难拉回，机制分析指向混合的规划/停止解释（内容预算超支+延续持续性）。
AI.motivation: 作者观察到后训练语言模型助手通常被优化以避免欠回答，鼓励完整、有帮助、谨慎和主动的响应。这引发了一个问题：这种优化是否产生了不对称的可控性成本——当用户明确要求更窄的回答时，哪些助手行为仍然可以被抑制，哪些会继续塑造响应？
AI.method: 通过提示端探针对多个高层响应维度进行探测；使用来自共享基础模型的可控助手策略变体；在匹配的边界控制评估下比较反欠回答策略与基线；进行机制导向探针（检查更长默认输出、EOS失败、不确定性补偿、局部延续偏差等）；进行鲁棒性检查（共享系统和更大规模设置）。
AI.result: 反欠回答策略在匹配的边界控制评估中比基线更难拉回；最小边界变体通常避免了这种反侧向上的偏移；机制探针排除了简单解释（更长默认输出、纯EOS失败、不确定性补偿、局部延续偏差）；鲁棒性检查保持了主要发现。
AI.conclusion: 后训练可能产生了方向特定的可控性成本：一些有帮助的助手倾向容易调用，但更难局部抑制。证据支持混合的规划/停止解释，其中内容预算超支和延续持续性共同使边界修正变得困难。

title: CAREF: Calibration-Aware Regularization for Explanation Faithfulness Without Rationale Supervision
summary: We introduce CAREF, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework that jointly optimizes predictive accuracy and explanation faithfulness via calibration-aware regularization. At its core, CAREF couples entropy-based calibration with token-level sparsity control through a single unified loss, the Calibration-Aware Regularization for Explanation Faithfulness (LSCED), without requiring rationale supervision. Evaluated on four NLE benchmarks (COS-E, ECQA, ComVE, e-SNLI) with Flan-T5, our lightweight CAREF-AQ variant attains the best average accuracy (89.04) and explanation alignment (81.00 nBERT) using only 6.43% of trainable parameters, outperforming LoRA and AdaLoRA. To our knowledge, CAREF is the first method to unify entropy and sparsity regularization in a single training objective for interpretable LLM fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: CAREF是一个参数高效微调框架，通过校准感知正则化联合优化预测准确性和解释忠实度，在四个NLE基准上以仅6.43%的可训练参数取得了最佳效果。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法（如LoRA）在提升预测准确性的同时，缺乏对模型解释忠实度的保证，且通常需要额外的理由标注数据，成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出统一损失函数LSCED，将基于熵的校准与令牌级稀疏控制相结合，无需理由监督信号即可同时优化准确性和解释忠实度。
AI.result: 在COS-E、ECQA、ComVE、e-SNLI四个基准上，CAREF-AQ变体以6.43%可训练参数达到平均准确率89.04，解释对齐度81.00 nBERT，全面超越LoRA和AdaLoRA。
AI.conclusion: CAREF是首个将熵正则化与稀疏正则化统一到单一训练目标中的可解释LLM微调方法，证明了校准感知正则化在参数高效微调中的有效性。

title: Semantic Flow Regularization: Teaching LLMs to Generate Diverse Yet Coherent Responses
summary: When large language models are fine-tuned to generate persona- or tone-conditioned responses, their output diversity is severely limited--a failure we term Cross-Style Collapse. We trace this collapse to the cross-entropy objective, which under shared representations tends to suppress diverse continuations. We propose Semantic Flow Regularization (SFR), a lightweight auxiliary objective that supervises the backbone with continuous sentence-encoder embeddings of future segments via conditional flow matching. The stochastic flow source preserves multi-modality by construction; the flow-matching head is discarded at inference, adding zero deployment cost. On a large-scale industrial dialogue dataset (Qwen3-32B, 9 personas), SFR improves output diversity, style fidelity, and response quality over SFT. We further validate on the public LiveCodeBench-v5 (Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct), where SFR consistently improves pass@k, confirming generality beyond stylized dialogue. A controlled comparison on MBPP reveals Multi-Token Prediction to be a degenerate special case of SFR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义流正则化（SFR）方法，解决大语言模型在微调中因交叉熵目标导致的"跨风格坍缩"（输出多样性受限）问题。SFR通过条件流匹配监督骨干网络，在工业级对话数据集（Qwen3-32B，9种人格）上提升了输出多样性、风格保真度和响应质量，并在代码生成任务上验证了泛化性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在微调为生成特定人格或语气条件响应时，输出多样性严重受限（称为"跨风格坍缩"），作者将这一失败追溯到交叉熵目标函数在共享表征下倾向于抑制多样化的续写。
AI.method: 提出语义流正则化（SFR），一种轻量级辅助目标函数，通过条件流匹配，用连续句子编码器嵌入监督骨干网络。随机流源通过构造保持多模态性，流匹配头在推理时丢弃，零部署成本。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-32B（9种人格）工业级对话数据集上，SFR比SFT提升了输出多样性、风格保真度和响应质量。在LiveCodeBench-v5上SFR一致提升pass@k，验证了超越风格对话的泛化性。控制实验表明多标记预测（MTP）是SFR的一个退化特例。
AI.conclusion: SFR有效缓解了跨风格坍缩问题，在保持风格保真度的同时显著提升输出多样性，且具有零部署成本、泛化性强等优势，为条件文本生成中的多样性-保真度权衡提供了新思路。

title: From Detection to Mechanism: Cross-Attention Graph Neural Networks Enable Drug-Drug Interaction Type Prediction An Ablation Study with Acetylsalicylic Acid Validation
summary: Predicting whether two drugs interact (binary detection) is a substantially dif- ferent task from predicting the mechanism type of that interaction (multi-class classification). This study presents a systematic ablation study of three Graph Neural Network (GNN) architectures for drug-drug interaction (DDI) prediction on a publicly available benchmark dataset comprising 38,337 positive pairs across 86 interaction types. Three architectures are compared under identical training conditions (n = 61,339 pairs): a siamese dual Message Passing Neural Network (MPNN) with concatenation (Concat), a dual MPNN with four-head cross-attention (CrossAtt), and a ternary MPNN incorporating an interaction graph (Ternary). CrossAtt improves multi-class F1-macro by +0.186 absolute (+45%) over Concat, while improving binary AUC by only +0.012 (+1.3%) - confirming that atom-level inter-molecular communication specifically enables mechanism-type classification. The ternary architecture underperforms despite equivalent training data, with its failure consistent with a training instability hypothesis. Validation on ten acetylsali- cylic acid (ASA) drug pairs, held out prior to training, demonstrates 10/10 correct DDI-type predictions for CrossAtt versus 0/10 for Ternary. Two consistent failure cases are identified across all architectures, linking to structural limits established in a companion toxicity study.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统消融实验比较三种GNN架构（Concat、CrossAtt、Ternary）在DDI预测上的表现，发现CrossAtt通过原子级跨分子注意力机制显著提升多分类F1-macro（+45%），但对二元检测提升很小（+1.3%），而Ternary架构因训练不稳定表现最差。
AI.motivation: 药物相互作用预测存在二元检测与机制类型分类两种本质不同的任务，现有研究未系统比较不同GNN架构在这两类任务上的表现差异，亟需通过消融实验明确架构设计对两类任务的影响。
AI.method: 在包含38,337个正样本对、86种相互作用类型的公开基准数据集上，对三种GNN架构（Siamese双MPNN+Concat、双MPNN+四头Cross-Attention、三元MPNN+Interaction Graph）在相同训练条件（n=61,339对）下进行系统消融比较。
AI.result: CrossAtt在多分类F1-macro上比Concat提升0.186（+45%），但在二元AUC上仅提升0.012（+1.3%）；Ternary架构表现最差，10个ASA药物对预测全部错误（0/10），CrossAtt全部正确（10/10）；所有架构均存在两个一致失败案例。
AI.conclusion: 原子级分子间注意力机制对DDI机制类型分类至关重要但对二元检测影响有限，三元架构训练不稳定。研究还识别了所有架构共有的结构局限性，为未来DDI预测研究提供了架构选择依据。

title: Harness-Bench: Measuring Harness Effects across Models in Realistic Agent Workflows
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures, 11 tables. The first three authors contributed equally
summary: LLM agents are increasingly deployed as executable systems that use tools, modify workspaces, and produce concrete artifacts. In such workflows, performance depends not only on the base model, but also on the harness: the system layer that manages context, tools, state, constraints, permissions, tracing, and recovery. However, existing benchmarks typically abstract away execution, compare complete agent systems, or hold the harness fixed, making execution-layer variation difficult to study. We introduce Harness-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating configuration-level harness effects in realistic agent workflows. Harness-Bench evaluates representative harness configurations across multiple model backends under shared task environments, budgets, and evaluation protocols, while preserving each harness's native execution behavior. The benchmark contains 106 sandboxed offline tasks constructed from practical agent-use patterns and manually reviewed for realism, solvability, oracle-checkability, and integrity. Each run records final artifacts, execution traces, usage statistics, and validator outputs, enabling analysis beyond final completion. Across 5,194 execution trajectories, we observe substantial variation in completion, process quality, efficiency, and failure behavior across model-harness pairings. These results suggest that agent capability should be reported at the model-harness configuration level rather than attributed to the base model alone. Our analysis further identifies recurring execution-alignment failures, where plausible reasoning becomes decoupled from tool feedback, workspace state, evidence, or verifiable output contracts. Harness-Bench provides a reproducible foundation for diagnosing and improving reliable, efficient, and auditable agent execution stacks.

AI.tldr: 提出了Harness-Bench基准，用于评估LLM智能体系统中配置层（harness）对执行性能的影响，发现模型与harness的配对组合才是决定性能的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试通常抽象掉执行层、比较完整智能体系统或固定harness配置，导致难以单独研究执行层变化对智能体性能的影响。
AI.method: 构建了包含106个沙盒离线任务的Harness-Bench基准，在不同模型后端上评估多种代表性harness配置，保持共享任务环境、预算和评估协议，记录最终产物、执行轨迹、使用统计和验证器输出。
AI.result: 在5,194条执行轨迹中观察到不同模型-harness组合在完成度、过程质量、效率和失败行为上存在显著差异，并识别出推理与工具反馈、工作区状态、证据或可验证输出合约脱节的执行对齐失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 智能体能力应在模型-harness配置层面报告，而非仅归因于基础模型；Harness-Bench为诊断和改进可靠、高效、可审计的智能体执行栈提供了可复现的基础。

title: Periodic RoPE for Infinite Context LLMs
summary: The ability to process ultra-long contexts is crucial for large language models (LLMs) to perform long-horizon tasks. While recent efforts have extended context windows to 1M and beyond, model performance degrades when sequence length exceeds the pre-trained range of positional encodings (e.g., RoPE), i.e., position exhaustion. This fundamental limitation must be overcome to achieve a truly infinite context. To address it, we propose Periodic RoPE (P-RoPE), a positional encoding mechanism designed to circumvent this exhaustion. It operates in conjunction with sliding window attention (SWA) to capture local dependencies and relative positions within each window. This local layer is then complemented by a global attention layer with No Positional Encoding (NoPE), enabling unbounded interaction across the entire sequence without positional constraints. By stacking these two types of layers, the model avoids the need for positional extrapolation to generalize longer and theoretically supports an infinite context window. Empirical results show that our model, MiniWin, outperforms MiniMInd with standard GPT architectures in long-context efficiency and stability. Our work provides a possible pathway toward LLMs with genuine infinite-context understanding. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/Cominder/miniwin}{https://github.com/Cominder/miniwin}.

AI.tldr: 提出Periodic RoPE（P-RoPE）位置编码机制，结合滑动窗口注意力与无位置编码的全局注意力，使LLM理论上支持无限上下文，实验表明MiniWin模型在长上下文任务中表现优于标准架构。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在处理超长上下文时，当序列长度超出预训练位置编码范围（如RoPE）时会出现性能衰退（即位置耗尽问题），亟需一种能真正实现无限上下文理解的位置编码方案。
AI.method: 提出P-RoPE位置编码，与滑动窗口注意力（SWA）配合捕获局部依赖；叠加无位置编码（NoPE）的全局注意力层实现无限跨序列交互，通过两种层交替堆叠避免位置外推需求。
AI.result: MiniWin模型在长上下文效率和稳定性上优于使用标准GPT架构的MiniMind，理论上支持无限上下文窗口。
AI.conclusion: P-RoPE为LLM实现真正的无限上下文理解提供了一条可行路径。

title: SPAR: Support-Preserving Action Rectification
summary: Offline policy improvement faces an inherent conflict between maximizing value and fitting the data distribution. While in-sample weighted regression is stable, it suffers from over-conservatism that suppresses high-value actions in the distribution tail; conversely, gradient-based approaches often exhibit a fitting-optimization conflict of gradients, which drives the policy off the data manifold. To address this, we propose Support-Preserving Action Rectification (SPAR), which reframes global learning as a local residual rectification anchored to a frozen pure behavior cloning policy. This framework performs fine-grained fitting and local policy improvement in the residual space, thereby contracting the search space. We further introduce Latent Self-Imitation, utilizing a latent-sampling weighted-regression mechanism to address fitting-improvement gradient conflict in the residual space. Theoretically, we prove this mechanism eliminates the manifold-normal drift of standard value gradients, while extensive D4RL experiments show SPAR extracts significant gains from suboptimal baselines to achieve state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 提出SPAR框架，通过将全局学习转为局部残差修正，解决离线策略改进中价值最大化与数据分布拟合的冲突，在D4RL上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 离线策略改进面临固有权衡：在样本内加权回归（过保守，抑制分布尾部的高价值动作）与基于梯度的方法（存在拟合-优化梯度冲突，驱使策略偏离数据流形）之间难以兼顾。
AI.method: 提出支持保持动作修正(SPAR)：将全局学习重构为基于冻结行为克隆策略的局部残差修正框架；引入潜在自我模仿机制，通过潜在采样加权回归解决残差空间中的梯度冲突。
AI.result: 理论上证明该机制消除了标准价值梯度的流形法向漂移；D4RL实验表明SPAR能从次优基线中提取显著增益，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: SPAR通过局部残差修正+潜在自我模仿，有效解耦了离线策略中的拟合与优化目标，避免了过保守与梯度冲突两大问题。

title: DiagramRAG: A Lightweight Framework to Retrieve Scientific Diagram for Figure Generation
summary: Scientific diagrams are essential for communicating complex methodologies in academic papers. A natural way for researchers to specify such diagrams is through rough sketches, where text labels, connectors, and spatial arrangements express early semantic and topological intentions. However, sketches are usually incomplete, making them insufficient for directly producing publication-quality diagrams. Existing sketch-based generation methods mainly reconstruct the sketch itself, while recent text-driven diagram generation frameworks rely on textual semantics and do not fully exploit the topological structure contained in sketches. In this paper, we introduce DiagramRAG, a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework for sketch-based scientific diagram completion. Given a user sketch, DiagramRAG retrieves reference diagrams that are both semantically relevant to the sketch content and topologically compatible with its structure, and uses them to guide downstream diagram generation. To enable efficient structure-aware retrieval, we represent diagrams as knowledge graphs, synthesize sketch variants at different simplification levels, and train an embedding model to align sketches with compatible diagrams in a shared space. The retrieved references further provide content, topology, and visual priors for completing and rendering the final diagram. Experiments show that DiagramRAG achieves F1-scores of 0.848 and 0.802 on DiagramBank and FigureBench, respectively, and improves generation quality with the best VLM-as-a-Judge score of 7.170, while reducing inference latency to 35.48 seconds per sample. Our code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DiagramRAG-A262 and https://huggingface.co/datasets/anonymous-review-a262/DiagramSketch.

AI.tldr: DiagramRAG是一个轻量级检索增强框架，利用知识图谱表示和草图变体对齐技术，从草图中检索语义和拓扑兼容的参考图表，从而指导高质量科学图表的补全与生成，在多个基准上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 科学图表对学术论文至关重要，研究者通常通过粗略草图表达意图，但草图往往不完整，无法直接生成可发表级图表。现有方法要么仅重构草图本身，要么依赖纯文本语义而未能充分利用草图中蕴含的拓扑结构信息。
AI.method: DiagramRAG采用检索增强生成框架：将图表表示为知识图谱，合成不同简化级别的草图变体，训练嵌入模型将草图与兼容图表在共享空间中对齐，从而检索语义相关且拓扑兼容的参考图表，为下游图表补全与渲染提供内容、拓扑和视觉先验。
AI.result: 在DiagramBank和FigureBench上分别取得0.848和0.802的F1分数，最佳VLM-as-a-Judge得分为7.170，推理延迟降至每样本35.48秒。
AI.conclusion: DiagramRAG有效解决了草图不完整问题，通过结构感知检索实现了草图到高质量科学图表的生成，兼顾了语义和拓扑一致性。

title: KVoiceBench, KOpenAudioBench, and KMMAU: Agent-Driven Korean Speech Benchmarks for Evaluating SpeechLMs
summary: Speech language models (SpeechLMs) have achieved substantial progress by extending large language models (LLMs) to the speech modality. However, SpeechLM evaluation remains heavily centered on English, limiting reliable assessment of multilingual speech capabilities. Straightforward benchmark transfer through ASR, translation, normalization, and TTS can corrupt language-specific instructions, answer constraints, and spoken forms; for audio understanding, transferring source-language audio also fails to preserve target-language speaker attributes, accents, and paralinguistic properties. To address these limitations, we propose two human-agent benchmark-construction frameworks: one transfers source-language SpokenQA benchmarks into target-language SpokenQA benchmarks, and the other converts target-language ASR corpora into audio understanding benchmarks using transcriptions and speaker metadata. Using these frameworks, we construct and publicly release three Korean speech benchmarks: KVoiceBench and KOpenAudioBench for Korean SpokenQA, and KMMAU for Korean audio understanding, comprising 12,345 samples in total. We evaluate eight recent SpeechLMs and find that English-Korean performance gaps vary substantially across models and task families, and that SpokenQA and audio understanding rankings diverge, revealing complementary weaknesses invisible to English-only evaluation.

AI.tldr: 针对语音语言模型（SpeechLM）评估过度集中于英语的问题，本文提出两种人工-智能协同基准构建框架，将源语言SpokenQA基准迁移为目标语言，或利用ASR语料构建音频理解基准。据此构建了三个韩语语音基准（KVoiceBench、KOpenAudioBench、KMMAU，共12345样本），评估发现英韩性能差距因模型和任务而异，且SpokenQA与音频理解排名不一致，暴露了仅英语评估无法发现的互补性弱点。
AI.motivation: 现有SpeechLM评估高度集中于英语，无法可靠衡量多语言语音能力。直接通过ASR、翻译、归一化、TTS等流水线迁移基准会破坏语言特定指令、答案约束和口语形式；音频理解任务中迁移源语言音频也无法保留目标语言的说话人特征、口音和副语言属性。
AI.method: 提出两种人工-智能协同基准构建框架：(1) 将源语言SpokenQA基准迁移为目标语言SpokenQA基准；(2) 利用目标语言ASR语料的转录和说话人元数据，将其转换为音频理解基准。基于这两个框架构建了三个韩语语音基准。
AI.result: 构建并公开了三个韩语语音基准（共12345样本），评估了8个近期SpeechLM，发现英韩性能差距因模型和任务族而异，且SpokenQA与音频理解的排名不一致，揭示了仅英语评估无法发现的互补性弱点。
AI.conclusion: 多语言SpeechLM评估至关重要，仅依赖英语评估会掩盖模型在不同语言和任务类型上的能力差异。本文提出的框架可用于扩展其他语言的语音评估，推动SpeechLM的多语言能力发展。

title: FedEHR-Gen: Federated Synthetic Time-Series EHR Generation via Latent Space Alignment and Distribution-Aware Aggregation
comment: 8 pages main paper with 14 pages supplementary appendix
summary: Synthetic Electronic Health Record (EHR) generation provides a promising avenue for data augmentation and cross-hospital modeling in privacy-constrained healthcare settings. However, most existing EHR generative models are centralized and require pooling data across hospitals, which is often infeasible when real-world data sharing is restricted. While federated EHR generation offers a natural solution, direct federated modeling often collapses or diverges due to the high dimensionality, sparsity, and cross-hospital heterogeneity of EHR data. In this work, we propose FedEHR-Gen, the first federated framework for synthetic time-series EHR generation across distributed hospitals. FedEHR-Gen uses a two-stage learning paradigm. First, we introduce a federated autoencoder that projects high-dimensional and sparse EHR features onto a compact latent space. To ensure semantic consistency across hospitals, we develop a layer-wise matching aggregation mechanism that aligns local encoders into a unified global latent space. Second, operating on this aligned latent space, we train a federated temporal conditional variational autoencoder (TCVAE) with distribution-aware aggregation, enabling stable temporal generative modeling under severe cross-hospital heterogeneity. Extensive experiments on the eICU and MIMIC-III datasets demonstrate that FedEHR-Gen achieves generation fidelity, downstream utility, and privacy risk comparable to centralized training, while consistently outperforming the standard federated baseline.

AI.tldr: FedEHR-Gen是首个面向分布式医院场景的联邦学习框架，用于合成时间序列电子健康记录数据。它通过两阶段学习（联邦自编码器+联邦时序条件变分自编码器）解决数据高维稀疏和跨医院异质性问题，在eICU和MIMIC-III数据集上达到与集中式训练相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有EHR生成模型多为集中式，需跨医院汇集数据，这在隐私受限的现实中往往不可行。联邦EHR生成虽为自然方案，但EHR数据的高维性、稀疏性和跨医院异质性导致直接联邦建模容易崩溃或发散。
AI.method: 提出FedEHR-Gen联邦框架，包含两阶段学习：(1) 联邦自编码器将高维稀疏EHR特征投影到紧凑隐空间，并通过层级匹配聚合机制对齐各医院局部编码器；(2) 在统一隐空间上训练联邦时序条件变分自编码器(TCVAE)，采用分布感知聚合以应对跨医院异质性。
AI.result: 在eICU和MIMIC-III数据集上，FedEHR-Gen在生成保真度、下游任务效用和隐私风险方面与集中式训练相当，且一致优于标准联邦基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FedEHR-Gen有效解决了分布式场景下合成EHR数据生成的难题，在不共享原始数据的前提下实现了接近集中式训练的效果，为隐私约束下的跨医院数据增强和建模提供了可行方案。

title: Do Agents Think Deeper? A Mechanistic Investigation of Layer-Wise Dynamics in Sequential Planning
summary: Recent mechanistic studies suggest that large language models (LLMs) may utilize their depth inefficiently in standard single-turn tasks. Whether this still holds in autonomous agent settings, where models must perform multi-turn planning, tool use, and iterative state updates, remains unclear. We study this question through a systematic layer-wise analysis of complete user-agent trajectories spanning three domains: Deep Research, Code Generation, and Tabular Processing. Using residual stream probes, causal layer-skipping interventions, and effective-depth measurements, we show that agentic reasoning exhibits a distinct depth profile from static tasks. As trajectories unfold, models progressively recruit more and deeper layers, with stronger long-range inter-layer dependencies emerging in later turns. At the same time, residual updates become increasingly correction-dominant, indicating a shift from stable feature accumulation toward repeated recalibration. Effective-depth analysis further reveals a substantial construction-refinement gap: semantic direction often forms relatively early, while deep layers remain necessary for stabilizing final outputs. Across model families, this gap is pronounced in Qwen and Minimax, whereas GLM shows a more domain-dependent depth allocation pattern. These results provide mechanistic evidence that autonomous LLM agents allocate depth adaptively as reasoning complexity grows.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了LLM在自主智能体场景中的层深度利用机制，发现与单轮任务不同，智能体推理会随着轨迹推进逐步招募更多深层，并存在显著的“构建-精炼”深度差距。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明LLM在单轮任务中可能低效利用网络深度，但在需要多轮规划、工具使用和状态更新的自主智能体场景中，模型的深度利用模式是否不同尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在Deep Research、Code Generation、Tabular Processing三个领域对完整用户-智能体轨迹进行逐层分析，使用残差流探针、因果层跳过干预和有效深度测量三种方法。
AI.result: 智能体推理随轨迹展开逐步招募更多更深层，层间长程依赖增强；残差更新从稳定特征积累转向重复校准；存在“构建-精炼”差距（语义方向早形成，深层用于稳定输出）；Qwen和Minimax差距明显，GLM呈领域依赖模式。
AI.conclusion: 自主LLM智能体会随推理复杂度增长自适应地分配深度资源，验证了深度利用的动态调整机制。

title: An Evolutionary Approach for Designing Stable and Highly Expressible Low-Immunogenicity Therapeutic mRNA Sequences
summary: Messenger RNA (mRNA) sequences as therapeutics require optimized design to ensure efficient translation, structural stability, and minimal immunogenicity. This study presents a two-stage in-silico framework that integrates deep learning and evolutionary computation for rational mRNA optimization instead of existing state-of-the-art models. In the first stage, a pretrained CodonTransformer (BERT-like Large Language Model) generates biologically coherent mRNA sequences encoding the target antigen. In the second stage, a genetic algorithm (GA) evolves these candidate sequences through codon-aware crossover and synonymous mutation guided by human codon usage preferences. Fitness functions for evaluation combined translation-related metrics (CAI, tAI, codon-pair bias), mRNA structural stability (local and global MFE via RNAfold, GC content), and reduced immunogenicity (CpG/UpA motif frequency). Over successive generations (38th, 40th, and 42nd), the GA improved (achieved CAI values of 0.73 to 0.74 and tAI values of 0.63 to 0.64) CAI and tAI by over 6% and codon-pair bias is high and consistent (0.97 ) and improved ribosomal accessibility at the 5' end, with an unpaired_30 fraction reaching 0.87; Global Minimum Free Energy (MFE) converged to a balanced range of -346 to -356 kcal/mol, achieving approximately 84% base-paired structural stability, and reduced immune-stimulatory motifs - lowering the average immune penalty to 27.3 in the final generation. Linear Design produces hyper-stable transcripts (MFE < - 2000 kcal/mol) that risk translation inefficiency due to extreme rigidity, and BiLSTM-CRF focuses solely on high CAI (0.96 to 0.98) without structural constraints, our framework achieves an optimal translation-stability equilibrium, highlighting the proposed BERT-GA framework as an effective, data-driven approach for the design and optimization of in-silico mRNA sequences.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种两阶段mRNA优化框架：先利用CodonTransformer（类BERT大模型）生成生物合理的mRNA序列，再通过遗传算法（GA）进行密码子感知的交叉和突变优化。优化目标包括翻译效率（CAI、tAI）、结构稳定性（MFE、GC含量）和低免疫原性（CpG/UpA）。最终在翻译-稳定性权衡上优于线性设计和BiLSTM-CRF方法。
AI.motivation: mRNA序列作为治疗药物需要优化翻译效率、结构稳定性和低免疫原性，现有模型（如线性设计导致超稳定结构阻碍翻译，BiLSTM-CRF只追求高CAI忽略结构约束）难以达到三者平衡，因此需要一种综合优化的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段，预训练的CodonTransformer（BERT-like LLM）生成目标抗原的mRNA候选序列；第二阶段，遗传算法（GA）通过密码子感知的交叉和同义突变（以人类密码子偏好为指导）进化这些候选序列，适应度函数综合翻译指标（CAI、tAI、密码子对偏差）、结构稳定性（局部/全局MFE、GC含量）和免疫原性（CpG/UpA频率）。
AI.result: GA经过38、40、42代优化后：CAI达0.73-0.74，tAI达0.63-0.64（提高6%以上）；密码子对偏差达0.97；5'端核糖体可及性（unpaired_30）达0.87；全局MFE收敛至-346~-356 kcal/mol（约84%碱基配对结构稳定性）；免疫惩罚降至27.3。优于线性设计（MFE < -2000 kcal/mol，极端刚性）和BiLSTM-CRF（仅CAI 0.96-0.98，无结构约束）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的BERT-GA框架能在翻译效率、结构稳定性和低免疫原性之间取得最优平衡，是一种有效的数据驱动mRNA序列设计优化方法。
