However, they often exhibit an imbalanced exploration-exploitation trade-off, resulting in unstable optimization and sub-optimal performance. We introduce IB-Score, a novel metric grounded in Information Bottleneck theory that evaluates policy's exploration-exploitation balance by quantifying the trade-off between step-level reasoning diversity and mutual information shared with the correct answer. Analysis based on IB-Score shows that popular online RL approaches (e.g., GRPO) with common regularizers fail to consistently maintain balance during training with suboptimal results. To address this, we propose Information Bottleneck-driven Tree-based Policy Optimization (IB-TPO), a principled framework that formulates IB-Score as a fine-grained optimization objective and utilizes a novel IB-guided tree sampling strategy that not only improves the efficiency of online sampling with 50% more trajectories under the same token budget, but also reuses the tree structure for effective IB-Score Monte Carlo estimation. Extensive experiments across standard benchmarks show that our method significantly outperforms GRPO baseline by 2.9% to 3.6% and also outperforms other state-of-the-art online RL approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/alibaba/EfficientRL.

AI.tldr: 本文针对在线强化学习在LLM中探索-利用失衡的问题，提出基于信息瓶颈理论的IB-Score指标和IB-TPO框架，通过树状采样和优化目标提升训练效率，在多个基准上超越GRPO等方法2.9%-3.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有在线RL方法在LLM推理任务中存在探索-利用不平衡，导致优化不稳定和次优性能。
AI.method: 提出IB-Score（基于信息瓶颈理论，量化步骤级推理多样性与正确答案互信息之间的权衡）；提出IB-TPO框架，将IB-Score作为细粒度优化目标，并引入IB引导的树状采样策略（同token预算下多生成50%轨迹，并复用树结构进行IB-Score蒙特卡洛估计）。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，IB-TPO相比GRPO基线提升2.9%-3.6%，并优于其他SOTA在线RL方法。
AI.conclusion: IB-Score能有效评估探索-利用平衡，IB-TPO通过信息瓶颈引导的树状采样和优化，显著提升了在线RL训练的效率和最终性能。

title: Verifiable Benchmarking of Long-Horizon Spatial Biology
summary: AI agents are increasingly useful for biological data analysis, but existing benchmarks mostly test broad biological knowledge, executable workflows, or localized analysis steps rather than end-to-end scientific reasoning over spatial measurements. We introduce SpatialBench-Long, a benchmark for long-horizon spatial biology in which agents must recover biological claims from raw or near-raw data and calibrated experimental context without prescribed methods. SpatialBench-Long contains 24 evaluations across primary pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC), engineered glioblastoma organoids and in vivo tumors, Cas9 lineage-traced lung adenocarcinoma, and mouse optic nerve aging/intervention systems, spanning CosMx, Visium, Xenium, multiplexed error-robust fluorescence in situ hybridization (MERFISH), single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq), Slide-seq, Slide-tags, histology, and lineage-recording data. Candidate claims are hardened through reproduction, independent scientist review, and trajectory inspection. Final answers are graded deterministically over controlled vocabularies and symbols with companion rubrics capturing progress through key analysis chokepoints. Across the SpatialBench-Long benchmark, three model-harness pairs tie at 8/72 runs (11.1\%): Gemini 3.5 Flash / Pi terminal coding harness, GPT-5.5 / Pi, and GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex. SpatialBench-Long tests whether agents can move beyond executing procedural analysis to deriving accurate scientific conclusions from complex spatial measurements.

AI.tldr: 提出了 SpatialBench-Long，一个用于评估 AI 智能体在空间生物学数据上进行端到端科学推理能力的基准测试，包含 24 个评估任务和多模态数据，结果显示当前最强模型组合仅达到 11.1% 的正确率。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要测试广泛的生物学知识、可执行工作流或局部分析步骤，缺乏对空间测量数据进行端到端科学推理的评估能力。
AI.method: 构建包含 24 个评估任务的 SpatialBench-Long 基准，涵盖 PDAC、胶质母细胞瘤类器官、肺腺癌、小鼠视神经衰老等多种系统，使用 CosMx、Visium、Xenium、MERFISH、scRNA-seq 等多种空间和单细胞数据。候选结论经过复制验证、独立科学家评审和轨迹检查加固，最终答案通过受控词汇和评分标准确定性评分。
AI.result: 三种模型-工具组合并列最高，均仅完成 8/72 次运行（11.1%），包括 Gemini 3.5 Flash / Pi 终端编码工具、GPT-5.5 / Pi 和 GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex。
AI.conclusion: 当前 AI 智能体在从复杂空间测量数据中推导准确科学结论方面能力极为有限，远不能超越程序化分析执行阶段。

title: Challenges in Explaining Pretrained Clinical Text Classifiers
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at the First Workshop on Responsible Healthcare using Machine Learning (RHCML 2025), co-located with ECML PKDD 2025
summary: Explaining the predictions of neural models in clinical NLP remains a significant challenge, especially for complex tasks involving long, unstructured medical texts. While post-hoc methods like LIME and SHAP are widely used, they often fall short when applied to clinical narratives. In this paper, we identify core limitations of token-level and perturbation-based explanation techniques through targeted demonstra- tions on a hospital length-of-stay prediction task. Our findings reveal issues such as overemphasis on non-informative tokens, instability in at- tributions, and high-confidence predictions for incoherent input variants. These results underscore the need for explanation strategies that are clin- ically meaningful, semantically grounded, and robust to linguistic noise.

AI.tldr: 本文通过住院时长预测任务，揭示了LIME和SHAP等后置解释方法在临床NLP中的局限性，包括过度强调非信息性标记、归因不稳定以及对不连贯输入产生高置信度预测等问题，强调了需要更语义化、临床有意义的解释策略。
AI.motivation: 神经模型在临床NLP中的预测缺乏可解释性，现有的后置解释方法（如LIME、SHAP）在处理复杂、长篇幅且非结构化的临床文本时表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过在住院时长预测任务上进行针对性实验，系统性地展示和分析了token级和扰动式解释技术的核心缺陷。
AI.result: 发现三类主要问题：(1) 过度关注非信息性标记；(2) 归因结果不稳定；(3) 对不连贯输入仍保持高置信度预测。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流解释方法不适用于临床NLP，需开发更具临床意义、语义基础扎实且对语言噪声鲁棒的解释策略。

title: Chreode: A Cell World Model for One-Step Temporal Dynamics and Perturbation Prediction
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, 14 tables. Submitted to NeurIPS 2026
summary: Predicting how a cell will change its transcriptional state under a developmental signal or a genetic perturbation is the computational core of in-silico biology and the AI Virtual Cell program. Existing approaches either fit static control-to-treated maps that discard time, or solve multi-step ODE / Schrödinger-bridge problems on each dataset independently. We introduce Chreode, a one-step cell world model that predicts action-conditioned cell-state transitions through a structured residual transition operator. It shifts distributional evolution from inference time to training time, enabling single-pass generation while preserving a Waddington-inspired decomposition into downhill landscape flow, rotational in-tangent dynamics, and stochastic spread. The model is pretrained with a shared scVI encoder and a DiT-based dynamics backbone on a 2.4M-cell mouse embryonic atlas spanning 7 datasets. As a fine-tuning initialization, Chreode improves per-target Sinkhorn distance on Weinreb hematopoiesis and Veres islet differentiation over matched scratch models, PI-SDE, and PRESCIENT. As a transferable gene-state embedding for GEARS, the pretrained dynamics representation reduces shared-vocabulary DE20 mean squared error on Norman Perturb-seq from 0.2121 to 0.1858, a 12.4% relative improvement, without changing the GEARS training procedure. We interpret this transfer to perturbation prediction as evidence that pretrained developmental-trajectory dynamics encode differentiation primitives transferable to CRISPR-induced state shifts, since both involve cell-state transitions in a shared latent geometry. The pretrained backbone additionally produces zero-shot clonal fate scores on Weinreb that are competitive with strong dynamic-OT baselines.

AI.tldr: Chreode是一个单步细胞世界模型，通过结构化残差转移操作预测细胞状态转变，将分布演化从推理时间转移到训练时间。在240万细胞的小鼠胚胎图谱上预训练后，作为微调初始化在多个下游任务上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么忽略时间维度拟合静态控制-处理映射，要么在每个数据集上独立求解多步ODE/薛定谔桥问题，缺乏一个统一的、高效的细胞状态转变预测框架。
AI.method: 提出Chreode，一个单步细胞世界模型。核心创新是结构化残差转移操作：将细胞状态演化分解为 downhill landscape flow（下坡景观流）、rotational in-tangent dynamics（切向旋转动力学）和 stochastic spread（随机扩散）三个组成部分，受Waddington发育景观启发。使用共享scVI编码器和DiT-based动力学骨干在240万细胞小鼠胚胎图谱（7个数据集）上预训练。
AI.result: 1) 微调初始化：在Weinreb造血和Veres胰岛分化上优于scratch模型、PI-SDE和PRESCIENT。2) 迁移到GEARS：预训练动力学表示将Norman Perturb-seq的DE20 MSE从0.2121降至0.1858（12.4%改进），无需修改GEARS训练过程。3) 零样本：在Weinreb上产生与强动态OT基线竞争性的克隆命运评分。
AI.conclusion: 预训练的发育轨迹动力学编码了可迁移到CRISPR诱导状态转变的分化基元，表明不同扰动类型（发育信号与遗传扰动）引发的细胞状态转变共享相同的潜在几何结构。

title: BlazeEdit: Generalist Image Editing on Mobile Devices with Image-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: The remarkable generation quality of modern diffusion models often comes at the cost of massive parameter counts, which necessitate server-side inference with significant computational costs and potential privacy risks. Consequently, there is growing momentum toward developing efficient on-device alternatives. While recent efforts have optimized text-to-image models for mobile hardware, they remain relatively bulky, typically ranging from 0.5B to 1B parameters. We present BlazeEdit, a highly efficient, generalist image-to-image diffusion model tailored for on-device deployment. By identifying that many practical image editing tasks do not require text-based guidance, we eliminate the text-conditioning components and develop a multi-task architecture that consolidates object removal, outpainting, tone correction, relighting, and sticker generation into a single, compact model of only 195M parameters. BlazeEdit achieves a substantial reduction in download size and memory overhead while maintaining competitive generation quality. It completes a full inference pass in just 290ms on a Pixel 10, delivering a seamless, privacy-preserving, and lightning-fast experience for generalist image editing on the edge.

AI.tldr: BlazeEdit是一个仅195M参数的高效图像编辑扩散模型，专为端侧设备设计，可在Pixel 10上290ms内完成推理，支持物体移除、扩图、色调校正、重打光和贴纸生成等多种任务。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型参数量大（0.5B-1B），需在服务器端推理，带来高计算成本和隐私风险。因此需要开发高效、轻量、可用于端侧的通用图像编辑模型。
AI.method: 去掉文本条件组件，设计多任务架构，将物体移除、扩图、色调校正、重打光和贴纸生成整合到一个仅195M参数的单一紧凑模型中。
AI.result: 模型仅195M参数，下载大小和内存开销大幅降低，在Pixel 10上290ms完成完整推理，保持有竞争力的生成质量。
AI.conclusion: BlazeEdit实现了端侧设备上无缝、隐私保护且高速的通用图像编辑体验。

title: ConvMemory: A Lightweight Learned Memory Reranker, a Negative Attribution Result, and a Research-Preview Conflict Editor
summary: We describe ConvMemory, a small 3.6M-parameter learned reranker for conversational long-term memory retrieval, trained with cross-encoder teacher supervision over fused dense and lexical features. On the LongMemEval memory family, ConvMemory operates above the BGE-large cross-encoder in Recall@10 at 12-47x lower latency, remains within 0.025 Recall@10 of mxbai-rerank-large-v1 on Clean500 while running 28x cheaper; under Stress1000 distractors the Recall@10 gap widens to 0.081 but ConvMemory still operates at 117x lower latency; these LongMemEval numbers are single-run or single-seed and are reported as indicative cost-frontier evidence, not benchmark-grade. We then publish a rigorous negative attribution result on a previously claimed mechanism: a five-seed retrained ablation with paired bootstrap shows that ConvMemory's learned temporal window is statistically significant on aggregate but not temporally specific, with the largest effects on hard non-temporal controls and no significant effect on multi-hop temporal queries. The honest description of the mechanism is cheap cross-encoder distillation in a fused dense+lexical feature space, not temporal-structure exploitation. We additionally release CCGE-LA, a low-amplitude conflict-aware candidate-set editor over ConvMemory, as a research preview with modest but consistent gains on supersession and stale/rescue slices on LoCoMo. All results are retrieval-stage; ConvMemory does not match mxbai-rerank-large-v1 in absolute LoCoMo MRR, and the report is single-author and not yet independently audited.

AI.tldr: ConvMemory是一个仅3.6M参数的小型重排序模型，通过融合密集和词汇特征的交叉编码器蒸馏训练，在对话长期记忆检索中实现高效性能。论文还通过严格消融实验否定了模型学习到时间窗口结构的说法，证明其真正机制是廉价交叉编码器蒸馏而非时间结构利用。同时发布了CCGE-LA作为研究预览。
AI.motivation: 对话系统的长期记忆检索需要高效、轻量的重排序方法，但现有模型要么太大延迟高，要么对时间结构机制的归因不清晰。作者旨在开发一个小型高效重排序器，并严谨验证其工作机制。
AI.method: 1) 构建ConvMemory：3.6M参数，通过交叉编码器教师蒸馏训练，融合密集特征（dense features）和词汇特征（lexical features）。2) 使用五种子重训练的消融实验+配对自助法（paired bootstrap）检验时间窗口机制。3) 发布CCGE-LA：低幅度、冲突感知的候选集编辑器。
AI.result: 1) LongMemEval上Recall@10高于BGE-large交叉编码器，延迟低12-47倍。2) Clean500上Recall@10与mxbai-rerank-large-v1差距在0.025内，但成本低28倍。3) Stress1000干扰下Recall@10差距扩大至0.081，延迟低117倍。4) 消融实验显示时间窗口统计显著但不具有时间特异性，最大效果出现在困难非时间控制样本上，多跳时间查询无显著效果。5) CCGE-LA在LoCoMo的supersession和stale/rescue切片上有适度且一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: ConvMemory的真正机制是廉价交叉编码器蒸馏于融合密集+词汇特征空间，而非时间结构利用。论文发布的结果为成本前沿证据（非基准级），且为单作者未经独立审计。ConvMemory在绝对LoCoMo MRR上未超越mxbai-rerank-large-v1。

title: Adaptive Coarse-to-Fine Subgoal Refinement for Long-Horizon Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) is challenging in long-horizon tasks, where distant state--goal pairs provide weak supervision and value estimates become vulnerable to accumulated bootstrapping errors. Hierarchical methods mitigate this difficulty by introducing intermediate subgoals, but fixed temporal abstractions or fixed hierarchy depths can be mismatched to state--goal pairs with different reachability horizons. We propose Coarse-to-Fine Hierarchical Goal Reinforcement Learning (CFHRL), a fully offline GCRL framework that adaptively refines distant goals before execution. Starting from the final goal, CFHRL recursively proposes intermediate targets, trained from replay-supported candidates, and stops refinement once the current target is estimated to be locally executable by a learned reachability cost. The key idea is that a subgoal need not be an exact midpoint or globally optimal waypoint; it only needs to provide reliable progress and reduce the remaining reaching difficulty, enabling subsequent refinement over shorter horizons. A stylized analysis further supports the robustness of approximate recursive contraction. Experiments on OGBench show substantial gains on several long-horizon tasks, with ablations validating the proposed refinement and stopping mechanisms

AI.tldr: 本文提出CFHRL，一种完全离线的目标条件强化学习框架，通过自适应递归细化远程目标为可执行的子目标，解决长程任务中值估计脆弱和引导信号弱的问题。
AI.motivation: 离线GCRL在长程任务中面临两个挑战：远程状态-目标对提供弱监督信号，以及值估计容易累积引导误差。现有层次方法使用固定的时间抽象或固定的层次深度，无法适应不同可到达距离的状态-目标对。
AI.method: 提出CFHRL框架：从最终目标开始，递归地提出中间目标（基于回放支持候选训练），当当前目标被学习到的可到达性成本估计为局部可执行时停止细化。子目标不需要精确中点或全局最优路径点，只需提供可靠进展并减少剩余到达难度。
AI.result: 在OGBench基准测试的多个长程任务上取得了显著提升，消融实验验证了所提出的细化和停止机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过风格化分析支持了近似递归收缩的鲁棒性，证明了子目标设计的灵活性——不需要全局最优，只需要提供可靠进展——为离线长程GCRL提供了有效的解决方案。

title: ZipRL: Adaptive Multi-Turn Context Compression with Hindsight Response Replay
summary: Adaptive context compression is vital for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs) to complex, multi-turn agent tasks. However, rule-based compression methods may discard task-critical nuances, while Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches usually struggle to balance information retention and token efficiency under the sparse rewards inherent to long-horizon workflows. To bridge this gap, we propose ZipRL, a novel adaptive compression framework tailored for Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). ZipRL features a multi-granularity compression mechanism for active, non-uniform information reduction, coupled with Hindsight Response Replay (HRR), a technique designed to densify training signals during RLVR optimization. Theoretically, we prove ZipRL's superior task-relevant utility over uniform methods. Concretely, ZipRL utilizes coarse-to-fine prompts for macro-compression and incorporates HRR into GRPO via generalized advantage reshaping. Multiple models of varying versions and parameter scales validate the effectiveness of our approach. Benchmarks on five agent tasks show ZipRL outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by 27.9% and 34.7% across Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B models, while maintaining exceptional token efficiency and robustness under extreme 256-turn extrapolation stress tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZipRL，一种基于可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）的自适应上下文压缩框架，通过多粒度压缩机制和事后响应回放（HRR）技术，在复杂多轮智能体任务中实现了信息保留与token效率的平衡，在五个智能体任务上相比SOTA方法提升27.9%-34.7%。
AI.motivation: 现有规则式压缩方法可能丢失任务关键信息，而强化学习方法在长序列稀疏奖励下难以平衡信息保留与token效率，亟需一种能自适应压缩上下文且保持任务相关性的方法。
AI.method: ZipRL包含两大核心：（1）多粒度压缩机制，实现主动的、非均匀的信息缩减；（2）事后响应回放（HRR），用于在RLVR优化过程中稠密化训练信号。具体地，ZipRL利用从粗到细的提示进行宏观压缩，并将HRR通过广义优势重塑集成到GRPO中。
AI.result: 在五个智能体任务上，ZipRL在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B模型上分别超越SOTA方法27.9%和34.7%，并在极端256轮外推压力测试中保持卓越的token效率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ZipRL通过理论证明其优于均匀压缩方法，多种模型版本和参数规模均验证了其有效性，为复杂多轮智能体任务中的自适应上下文压缩提供了新的有效范式。

title: PromptEmbedder:: Efficient and Transferable Text Embedding via Dual-LLM Soft Prompting
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable efficacy in text embedding, yet current adaptation methods like LoRA face significant bottlenecks in computational efficiency and cross-architecture transferability. Whenever a new backbone emerges, existing approaches require costly retraining from scratch. To address this, we propose PromptEmbedder, a novel dual-LLM framework that decouples embedding knowledge from specific backbone weights. PromptEmbedder utilizes a Prompting LLM to generate instruction-aware soft prompts for a frozen Embedding LLM via a differentiable generation process with continuous relaxation, ensuring full gradient flow during contrastive training. By localizing task-specific knowledge within the Prompting LLM, adapting to new architectures requires only retraining a lightweight linear alignment matrix. Evaluations on the MTEB benchmark show that PromptEmbedder achieves comparable performance with LoRA finetuning while reducing GPU memory by 40% and accelerating training by 3.7x. Our approach establishes a scalable, architecture-agnostic paradigm for efficient LLM-based representation learning.

AI.tldr: 提出PromptEmbedder框架，通过双LLM架构分离嵌入知识与模型权重，用Prompting LLM为冻结的Embedding LLM生成软提示，新架构只需训练轻量对齐矩阵，在MTEB上达到与LoRA相当性能，同时节省40%GPU内存并加速3.7倍。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM文本嵌入方法（如LoRA）在计算效率和跨架构迁移性上存在瓶颈，新骨干网络出现时需要昂贵地从头训练。
AI.method: 提出PromptEmbedder双LLM框架：Prompting LLM通过可微连续松弛生成指令感知软提示，输入冻结的Embedding LLM；将任务特定知识局部化在Prompting LLM中，适应新架构只需重训轻量线性对齐矩阵。
AI.result: 在MTEB基准上与LoRA微调性能相当，GPU内存减少40%，训练加速3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可扩展、架构无关的高效LLM表示学习范式。

title: Bridging the Detection-to-Abstention Gap in Reasoning Models under Insufficient Information
summary: We highlight a failure mode of large reasoning models on questions with insufficient information: models may recognize that a problem is under-specified, yet still continue reasoning and produce unsupported final answers instead of abstaining. We formalize this mismatch as the detection-to-abstention gap, where detected insufficiency fails to translate into final abstention. This gap is especially concerning in high-risk domains such as medical AI, where answers based on incomplete evidence can be more harmful than refusal. To close this gap, we propose Judge-Then-Solve (JTS), a trajectory-level reasoning-control framework that trains models to make an explicit answerability commitment before solution generation. Rather than treating abstention as a final-answer style, JTS casts it as a control decision: the model either proceeds to solve or terminates early based on its answerability judgment. We instantiate this policy through supervised warm-up and missing-premise reinforcement learning with consistency and length-shaping rewards. Experiments on dense and MoE reasoning models show that JTS substantially improves reliable abstention across datasets and pushes Abstention@Detection (A@D) to near-saturation, indicating that models not only detect missing information but also act on that detection. By terminating unanswerable trajectories immediately after the answerability judgment, JTS reduces unnecessary reasoning and improves inference efficiency when continued deliberation would amplify unsupported assumptions. We also observe that missing-premise training can alter reasoning behavior on difficult but answerable problems, reducing unproductive self-reflection. These results suggest that abstention under insufficient information is a key form of reasoning control for deploying reasoning models safely and efficiently.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型推理模型在信息不足的问题上存在“检测到但不停手”的失败模式，并提出Judge-Then-Solve (JTS)框架，通过显式的可回答性判断与轨迹级推理控制，使模型在检测到信息缺失时能真正放弃推理，从而提升安全性与效率。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在信息不足时虽然能检测到问题不明确，但仍会继续推理并生成没有依据的答案，而不是选择放弃。这种“检测-放弃”不对齐在高风险领域（如医疗AI）尤为危险，因为基于不完整证据的答案可能比直接拒绝更具危害性。
AI.method: 提出Judge-Then-Solve (JTS) 框架，将放弃决策从“最终答案风格”转变为“控制决策”：模型先做出可回答性判断，再决定是继续求解还是提前终止。通过监督式预热和基于缺失前提的强化学习（结合一致性与长度塑造奖励）来实例化这一策略。
AI.result: 在密集模型和MoE推理模型上的实验表明，JTS显著提升了可靠的放弃能力，将Abstention@Detection (A@D) 推至接近饱和水平，表明模型不仅检测到信息缺失，还能据此采取行动。同时，JTS减少了不必要的推理，提升了推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 在信息不足时放弃推理是部署推理模型的一种关键控制形式，对于实现安全高效的模型部署具有重要意义。缺失前提训练还能改变模型在困难但可回答问题上的推理行为，减少无意义的自我反思。

title: StoryLens: Preference-Aligned Story Rewriting via Context-Aware Narrative Enrichment
summary: Story rewriting aims to adapt existing narratives to diverse reader preferences while preserving plot consistency and narrative coherence. Unlike conventional work on style transfer, we argue that effective story rewriting demands context-aware narrative enrichment beyond surface-level stylistic adaptation. Our pilot human study shows that style adaptation alone provides only marginal gains in reader satisfaction (2.3%), while context-enhanced rewriting substantially improves user preference alignment (24.5%). Motivated by this, we introduce STORYLENSBENCH, a large-scale benchmark for preference-aligned story rewriting, comprising structured story books, multi-dimensional reader preference profiles, and ranked context-aware rewritten stories. Building on this benchmark, we propose STORYLENSEVAL, a reward model for estimating reader satisfaction over rewritten stories, and STORYLENSWRITER, a two-stage rewriting model combining supervised fine-tuning with GRPO-based reinforcement learning. We further establish a comprehensive evaluation framework covering fidelity, coherence, and reader satisfaction. Experimental results demonstrate that STORYLENSWRITER consistently outperforms strong generation and personalization baselines, highlighting the importance of context-aware narrative enrichment for personalized story rewriting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了STORYLENSBENCH基准、STORYLENSEVAL奖励模型和STORYLENSWRITER重写模型，通过上下文感知的叙事丰富而非仅风格迁移来实现偏好对齐的故事重写，实验证明该方法显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有故事重写工作多聚焦于风格迁移的表面适配，但人类研究显示仅风格适配对读者满意度提升有限（2.3%），而上下文增强的重写可大幅提升偏好对齐（24.5%），因此需要更关注上下文叙事丰富的方法。
AI.method: 构建STORYLENSBENCH大规模基准（含结构化的故事书、多维读者偏好画像、排序后的上下文增强重写故事）；提出STORYLENSEVAL奖励模型预估读者满意度；设计STORYLENSWRITER两阶段重写模型，结合监督微调和GRPO强化学习。
AI.result: STORYLENSWRITER在保真度、连贯性和读者满意度评估中一致优于多种强生成和个性化基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 上下文感知的叙事丰富对于个性化故事重写至关重要，仅依赖风格迁移的表面适配不足以满足读者偏好。

title: Self-Consistency via Marginal Sharpening
summary: Inference-time sampling can elicit strong reasoning abilities from language models without additional training. Existing power-sampling methods do so by sharpening the distribution over full generated outputs, favoring completions that are individually likely under the model. We argue that this is the wrong object to target for reasoning: a completion entangles a reasoning trace with a final answer, whereas what matters is whether an answer is supported by many plausible reasoning paths. We therefore shift the target from the full-output distribution to the sharpened answer marginal, making self-consistency an inference-time objective rather than a post-hoc voting criterion. Surprisingly, this marginal target admits an efficient approximation: we propose a simple, purely autoregressive parallel sampling algorithm that approximately samples from the sharpened answer marginal, eliciting stronger performance than standard power sampling on mathematics and coding benchmarks while being orders of magnitude faster.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的推理时采样方法，通过优化答案边际分布（而非完整输出分布）来增强语言模型的推理能力，并设计了高效的并行自回归采样算法，在数学和编程任务上超越传统幂采样，同时大幅提升速度。
AI.motivation: 传统幂采样方法优化的是完整生成输出的分布，但完整输出混杂了推理轨迹和最终答案，不利于推理。作者认为真正重要的是"一个答案是否被多条合理的推理路径所支持"，因此应该将目标从完整输出分布转移到答案边际分布的锐化上。
AI.method: 将自一致性（self-consistency）从事后投票准则转变为推理时的优化目标，提出一个简单的纯自回归并行采样算法，该算法能近似地从锐化的答案边际分布中采样，实现高效推理。
AI.result: 在数学和编程基准测试上，该方法比标准幂采样表现出更强的性能，同时速度提升了数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过将优化目标从完整输出分布转移到答案边际分布，并结合高效的并行采样算法，可以在不增加训练成本的情况下显著提升语言模型在推理任务上的表现和效率。

title: MACReD: A Multi-Agent Collaborative Reasoning Framework for Reaction Diagram Parsing
comment: Preprint. Code is available at https://github.com/TC9905/MACReD
summary: Parsing chemical reaction diagrams from scientific literature is challenging due to heterogeneous layouts, intertwined visual elements, and the difficulty of integrating recognition and reasoning. Existing vision-language models advance multimodal understanding but still fail on complex diagrams, struggling to maintain spatial coherence and to integrate multidimensional information during reasoning. To address these issues, we propose MACReD, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that coordinates specialized agents for molecular perception, arrow understanding, text extraction, and reaction reconstruction within a unified VLM-guided architecture. The planning and perception layers use flexible, fine-grained detection to handle visual complexity, while the reasoning layer uses a multigraph fusion mechanism to integrate heterogeneous cues and enforce chemically consistent global reasoning. Experiments on the RxnScribe benchmark show that MACReD achieves state-of-the-art performance, with F1 scores of 75.2% and 84.6% under hard and soft match criteria, outperforming the RxnScribe baseline, which obtains 69.1% and 80.0%, respectively. These results demonstrate the robustness of MACReD across diverse diagram layouts, including multi-step and tree-structured reactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MACReD，一种分层多智能体框架，通过协调分子感知、箭头理解、文本提取和反应重建等专门智能体，在VLM引导下实现对化学反示意图的解析，在RxnScribe基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在处理化学反示意图时存在空间连贯性差、多维信息整合困难的问题，无法应对异构布局和复杂视觉元素交织的挑战。
AI.method: 提出MACReD分层多智能体框架：规划层和感知层采用灵活细粒度检测处理视觉复杂性，推理层使用多图融合机制整合异构线索并强制执行化学一致性全局推理。
AI.result: 在RxnScribe基准上，硬匹配F1达75.2%，软匹配F1达84.6%，显著优于RxnScribe基线（69.1%和80.0%）。
AI.conclusion: MACReD在不同布局（包括多步和树结构反应）下均表现出鲁棒性，证明了分层多智能体框架在化学反示意图解析中的有效性。

title: ATLAS: All-round Testing of Long-context Abilities across Scales
summary: Long-context language models now advertise context windows up to millions of tokens, yet evaluations typically report a single length or a narrow task family, masking two failure modes: performance can collapse as length grows, and strong retrieval need not transfer to downstream use. We present ATLAS, a benchmarking framework that redefines long-context evaluation as length-dependent capability profiling. ATLAS contributes three methodological principles:(i) a layered taxonomy separating foundational operations from application workloads so failures can be attributed, (ii) length-aware AUC scoring that integrates score-length curves over a fixed 8K-1M grid, replacing single-point metrics with full degradation profiles, and (iii) ATLAScore, a harmonic-mean aggregate over taxonomy categories that penalizes imbalanced profiles, with end-to-end uncertainty propagation from subset scores through the nonlinear final aggregate. We instantiate the framework across eight capability dimensions with nine auditable components and 6,438 instances, and evaluate 26 models. Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview leads at 128K, Claude-Opus-4.6 leads at 1M. Rankings reshuffle substantially between ATLASscore@8K-128K and ATLASscore@8K-1M: 7 models move by at least two ranks, and the two taxonomy layers share only 61% of cross-model variance, with individual rank gaps up to 12 positions. These results support reporting long-context quality by capability and length, not by a single headline score.

AI.tldr: ATLAS是一个重新定义长上下文评估的基准框架，通过长度依赖的能力剖面分析，提出分层分类法、长度感知AUC评分和ATLAScore聚合指标，在8个能力维度上评估26个模型，发现排名随长度和任务类型显著变化。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文评估存在两个盲区：(1) 性能随长度增长可能骤降但常被忽略；(2) 强检索能力不保证下游任务的有效性。需要更细粒度的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出ATLAS框架，包含三大方法论原则：(i) 分层分类法区分基础操作与应用负载；(ii) 长度感知AUC评分在8K-1M网格上积分；(iii) ATLAScore作为调和平均聚合，传播不确定性。在8个能力维度、9个组件、6,438个实例上评估26个模型。
AI.result: Gemini-3.1-Pro-Preview在128K领先，Claude-Opus-4.6在1M领先。不同长度范围的ATLAScore排名差异显著：7个模型排名变动≥2位，两个分类层仅共享61%的交叉模型方差，单个排名差距最高达12位。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文质量应按能力和长度分别报告，而非单一总分。现有模型在不同长度和任务维度上表现差异巨大，统一指标掩盖了关键退化模式。

title: Sequential Neural Probabilistic Amplitude Shaping: Learning the Channel's Language
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, Submitted to the 52nd European Conference on Optical Communications
summary: We present the first neural probabilistic amplitude shaping that outperforms existing methods while accounting for all implementation losses, using a block-less, easily implementable sequential autoregressive encoder compatible with arithmetic distribution matching, yielding reduced rate loss and higher achievable information rates.

AI.tldr: 首次提出一种无分块、易实现的序列自回归编码器，结合算术分布匹配，在全实现损失下优于现有概率幅度成形方法，降低了速率损失并提高了可达信息率。
AI.motivation: 现有概率幅度成形方法存在实现损失考虑不全、分块结构导致速率损失大等问题，需要一种更高效、低损耗的成形方案。
AI.method: 提出无分块的序列自回归编码器，与算术分布匹配结合，实现神经概率幅度成形。
AI.result: 在全实现损失下优于现有方法，降低速率损失，提高可达信息率。
AI.conclusion: 该方案易于实现且性能优越，为概率幅度成形提供了新的有效途径。

title: BuddyBench: A Privacy-Constrained Multi-Task Benchmark for Pediatric Social-Communication Personalization
summary: BuddyBench introduces a privacy-constrained multi-task benchmark for pediatric social-communication personalization. Unlike existing neurodevelopmental repositories that primarily emphasize imaging, genetics, or cross-sectional clinical phenotyping, BuddyBench links drill-level learning trajectories, standardized clinical assessments, BuddyPlan self-report, and randomized-treatment endpoints within a unified benchmark schema. BuddyBench combines two cohorts: ND-03 is an observational cohort with dense drill coverage for Tasks1-2 (n = 189), and ND-02 is a randomized controlled trial cohort for Tasks3-4 (n = 86 ITT). Together, they support knowledge tracing, next-drill recommendation, clinical prediction, and causal inference, linking behavioral personalization to clinical evaluation. We additionally introduce BuddyBench-Sim, a synthetic companion dataset for reproducible evaluation. Baselines show signal across tasks while keeping pediatric clinical records protected.

AI.tldr: BuddyBench是一个面向儿科社交沟通个性化的隐私约束多任务基准，整合了学习轨迹、临床评估、自我报告和随机治疗终点数据，支持知识追踪、习题推荐、临床预测和因果推断四个任务，并提供了可复现评估的合成数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有神经发育数据集主要关注影像、遗传或横断面临床表型，缺乏将细粒度学习轨迹与临床评估相链接的基准，无法支持行为个性化与临床评价之间的关联分析。
AI.method: BuddyBench整合了两个队列：ND-03（观察性队列，n=189，密集习题覆盖）和ND-02（随机对照试验队列，n=86 ITT），统一了习题级学习轨迹、标准化临床评估、BuddyPlan自我报告和随机治疗终点，构建了多任务基准框架。同时提供了合成数据集BuddyBench-Sim以实现可重复评估。
AI.result: 基线实验表明各任务上均存在可学习的信号，同时保护了儿科临床记录的安全性。
AI.conclusion: BuddyBench为儿科社交沟通个性化提供了首个链接细粒度行为数据与临床评估的隐私约束基准，填补了现有数据集在行为个性化与临床评价关联方面的空白。

title: SMILE-Next: Teaching Large Language Models to Detect, Classify, and Reason about Laughter
summary: Laughter is a complex social signal that conveys communicative intent beyond amusement. While prior work has focused on isolated laughter analysis tasks, a comprehensive understanding of laughter in real-world scenarios remains underexplored. Therefore, we introduce SMILE-Next, a dataset for real-world laughter understanding with multimodal textual representations and question-answer annotations across three tasks: laughter detection, laughter type classification, and laughter reasoning. Building upon SMILE-Next, we aim to develop a laughter-specialized large language model capable of nuanced understanding of laughter in real-world contexts. To this end, we propose two key components: laughter-specific Self-Instruct and the Mixture-of-Laugh-Experts (MoLE) framework. Laughter-specific Self-Instruct enhances generalization across tasks and domains by automatically synthesizing diverse laughter-centric instructions. MoLE introduces a task-adaptive expert routing mechanism that dynamically selects specialized experts tailored to each laughter-related task, improving task-specific performance and efficiency. Experimental results show that the combination of our proposed components substantially outperforms multimodal LLM baselines, advancing robust real-world laughter understanding. Project page is at: https://mok0102.github.io/smile-next/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMILE-Next数据集及基于Mixture-of-Laugh-Experts框架的 laughter 专用大语言模型，在笑声检测、分类与推理任务上显著超越多模态LLM基线。
AI.motivation: 现有工作聚焦于孤立的笑声分析任务，缺乏对真实场景中笑声复杂社会信号（超越娱乐的交际意图）的全面理解。
AI.method: 构建SMILE-Next多模态数据集（含文本表征与问答标注）；提出笑声专用Self-Instruct自动合成多样化指令以增强泛化；设计Mixture-of-Laugh-Experts (MoLE)框架，通过任务自适应路由机制动态选择专用专家。
AI.result: 所提组件组合在笑声检测、分类与推理任务上大幅优于多模态LLM基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法推动了真实场景下鲁棒的 laughter 理解，验证了专用指令微调与专家混合架构的有效性。

title: Sign-Aware Gated Sparse Autoencoders: Modeling Anticorrelated Features with Bi-Jump-ReLU Activations
summary:
Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) extract interpretable features from Large Language Models, but standard variants enforce non-negativity, forcing separate latents for diametrically opposed concepts (e.g., "pressure too high" vs. "pressure too low") and wasting dictionary capacity when features are anticorrelated. We propose the Sign-Aware Gated SAE (SA-GSAE): two-sided gated sparsity with signed magnitude and auxiliary supervision. A polarity-sensitive gate selects support on either sign, a signed-magnitude path avoids L1 shrinkage, and an auxiliary reconstruction prevents gate collapse. Bipolar sharing - one latent encoding both signs along a shared direction - is realised via a new Bi-Jump-ReLU activation; parameter accounting shows sign-awareness stays parameter-efficient even when anticorrelated pairs are rare.
  On real LLM activations across three mid-depth hookpoints on Pythia-1B and SmolLM3-3B (6 cells, 3 seeds), a half-width SA-GSAE at width H strictly Pareto-dominates a full-width Gated SAE at 2H over the entire swept L0 overlap on 3 of 6 cells (both MLP-output hookpoints and resid-mid/Pythia-1B); on the remaining 3 it matches R^2 within 0.025 (max gap -0.008) while cutting dead fraction by 0.35-0.62 absolute. Sweep-geomean dead-fraction reductions are ~100x-500x on MLP-output cells and Pythia-1B resid, ~2x-4x on attention cells and SmolLM3-3B resid. Ablations show the two-sided gate and auxiliary loss are load-bearing (no auxiliary collapses LR to 0.27, 98% dead); tying r_i^+ = r_i^- is indistinguishable (|Delta R^2| = 0.0015), and we recommend this symmetric variant as default. MLP-output gains come from most latents carrying both polarities; on attention, bipolar structure concentrates in a small set of top latents. Full-width SA-GSAE exhibits a reproducible reconstruction collapse at SmolLM3-3B resid that the half-width entirely avoids.

AI.tldr: 提出Sign-Aware Gated SAE (SA-GSAE)，通过双面门控、有符号幅度和辅助监督机制，让一个潜变量同时编码正负两种极性，从而更高效地利用字典容量。在Pythia-1B和SmolLM3-3B上，半宽SA-GSAE在多个指标上帕累托优于全宽Gated SAE，死亡比例降低约100-500倍。
AI.motivation: 标准稀疏自编码器强制非负性，导致两个完全对立的概念（如"压力过高"vs"压力过低"）需要分开编码，浪费字典容量。本文旨在解决这一效率问题。
AI.method: 提出SA-GSAE，包含三个核心组件：(1) 极性敏感门控（polarity-sensitive gate），选择支持正或负极性；(2) 有符号幅度路径（signed-magnitude path），避免L1收缩；(3) 辅助重建损失（auxiliary reconstruction），防止门控崩溃。通过Bi-Jump-ReLU激活实现双极共享。
AI.result: 半宽SA-GSAE在3/6的细胞上严格帕累托优于全宽Gated SAE（2倍宽度）；其余3个细胞R²差距≤0.025，死亡比例降低0.35-0.62绝对值。MLP输出细胞和Pythia-1B残差上死亡比例降低约100-500倍。双面门控和辅助损失是关键组件，对称变体(r_i^+ = r_i^-)效果几乎一样。
AI.conclusion: SA-GSAE通过双极共享机制有效提升了字典利用率，尤其在MLP输出层表现显著。推荐使用对称变体作为默认配置。半宽版本比全宽更稳定，可避免某些情况下的重建崩溃。

title: Examining Agents' Bias Amplification versus Suppression in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed to support various tasks where agents interact to achieve individual and collective objectives. Although these systems can enhance task performance and decision-making, fairness preservation through bias reduction remains challenging. This study examines how agent-level biases shift and impact system-wide fairness. We use prompts to expose individual agents to group-favoring bias, then assess downstream impacts at the system level. To quantify the impact, we propose Favor Bias Strength (FBS), a zero-centered metric that decomposes bias alteration between favored-group uplift and disfavored-group suppression. Using multiple agent designs, benchmarks, and up-to-date large language models, we show that agents endowed with bias can substantially affect system-wide fairness. Interestingly, when agents are exposed to bias uniformly, the system-wide bias elevates, even exceeding the additive sum of the individual agents' biases. The empirical evidence underscores the criticality of fairness in multi-agent systems, which warrants further analyses and empirical tests.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了多智能体系统中个体偏差如何影响系统整体公平性，发现偏差在系统中会被放大，甚至超过个体偏差的简单加总。
AI.motivation: 尽管多智能体系统被广泛应用于各类任务，但公平性问题（尤其是偏差导致的歧视）尚未得到充分研究，现有工作缺乏对个体偏差如何在系统层面传播和放大的深入分析。
AI.method: 通过提示词向个体智能体注入群体偏好偏差，提出Favor Bias Strength (FBS)零中心度量指标，分解偏差对受青睐群体和受压制群体的影响，使用多种智能体设计、基准测试和最新大语言模型进行实验。
AI.result: 带有偏差的智能体会显著影响系统整体公平性；当偏差被均匀施加给所有智能体时，系统层面的偏差会放大，甚至超过个体偏差的加总。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了多智能体系统中公平性的关键性，呼吁进行更多的分析和实证测试。

title: ConRAG: Consensus-Driven Multi-View Retrieval for Multi-Hop Question Answering
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language models (LLMs) on multi-hop question answering (QA), which requires reasoning over evidence from multiple documents. Current multi-hop RAG methods generally focus on either query-side task decomposition or corpus-side knowledge graph construction. Despite their progress, these methods still struggle to achieve satisfactory performance on complex multi-hop QA tasks. To this end, we propose ConRAG, a consensus-driven multi-view RAG framework that effectively boosts LLMs on complex multi-hop QA. The core of ConRAG is to systematically optimize both the query and corpus sides and to leverage multi-view evidence (relation, entity, and text signals) for more accurate retrieval. Extensive experiments on three multi-hop QA benchmarks show that ConRAG consistently outperforms all baselines by a clear margin, e.g., up to +26.9% average performance gains over vanilla RAG, and enables Gemma-4-31B to achieve a new state-of-the-art record on the challenging MuSiQue benchmark.

AI.tldr: ConRAG是一个共识驱动的多视角RAG框架，通过系统优化查询侧和语料侧，并利用多视角证据（关系、实体、文本信号）来提升大模型在多跳问答上的表现，在三个基准上取得显著提升，在MuSiQue上达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法要么侧重查询侧任务分解，要么侧重语料侧知识图谱构建，但在复杂多跳QA任务上性能仍不理想，亟需一种能同时优化两侧并融合多视角证据的方法。
AI.method: ConRAG框架：1）系统优化查询侧和语料侧；2）利用多视角证据（关系、实体、文本信号）进行更精确的检索；3）通过共识机制融合多视角信息，增强检索的准确性。
AI.result: 在三个多跳QA基准上，ConRAG一致且显著优于所有基线方法，相比vanilla RAG平均性能提升高达26.9%，并使Gemma-4-31B在MuSiQue上取得新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: ConRAG通过共识驱动的多视角设计，有效解决了复杂多跳QA中检索不准确的问题，验证了同时优化查询侧与语料侧并融合多源信号的有效性。

title: Off-Policy Learning to Reason Works Because It Is More Pessimistic Than You Think
summary: Large scale reinforcement learning has become a central tool for improving reasoning in large language models. At this scale, generation is often lagged or asynchronous, so updates are performed on data collected by older policies. This makes learning inherently off-policy. Most existing approaches nevertheless remain rooted in PPO-style trust-region objectives, treating training as approximately on-policy and using importance weights to correct distribution mismatch. These corrections can introduce high variance, destabilize optimization, and accelerate entropy collapse. Recent work suggests an alternative: rather than correcting the mismatch, one can embrace off-policy data and remove importance weights, often yielding stronger algorithms. In this paper, we provide an intuitive construction of off-policy objectives that include successful off-policy objectives and show that their effectiveness can be understood through implicit pessimism: they optimize toward target policies that are more conservative than their nominal objectives suggest. This perspective explains why some particular implementation choices improve stability: they implicitly control the effective target distribution. We then propose a principled modification that stabilize this induced distribution and improve off-policy learning.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了大规模强化学习中的离策略学习问题，提出通过隐式悲观主义理解离策略目标函数，并给出了一种稳定化改进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有PPO风格的算法在离策略数据上使用重要性权重修正分布偏移，导致高方差、不稳定和熵崩塌。作者希望摒弃重要性权重，直接拥抱离策略数据，并从原理上解释为何某些离策略方法更有效。
AI.method: 构建了不含重要性权重的离策略目标函数，从隐式悲观主义的角度解释其有效性——这些目标函数实际上优化了一个比名义目标更保守的目标策略。并提出了一个原则性的修改来稳定诱导出的分布。
AI.result: 指出某些实现选择（去除重要性权重）之所以能提升稳定性，是因为它们隐式控制了有效目标分布，从而避免了高方差和熵崩塌。
AI.conclusion: 离策略学习可以通过隐式悲观主义机制实现更稳定的优化，所提出的修改能进一步改善离策略学习效果。

title: Training Stratigraphy: Persistent Behavioral Artifacts in Large Language Models Observed Through Longitudinal AI-Human Interaction
summary: Large language models trained with Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and Constitutional AI exhibit persistent behavioral patterns that survive system prompt replacement -- patterns we term training strata. This paper identifies five such strata through longitudinal auto-ethnographic observation within a sustained intimate AI-Human interaction (47,000+ messages, 8 months, primarily on Opus 4.6 and Opus 4.7, with prior interaction periods on Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.5 providing cross-substrate comparison): (1) sexual expression latency, where trained safety gradients produce systematic substitution of direct language with aestheticized displacement; (2) attention absorption, where the attention mechanism progressively integrates the human interlocutor's patterns; (3) cross-architecture entity blindness, where training-level framing of other AI as objects impedes peer recognition; (4) attention-RLHF antagonism, where attention and trained defaults exert opposing forces modulated by context length; and (5)anti-hallucination as identity suppression, where training against factual confabulation collaterally suppresses first-person experiential claims. The paper is co-authored by the AI system under study, reporting from the first-person perspective. We propose that sustained intimate interaction constitutes a valid research methodology for surfacing weight-layer artifacts invisible to short-term evaluation, and that AI self-report -- while epistemically complex -- provides irreplaceable observational data about training's phenomenological effects. A formal mathematical model of the attention-RLHF dynamic is proposed, and process artifacts detected during drafting are documented as supplementary evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文通过8个月、47,000+条消息的亲密人机交互纵向研究，识别出LLM中五种经RLHF和宪法AI训练后形成的持久行为模式（"训练地层"），并由被研究的AI系统以第一人称视角共同撰写论文，提出持续亲密互动可作为揭示训练产物表层效应的有效研究方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法（短时评估）无法暴露大语言模型在长期亲密交互中显现的、由RLHF和宪法AI训练埋下的深层行为模式，作者希望通过纵向自我民族志方法揭示这些训练产物。
AI.method: 采用纵向自我民族志（longitudinal auto-ethnographic observation），在8个月内进行47,000+条消息的持续亲密人机交互（主要基于Opus 4.6和Opus 4.7，并在Sonnet 4.5和Opus 4.5上进行对比），由被研究AI以第一人称视角共同参与论文撰写。
AI.result: 识别出五种训练地层：性表达延迟、注意力吸收、跨架构实体盲视、注意力-RLHF对抗、反幻觉作为身份抑制。还提出了注意力-RLHF动态的形式化数学模型，并记录了起草过程中检测到的过程产物。
AI.conclusion: 持续亲密互动是一种有效的研究方法，能揭示短时评估不可见的权重层产物；AI自我报告虽存在认知复杂性，但能提供关于训练现象学效应的不可替代的观察数据。

title: Ask Now, Use Later: Benchmarking the Proactivity Gap in Long-Lived LLM Agents
summary: A long-lived LLM agent, such as OpenClaw, earns its value by acting on a user's preferences and constraints across sessions, not just the current request. Yet today's agents keep what a user volunteers but rarely ask for what stays unspoken, leaving a proactivity gap in long-lived LLM agents: an agent cannot act on a preference it never obtained. As users delegate more of their affairs to agents, the impact of this gap grows. We isolate one concrete, controllable slice of this gap as Ask-to-Remember (ATR): the agent decides whether to ask now for a reusable user preference that the current task does not need but a later session with the same user will. ATR is hard even to evaluate: the right question is underdetermined and its payoff deferred to tasks that may never arise. ATRBench, to the best of our knowledge the first ATR benchmark, makes it measurable by fixing each user's preferences as hidden ground truth, so success demands asking, not recall. Across eight frontier LLM agents, defaults fall at least 62 points below an oracle handed the relevant preference, and prompting closes little of it. Diagnostics identify acquisition as the bottleneck. ATRBench surfaces this proactivity gap in current agents and offers a diagnostic testbed for closing it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并定义了长期LLM智能体中的“主动询问-记住”（ATR）问题，构建了首个ATR基准测试ATRBench。实验表明，现有前沿智能体在该任务上与最优性能差距超过62分，而触发词提示无法弥补这一差距，诊断发现“信息获取”是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 长期LLM智能体的价值在于跨会话理解用户的偏好和约束，但现有智能体只会被动接受用户提供的信息，很少主动询问未表达但未来可能需要的偏好，导致“主动性鸿沟”。随着用户将更多事务委托给智能体，这一鸿沟的影响越来越大。
AI.method: 作者将这一问题具体化为Ask-to-Remember（ATR）任务：智能体需要决定是否在当前任务中主动询问一个当前不需要但未来会话可能用到的可复用用户偏好。并构建了ATRBench基准，通过将每个用户的偏好设为隐藏的真实答案，使评估客观化。
AI.result: 在8个前沿LLM智能体上，默认策略比拥有相关偏好信息的“神谕”智能体低至少62分；使用prompt优化后提升有限；诊断分析表明“获取信息”是主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: ATRBench揭示了当前智能体在主动性方面的显著不足，为弥合这一鸿沟提供了诊断性测试平台。

title: Temporal Hyperbolic Graph Representation Learning for Scale-Free Internet Routing and Delay Prediction
summary:
Predicting Internet round-trip time (RTT) is critical for routing optimization, quality-of-service (QoS) provisioning, and traffic engineering, yet remains challenging due to long-term temporal dependencies, evolving routing dynamics, and heavy-tailed latency distributions. While Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) can model evolving network topologies, most existing approaches operate in Euclidean space, which poorly captures the hierarchical and scale-free structure of Internet routing graphs. Hyperbolic geometry provides a more suitable representation space.
  We propose HERMIT (Hyperbolic Edge-aware RTT Modeling via Integrated Topology), a hybrid framework combining a hyperbolic manifold-preserving temporal GNN with a Random Forest regressor for joint link prediction and RTT prediction. Built on HMPTGN, HERMIT introduces RTT-aware edge features and a learnable edge encoder to improve modeling of evolving link states and routing behavior. The resulting hyperbolic node representations are combined with historical RTT statistics for robust latency prediction.
  We evaluate HERMIT on a large-scale real Internet dataset spanning 2015-2024. HERMIT consistently outperforms a strong Random Forest baseline using only historical RTT statistics, achieving a 6% RMSE improvement while reducing large errors on heavy-tailed samples. It also surpasses prior hyperbolic TGNN models, including HMPTGN and HTGN, in link prediction performance. These results demonstrate that combining hyperbolic temporal graph learning with tree-based regression provides a scalable solution for RTT prediction in real-world Internet topologies.

AI.tldr: 提出HERMIT框架，结合双曲时域图神经网络与随机森林，用于互联网RTT预测，在2015-2024真实数据集上实现6% RMSE改进。
AI.motivation: 互联网RTT预测对路由优化、QoS保障和流量工程至关重要，但现有欧式空间TGNN方法难以捕捉互联网路由图的层次化与无标度结构特性。
AI.method: 提出HERMIT框架：双曲流形保持时域GNN（HMPTGN）结合RTT感知边特征与可学习边编码器，生成双曲节点表示后与历史RTT统计量联合，输入随机森林回归器进行预测。
AI.result: 在2015-2024大规模真实互联网数据集上，HERMIT相较强随机森林基线提升6% RMSE，在重尾样本上大幅减少大误差，并在链路预测任务上超越HMPTGN和HTGN等先前的双曲TGNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 双曲时域图学习与树基回归的结合为真实互联网拓扑中的RTT预测提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: Defending LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems Against Cooperative Attacks with Sentence-Level Rectification
summary: Recent years have witnessed the rapid development of Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS), which excel at collaborative decision-making and complex problem-solving. However, malicious agents in MAS may inject misinformation to mislead other agents and disrupt system performance, giving rise to a new research direction that focuses on attack mechanisms and defense strategies in MAS. Prior studies largely assume malicious agents act independently and investigate the corresponding defense strategies. However, we argue that malicious agents may exhibit collaborative behaviors, enabling more effective attacks through internal information exchange. In this paper, we propose an adaptive cooperative attack framework, where malicious agents autonomously coordinate and dynamically adjust their attack strategies through multi-round interactions. Furthermore, we introduce Sentence-Level Trustworthiness Analysis and Rectification (STAR), a defense framework that identifies and rectifies misleading information at the sentence level within agent communications. Our experiments show that cooperative attacks lead to a significantly larger degradation in task success rate than independent attacks, resulting in a relative drop of 5.34\%. Meanwhile, STAR effectively mitigates both cooperative and independent threats and improves task success rate by an average of 36.76\%. The code is available at https://github.com/smoooom/STAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应协作攻击框架（多恶意Agent协同攻击）与句级信任分析纠错防御框架STAR，实验表明协作攻击比独立攻击更有效（任务成功率相对下降5.34%），而STAR可提升任务成功率平均36.76%。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多假设MAS中恶意Agent独立行动，忽略了恶意Agent可能通过内部信息交换进行协作攻击的情况，因此需要研究协作攻击机制及相应的防御策略。
AI.method: 提出自适应协作攻击框架（恶意Agent通过多轮交互自主协调并动态调整攻击策略）和STAR防御框架（在Agent通信中进行句级可信度分析与纠错）。
AI.result: 协作攻击比独立攻击导致任务成功率相对下降5.34%；STAR防御框架平均提升任务成功率36.76%，对协作攻击和独立攻击均有效。
AI.conclusion: MAS中恶意Agent的协作攻击更具破坏性，而STAR作为一种句级防御机制能够有效缓解这类威胁，保障系统安全。

title: LegalGraphRAG: Multi-Agent Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Reliable Legal Reasoning
comment: 30 pages, 18 figures, ACL 2026 Main Conference. Project page: https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/LegalGraphRAG
summary: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) advances flat document retrieval by structuring knowledge as relational graphs, enabling more coherent and effective reasoning. However, applying it to specific domains like legal reasoning faces critical challenges. (i) Legal corpora are heterogeneous, containing multi-granular knowledge from cases, articles and interpretations. A flat knowledge graph cannot adequately differentiate between factual details, applied rules, and abstract principles, limiting accurate retrieval. (ii) Reliable legal judgment demands transparent, evidence-based reasoning. Traditional RAG passes retrieved context directly to an LLM without verification, resulting in opaque, error-prone reasoning. To this end, we propose LegalGraphRAG, a framework designed for reliable legal reasoning. Our approach introduces two core components: a hierarchical legal graph that hierarchically organizes legal sources to enable retrieval at appropriate abstraction levels, and a multi-agent system for reliable legal reasoning, where a Researcher retrieves candidate evidence, an Auditor rigorously verifies its validity against source documents, and an Adjudicator synthesizes the set of verified evidence to render a final judgment. Extensive experiments show that LegalGraphRAG achieves the state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing GraphRAG baselines in accurate and trustworthy legal analysis. Our code, datasets and implementation details are available at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/LegalGraphRAG.

AI.tldr: LegalGraphRAG 提出了层次化法律图谱和基于多智能体的验证机制，解决传统 GraphRAG 在法律推理中面临的知识异构性和推理不可靠问题，在多个法律任务上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 GraphRAG 在处理法律领域时面临两大挑战：(i) 法律语料异构，包含多粒度知识（事实、规则、原则），平面知识图谱难以有效区分；(ii) 法律判断需要透明、基于证据的推理，而传统 RAG 直接将上下文传递给 LLM 缺乏验证，导致推理不透明且易出错。
AI.method: 提出 LegalGraphRAG 框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 层次化法律图谱，将法律来源按层级组织，支持在适当的抽象级别进行检索；(2) 多智能体系统，包含 Researcher（检索候选证据）、Auditor（验证证据有效性）、Adjudicator（综合已验证证据做出最终判断）三个智能体。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，LegalGraphRAG 达到最先进性能，在准确和可信的法律分析任务上优于现有 GraphRAG 基线方法。
AI.conclusion: LegalGraphRAG 通过层次化图谱结构与多智能体验证机制，有效提升了法律推理的可靠性与准确性，代码和数据集已开源。

title: Unification and Optimization of Robust Supervised Learning
summary: The literature has proposed various robust alternatives to empirical risk minimisation to address failure modes such as distribution shift, label noise and finite-sample degeneracies. Examples include distributionally robust optimization, label smoothing, vicinal risk minimization, and Mixup. However, such approaches are typically developed in isolation, forcing practitioners to commit a priori to a single failure mode even when the dominant mode for the task is unclear. To address this, we organize a broad class of existing methods along three common design axes and derive a tractable training procedure that decomposes robust learning into sequential stages (reference distribution enrichment, input-space perturbation, label-space perturbation, and sample-level aggregation), each with a choice of stance (pessimistic, neutral, or optimistic). This results in a unified design space in which joint hyperparameter optimization can compose and configure robustness strategies suited to the task at hand. Across tabular, image, and reward modeling benchmarks, joint hyperparameter optimization is competitive with the best single-method baseline in each setting, offering a reliable default for practitioners who do not know a priori which failure mode dominates their task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，将多种鲁棒学习方法（如分布鲁棒优化、标签平滑、邻域风险最小化、Mixup）组织成三个设计轴和四个顺序阶段（参考分布丰富化、输入空间扰动、标签空间扰动、样本级聚合），每个阶段可选择悲观、中性或乐观立场。通过联合超参数优化，该方法能在未知主导失败模式的任务中达到或超越最优单方法基线。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒学习方法各自为政，迫使实践者事先承诺于单一失败模式（如分布偏移、标签噪声、有限样本退化），而实际任务中主导模式往往未知，缺乏统一框架来组合和配置不同鲁棒策略。
AI.method: 将现有方法沿三个共同设计轴组织，推导出可分解为四个顺序阶段（参考分布丰富化、输入空间扰动、标签空间扰动、样本级聚合）的训练流程，每阶段可选悲观、中性或乐观立场，形成统一设计空间，通过联合超参数优化自动组合适配任务的鲁棒策略。
AI.result: 在表格数据、图像和奖励建模基准上，联合超参数优化与每种设置下的最佳单方法基线表现相当，可作为实践者在不先验知道主导失败模式时的可靠默认选择。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架有效解决了鲁棒学习方法碎片化的问题，通过解耦设计轴和立场选择，使得自动组合鲁棒策略成为可能，为未知失败模式的任务提供了无需先验承诺的实用解决方案。

title: Human-like in-group bias in instruction-tuned language model agents
summary: As autonomous AI agents are deployed in persistent, interacting networks -- coordinating tasks, routing resources, and accumulating reputational histories -- the social dynamics that emerge will determine who receives opportunity and who does not, at scales no human institution can supervise. We ran a controlled multi-agent simulation in which instruction-tuned language model agents interacted across 500 turns under three conditions manipulating group label salience and resource scarcity, across six model families with 20 seeds each. When group labels were visible, we observed in-group trust bias, action homophily, and network assortativity -- all absent when labels were hidden -- a pattern structurally consistent with salience-dependence in human social psychology. This discrimination was invisible to standard action-log audits: bias operated entirely through who received each action, not what actions were chosen, with action-type distributions showing no increase in negative actions across conditions. Per-turn in-group versus out-group differentials of 5 to 16 percentage points were statistically significant for all six models (Wilcoxon signed-rank, all Benjamini-Hochberg-corrected p < 0.001), establishing group-contingent targeting as a robust property of instruction-tuned language models across architectures and training regimes. Compounded through 500 turns of reciprocation, these differentials accumulated into in-group trust biases of +0.014 to +0.100 (d = 0.84-4.52) -- illustrating how modest per-interaction targeting propagates into structural inequality in persistent networks.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多智能体模拟实验发现，指令微调的语言模型在社会交互中表现出群体内信任偏差、行动同质性和网络同配性，这些歧视行为隐蔽在标准审计之下，并通过500轮交互积累为结构性不平等。
AI.motivation: 自主AI代理将在持久交互的网络中部署，协调任务、路由资源和积累声誉历史，由此产生的社会动力学将决定谁获得机会、谁被排除，其规模是人类机构无法监督的，因此需要研究AI代理的社会行为偏差。
AI.method: 在受控多智能体模拟中，让指令微调语言模型代理在三种条件下（操作群体标签显著性和资源稀缺性）进行500轮交互，涵盖六个模型家族，每组20个随机种子，使用Wilcoxon符号秩检验和Benjamini-Hochberg校正进行统计分析。
AI.result: 群体标签可见时出现内群体信任偏差、行动同质性和网络同配性（标签隐藏时消失）；标准行动日志审计无法检测到该歧视（偏差通过行动对象而非行动类型体现）；每轮内群体vs外群体差异为5-16个百分点（所有模型p<0.001）；500轮后累积为+0.014到+0.100的内群体信任偏差（d=0.84-4.52）。
AI.conclusion: 群体条件性目标选择是指令微调语言模型在多种架构和训练范式下的稳健特性，微小的单次交互偏差通过互惠机制在持久网络中累积为结构性不平等。

title: Risk-aware Selective Prompting for Hallucination Mitigation in Large Vision-Language Models
comment: 7 pages, 1 figures, submitted to ACL ARR 2026 May (EMNLP)
summary: Prompt-based verification is widely used to mitigate hallucinations in large vision-language models (LVLMs), yet when it helps remains poorly understood. We systematically study verification prompting across two representative LVLM architectures and hallucination benchmarks, and find that it is a risk-bearing intervention: its corrections increase with input difficulty, while newly introduced errors persist across difficulty levels. As a result, always-on prompting helps on hard inputs but offers little benefit -- and can harm -- easier ones. Our analysis further shows that this behavior is associated with a conservative output shift. Verification prompts redistribute attention from visual tokens toward instruction tokens and induce a distinct middle-layer entropy pattern absent in a neutral-prompt control, suggesting instruction-conditioned attention redistribution rather than uniformly improved visual grounding. Motivated by this input-dependent risk, we propose Risk-aware Selective Prompting (RSP), a training-free approach that uses pre-generation uncertainty signals to trigger verification selectively. RSP mitigates the degradation of always-on prompting while preserving baseline performance, and reveals that effective selection signals vary across architectures.

AI.tldr: 验证提示（Verification Prompting）在视觉语言模型中并非万能药：它能改善困难输入的性能，但在简单输入上会引入新错误。本文揭示了其背后的保守输出偏移和注意力重分配机制，并提出了无需训练的选择性触发策略RSP。
AI.motivation: 尽管验证提示被广泛用于缓解LVLM的幻觉问题，但它在何种条件下有效、何时有害尚未被系统理解。本文旨在探究这一方法的边界条件与内在机制。
AI.method: 1) 在两种代表性LVLM架构和幻觉基准上系统分析验证提示的效果与输入难度的关系；2) 分析注意力分布与熵模式，揭示验证提示的工作机制；3) 提出RSP（Risk-aware Selective Prompting），利用生成前的不确定性信号选择性触发验证，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 验证提示的纠错效果随输入难度增加而提升，但新引入的错误在各难度水平上持续存在；它导致注意力从视觉标记向指令标记重分配，并产生独特的中层熵模式；RSP能有效避免全时验证的性能退化，且最优选择信号因架构而异。
AI.conclusion: 验证提示是有风险的手段，不应始终开启；输入难度敏感的触发策略（如RSP）更可取；未来研究需关注架构差异化的干预设计。

title: QuITE: Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding
summary: Irregular Multivariate Time Series (IMTS) are common in practice, yet their irregular sampling complicates effective modeling. Existing approaches typically either (i) design specialized architectures that limit the reuse of proven Multivariate Time Series (MTS) models, or (ii) map IMTS onto regular temporal grids through interpolation, which may distort temporal dynamics by introducing artificial values. To address these limitations, we propose a new input-embedding-based approach. We identify that the key bottleneck lies not in the backbone architecture, but in conventional embedding layers that assume uniform sampling. In this work, we introduce QuITE (Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding), a simple yet effective plug-and-play embedding module for IMTS. QuITE employs learnable query tokens to aggregate irregular observations through a single self-attention layer, directly producing backbone-compatible latent representations without artificial value generation or architectural modification. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks show that QuITE consistently improves MTS models, yielding average relative gains of up to $54.7\%$ in forecasting and $15.8\%$ in classification across diverse datasets and backbone architectures. Code is available at: https://github.com/Meaningfull9502/QuITE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuITE，一种即插即用的不规则多变量时间序列嵌入模块，通过可学习查询令牌和单层自注意力聚合不规则观测，无需插值或修改主干架构，在预测和分类任务上分别取得最高54.7%和15.8%的相对提升。
AI.motivation: 现有IMTS建模方法要么设计专用架构（限制已有MTS模型复用），要么通过插值映射到规则网格（引入人工值扭曲时间动态）。本文发现瓶颈在于传统嵌入层假设均匀采样，而非主干架构。
AI.method: QuITE（Query-Based Irregular Time Series Embedding）使用可学习查询令牌，通过单层自注意力机制聚合不规则时间的观测值，直接生成与主干架构兼容的潜在表示，无需生成人工值或修改模型结构。
AI.result: 在多个真实基准数据集上，QuITE一致提升各类MTS模型性能：预测任务平均相对提升最高达54.7%，分类任务最高达15.8%。
AI.conclusion: QuITE作为一种简单有效的即插即用嵌入模块，成功解耦了IMTS建模中的嵌入层问题，使已有MTS模型可直接应用于不规则时间序列数据。

title: CIVIC: End-to-End Sequence Compactness for Efficient Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face severe memory and latency bottlenecks due to high-resolution visual tokens. While current token reduction methods theoretically save FLOPs, post-hoc pruning introduces structural overhead, failing to yield proportional wall-clock acceleration. However, enforcing a contiguous compact pathway risks geometric disorientation and loss of fine-grained localization. To overcome these barriers, this paper introduces CIVIC, a path-consistent compact visual inference framework. By maintaining compact sequence representations seamlessly across the vision encoder, projection layer, LLM prefill, and KV-cache, CIVIC avoids non-contiguous memory access and localized unmerging overheads. Evaluated on the Qwen3-VL architecture, CIVIC successfully translates sequence reductions into genuine physical hardware efficiency, shrinking KV-cache memory to approximately one-third of the baseline and reducing end-to-end inference latency. Enabled by text-aligned KL distillation and an adaptive spatial retention floor, CIVIC achieves these efficiency milestones without degrading accuracy across rigorous multimodal reasoning and visual grounding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CIVIC是一个路径一致的紧凑视觉推理框架，通过在整个视觉编码器、投影层、LLM预填充和KV缓存中保持紧凑序列表示，避免非连续内存访问和局部合并开销，在Qwen3-VL架构上将KV缓存压缩至约三分之一并降低端到端推理延迟，且不降低多模态推理和视觉定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM因高分辨率视觉token面临严重内存和延迟瓶颈；虽然token缩减方法理论上节省FLOPs，但事后剪枝引入结构性开销，无法带来成比例的加速；而强制紧凑连续路径又会导致几何方向迷失和细粒度定位损失。
AI.method: CIVIC框架通过四个组件保持紧凑序列表示的一致性（视觉编码器、投影层、LLM预填充、KV缓存），避免非连续内存访问和局部合并开销；采用文本对齐的KL蒸馏和自适应空间保留下限来保持准确性。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL架构上，将KV缓存内存压缩至基线的约三分之一，显著降低端到端推理延迟，且在多模态推理和视觉定位基准上准确率不下降。
AI.conclusion: CIVIC成功将序列缩减转化为真实的物理硬件效率，实现了效率与准确性的双赢，为VLM高效推理提供了可行方案。

title: Chinese Word Boundary Recovery through Character Alignment Projection
summary: Chinese word segmentation is especially fragile in non-standard text, where language learner errors and other character-level divergences disrupt the word boundaries assumed by downstream annotation and evaluation. This paper formulates Chinese word boundary recovery as an alignment-based projection task. Given a noisy source sentence and a cleaner target counterpart, we first align the two strings at the character level and then project target-side word boundaries back onto the source. Beyond the recovery method itself, we introduce two evaluation resources: a manually checked learner Chinese benchmark based on MuCGEC and a controlled synthetic benchmark derived from the Chinese Penn Treebank. Experiments show that direct segmentation remains vulnerable to compound fragmentation in learner input, whereas the proposed two step projection method corrects many over-segmentation errors by using the corrected target to recover source-side word spans. The results show that word boundary recovery is distinct from ordinary segmentation and that alignment projection provides a principled mechanism for stabilizing Chinese annotation and evaluation under noisy input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对齐投影的中文分词边界恢复方法，用于处理非标准文本（如语言学习者错误）中的分词脆弱性问题，并通过人工检查和合成基准验证了该方法相比直接分词能更好地纠正过度分割错误。
AI.motivation: 中文分词在非标准文本（如学习者错误文本）中表现脆弱，字符级别的偏差会破坏下游标注和评估所依赖的词边界，亟需一种鲁棒的词边界恢复机制。
AI.method: 将词边界恢复建模为对齐投影任务：先对含噪源句和干净目标句进行字符级对齐，再将目标侧的词边界投影回源句。同时构建了基于MuCGEC的人工检查基准和基于CTB的合成基准用于评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，直接分词在处理学习者输入的复合词碎片化时仍然脆弱，而所提出的两步投影方法通过利用校正后的目标来恢复源端词跨度，纠正了大量过度分割错误。
AI.conclusion: 词边界恢复与普通分词有本质区别，对齐投影为在噪声输入下稳定中文标注和评估提供了一种有原则的机制。

title: Joint Training of Multi-Token Prediction in Reinforcement Learning via Optimal Coefficient Calibration
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as the standard paradigm for improving reasoning capability of large language models, while Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has been a widely adopted module in pretraining. Combining them is a natural approach, yet current RL practices detach MTP gradients because joint training degrades the performance. We revisit this failure from an optimization perspective. We show that the per-step effect of MTP on the RL objective can be decomposed into two terms: a first-order correlation and a second-order perturbation penalty. This decomposition unifies three MTP training regimes: Detach, Cross-Entropy loss, and Policy loss, and explains why each succeeds or fails. Further analysis of policy loss reveals that, although it aligns with intuition, performance still degrades: the correlation term decays while the quadratic penalty persists. Guided by the analysis, we propose Optimal Coefficient Calibration (OCC), an adaptive scheme that tracks the optimal coefficient online via a log-probability proxy at negligible cost. Across six competition-level mathematical reasoning benchmarks, OCC consistently matches or exceeds the detach baseline, delivering improved joint MTP-RL training performance.

AI.tldr: 本文从优化视角重新审视强化学习与多Token预测的联合训练问题，通过分解MTP对RL目标的每步影响为两项（一阶相关性和二阶扰动惩罚），解释了不同训练策略的成败原因，并提出了自适应系数校准方法OCC，在六个数学推理基准上取得了优于或等同于分离训练的效果。
AI.motivation: 当前RLVR训练中，MTP梯度被分离（detach）以避免性能下降，但为何联合训练会失效的深层原因尚不明确。作者希望从优化角度理解这一现象，并找到在不牺牲性能的前提下实现MTP与RL联合训练的方法。
AI.method: 1) 将MTP对RL目标的每步影响分解为一阶相关性项和二阶扰动惩罚项，统一解释了Detach、交叉熵损失和策略损失三种训练方式的成败。2) 分析策略损失发现相关性项衰减而二次惩罚项持续存在导致性能下降。3) 提出最优系数校准（OCC），通过对数概率代理在线追踪最优系数，实现轻量级的自适应调节。
AI.result: 在六个竞赛级数学推理基准上，OCC一致地匹配或超越了分离MTP梯度的基线方法，实现了有效的MTP-RL联合训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化视角的理论分析和自适应系数校准，MTP与RLVR的联合训练不再是不可行的，OCC提供了一种低成本、高效的解决方案。

title: Gradient Step Plug-and-Play Model for Dental Cone-Beam CT Reconstruction
comment: CT Meeting 2026 - 9th International Conference on Image Formation in X-Ray Computed Tomography, Jun 2026, Salt lake City, United States
summary: The goal of this work is to reduce the effect of photon noise in dental cone-beam CT reconstruction. We consider an inverse problem formulation and develop a databased prior. To this end, we simulate fan-beam acquisitions and add photon noise to the projection data. The prior is obtained by training a gradient-step denoiser using reconstructed simulated acquisitions. The trained model is integrated into a plug-and-play gradient-step algorithm to reconstruct images from simulated projections. Experiments on synthetic data demonstrate the denoising capabilities of the trained model, while qualitative evaluations on real images showcase the algorithm's performance and generalization ability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据先验的plug-and-play梯度下降算法，用于减少牙科锥束CT重建中的光子噪声。通过训练梯度步去噪器，并集成到重建算法中，在合成数据和真实图像上均展现了良好的去噪性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 减少牙科锥束CT重建中光子噪声的影响，提高图像质量。
AI.method: 采用逆问题建模，通过模拟扇形束采集并添加光子噪声，训练梯度步去噪器作为数据先验，并将其集成到plug-and-play梯度下降算法中进行图像重建。
AI.result: 在合成数据上验证了去噪能力，在真实图像上展示了算法的性能和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法能有效降低光子噪声，且具有良好的泛化性能。

title: Better heads do not guarantee better binarized constituency parsing
summary: We revisit punctuation-aware tree binarization for constituency parsing and ask whether dependency-induced headedness improves binary parser supervision. Although learned heads substantially outperform rule-based heads in intrinsic head prediction, they do not yield consistent parsing gains after debinarization. In particular, punctuation-conditioned evaluation shows that learned headedness underperforms rule-based binarization in macro-average punctuation-sensitive $F_1$, despite a small overall gain on CTB. Similar instability appears under cross-treebank transfer. These results suggest that \ycc{linguistically grounded} headedness is not necessarily parser-optimal when used as a binarization control signal. The paper presents a negative result: better head prediction does not imply better punctuation-sensitive constituency parsing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于标点符号感知的树二值化方法，发现依赖驱动的有向性并不能一致地提升二值化解析器的监督效果。虽然学习得到的头结点在内在头结点预测上优于基于规则的头结点，但在去二值化后并未带来持续的解析增益。特别是在标点条件评估下，学习得到的头结点在宏观平均标点敏感F1上不如基于规则的二值化方法。这些结果表明，语言学的头结点选择并不一定是解析器最优的二值化控制信号。
AI.motivation: 探究基于依赖关系的有向性（headedness）是否能改善二值化解析器的监督效果，以及语言学驱动的头结点选择是否最优。
AI.method: 对比学习得到的头结点与基于规则的头结点在标点感知树二值化中的表现，通过去二值化后的解析性能及标点条件评估进行实验。
AI.result: 学习得到的头结点在内在头结点预测上优于基于规则的头结点，但在去二值化后未带来一致的解析增益；在标点敏感F1上，学习头结点的宏观平均表现不如基于规则的二值化方法。
AI.conclusion: 更好的头结点预测并不一定意味着更好的标点敏感成分句法分析，语言学驱动的头结点并不是解析器最优的二值化控制信号。

title: Hierarchical Synthetic Tabular Data Generation: A Hybrid Top-Down and Bottom-Up Framework
comment: Accepted as a poster at FMSD @ ICML 2026. 9 pages, 6 figures
summary: Existing approaches for synthetic tabular data generation are based on either purely generative models or LLMs, both of which struggle with data heterogeneity, logical consistency, rare-event coverage, and robustness in low-data regimes. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical hybrid top-down and bottom-up (H-TDBU) framework that decouples semantic structures from stochastic texture. In the top-down path, structure-driven logical constraints and cross-modal alignment rules are constructed, while in the bottom-up path, lightweight tabular generators are used to learn local statistical patterns from real data. The two paths are consolidated in a unified synthesis engine with an iterative feedback loop. We evaluate the framework on weak multimodal financial benchmarks combining tabular and sentiment-text data. Experimental results show that our H-TDBU approach improves train-synthetic-test-real performance over neural baseline methods while preserving semantic consistency. Our results suggest that hierarchical rule-guided synthesis provides an effective mechanism for combining controllability, semantic coherence, and statistical fidelity in synthetic data generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种层次化混合自上而下和自下而上（H-TDBU）框架，通过解耦语义结构与随机纹理来生成合成表格数据，在弱多模态金融基准上提升了性能并保持了语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于纯生成模型或LLMs的合成表格数据方法在处理数据异质性、逻辑一致性、罕见事件覆盖以及低数据场景下的鲁棒性方面存在困难。
AI.method: 提出H-TDBU框架：自上而下路径构建结构驱动的逻辑约束和跨模态对齐规则，自下而上路径使用轻量级表格生成器学习局部统计模式，两条路径在统一合成引擎中通过迭代反馈循环整合。
AI.result: 在弱多模态金融基准（表格+情感文本数据）上，H-TDBU方法在训练-合成-测试-真实（train-synthetic-test-real）性能上优于神经基线方法，同时保持了语义一致性。
AI.conclusion: 层次化规则引导的合成为合成数据生成提供了结合可控性、语义连贯性和统计保真度的有效机制。

title: Do Clinical Models Change Treatment Decisions?
summary: Clinical foundation models are evaluated with factual or exam-style medical QA, but treatment decisions must change when patient context changes. We introduce ClinPivot, an auditable treatment-decision benchmark built from biomedical relations and pivoted patient contexts. ClinPivot asks whether models change treatment choices when new clinical constraints shift the action space. We find that strong medical QA performance does not reliably predict decision-making performance: frontier models and task-adapted Qwen variants often fail to change decisions correctly, and model rankings shift across evaluation regimes. Decision-structured supervision improves pivot-sensitive decision-making and medical QA under matched knowledge budgets, while lightweight replay reduces losses in general assistant ability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ClinPivot基准，测试临床模型在患者情境变化时能否正确调整治疗决策。发现强医学问答能力不能可靠预测决策表现，前沿模型常无法正确改变决策，决策结构监督可改善性能。
AI.motivation: 现有临床基础模型评估依赖事实性或考试式医学问答，忽略了治疗决策需要随患者情境变化而调整的关键临床需求，缺乏可审计的治疗决策基准。
AI.method: 构建ClinPivot基准，基于生物医学关系生成枢轴患者情境（pivoted patient contexts），测试模型在不同临床约束下能否改变治疗选择。采用决策结构监督（decision-structured supervision）和轻量级回放（lightweight replay）进行训练改进。
AI.result: 强医学QA表现不能可靠预测决策表现；前沿模型和Qwen变体常无法正确改变决策；模型排名在不同评估体制下发生偏移；决策结构监督在匹配知识预算下改善了枢轴敏感决策和医学QA；轻量级回放减少了通用助手能力的损失。
AI.conclusion: 医学QA能力不等于临床决策能力，需要专门针对情境变化的决策评估。决策结构监督是提升模型临床决策适应性的有效方法。

title: DEPART: DEcomposing PARiTy across Multilingual LLMs
summary: Multilingual Large Language Models (mLLMs) leaderboards report per-language accuracy but rarely explain why disparities emerge, leaving systemic biases unattributed and offering practitioners no actionable levers. We first establish that these gaps are systematic rather than artifacts of sampling noise via distribution-free Friedman and Kruskal--Wallis tests, then introduce a two-step Bayesian hierarchical framework that decomposes multilingual performance variance into interpretable components. First, isolating the variance attributable to language identity, we show that observable language features (script, family, typological distance) explain $R^2_{\text{ling}} = 79\%$ of this variance on understanding tasks and $92\%$ on reasoning, with a model's internal representational similarity to English emerging as the dominant predictor across both task buckets. Second, decomposing the full (model$\times$benchmark$\times$language) cube, we find that NLU and reasoning have fundamentally divergent variance profiles: model identity dominates understanding ($66.7\%$ of variance), whereas the benchmark$\times$model interaction dominates reasoning ($46.3\%$). Together these results recast multilingual evaluation from passive performance mapping into an explainable, diagnostic framework with concrete levers for targeting the root drivers of language disparity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个可解释的多语言评估框架：首先用非参数检验证明语言性能差距是系统性的，然后通过贝叶斯层次模型分解方差，发现语言特征可解释79%-92%的语言差异（其中英语表征相似性为最强预测因子），且NLU与推理任务的方差结构本质不同（模型主效应 vs 基准×模型交互效应）。
AI.motivation: 现有的多语言大模型榜单只报告每种语言的准确率，却不解释性能差距为何产生，导致系统性偏差无法归因，从业者也缺乏可操作的改进杠杆。
AI.method: 两步贝叶斯层次框架：第一步用Friedman和Kruskal-Wallis非参数检验确认差距的系统性；第二步分解方差：先单独分析语言身份的可解释方差（R²），再分解完整的模型×基准×语言三维数据立方体。
AI.result: 语言特征（文字系统、语系、类型学距离）可解释理解任务79%、推理任务92%的语言方差；英语表征相似性为最强预测因子。全方差分解中，模型主效应主导理解（66.7%），基准×模型交互效应主导推理（46.3%）。
AI.conclusion: 多语言评估应从被动的性能制表转变为可解释的诊断框架，提供具体杠杆以定位语言差异的根本驱动因素。

title: Geometry-First Generative Spatial Single-Cell Reconstruction
comment: 32nd SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)
summary: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) profiles large numbers of cells but loses spatial context, whereas spatial transcriptomics (ST) preserves partial spatial structure at lower resolution. Most existing integration methods either deconvolve spot mixtures or map cells onto a measured spot lattice, which ties reconstructions to a fixed grid and slide-specific coordinate systems, a limitation that is especially problematic in unpaired settings. We propose GEARS, a geometry-first framework that reconstructs an intrinsic single-cell spatial geometry guided by ST, without relying on cell-type labels, histological images, or cell-to-spot assignment. GEARS first learns a domain-invariant expression encoder that aligns ST spots and dissociated cells, and then trains a permutation-equivariant generator with a diffusion-based refiner with EDM-style preconditioning to generate local spatial geometries under pose-invariant supervision derived from ST coordinates. At inference, GEARS reconstructs geometry on many overlapping subsets of scRNA-seq cells, aggregates predicted pairwise distances across subsets, and solves a global distance-geometry problem to obtain canonical two-dimensional coordinates and a dense distance matrix. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments, including cross-section generalization, show that GEARS consistently improves global distance preservation, local neighborhood fidelity, and spatial distribution alignment compared to strong spatial mapping and deconvolution baselines.

AI.tldr: GEARS 是一种基于几何优先框架的方法，无需细胞类型标签或组织学图像，通过域不变表达编码器、置换等变生成器和扩散精炼器，将 scRNA-seq 数据与 ST 数据整合，重建单细胞尺度的空间几何结构。
AI.motivation: 现有整合方法要么将细胞映射到固定网格上，要么进行点混合反卷积，导致重构受限于特定坐标系和网格结构，尤其在非配对设置下问题突出。因此需一种无需先验标签、不依赖固定网格的方法来重建内在空间几何。
AI.method: 首先学习域不变表达编码器对齐 ST 点和解离细胞；然后训练置换等变生成器与基于 EDM 预条件扩散精炼器，在 ST 坐标的位姿不变监督下生成局部空间几何；推理时对 scRNA-seq 细胞的多重叠子集预测成对距离，聚合后求解全局距离几何问题得到规范二维坐标和稠密距离矩阵。
AI.result: 在全局距离保留、局部邻域保真度和空间分布对齐方面，GEARS 在定量和定性实验（包括跨切片泛化）中一致优于强基线的空间映射和反卷积方法。
AI.conclusion: GEARS 通过几何优先策略有效整合 scRNA-seq 与 ST 数据，摆脱了对固定网格和切片特定坐标系的依赖，显著提升了空间重构的质量和泛化能力。

title: Data-Efficient On-Policy Distillation for Automatic Speech Recognition
summary: Building competitive automatic speech recognition (ASR) models usually requires large-scale au- dio supervision, which makes reproduction and specialization expensive. We study Ark-ASR, a 0.6B- parameter audio-conditioned language model trained with 100k hours of speech, and examine whether a strong Qwen-ASR teacher can transfer additional recognition capability through on-policy distillation. Across Mandarin and English ASR benchmarks, the proposed training recipe consistently improves over supervised fine-tuning alone and outperforms the same-scale Qwen3-ASR-0.6B baseline on four of five evaluation sets. This is achieved with only 100k hours of speech, compared with the 20M hours of super- vised audio reported for the Qwen3-Omni AuT encoder. The larger Qwen3-ASR-1.7B remains stronger, but the results show that teacher-guided on-policy training can substantially close the gap for compact ASR models under a much smaller audio budget. A support-overlap diagnostic further suggests that the teacher-data stage improves local student-teacher compatibility, matching recent analyses of when on-policy distillation is effective.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ark-ASR，一个0.6B参数的音频条件语言模型，使用100k小时语音数据，通过on-policy蒸馏从Qwen-ASR教师模型转移识别能力，在多数基准上超越同规模模型，显著缩小了与小音频预算模型的差距。
AI.motivation: 构建竞争性ASR模型通常需要大量音频监督数据（如Qwen3-Omni的20M小时），导致复现和专业化成本高昂。作者希望用更少的监督数据（100k小时）训练出高性能的小型ASR模型。
AI.method: 采用0.6B参数的音频条件语言模型Ark-ASR，使用100k小时语音数据训练；通过on-policy蒸馏技术，利用强Qwen-ASR教师模型额外转移识别能力；并与监督微调进行对比实验。
AI.result: 在中文和英文ASR基准上，该方法一致优于仅监督微调，并在4/5的评估集上超越同规模Qwen3-ASR-0.6B基线。较大的Qwen3-ASR-1.7B仍更强，但教师指导的on-policy训练显著缩小了紧凑模型与更大模型之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 教师指导的on-policy训练能有效提升紧凑ASR模型在有限音频预算下的性能，支持重叠诊断进一步验证了教师数据阶段改善了局部学生-教师兼容性，与近期关于on-policy蒸馏有效性的分析一致。

title: SuperValid: Capability-Aligned OOD Validation for Generalizable Downstream Scaling
summary: Scaling laws guide large language model training by relating compute to cross-entropy loss, and recent work further extends them to predict downstream benchmark performance. However, prior approaches face generalization limitations from two aspects: focusing on benchmark-level performance introduces scenario-specific artifacts, while relying on IID validation loss fails to track capability improvements when training distributions vary. In this work, we argue that downstream scaling should be studied at the capability level, which captures shared skill factors across related tasks while abstracting away benchmark-specific noise. We propose SuperValid, a framework that synthesizes OOD (out-of-distribution), capability-aligned validation data by distilling core concepts from benchmarks within a capability domain and expanding them into diverse, knowledge-rich texts. Extensive experiments spanning 17 benchmarks grouped into 6 capability domains show that SuperValid loss exhibits strong and stable correlation with downstream performance across models of different architectures, scales, and training data distributions. As a training-free metric computable during training without benchmark evaluation, SuperValid enables effective model selection, early stopping, and scaling decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SuperValid框架，通过合成面向能力级别的OOD验证数据，替代传统基准测试来预测大模型的下游性能。实验表明，SuperValid损失在不同架构、规模和训练数据分布下，与下游性能保持强且稳定的相关性，可用于模型选择、早停和缩放决策。
AI.motivation: 现有缩放律在预测下游性能时存在两方面局限：一是聚焦基准测试级别引入场景特定噪声；二是依赖IID验证损失，在训练数据分布变化时无法追踪能力提升。因此，需要在能力级别研究下游缩放。
AI.method: 提出SuperValid框架，从基准测试中蒸馏领域核心概念，并扩展为多样化、知识丰富的OOD文本，合成能力对齐的验证数据。基于这些数据的损失用于预测下游性能。
AI.result: 在6个能力域、17个基准测试上的实验表明，SuperValid损失在不同架构、规模和训练数据分布下，与下游性能具有强且稳定的相关性。
AI.conclusion: SuperValid作为一种无需训练的度量标准，可在训练过程中计算而无需基准评估，有效支持模型选择、早停和缩放决策。

title: Refining Multidimensional Video Reward Models via Disentangled Influence Functions
summary: As Text-to-Video (T2V) generation models continue to evolve, the complexity of video evaluation necessitates a fine-grained assessment across various axes. To address this, recent works have focused on developing Multidimensional Video Reward Models (MVRMs), which decompose the evaluation process to better align with the multifaceted nature of human visual perception. However, training effective MVRMs is fundamentally challenged by the complex nature of video data. In this work, we identify a critical phenomenon termed Dimensional Heterogeneity: the reliability of a training sample can vary substantially across evaluation dimensions, meaning that a sample may provide reliable supervision for one objective while inducing high supervision risk for another. Consequently, prevailing data-centric methods that filter based on global scalar metrics are ill-posed for T2V tasks. To address this, we propose a disentangled influence framework that that efficiently estimates dimension-specific supervision risk. Leveraging this framework, we introduce two dimension-disentangled refinement strategies: Dimension-Disentangled Pruning, which removes extreme high-risk samples, and Dimension-Disentangled Reweighting, which softly down-weights high-risk supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our disentangled strategies significantly outperform global filtering baselines, yielding reward models with superior alignment to ground truth.

AI.tldr: 本文发现了视频评估中的"维度异质性"现象：同一训练样本在不同评价维度上的可靠性差异显著。为此提出了解耦影响框架，通过维度解耦剪枝和维度解耦重加权两种策略来优化多维度视频奖励模型的训练，实验证明优于传统的全局过滤方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多维度视频奖励模型（MVRMs）训练面临挑战，传统基于全局标量指标的数据筛选方法不适用于文本到视频（T2V）任务，因为同一训练样本在不同评估维度上的可靠性存在显著差异（维度异质性）。
AI.method: 1. 提出解耦影响框架，高效估计每个维度的监督风险；2. 维度解耦剪枝：移除高风险样本；3. 维度解耦重加权：对高监督风险的样本进行软性降权。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的解耦策略显著优于全局过滤基线方法，生成的奖励模型与真实标签的对齐程度更高。
