AI.conclusion: 维度异质性是视频评估中的重要现象，解耦维度的数据精炼策略是训练高质量多维度视频奖励模型的有效途径。

title: Deconstructing Spatial Complexity: Hierarchical Decomposition for LLM Spatial Reasoning
summary: LLMs have shown remarkable proficiency in general language understanding and reasoning. However, they consistently underperform in spatial reasoning that severely limits their application, particularly in embodied intelligence. Inspired by the success of hierarchical reinforcement learning, this paper introduces a novel method for hierarchical task decomposition in LLM spatial reasoning. Our approach guides LLMs to decompose complex tasks into manageable sub-tasks by identifying key intermediate states and generating simplified sub-environments. However, we identify that LLMs often fail to derive optimal intermediate states due to their insufficient spatial prior, leading to sub-optimal task decomposition. To address this limitation and enhance its planning capability, we propose the MCTS-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization (M-GRPO), where we reformulate the UCT formula by incorporating the LLM's prior predictive probabilities alongside its epistemic uncertainty. Furthermore, we implement a more fine-grained advantage function, enabling the model to learn optimal path planning. Experimental results demonstrate that our method substantially improves LLM performance on spatial tasks, including navigation, planning, and strategic games, achieving state-of-the-art results. This work paves the way for LLMs in real-world applications.

AI.tldr: 提出M-GRPO方法，通过层级任务分解和基于MCTS的强化学习，显著提升LLM在空间推理任务上的表现，包括导航、规划和策略游戏。
AI.motivation: LLM在空间推理任务上表现不佳，限制了其在具身智能等真实场景中的应用。作者受层级强化学习启发，希望提升LLM的空间推理和规划能力。
AI.method: 1) 层级任务分解：引导LLM识别关键中间状态并生成简化子环境；2) M-GRPO：将LLM先验预测概率和认知不确定性融入UCT公式，并实现更细粒度的优势函数来学习最优路径规划。
AI.result: 在导航、规划和策略游戏等空间任务上取得最先进结果，显著提升了LLM的空间推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服了LLM空间先验不足的问题，为LLM在真实世界应用（如具身智能）中铺平了道路。

title: When Confidence Misleads: Suffix Anchoring and Anchor-Proximity Confidence Modulation for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models decode text by iteratively denoising masked token sequences, making the choice of which positions to decode a central inference-time decision. Most training-free decoding strategies use model confidence for position selection, assuming that high-confidence positions are ready to be decoded. In this work, we revisit this assumption by studying when confidence misleads fully non-autoregressive (fully non-AR) decoding. EOT tokens can receive high confidence and cause incomplete generation; inserting a suffix anchor can mitigate this issue but introduces local overconfidence near the anchor, causing anchor-adjacent tokens to be decoded too early. To address these issues, we propose Suffix-Anchored Confidence Modulation, a simple training-free method that inserts a short suffix anchor to encourage response completion and modulates confidence near the anchor according to decoding progress. This preserves the response-completion benefit of suffix anchoring while reducing premature decoding of anchor-adjacent tokens. Across text-only reasoning, vision-language reasoning, and code-generation benchmarks, our method consistently improves confidence-based fully non-AR decoding, outperforms explicit EOT suppression, and preserves the parallel decoding advantage of fully non-AR generation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现扩散语言模型在非自回归解码中，高置信度标记可能误导解码（如EOT标记导致生成不完整、锚点附近标记过早解码），并提出后缀锚定置信度调制方法，通过插入短后缀锚点并随解码进度动态调节置信度，在保留并行解码优势的同时提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的解码策略默认高置信度位置可直接解码，但作者发现这一假设在完全非自回归解码中存在问题：高置信度可能来自EOT标记（导致生成提前终止）或锚点附近标记（导致过早解码），需要重新审视并解决这些误导性问题。
AI.method: 提出后缀锚定置信度调制方法：1）插入短后缀锚点以鼓励响应的完整性；2）根据解码进度动态调节锚点附近标记的置信度，避免过早解码。
AI.result: 在文本推理、视觉-语言推理和代码生成基准测试中，该方法一致地提升了基于置信度的完全非自回归解码性能，优于显式EOT抑制方法，并保持了并行解码的优势。
AI.conclusion: 高置信度在非自回归解码中不可靠，需要结合解码进度进行动态调节；所提方法简单有效，无需额外训练即可改进生成质量。

title: Robust Contrastive Graph Clustering with Adaptive Local-Global Integration
summary: Graph clustering is essential in graph analysis for revealing structural patterns and node communities. Despite recent advances in self-supervised contrastive learning that have improved clustering via structural and attribute signals, existing methods still struggle to flexibly capture high-order local structures and often overlook global semantics in complex graphs. These limitations lead to suboptimal node representations, especially in real-world graphs with fragmented structures and ambiguous cluster boundaries. To address these limitations, a contrastive graph clustering framework is proposed to jointly integrate multi-scale local structures with global semantics via attention mechanisms. At the local level, GNN-based topological signals extracted from multiple propagation depths are adaptively fused through attention-based weighting to capture multi-scale neighborhood features. At the global level, semantic prototypes derived from dynamically evolving cluster centers are adaptively aggregated through attention to guide node representations and enhance inter-cluster separability. The model is trained under a dual-view contrastive learning paradigm with a hybrid objective that combines instance-level and structure-aware losses to improve representation robustness and discrimination. Experiments on eight real-world graph datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive clustering performance. Code is available at https://github.com/vege12138/w2.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合多尺度局部结构与全局语义的对比图聚类框架，通过注意力机制融合不同传播深度的图神经网络拓扑信号和动态聚类中心的语义原型，在双视图对比学习范式下提升节点表示的鲁棒性和判别性，在8个真实数据集上取得有竞争力的聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督对比聚类方法难以灵活捕捉高阶局部结构，且往往忽略复杂图中的全局语义，导致在结构碎片化、聚类边界模糊的真实图上表示效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出对比图聚类框架：(1) 局部层面：对多个传播深度的GNN拓扑信号进行注意力加权融合，捕捉多尺度邻域特征；(2) 全局层面：对动态演化的聚类中心语义原型进行注意力聚合，引导节点表示并增强类间分离性；(3) 双视图对比学习，结合实例级和结构感知损失进行训练。
AI.result: 在8个真实图数据集上实验，该方法取得了具有竞争力的聚类性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模多尺度局部结构与全局语义，有效提升了图聚类在复杂真实图上的表现，代码已开源。

title: Adaptive Reservoir Computing for Multi-Scenario Chaotic System Forecasting
summary: We present an adaptive reservoir computing framework for the CTF-4-Science Lorenz benchmark, which evaluates machine learning models across twelve distinct tasks spanning five qualitatively different scenarios: baseline forecasting, noisy signal reconstruction, forecasting under noise, few-shot learning, and parametric generalization. Rather than applying a uniform inference strategy, we tailor the training and prediction procedure of Echo State Networks (ESNs) to the specific demands of each evaluation scenario. Our key contributions are fourfold: (1) exact reservoir state synchronization that eliminates warmup approximation error in short-time prediction; (2) histogram-guided candidate selection that directly optimizes the long-time ergodic evaluation metric; (3) multi-seed reservoir search for few-shot regimes with severely limited training data; and (4) sequential multi-sequence training that resolves state-distribution mismatch in parametric generalization tasks. The proposed framework achieves a score of 74.91 on the public benchmark leaderboard, demonstrating that carefully adapted reservoir computing constitutes a competitive and computationally efficient approach for diverse chaotic system modeling challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应储层计算框架，针对CTF-4-Science Lorenz基准测试的12个任务（涵盖基线预测、噪声信号重建、含噪预测、少样本学习和参数泛化）分别定制ESN训练策略，通过四种关键技术（精确状态同步、直方图引导候选选择、多种子搜索、序列多序列训练）取得74.91的排行榜分数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法对不同类型的混沌系统建模任务采用统一推理策略，未能针对各场景的特性（如短时预测、长时遍历性、少样本、参数泛化）进行专门优化，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出四种关键技术：(1) 精确储层状态同步，消除短时预测中的预热近似误差；(2) 直方图引导的候选选择，直接优化长时遍历性评估指标；(3) 多种子储层搜索，应对少样本场景；(4) 序列多序列训练，解决参数泛化任务中的状态分布不匹配问题。
AI.result: 在公开基准排行榜上取得74.91分，证明自适应储层计算在多样化混沌系统建模挑战中兼具竞争力和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 精心适配的储层计算是一种高效且具有竞争力的混沌系统建模方法，针对不同场景定制训练策略可显著提升性能。

title: BenGER: Benchmarking LLM Systems on Subsumption-Based Legal Reasoning in German Law
summary: We introduce the BenGER (Benchmark for German Law) dataset for evaluating LLM systems on subsumption-based legal reasoning in German law. The BenGER dataset consists of three components: 596 exam-style free-text legal case tasks across multiple levels of legal education and 531 short doctrinal reasoning tasks. We evaluate 12 contemporary LLM systems -- closed flagship, efficiency-oriented, and open-weight -- across automatic and judge-based metrics. On a controlled validation subset of timed human-written solutions under both unaided and human--AI co-creation conditions, we contextualise model performance against these human baselines. We introduce a rubric-aligned LLM-as-a-Judge framework cross-validated against a multi-rater human-grading protocol (three blind reviews plus one author-informed creator review per solution). Our results show that replacing a blind human reviewer with the LLM judge degrades agreement with the full human pool no more than removing that reviewer altogether (Calderon r=0.96 vs.~r=0.96, matched n=30), that closed-flagship systems lead the leaderboard across all corpora, and that human--AI co-creation substantially outperforms unaided human work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了德国法律推理基准BenGER，包含596个案例任务和531个教义推理任务，评估了12种LLM系统，发现闭源旗舰模型领先，人机协作显著优于纯人工，并验证了LLM评分法官的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 德国法律推理（涵摄推理）缺乏专门的评估基准，现有法律NLP数据集未针对德国法体系设计，且缺乏对LLM在自由文本法律推理上的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建了BenGER数据集（596个案例任务+531个教义任务），评估12种LLM（闭源旗舰、高效型、开源），使用自动度量和LLM-as-a-Judge评估框架，并与人类基线（无辅助/人机协作）进行对照。
AI.result: LLM评分法官与人类评分池的一致性极高（r=0.96），移除LLM法官不会比移除一位人类评审员带来更大的评分偏差；闭源旗舰模型在所有语料上领先；人机协作显著优于纯人工解答。
AI.conclusion: BenGER可作为评估LLM法律推理能力的有效基准；LLM法官可可靠替代单一人类评审；人机协作是提升法律推理质量的有效范式。

title: PhAME: Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing via Latent Diffusion
summary: Small-molecule drug discovery requires simultaneous optimization of numerous properties of candidate molecules. These properties can be investigated through the analysis of high-dimensional biological signatures, such as cell morphology and transcriptomic perturbations, which provide a rich perspective on the underlying biological mechanisms. However, existing generative methods, which use those signatures for optimization, fail to meet two key requirements: providing precise guidance toward desired phenotypic signatures while maintaining structural proximity to a known hit. We introduce PhAME (Phenotype-Aware Molecular Editing), a latent diffusion framework that overcomes this challenge by recasting molecular optimization as editing in the latent space of a pretrained graph-based VAE. Our central contribution is a compositional classifier-free guidance scheme with two independent scales, one for the phenotype-conditioning and one for similarity to the seed structure, allowing practitioners to control the tradeoff between these two objectives. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks, including docking score optimization and multimodal phenotypic generation, demonstrate that PhAME achieves state-of-the-art results while maintaining high chemical validity and novelty.

AI.tldr: PhAME是一个隐空间扩散框架，通过在预训练图VAE的隐空间中编辑分子，实现对高维生物表型特征的精确优化，同时保持与已知先导化合物的结构相似性。其核心贡献是提出了一种组合式无分类器引导机制，允许独立控制表型条件强度和结构相似性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 小分子药物发现需要同时优化候选分子的多种属性。虽然高维生物特征（如细胞形态和转录组扰动）提供了丰富的生物学机制视角，但现有生成方法无法同时满足两个关键需求：提供向期望表型特征的精确引导，同时保持与已知先导化合物的结构邻近性。
AI.method: 提出PhAME（表型感知分子编辑）框架，基于预训练图VAE的隐空间，采用隐扩散模型进行分子编辑。核心创新是组合式无分类器引导方案，包含两个独立尺度：一个控制表型条件强度，另一个控制与种子结构的相似性，使实践者可以自由调节这两个目标之间的权衡。
AI.result: 在对接得分优化和多模态表型生成等多个基准测试中，PhAME达到了最先进的结果，同时保持了高化学有效性和新颖性。
AI.conclusion: PhAME成功解决了分子优化中精确表型引导与结构相似性保持之间的平衡问题，为小分子药物发现提供了一种有效的分子编辑工具。

title: OR-Space: A Full-Lifecycle Workspace Benchmark for Industrial Optimization Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used to assist with operations research (OR) modeling, yet existing OR-oriented benchmarks often reduce evaluation to one-shot translation from a self-contained problem statement into a mathematical formulation or solver program. Such settings abstract away two characteristics of real industrial OR workflows: persistent multi-artifact workspaces and multi-stage task lifecycles. We introduce OR-Space, a full-lifecycle workspace benchmark for evaluating industrial optimization agents across model construction, model revision, and grounded explanation. Each instance is an executable workspace containing business documents, structured data, optional code artifacts, solver outputs, and task-specific evaluators distributed across interdependent files. OR-Space defines three task modes: Build, where agents construct solver-ready optimization models from heterogeneous artifacts; Revise, where agents modify existing models under changing requirements or solver feedback while preserving valid prior logic; and Explain, where agents answer grounded questions about solutions, constraints, and business implications using evidence spread across workspace artifacts. By combining persistent workspaces with lifecycle-oriented tasks, OR-Space evaluates whether agents can perform reliable optimization work beyond end-to-end text generation. We describe the benchmark design, evaluation protocol, and quality-control pipeline, and position OR-Space as a benchmark for studying the reliability, failure modes, and practical readiness of LLM agents in industrial OR workflows.

AI.tldr: OR-Space是一个用于评估工业运筹优化智能体的全生命周期工作台基准，包含构建、修订和解释三种任务模式，强调多工件工作区和多阶段任务流程。
AI.motivation: 现有OR基准仅评估从问题陈述到数学公式或求解器程序的一步式翻译，忽略了工业OR工作流中持续的多工件工作区和多阶段任务生命周期的特性。
AI.method: 构建OR-Space基准，每个实例包含可执行工作区（业务文档、结构化数据、代码工件、求解器输出、任务评估器），定义三种任务模式：Build（从异构工件构建模型）、Revise（在需求变化下修改模型）、Explain（跨工件回答相关问题）。
AI.result: OR-Space通过结合持久工作区和生命周期导向任务，评估智能体在工业OR工作流中超越端到端文本生成的可靠优化工作能力。
AI.conclusion: OR-Space可作为研究LLM智能体在工业OR工作流中可靠性、失败模式和实践准备度的基准。

title: Framing Matters: Addressing Framing Sensitivity in Decision-Making through Behaviorally-Grounded Value Alignment
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes decision-making settings such as legal reasoning, where consistency under factually equivalent inputs is critical. However, we find that fact-preserved but differently framed inputs can significantly destabilize LLM decisions. To systematically investigate this problem, we introduce Fragile, a large-scale benchmark that isolates fact-preserving semantic framing across three controlled dimensions: value-tinted narration, temporal slice, and narrative vividness. Our experiments reveal a high susceptibility of LLMs to framing, with an average decision flip rate of 28.6%. We find that simple prior prompt-level and activation-level interventions not only fail to suppress framing sensitivity but actively amplify it. We therefore propose Valign, a representation-level method that explicitly targets these framing dimensions by anchoring decisions to a stable value prior, steering hidden states toward the model's value-consistent direction, and projecting out temporal-vividness-sensitive directions from the model's hidden states. Valign consistently reduces framing-induced decision flips, demonstrating that robust mitigation requires directly targeting the internal pathways in which framing operates.

AI.tldr: 大语言模型在事实等价但不同框架的输入下决策高度不稳定（翻转率28.6%），现有干预无效甚至加剧问题，本文提出Valign方法通过在表示层级锚定价值先验、引导隐藏状态、投影去除敏感方向，有效抑制框架诱导的决策翻转。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在司法推理等高 stakes 场景中部署日益增多，但事实等价的不同框架输入会显著破坏决策一致性，现有方法无法有效缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 构建Fragile基准数据集（三控制维度：价值着色、时间切片、叙述生动性），提出Valign方法：将决策锚定到稳定价值先验，将隐藏状态向模型的价值一致方向引导，并从隐藏状态中投影出对时间和生动性敏感的方向。
AI.result: LLM平均决策翻转率28.6%；简单提示层和激活层干预不仅无效反而放大问题；Valign持续有效减少框架诱导的决策翻转。
AI.conclusion: 框架敏感性根植于模型内部表征路径，有效缓解必须直接针对框架运作的内部通路进行干预，Valign为此提供了可行方案。

title: IRDS: Interpretable RLVR Data Selection via Verifier-Coupled Sparse Autoencoder Coverage
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a key technique for en- hancing LLM reasoning, yet its data ineffi- ciency remains a major bottleneck. Existing methods address this problem only partially, each missing at least one of subset-level cov- erage, verifier signal use, or interpretability. To address this gap, we present IRDS (Inter- pretable RLVR Data Selection), which selects RLVR training instances on a sparse autoen- coder (SAE) cluster basis so the selection itself is auditable on recognizable problem motifs. To select instances the model both fails on and can still learn from, we introduce a verifier- coupled coverage objective on the SAE basis and solve it by greedy log-determinant max- imization. Experiments on three instruction- tuned models and six math reasoning bench- marks show that IRDS achieves the highest overall accuracy, exceeding the strongest base- line by +3.9/+4.0 pp on the two Qwen models and by +0.5 pp on Llama-3.1-8B, while run- ning an order of magnitude cheaper than the trajectory-based baseline.

AI.tldr: IRDS是一种基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）簇的可解释数据选择方法，通过验证器耦合的覆盖目标与贪心log行列式最大化，提升RLVR训练效率，在六个数学推理基准上超过现有基线方法，且计算成本降低一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR数据选择方法存在三大不足：缺乏子集级覆盖、未充分利用验证器信号、可解释性差，导致数据效率低下。
AI.method: 提出IRDS方法：1) 以SAE簇为单元选择训练实例，使选择过程在可识别的问题模式上可审计；2) 引入验证器耦合的覆盖目标，选择模型当前失败但尚能学习的实例；3) 通过贪心log行列式最大化求解覆盖目标。
AI.result: 在三个指令微调模型和六个数学推理基准上，IRDS取得最高整体准确率：在Qwen模型上分别超过最强基线+3.9/+4.0个百分点，在Llama-3.1-8B上超过+0.5个百分点，同时计算成本比基于轨迹的基线方法低一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: IRDS通过可解释的SAE簇级数据选择，同时解决了覆盖率、验证器信号利用和可解释性问题，显著提升了RLVR的数据效率和模型推理性能。

title: Look on Demand: A Cognitive Scheduling Framework for Visual Evidence Acquisition in Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Existing multimodal reasoning approaches predominantly follow two paradigms: converting visual inputs into text prior to reasoning, or performing end-to-end reasoning within a unified vision-language representation space. Despite their empirical progress, both paradigms suffer from fundamental structural limitations. The former relies on static visual-to-text conversion, which tends to compress and lose fine-grained visual details. The latter is prone to linguistic dominance induced by joint optimization and attention mechanisms, leading to systematically weakened faithfulness to visual evidence during reasoning. In this work, we argue that a central challenge is how and when visual evidence is introduced into the reasoning process. Motivated by this insight, we propose CSMR, a multimodal reasoning framework in which a language model controls the reasoning process by deciding when to invoke an independent visual perception module to acquire task-relevant visual evidence. Experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that CSMR consistently outperforms representative baseline methods in accuracy under a zero-shot setting. Further experimental analysis confirms that these advantages primarily arise from the proposed cognitive scheduling mechanism.

AI.tldr: 提出CSMR框架，通过让语言模型控制何时调用独立的视觉感知模块来获取证据，解决了多模态推理中视觉信息丢失和语言主导性问题，在零样本设置下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有两种多模态推理范式（先转文本再推理 vs 统一视觉-语言空间推理）都存在结构缺陷：前者压缩丢失视觉细节，后者易受语言主导而削弱对视觉证据的忠实度。核心挑战在于**何时以及如何将视觉证据引入推理过程**。
AI.method: 提出CSMR（Cognitive Scheduling for Multimodal Reasoning）框架，语言模型控制推理过程，自主决定何时调用独立的视觉感知模块来获取与任务相关的视觉证据。
AI.result: 在多个多模态推理基准上，CSMR在零样本设置下一致优于代表性基线方法。消融实验证实优势主要来自所提出的认知调度机制。
AI.conclusion: 通过认知调度机制（语言模型控制视觉感知模块的调用时机）可以有效解决现有多模态推理范式的结构性问题，提升推理准确率和对视觉证据的忠实度。

title: The Harder Text Embedding Benchmark (HTEB): Beyond One-dimensional Static Robustness
summary: Embedding benchmarks like MTEB report a single score per model, implicitly treating robustness as a static, scalar property. We argue that embedding robustness is multidimensional, since models respond differently to different types of variation, and requires dynamic evaluation to expose failures hidden by static benchmarks. We introduce the Harder Text Embedding Benchmark (HTEB), a dynamic evaluation framework that challenges model robustness along three practically interpretable axes (Lexical/Stylistic, Length and Language) by stochastically transforming inputs at evaluation time with an LLM. Evaluating 16 open-weight embedding models on 32 datasets covering 42 languages under transformations validated by 4,800 human ratings on an English subsample, we find three patterns: (1) Models exhibit specific, partly decoupled robustness profiles across axes. (2) Across three model families, scale increases absolute scores but does not close the gap between original and transformed evaluations. Here, scaling tends to improve specifically the Language axis. (3) English datasets are more sensitive to HTEB transformations than multilingual datasets. This demonstrates that HTEB identifies strengths and weaknesses of models along deployment-relevant axes, challenging current embedding benchmarks and arguing for multidimensional, dynamic robustness evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTEB基准，通过LLM驱动的三大可解释轴（词汇/风格、长度、语言）动态转换输入，揭示嵌入模型的鲁棒性是**多维且动态**的，静态基准（如MTEB）会掩盖模型在不同变换下的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入基准（如MTEB）将鲁棒性视为静态标量属性，无法捕捉模型对不同类型输入变化的差异化响应，需要更细粒度的动态评估。
AI.method: 构建HTEB框架：沿Lexical/Stylistic、Length、Language三个轴，用LLM随机变换输入；在42种语言、32个数据集上评估16个开源嵌入模型；通过4,800个人类评分验证变换质量。
AI.result: 三个发现：①模型在不同轴上呈现特异且部分解耦的鲁棒性轮廓；②模型规模提升绝对分数，但未缩小原始与变换评估间的差距，且规模主要改善Language轴；③英语数据集比多语言数据集对变换更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入鲁棒性是多维、动态的，HTEB能揭示模型在部署相关轴上的优劣，挑战了现有静态基准，主张采用多维动态鲁棒性评估。

title: OccuReward: LLM-Guided Occupant-Centric Reward Shaping for Demographic Equity in Grid-Interactive Buildings
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at OccuSys 2026, co-located with ACM Sustainability Week 2026. Preprint version
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated promising capability in generating reward functions for deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based building energy management. However, their potential to exhibit or exacerbate disparities in occupant comfort across heterogeneous demographic populations remains unexplored. We present OccuReward, a framework investigating how LLM-mediated reward design affects demographic equity. Our contribution is three-fold: the introduction of the Comfort Equity Index (CEI) as a novel feedback signal; a methodology for iterative, equity-aware LLM reward shaping; and a performance analysis of DRL agents under these refined objectives. Utilizing four empirically grounded occupant profiles from the ASHRAE Global Thermal Comfort Database II (13,440 votes), we deploy a Soft Actor-Critic agent in CityLearn v2. Our approach employs the Gemini API to generate reward function logic and weights--rather than performing per-step inference--across three refinement rounds. Results across 15 experimental runs reveal that elderly female occupants consistently experience the lowest satisfaction in initial rounds. By Round 3, equity-aware LLM refinement activates specific reward components that improve satisfaction for Young Males (+17.6%), Mid-aged Females (+28.2%), Health Sensitive (+53.8%), and Elderly Females (+567%), while simultaneously reducing energy costs by 3.2%. Our findings highlight that while reward-level intervention significantly improves equity, demographic disparities in AI-driven controllers persist, necessitating further research into algorithmic fairness in building systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OccuReward框架，探索LLM在强化学习奖励函数设计中如何影响建筑能耗管理的人口公平性。通过引入舒适公平指数(CEI)和迭代式公平感知奖励塑形，实验表明该方法能显著提升弱势群体（如老年女性）的舒适满意度（+567%），同时降低能耗3.2%，但人口差距仍部分存在。
AI.motivation: LLM已被证明能生成DRL奖励函数用于建筑能耗管理，但其是否会导致或加剧不同人口群体间的舒适度不公平问题尚未被探索。作者旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1) 提出Comfort Equity Index (CEI)作为反馈信号；2) 设计迭代式公平感知LLM奖励塑形方法；3) 基于ASHRAE全球热舒适数据库II（13,440条投票）构建四种人口画像，使用SAC智能体在CityLearn v2中训练，通过Gemini API生成奖励函数逻辑与权重，进行三轮精炼。
AI.result: 三轮迭代后：年轻男性舒适度+17.6%，中年女性+28.2%，健康敏感人群+53.8%，老年女性+567%；同时能耗降低3.2%。但初始轮次中老年女性满意度最低，且最终仍存在人口差距。
AI.conclusion: 奖励层面的干预能显著改善公平性，但AI控制系统中的人口差异仍持续存在，需要进一步研究建筑系统中的算法公平性。

title: Pruning and Distilling Mixture-of-Experts into Dense Language Models
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is now the dominant architecture for frontier language models, yet it requires all expert parameters to be loaded in memory, making it less preferable for memory-constrained deployment. Existing compression methods reduce the number of experts but the output remains an MoE model with the same fundamental limitation. We present the first systematic framework for converting a trained MoE into a standard fully dense architecture: experts are scored, selected, and grouped, then concatenated into a dense FFN and refined by knowledge distillation from the MoE teacher. We evaluate 7 scoring, 5 grouping, and 2 magnitude scaling methods across a range of selected expert counts on Qwen3-30B-A3B, yielding 350 configurations. We find that the choice of scoring method is the most impactful, with our novel diversity-aware scoring consistently outperforming prior methods on Qwen3-30B-A3B, DeepSeek-V2-Lite, and GPT-OSS-20B. Under a controlled comparison at matched parameter count, MoE-to-dense outperforms dense-to-dense pruning by +6.3 pp in average downstream accuracy after ~4B-token distillation at 1.6x faster training wall-clock speed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个将训练好的MoE模型系统性地转换为标准密集架构的框架，通过专家评分、选择、分组、拼接和知识蒸馏，在Qwen3-30B-A3B等模型上验证了350种配置，发现多样性感知评分方法最优，且在参数匹配条件下比密集剪枝的准确率高6.3个百分点，训练速度快1.6倍。
AI.motivation: MoE架构虽已成为前沿语言模型的主流，但需要将所有专家参数加载到内存中，不利于内存受限的部署场景。现有压缩方法只是减少专家数量，输出仍然是MoE模型，无法从根本上解决这一局限性。
AI.method: 提出MoE-to-dense转换框架：首先对专家进行评分、选择和分组，然后将专家拼接成密集FFN，最后通过知识蒸馏从MoE教师模型进行精炼。系统评估了7种评分方法、5种分组方法和2种幅度缩放方法，在Qwen3-30B-A3B上构建了350种配置。
AI.result: 评分方法的选择影响最大，新提出的多样性感知评分方法在Qwen3-30B-A3B、DeepSeek-V2-Lite和GPT-OSS-20B上一致优于先前方法。在参数匹配的受控对比中，MoE-to-dense在约40亿token蒸馏后，平均下游准确率比密集剪枝高6.3个百分点，训练墙钟速度快1.6倍。
AI.conclusion: MoE-to-dense转换是可行的且效果优于传统密集剪枝方法，可有效解决MoE模型的内存部署问题，同时保持甚至提升模型性能。

title: Dynamic Topic Modeling with a Higher-Order Hypergraphical Representation
summary: Dynamic topic modeling is widely used to analyze evolving trends in scientific literature, medical records, and social media. Traditional topic models represent each topic through a single probability vector on the multinomial simplex and implicitly couple word occurrence and repetition within one probabilistic mechanism. However, this formulation restricts the dependence structure among words and overlooks informative higher-order interactions, particularly in dynamic corpora with overlapping semantics. To address these limitations, we introduce a hypergraph representation of text where each document is modeled as a hyperedge connecting all co-occurring words, with repetition intensities encoded as node weights. This representation naturally separates word occurrence from repetition and induces a novel hypergraph-based multinomial distribution with a nonlinear normalization depending on the observed word set of each document. Building on this likelihood, we develop a dynamic topic modeling framework via structured low-rank factorizations with explicit temporal regularization on topic-word profiles. Moreover, we establish local convergence guarantees and derive non-asymptotic error bounds despite the intrinsic nonconvexity induced by bilinear factorization and document-specific nonlinear normalization. Numerical experiments on synthetic data and an application to the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) corpus demonstrate consistent improvements over existing multinomial-based topic models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于超图表示的动态主题建模框架，将文档建模为超边，词共现关系通过超边捕捉，词重复强度编码为节点权重，从而分离词出现与重复机制。基于此构建超图多项分布，结合结构化低秩分解与时序正则化，并提供局部收敛保证和非渐近误差界。实验表明该方法优于传统多项分布主题模型。
AI.motivation: 传统动态主题模型将每个主题表示为单一概率向量，隐式地将词的出现与重复耦合在同一概率机制中，限制了词之间的依赖结构，忽略了动态语料中重叠语义下的高阶交互信息。
AI.method: 1) 引入超图表示文本，文档为超边连接共现词，词重复强度为节点权重；2) 提出超图多项分布，具有依赖观测词集的非线性归一化；3) 构建结构化低秩分解框架，引入显式时序正则化约束主题-词轮廓；4) 证明局部收敛保证并推导非渐近误差界。
AI.result: 在合成数据和ICLR会议语料上的实验表明，该方法在一致性上持续优于基于多项分布的传统主题模型。
AI.conclusion: 超图表示有效分离词出现与重复机制，捕捉高阶词共现关系，为动态主题建模提供了更具表达能力的概率框架。

title: Localizing Input Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Models via Shapley Values
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-stakes decision-making, the ability to reliably quantify uncertainty has become a critical requirement for safety and trust. However, current uncertainty quantification methods primarily operate at the output level, often failing to distinguish whether uncertainty arises from the model's lack of knowledge or from ambiguity in the user's input. While input-centric uncertainty quantification has recently emerged as a promising direction, it remains relatively underexplored and typically relies on coarse, input-level information. Consequently, users are provided with scalar uncertainty scores that offer little actionable guidance on which parts of the input should be clarified to improve reliability. To address this limitation, we propose Shapley-based input uncertainty Quantification (ShaQ), a framework for span-level attribution of input-induced uncertainty. Our approach models ambiguous spans in the input as players in a cooperative game and quantifies their contributions using Shapley values, defined via the weighted average of marginal reductions in conditional entropy obtained by clarifying each span coalition. Unlike existing input-level approaches, our formulation captures complex interactions among spans and provides a principled decomposition in which individual attributions sum exactly to the total input-induced uncertainty. We evaluate ShaQ on the AmbigQA and AmbiEnt benchmarks, where it achieves state-of-the-art performance in ambiguity detection. We further demonstrate its utility on MediTOD, showing that ShaQ can localize under-specified clinical utterances and facilitate human-AI collaboration in high-stakes settings. Overall, ShaQ improves uncertainty estimation and provides actionable insights for targeted input clarification.

AI.tldr: 提出ShaQ框架，利用Shapley值将输入引起的不确定性归因到具体文本片段（span）级别，优于现有输入级方法，在多个基准上达到SOTA，并可定位临床对话中不明确的表述。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法主要在输出层面操作，无法区分不确定性来源于模型知识不足还是输入歧义；即使有输入级方法，也只能给出标量分数，无法告知用户输入中哪些部分需要澄清才能提高可靠性。
AI.method: 将输入中歧义片段视为合作博弈中的玩家，通过Shapley值量化每个片段对输入引起的不确定性的贡献，定义为澄清每个片段联盟后条件熵边际减少的加权平均值，确保各片段贡献之和等于总输入不确定性。
AI.result: 在AmbigQA和AmbiEnt基准上达到歧义检测SOTA；在MediTOD上证明可定位临床对话中不明确的表述，促进人机协作。
AI.conclusion: ShaQ改进了不确定性估计，并为针对性的输入澄清提供了可操作的洞察，在高风险场景（如医疗）中具有实际应用价值。

title: When Helpful Context Leaks: Privacy Risks in Domain-Adapted ASR
summary: SpeechLLMs are increasingly deployed in professional settings where domain customisation is standard practice: users supply context in prompts with sensitive information, fine-tune on proprietary recordings, or both. We identify and systematically investigate an overlooked privacy risk of such customisation: a model adapted to recognise domain-specific terminology can be nudged into transcribing a phonetically similar word from its context or training data, even when a different word is spoken, thereby leaking private information. To evaluate this risk, we construct a controlled dataset and measure leakage rates across two customisation mechanisms, prompting and fine-tuning. Both mechanisms cause measurable leakage, compounding when combined. We evaluate a prompt-level mitigation strategy and analyse the accuracy-leakage trade-off across customisation approaches, finding that fine-tuning without context prompts offers the best balance. We release our code and dataset publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，对语音LLM进行领域定制（如提示词注入上下文或微调）会导致模型被诱导转录出语音相似但实际未说的词汇，从而泄露隐私信息。研究发现提示词和微调两种定制方式都会造成泄露，且二者叠加时风险更大。微调（不加上下文提示）在准确率与隐私泄露之间取得最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了语音LLM在专业场景下进行领域定制（提示词上下文注入或微调）时存在的隐私泄露风险——模型可能会被诱导转录出上下文或训练数据中语音相似但实际未说出的词汇，从而泄露敏感信息。
AI.method: 构建了受控数据集，在提示词定制和微调两种机制下测量隐私泄露率；评估了提示层面的缓解策略；分析了不同定制方式下准确率与泄露之间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 提示词和微调都会导致可测量的隐私泄露，且两者组合使用时泄露程度加剧；微调（不加上下文提示）在准确率与隐私保护之间表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 语音LLM的领域定制存在显著的隐私泄露风险，提示词缓解策略效果有限；建议优先采用微调而非上下文提示词定制以平衡准确率与隐私安全。

title: Commit to the Bit: Reactive Reinforcement Learning Done Right
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms are commonly analyzed (and designed) under the Markov assumption. This is unrealistic, as most environments encountered in practice are either partially observable, or require function approximation that restricts the agent to access non-Markovian state features. We consider the problem of learning an optimal reactive policy in a finite environment with deterministic observations (or equivalently, hard state aggregation). We introduce a new algorithm, Committed Q-learning, and prove almost-sure convergence to the optimal reactive policy under an intuitive assumption we call rewire-robustness. This assumption is strictly weaker than the $q_\star$-realizability condition used in prior work. Our algorithm is a variant of classical Q-learning in which the behavior policy commits to a single action upon entering a feature, and only resamples actions when the observed feature changes. A crucial part of our analysis is the introduction of quasi-Markov environments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非马尔可夫环境下的强化学习问题，提出了一种名为Committed Q-learning的新算法，并证明了其在比现有条件更弱的rewire-robustness假设下能几乎必然收敛到最优反应策略。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法大多假设环境满足马尔可夫性，但这在实践中不现实（如部分可观测或使用非马尔可夫状态特征）。本文旨在解决在确定性观测（硬状态聚合）的有限环境中学习最优反应策略的问题。
AI.method: 提出Committed Q-learning算法，是经典Q-learning的变体。其行为策略在进入某一特征时"承诺"执行一个动作，只有当观测到的特征发生变化时才重新采样动作。论文引入了准马尔可夫环境（quasi-Markov environments）概念进行理论分析。
AI.result: 证明了Committed Q-learning在rewire-robustness假设下能够几乎必然收敛到最优反应策略，且该假设严格弱于先前工作中使用的q*可实现性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为非马尔可夫环境下的强化学习提供了新的理论保证，放宽了收敛条件，有助于推动强化学习在更真实复杂环境中的应用。

title: Agentic Active Omni-Modal Perception for Multi-Hop Audio-Visual Reasoning
summary: Multi-hop audio-visual reasoning remains challenging for Omni-LLMs, as relevant evidence is often sparse, temporally dispersed, and distributed across both audio and visual streams. Existing benchmarks provide limited investigation of this setting, typically involving only a limited number of modalities, relevant temporal segments, or reasoning steps. In this work, we introduce MOV-Bench, a benchmark containing 519 carefully curated questions that require multi-hop reasoning over temporally dispersed audio-visual evidence. Evaluations on MOV-Bench reveal that current Omni-LLMs still struggle with multi-hop cross-modal reasoning. To address this challenge, we further propose AOP-Agent, an efficient agentic framework built on open-source Omni-LLMs for active omni-modal perception. By combining a hierarchical omni-modal memory with a collaborative observe-reflect-replan loop, AOP-Agent enables open-source Omni-LLMs to perform active perception without additional training or proprietary models. Experiments on MOV-Bench and OmniVideoBench demonstrate that AOP-Agent consistently improves reasoning performance, with particularly notable gains on long videos and reasoning-intensive questions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MOV-Bench基准（519道多跳跨模态推理题）和AOP-Agent框架（基于开源Omni-LLM的主动感知智能体），揭示了现有Omni-LLM在多跳音视频推理上的不足，并通过层次化记忆与协作循环机制显著提升了长视频和推理密集型任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Omni-LLM在处理多跳音视频推理时表现不佳，因为相关证据稀疏、时间上分散且分布在音频和视频两个模态中。当前的基准测试对此场景的探索有限，仅涉及少量模态、时间片段或推理步骤。
AI.method: 提出MOV-Bench基准（519个精心设计的问题）用于评估多跳音视频推理；提出AOP-Agent框架，包含层次化全模态记忆（hierarchical omni-modal memory）和协作式"观察-反思-重新规划"（observe-reflect-replan）循环，使开源Omni-LLM无需额外训练即可执行主动全模态感知。
AI.result: 实验表明现有Omni-LLM在MOV-Bench上表现不佳，而AOP-Agent在MOV-Bench和OmniVideoBench上持续提升了推理性能，尤其在长视频和推理密集型问题上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 多跳音视频推理对当前Omni-LLM仍是挑战，AOP-Agent提供了一种高效且无需额外训练的解决方案，显著提升了开源模型在该任务上的表现。

title: IFMTBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multilingual Translation Instruction Following
summary: Modern translation workflows demand more than semantic equivalence. Users routinely require models to preserve JSON or HTML schemas, honor curated glossaries, disambiguate with provided context, and match prescribed registers, often several at once. Conventional metrics such as BLEU and xCOMET capture semantic fidelity but provide little signal on constraint adherence, while general instruction following benchmarks ignore the cross-lingual nature of translation. We introduce \bench, a benchmark for multilingual translation instruction following covering seven languages, with 4,506 single-constraint and 2,838 multi-constraint items spanning six constraint dimensions and five compositional patterns with instructions issued in all seven languages. Constraints are split into a gating subset verified by deterministic checkers and a continuous subset scored by a rubric-based LLM judge, combined under a multiplicative rule that resists reward hacking. Evaluating 15 models reveals systematic gaps that prior protocols miss: Instruction following scales with size more sharply than translation quality, glossary and structured-format constraints dominate the difficulty gradient, and general instruction following rankings correlate only weakly with translation behavior. Our benchmark are available at https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy-MT2/tree/main/IFMTBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个面向多语言翻译指令遵循的基准测试（IFMTBench），涵盖7种语言、6种约束维度和5种组合模式，包含4506个单约束和2838个多约束测试项，评估发现指令遵循能力随模型规模增长比翻译质量提升更显著，且通用指令遵循排名与翻译行为相关性弱。
AI.motivation: 现代翻译工作流不仅需要语义等价，还需要模型遵守JSON/HTML模式、术语表、上下文消歧、语域匹配等多种约束，但现有指标（BLEU、xCOMET）无法衡量约束遵循能力，通用指令遵循基准又忽略了跨语言特性。
AI.method: 构建了涵盖7种语言、6个约束维度（如结构化格式、术语表、上下文消歧等）和5种组合模式的基准。约束分为"门控子集"（确定性检查器验证）和"连续子集"（基于评分标准的LLM评判），通过乘法规则结合以抵抗奖励黑客。
AI.result: 评估15个模型发现：指令遵循能力随模型规模增长比翻译质量更显著；术语表和结构化格式约束难度最高；通用指令遵循排名与翻译行为相关性弱。
AI.conclusion: 现有通用指令遵循基准无法准确反映翻译中约束遵循能力，提示需要专门针对翻译的指令遵循评估方法。

title: AtomComposer: Discovering Chemical Space from First Principles with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Discovering novel stable molecules without training data remains a grand scientific challenge. Current molecular generative models are trained on large, pre-curated datasets, which introduce biases and limit exploration of novel chemistry. In contrast, we propose a new paradigm: autonomous, generalized agents capable of mapping vast, unknown chemical spaces without any pretraining. For the first time, we present AtomComposer, a self-guided agent that autonomously constructs valid 3D isomers under stoichiometric constraints and is trained exclusively online using reinforcement learning. Unlike existing approaches that generally overfit to a specific chemical formula, we establish a multi-composition training scheme that enables a broad generalization across diverse chemistry, guided by energy- and validity-based rewards. Our agent can discover up to an order of magnitude more valid isomers on unseen test formulas than existing single-composition reinforcement-learning baselines trained with per-step energy rewards. These results fulfill the promise of online reinforcement learning as a powerful paradigm for scalable, from-scratch exploration of chemical configuration space.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AtomComposer，一种无需预训练数据、通过在线强化学习自主构建3D异构体的自导智能体，在多组分训练方案下能发现比现有方法多一个数量级的有效异构体。
AI.motivation: 现有分子生成模型依赖大规模预训练数据集，这引入了偏差并限制了新化学空间的探索。作者希望建立一种无需预训练数据、能够自主探索广阔未知化学空间的新范式。
AI.method: 提出AtomComposer，一个自导智能体，在化学计量约束下自主构建有效的3D异构体，完全通过在线强化学习训练。采用多组分训练方案（而非单化学式过拟合），以能量和有效性为奖励信号进行优化。
AI.result: 在未见过的测试化学式上，AtomComposer发现的异构体数量比现有单组分强化学习基线方法多出一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 验证了在线强化学习作为从零开始大规模探索化学配置空间的可扩展范式的潜力。

title: Plant, Persist, Trigger: Sleeper Attack on Large Language Model Agents
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents remain vulnerable to safety threats from the external environment, where attackers inject adversarial content into external observations such as tool-returned data, webpages, or MCP context, causing harmful agentic behaviors such as unsafe actions or incorrect outputs. Existing studies typically focus on single-interaction attacks, where the agent observes adversarial content and immediately exhibits harmful behavior within one user request. However, we show that adversarial content can also persist across interactions served by the same agent, making such threats harder to detect and mitigate. Specifically, adversarial content may persist in the agent state, remain dormant across interactions, and later be activated by a benign user query. We formalize this type of safety threat as Sleeper Attack. To evaluate it, we construct a benchmark with 1,896 instances covering six real-world harmful outcomes, three attack strategies, and three agent state targets: session context, memory, and reusable skills. Experiments on seven strong open-source and closed-source LLMs show that state-of-the-art LLM agents remain vulnerable to Sleeper Attack, even when they achieve low attack success rates under a single-interaction baseline. Our code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/skdvnfu23ihr9wdscnksf1asdffsaef.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"Sleeper Attack"（潜伏攻击）—— 攻击者将对抗性内容注入到智能体的持久化状态（会话上下文、记忆、可复用技能）中，这些内容在单次交互中不触发有害行为，而是在后续交互中被良性用户查询激活。实验表明，当前主流LLM智能体在单次交互基准上表现良好，但在潜伏攻击下仍高度脆弱。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注单次交互攻击（agent观察到对抗内容后立即产生有害行为），但忽略了对抗内容可能持久化存在于agent状态中，跨交互潜伏并延迟触发。作者希望揭示这种更难检测和防御的安全威胁。
AI.method: 形式化定义了Sleeper Attack，构建了一个包含1,896个实例的基准测试，覆盖6种真实世界有害结果、3种攻击策略和3种agent状态目标（会话上下文、记忆、可复用技能）。在7种开源和闭源LLM上进行实验评估。
AI.result: 当前最先进的LLM智能体在单次交互基准下攻击成功率较低，但在Sleeper Attack下仍然高度脆弱，表明潜伏攻击是一种真实且未被重视的安全威胁。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体面临来自持久化对抗内容的跨交互安全威胁，现有安全措施不足以防御此类攻击，亟需新的防御机制。

title: Analyzing Quality-Latency-Resource Trade-offs in a Technical Documentation RAG Assistant Using LoRA Adaptation
comment: 13-page main body plus extended appendix; 6 figures; benchmark, LoRA adapters, and code at https://github.com/EugPal/rag-lora-tradeoffs
summary: We study quality-latency-resource trade-offs in a documentation-grounded retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system that uses Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) of the generator. We build a manually verified benchmark of 5,144 question-answer pairs over the official Kubernetes documentation and combine it with a fixed hybrid-retrieval pipeline (BGE-M3 dense, BGE-M3 native sparse, Reciprocal Rank Fusion, cross-encoder reranking). Over this benchmark we ablate 20 LoRA configurations on Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct across rank and target-module choices, and evaluate each on token-level F1, LLM-judged groundedness and correctness (pass@4), inference latency, inference memory, and training cost, all reported with bootstrap 95% confidence intervals. Pareto analysis shows that LoRA adapters acting only on the q and v attention projections consistently dominate the front, while the 3B/8B choice mainly defines operating regime. A param-matched control comparison further indicates that the q/v advantage is structural rather than purely parametric. The benchmark, selected adapters, and code are available at https://github.com/EugPal/rag-lora-tradeoffs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了基于文档的RAG系统中，使用LoRA微调生成器时的质量-延迟-资源权衡。基于Kubernetes官方文档构建了5,144问答对基准，对Llama-3.2-3B和Llama-3.1-8B模型进行了20种LoRA配置的消融实验。Pareto分析表明：仅作用于q和v注意力投影的LoRA适配器始终占优，模型规模（3B/8B）主要决定运行区间，且q/v优势是结构性的而非参数量的差异。
AI.motivation: 在实际RAG部署中，LoRA配置（如秩、目标模块）的选择对性能-资源权衡影响巨大，但缺乏系统性的实证研究来指导这一选择。
AI.method: 构建5,144问答对的Kubernetes文档基准，采用固定混合检索管线（BGE-M3稠密+稀疏检索、倒数秩融合、交叉编码器重排序），对Llama-3.2-3B和Llama-3.1-8B进行20种LoRA配置（不同秩和目标模块）的消融实验，评估F1分数、LLM评判的合理性和正确性、推理延迟、推理内存及训练成本，并进行Pareto分析和参数匹配对照实验。
AI.result: 仅作用于q和v注意力投影的LoRA适配器在所有配置中占据Pareto前沿；3B/8B模型规模差异主要决定运行区间而非性能优劣；参数匹配对照实验证实q/v优势是结构性的而非参数数量带来的。
AI.conclusion: 在实际RAG部署中，应优先选择仅适配q和v投影的LoRA配置，以在质量、延迟和资源消耗之间获得最优权衡。

title: Supervised Semantic Differential for Cross-Cultural Concept Analysis: A Case Study of Human Affect
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, excluding the appendices. Code to reproduce our results is available at https://github.com/przebor/Cross-Cultural-SSD
summary: Cross-cultural comparison of psychological meaning requires methods that go beyond word-level translation and examine how semantic dimensions are organized across languages. We introduce a cross-lingual extension of the Supervised Semantic Differential (SSD), which estimates supervised semantic gradients in embedding space and compares them across aligned multilingual word embeddings. The method tests gradient alignment and difference using permutation procedures and bootstrap intervals, and interprets residual differences through clustering around the difference gradient. We demonstrate the approach on Polish, English, and French affective norm lexicons, modeling Valence, Arousal, and Dominance where available. Affective dimensions were significantly recoverable across languages and model settings. Cross-lingual comparisons showed broad alignment together with structured residual differences: Valence appeared mostly shared, whereas Arousal and Dominance produced more interpretable contrasts involving bodily threat, aesthetic stimulation, internal emotionality, macro-level authority, and everyday control. Several clusters also reflected corpus-specific artifacts, underscoring the need for cautious interpretation. Cross-lingual SSD offers an explainable framework for testing semantic alignment, identifying divergence, and generating hypotheses about cross-cultural differences in psychological meaning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨语言扩展的监督语义差异法（SSD），在多语言词向量空间中比较情感维度的跨文化语义组织。在波兰语、英语和法语情感规范词汇上验证，发现Valence跨语言共享度最高，而Arousal和Dominance存在结构化的文化差异。该方法可解释性强，能测试语义对齐、识别分歧并生成跨文化心理学差异假设。
AI.motivation: 跨文化心理语义比较需要超越词汇层面的翻译方法，研究者希望探究不同语言中语义维度（如情感维度）的组织方式是否存在系统性差异。
AI.method: 提出跨语言监督语义差异法（Cross-lingual SSD）：1）在对齐的多语言词嵌入空间中估计监督语义梯度；2）通过置换检验和Bootstrap区间检验梯度对齐与差异；3）通过差异梯度周围的聚类解释残差差异。在波兰语、英语、法语的情感规范词典上验证，建模Valence、Arousal、Dominance三个维度。
AI.result: 情感维度在各语言和模型设置下均可显著恢复。跨语言比较显示：Valence高度共享；Arousal和Dominance产生更多可解释的文化对比，涉及身体威胁、审美刺激、内在情绪性、宏观权威和日常控制等方面。部分聚类反映语料库特定伪影。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言SSD提供了一个可解释的框架，用于检验语义对齐、识别分歧，并生成关于跨文化心理语义差异的假设。强调需要谨慎解释结果，注意语料库伪影。

title: ProRL: Effective Reinforcement Learning for Proactive Recommendation via Rectified Policy Gradient Estimation
summary: Proactive Recommender Systems (PRSs) aim to guide user preference shift toward target items by generating paths of intermediate recommendations. Reinforcement learning (RL) provides a principled framework for optimizing such sequential decision tasks, as path rewards can naturally capture both short-term acceptance and long-term guidance effectiveness. However, naively applying policy gradients to PRS results in deficient gradient estimation. We identify two deficiencies: (1) path-level rewards decompose into step-level rewards with positive mean, creating a length-dependent bias that causes gradients to favor path extension over meaningful exploration; (2) weighting each step by the entire path-level reward ignores the decomposition structure, leading to high gradient variance. To rectify these two deficiencies, we propose an effective RL framework ProRL with two novel mechanisms for proactive recommendation. First, Stepwise Reward Centering subtracts expected rewards to neutralize length-dependent bias, ensuring that path extension yields zero expected gradient signal. Second, Position-Specific Advantage Estimation leverages the reward decomposition structure to compute step-dependent baselines, reducing gradient variance. Together, these mechanisms yield policy gradients that precisely target path quality. Our experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that ProRL significantly outperforms state-of-the-art PRSs. Our code is available at https://github.com/hongruhou89/ProRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProRL框架，通过两步奖励中心化和位置特定优势估计两个机制，解决了强化学习在主动推荐系统中梯度估计存在的长度偏差和高方差问题，在三个真实数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 主动推荐系统（PRS）旨在通过生成中间推荐路径引导用户偏好向目标物品偏移。强化学习是优化此类序列决策任务的合适框架，但直接应用策略梯度会导致梯度估计存在两个缺陷：(1)路径级奖励分解为步级奖励时存在长度依赖偏差，使梯度倾向于延长路径而非有意义的探索；(2)用整个路径级奖励加权每一步会忽略分解结构，导致高梯度方差。
AI.method: 提出ProRL框架，包含两个核心机制：(1)步进奖励中心化（Stepwise Reward Centering）——减去期望奖励以消除长度依赖偏差，确保路径延长的预期梯度信号为零；(2)位置特定优势估计（Position-Specific Advantage Estimation）——利用奖励分解结构计算步级依赖的基线，降低梯度方差。两者共同实现精准针对路径质量的策略梯度。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，ProRL显著优于现有的最先进主动推荐系统。
AI.conclusion: ProRL通过针对性解决策略梯度在PRS中的两个缺陷，有效提升了主动推荐系统的推荐路径质量。

title: Learning When to Optimize: Verified Optimization Skills from Expert GPU-Kernel Lineages
summary: LLM-based agents are increasingly used to generate GPU kernels, but they often know what optimizations to try without knowing when those optimizations are sound. We introduce KLineage, which learns this missing "when" knowledge from expert kernels: instead of relying on forward rollouts, KLineage walks expert implementations backward through validation-gated simplifications and reverses each accepted step into a reusable optimization skill. Each skill records not only the optimization intent, but also where it applies in code, what conditions made it valid, what effect it had, and what failures its assumptions avoid. A downstream LLM materializes these skills on new code surfaces under the same compile/correctness/profile gate. On five expert workloads across two NVIDIA architectures, these lineage-derived skills serve as an effective optimization curriculum, exceeding recent memory-based LLM-kernel baselines in both final kernel quality and optimization efficiency under the same fixed budget. We additionally use a separate 22-instance held-out check as a sanity test against source-case memorization.

AI.tldr: KLineage通过反向追溯专家GPU内核的优化步骤，提取可复用的"何时优化"知识（即优化技能），帮助LLM代理在编译-正确性-性能验证流程中更高效地生成高质量GPU内核。
AI.motivation: LLM代理知道"优化什么"但不知道"何时优化是安全的"，缺乏优化适用条件的知识，导致盲目尝试。
AI.method: 从专家实现反向回溯，经过验证门控的简化步骤，将每个被接受的步骤逆转为可复用的优化技能；每个技能记录优化意图、适用位置、有效条件、效果及假设失败风险。
AI.result: 在5个专家负载和2种NVIDIA架构上，基于谱系的技能超过近期基于记忆的LLM内核基线，在最终内核质量和优化效率上均更优。
AI.conclusion: 谱系推导的技能可作为有效的优化课程，帮助LLM代理在固定预算下更优地生成GPU内核。

title: Why We Need Speech to Evaluate Speech Translation
summary: Speech translation models are increasingly capable of preserving speech-specific information (e.g., speaker gender, prosody, and emphasis), yet evaluation metrics remain blind to such phenomena. We meta-evaluate both text- and speech-based quality estimation metrics on two contrastive datasets targeting gender agreement and prosody, and find that both fall short, even when given direct access to the speech signal. We then train SpeechCOMET, a family of quality estimation models with speech encoders, and evaluate a state-of-the-art SpeechLLM as a judge. Both match or exceed text-based COMET on standard quality estimation, but neither consistently assesses speech-specific phenomena. We identify three causes: (1) speech-specific features are not reliably preserved in current encoders, (2) models tend to ignore the speech source signal, and (3) quality estimation training data contains too few relevant examples. We release all models and code, and argue that progress requires dedicated speech-specific training data and models that genuinely condition on speech.

AI.tldr: 本文发现当前的语音翻译质量评估指标（无论是基于文本还是语音）都无法有效评估语音中的性别一致性和韵律等语音特殊信息。作者提出SpeechCOMET模型家族和SpeechLLM评估方法，虽在标准评估上表现良好，但仍无法可靠评估语音特殊现象，主要原因包括：编码器不能保留语音特征、模型忽视语音源信号、训练数据缺乏相关样本。
AI.motivation: 现有的语音翻译质量评估指标忽略了语音中特殊的非文本信息（如说话者性别、韵律、强调等），导致评估与实际翻译质量之间存在差距。
AI.method: 在性别一致性和韵律两个对比数据集上对文本和语音质量评估指标进行元评估；训练SpeechCOMET（带语音编码器的质量评估模型）；评估SpeechLLM作为评估者的能力。
AI.result: SpeechCOMET和SpeechLLM在标准质量评估上与文本COMET相当或更优，但都无法一致地评估语音特殊现象。
AI.conclusion: 需要专门的语音特殊训练数据和真正以语音为条件的模型才能取得进展。

title: Machine Learning methods for event classification and vertex reconstruction of the 12C + 12C reaction with the MATE-TPC
summary: In modern nuclear physics experiments, identifying events of interest is challenging for nuclear reaction studies with the active target Time Projection Chamber (TPC). In this work, machine learning techniques are employed to analyze the complex data of the 12C + 12C fusion reaction from a TPC named MATE (multi-purpose active-target time projection chamber for nuclear experiments). Specifically, we successfully applied Residual Neural Network (ResNet-50, ResNet-34 and ResNet-18) and Visual Geometry Group (VGG-19) to classify elastic scattering and fusion reaction events from the 12C + 12C reaction. The classification results of the four models are nearly identical, with accuracies of approximately 97% for the simulated data and 90% for the experimental data. Moreover, these approaches successfully identify some events that are misclassified by traditional methods. These models are also applied to classify events from different fusion reaction channels, with classification accuracies of approximately 95% on simulated data. In addition, a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model is developed to reconstruct the reaction vertex, providing an alternative strategy for vertex reconstruction. These results indicate that machine learning techniques can effectively classify reaction events from different channels and reconstruct the reaction vertex, thereby paving the way for future analyses of complex nuclear reaction data.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ResNet-50/34/18和VGG-19等深度学习模型，对12C+12C核反应中的弹性散射与聚变事件进行分类，在模拟数据上准确率约97%，实验数据上约90%，并能识别传统方法误分类的事件。此外，CNN模型可重建反应顶点，展示了机器学习在核反应数据分析中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 现代核物理实验中，使用活性靶时间投影室（TPC）研究核反应时，识别感兴趣的事件具有挑战性，传统方法难以满足复杂数据的分析需求。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-50、ResNet-34、ResNet-18和VGG-19四种深度学习模型对12C+12C反应中的弹性散射和聚变事件进行分类，并训练CNN模型用于反应顶点重建。
AI.result: 四种模型分类结果相近，模拟数据准确率约97%，实验数据约90%；可用于区分不同聚变反应通道（准确率约95%）；CNN顶点重建模型提供替代策略。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术能有效分类不同核反应通道的事件并重建反应顶点，为未来复杂核反应数据分析开辟了新途径。

title: Explaining is Harder Than Predicting Alone: Evaluating Concept-based Explanations of MLLMs as ICL Visual Classifiers
comment: Accepted to the CompLearn Workshop at ICML 2026
summary:
In-context learning (ICL) enables multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to classify images from a few labelled examples. Yet, how these models use the provided context remains opaque. While Chain-of-Thought prompting is widely used, recent work argues that it may not reflect true internal computation.
  In this paper, we systematically evaluate the concept-based explainability of frozen MLLMs under few-shot ICL using five conditions of increasing formal rigour, ranging from baseline classification to Description Logics (DL) axiom generation.
  Evaluating four state-of-the-art MLLMs via an independent LLM-as-a-judge pipeline, we demonstrate that explaining is genuinely harder than predicting alone. Surprisingly, forcing models to generate formally structured, concept-based explanations degrades predictive accuracy monotonically (from 93.8% to 90.1%), contradicting the assumption that explicit reasoning universally aids performance.
  However, when models successfully articulate class-discriminative visual features, explanation quality strongly correlates with correct predictions. Our findings suggest that while MLLMs excel at visual classification, they lack the specific instruction-tuning required for formal, machine-verifiable explainability.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了冻结多模态大模型在少样本上下文学习下的概念可解释性，发现强制生成形式化、基于概念的解释会单调降低预测准确率（93.8%→90.1%），但当模型成功描述出类别判别性视觉特征时，解释质量与正确预测高度相关。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对多模态大模型如何利用上下文进行分类的内部机制理解不足，且缺乏对从基础分类到严格形式化解释的渐进式评估。
AI.method: 设计了五种严格程度递增的条件（从基线分类到描述逻辑公理生成），使用四种先进多模态大模型，通过独立的LLM-as-a-Judge流水线进行评估。
AI.result: 形式化解释生成会使预测准确率单调下降（93.8%→90.1%）；成功描述类别判别性特征时，解释质量与正确预测强相关。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大模型虽擅长视觉分类，但缺乏用于形式化、机器可验证可解释性所需的特定指令微调。

title: When Seekers Are Hard to Help: Evaluating Emotional Support Dialogue Systems in Worst-Case Interactions
summary: Emotional Support Dialogue Systems (ESDSes) are increasingly evaluated and trained with LLM-simulated seekers. However, such simulated seekers often behave as cooperative, average-case users who disclose clearly, respond constructively, and accept support within a few turns. This can lead to overly optimistic evaluation and obscure whether ESDSes can handle difficult help-seeking interactions. In this work, we study ESDS evaluation under worst-case interactions, where seekers are hard to help due to low engagement, resistance, limited self-disclosure, emotional volatility, or rigid negative interpretations. We first conduct an expert simulation study with eight experienced counselling professionals, who simulate difficult seekers, interact with existing Chinese ESDSes, provide scale ratings, and participate in semi-structured interviews. Based on this study, we derive worst-case seeker behaviours and identify key limitations of current systems. We then propose a worst-case evaluation framework consisting of an LLM-based worst-case seeker simulator and four worst-case-oriented metrics: Deep Emotional Understanding, Guided Exploration, Balanced Emotional Support, and Authentic and Grounded Support. Evaluating 17 systems, we find that nearly all models suffer substantial performance drops under worst-case interactions. Large general-purpose LLMs are generally more robust than specialised ESDSes, but even the strongest models struggle to sustain engagement and improve seekers' emotional states. Finally, we show that worst-case simulation can also generate useful training data, improving the robustness of smaller models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向情感支持对话系统的**最坏情况评估框架**，发现现有系统在困难求助者（低参与、抗拒、情绪波动等）交互下性能大幅下降；同时证明最坏情况模拟数据可用于提升小模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前ESDS评估多依赖LLM模拟的**合作型平均用户**，导致评估结果过于乐观，掩盖了系统在处理真实困难求助（低参与、抗拒、情绪波动等）时的不足。
AI.method: 1) 邀请8位专业咨询师模拟困难求助者与ESDS交互，通过量表评分和半结构化访谈提取最坏情况行为；2) 构建LLM驱动的**最坏情况求助者模拟器**；3) 提出四项最坏情况导向指标：深层情感理解、引导式探索、平衡情感支持、真实接地支持。
AI.result: 对17个系统的评估显示：几乎所有模型在最坏情况下性能大幅下降；通用大模型比专用ESDS更鲁棒，但最强模型也难以维持求助者参与度和改善情绪状态；最坏情况模拟数据能有效提升小模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ESDS需针对最坏情况进行专门评估和训练；最坏情况模拟不仅是评估工具，也可作为训练数据来源，具有双重价值。

title: T-GINEE: A Tensor-Based Multilayer Graph Representation Learning
summary: Traditional network analysis focuses on single-layer networks, real-world systems often form multilayer networks with multiple relationship types. However, existing methods typically fail to capture complex inter-layer dependencies by treating layers independently or aggregating them. To address this, we propose T-GINEE (Tensor-Based Generalized Multilayer-graph Estimating Equation), a statistical regularization framework combining tensor-based generalized estimating equations with task-specific loss to model cross-network correlations explicitly. Key innovations include: (1) CP tensor decomposition capturing structural dependencies via shared latent factors; (2) a generalized estimating equation framework modeling inter-layer correlations through working covariance matrices; and (3) a flexible link function accommodating characteristics like sparsity. Our theoretical analysis establishes consistency and asymptotic normality under mild conditions. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets validate T-GINEE's effectiveness for multilayer network analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出T-GINEE框架，利用张量分解和广义估计方程显式建模多层网络层间依赖关系，理论证明了相合性和渐近正态性，实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将多层网络各层独立处理或简单聚合，无法捕捉复杂的层间依赖关系。
AI.method: (1) CP张量分解捕获结构依赖；(2) 广义估计方程通过工作协方差矩阵建模层间相关；(3) 灵活链接函数适应稀疏性等特征。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了T-GINEE对多层网络分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: T-GINEE通过显式建模层间依赖显著优于现有独立/聚合方法。

title: When Does Memory Help Multi-Trajectory Inference for Tool-Use LLM Agents?
comment: More evaluation and analysis are on the way
summary: Multi-trajectory inference for tool-use LLM agents - generating multiple reasoning attempts and selecting among them - benefits from transferring knowledge across attempts so that later ones avoid the pitfalls of earlier ones. Existing cross-trajectory memory methods (trajectory-level reflection, atomic fact extraction, raw observation injection) are each evaluated under a single inference strategy on a single task, making it unclear whether reported gains reflect properties of the memory abstraction or of the inference method. We propose a unified framework that decomposes memory along two axes -- the scope of transfer (within an expansion vs. across trajectories) and the abstraction of the transferred content -- and evaluate four methods under three inference strategies (best-of-N, beam search, MCTS) on four tool-use benchmarks spanning SQL, knowledge-graph, and CLI environments, in a verifier-free setting that matches the deployment regime of practical agents. The experiment matrix identifies the inference method as a confound: the same memory method produces statistically distinct results under different inference strategies on the same examples. Reflection reaches significance only under MCTS (not under best-of-N); within-expansion injection (conditioning each candidate on prior siblings' outcomes) helps only diversity-starved beam search; and atomic fact extraction is accuracy-neutral but shortens trajectories by 19-26% on tasks with reusable environmental structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的框架，用于分析工具型LLM代理中多轨迹推理的记忆方法，发现在不同推理策略下，相同的记忆方法效果差异显著，反射仅在MCTS下有效，轨迹内注入仅对波束搜索有帮助，原子事实提取可缩短轨迹但对准确率无影响。
AI.motivation: 现有跨轨迹记忆方法各在不同推理策略和任务下独立评估，导致无法判断性能提升是来自记忆方法本身还是推理策略的差异。
AI.method: 提出了一个统一框架，沿两个维度分解记忆：转移范围（轨迹内vs跨轨迹）和内容抽象程度，并在四种工具使用基准上评估四种记忆方法与三种推理策略（Best-of-N、波束搜索、MCTS）的组合。
AI.result: 发现推理策略是混杂变量：相同记忆方法在不同推理策略下结果显著不同。反射仅在MCTS下有效；轨迹内注入仅对波束搜索有帮助；原子事实提取对准确率无影响但可缩短19-26%的轨迹长度。
AI.conclusion: 记忆方法的有效性高度依赖于推理策略的选择，评估时需控制此混杂变量。

title: Building Community-Centred NLP Resources for Puno Quechua
comment: Sixth Workshop on NLP for Indigenous Languages of the Americas (AmericasNLP 2026), co-located with ACL 2026
summary: The preservation of under-resourced languages requires digital tools and resources shaped by and for their speakers. We present the first dedicated ASR resources for Puno Quechua (ISO 639-3: qxp): (1) the largest speech corpus for any single Quechua variety, consisting in 66 hours of recordings for scripted and spontaneous speech (including 36 hours of manually transcribed and validated data), collected via a participatory design campaign; (2) the first systematic ASR benchmark for Puno Quechua, evaluating state-of-the-art models and fine-tuning Whisper-base, wav2vec2-base, and XLS-R-300M, with and without continued pre-training (CPT); (3) an open release of all datasets and fine-tuned models.

AI.tldr: 该论文为Puno Quechua语（濒危语言）构建了首个专用ASR资源：66小时语音语料库（含36小时人工标注数据）及系统基准测试，并开源所有数据集与微调模型。
AI.motivation: 保护资源匮乏的语言需要由使用者驱动的数字工具与资源，目前缺乏针对Puno Quechua语的专用ASR资源。
AI.method: 通过参与式设计活动收集66小时语音数据（含脚本语音和自发音语），其中36小时经人工转写验证；对Whisper-base、wav2vec2-base、XLS-R-300M三个模型进行微调，部分采用持续预训练（CPT）策略。
AI.result: 构建了该语言最大的语音语料库（66小时）及首个系统ASR基准测试，开源了全部数据集和微调模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为Puno Quechua语的数字化保护提供了基础工具，参与式设计方法可推广至其他资源匮乏语言。

title: How Far Can Disaggregation Go? A Design-Space Exploration of Attention-FFN Disaggregation for Efficient MoE LLM Serving
summary: Modern large language model (LLM) inference has progressively disaggregated to keep pace with growing model sizes and tight TTFT and TPOT service-level objectives: from chunked-prefill aggregation, to prefill-decode (P/D) disaggregation, and most recently to operator-level Attention-FFN Disaggregation (AFD). This trend is especially important for mixture-of-experts (MoE) models, where memory-bound attention, compute-intensive expert FFNs, and MoE dispatch/combine communication create distinct resource demands. AFD further exposes this heterogeneity by placing attention and MoE-FFN execution on separate GPU groups. Each level of disaggregation deepens the scheduling design space across workload characteristics, resource allocation, and interconnect topology, raising the central question: when does each level actually pay off? We systematically characterize this trade-off for MoE inference across realistic workloads spanning input/output sequence lengths, prefix-KV reuse, and per-user latency constraints. Using chunked-prefill and P/D disaggregation as baselines, we study the benefits and limits of AFD at scale through a framework that fuses on-device kernel measurements with high-fidelity network simulation. Under strict TTFT/TPOT SLOs, AFD sustains around 4k tokens/s of system throughput on DeepSeek-V3.2 across chat, coding, and agentic-coding workloads, where non-AFD deployments are infeasible. We distill concrete takeaways for jointly optimizing throughput and interactivity, including how to partition attention and FFN across GPUs as a function of workload and model architecture, providing design principles for current rack- and cluster-scale deployments as well as future disaggregated AI infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了MoE大模型推理中从chunked-prefill、P/D分离到操作级Attention-FFN分离（AFD）的多层次解耦调度策略，通过真实负载下的性能表征揭示了各层次解耦在不同场景下的收益与局限，实验表明AFD在严格SLO下可支撑约4k tokens/s的系统吞吐量，并提供了GPU资源分配的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 随着MoE模型规模增长和延迟约束（TTFT/TPOT）日益严格，现有的chunked-prefill和P/D分离已难以平衡Attention（内存密集）、FFN（计算密集）和MoE调度通信的异构资源需求。AFD进一步暴露了这种异构性，但不同解耦层次何时真正有效缺乏系统性理解，亟需一个统一的权衡分析框架。
AI.method: 以chunked-prefill和P/D分离为基线，通过融合设备级内核测量与高保真网络仿真构建评估框架，在多种真实负载（聊天、编码、智能体编码）下系统对比不同解耦层次在序列长度、前缀KV复用、用户延迟约束等维度的性能表现。
AI.result: 在严格TTFT/TPOT SLO下，AFD在DeepSeek-V3.2上可维持约4k tokens/s的系统吞吐量，而非AFD部署在此类约束下不可行。同时给出了Attention与FFN在不同工作负载和模型架构下的最优GPU划分比例。
AI.conclusion: 不同解耦层次各有适用场景，AFD在追求高吞吐与严格交互性时优势显著；提出了面向当前机架级/集群级部署和未来解耦AI基础设施的设计原则，为MoE推理的调度优化提供了可操作的指导。

title: PIRS: Physics-Informed Reward Shaping for SAC-Based Building Energy Management
comment: N pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on AI-Driven Energy Efficiency in Dynamic Systems (AI-DEEDS '26), co-located with ACM e-Energy / ACM Sustainability Week, Banff, AB, Canada, June 22-25, 2026
summary: Occupant comfort and grid-aware energy efficiency are competing objectives whose joint optimization depends critically on how reward functions are specified in deep reinforcement learning (DRL) controllers for buildings. Yet reward design remains largely ad hoc: comfort terms are either hand-tuned heuristics or simple temperature-deviation proxies without explicit grounding in thermal-comfort physics. We present PIRS (Physics-Informed Reward Shaping), which replaces these ad-hoc comfort proxies with the ISO 7730 Predicted Mean Vote (PMV) formulation inside a weighted multi-objective reward for Soft Actor-Critic (SAC). By anchoring the comfort signal in the ISO 7730 PMV formulation, PIRS improves reward interpretability and provides a standards-grounded comfort proxy without changing any other component of the learning pipeline. We evaluate PIRS in CityLearn v2.1.2 (challenge 2022 phase 1) with a central SAC agent trained for 50k steps over five random seeds, and compare against a rule-based controller (RBC), a manually engineered reward (E2), an energy-only reward (E3), and a naive temperature-deviation comfort reward (E4). District-level key performance indicators (KPIs), reported as ratios versus RBC, show that PIRS attains cost, carbon, and electricity metrics on par with the manual baseline while substantially outperforming non-physics-grounded designs -- particularly on load ramping (1.78x vs. ~2.4x RBC) and daily peak demand. All DRL policies remain above RBC at this training budget; we interpret this gap honestly and position PIRS as an interpretable, standards-aligned foundation for reward design rather than a claim of dominance over classical control at limited compute.

AI.tldr: PIRS是一种基于ISO 7730 PMV物理模型的奖励塑形方法，用于深度强化学习建筑控制，在CityLearn模拟中优于非物理基础的奖励设计，但受限于训练预算，性能尚未超越基线规则控制器。
AI.motivation: 建筑DRL控制中，舒适度与电网效率的联合优化依赖奖励函数设计，但现有奖励设计缺乏热舒适物理基础，多为经验调参或简单温度偏差代理。
AI.method: 将ISO 7730 PMV公式嵌入SAC算法的多目标加权奖励中，替代传统的启发式舒适度代理项，构建物理信息奖励塑形方法PIRS。
AI.result: 在CityLearn v2.1.2模拟中，PIRS在成本、碳排放和电力指标上与人工基线持平，在负载波动和峰值需求上显著优于非物理奖励设计（负载波动1.78x vs ~2.4x RBC），但所有DRL策略尚未超越RBC。
AI.conclusion: PIRS提供了一种可解释、符合标准的奖励设计基础，但受限于有限计算预算，不声称优于经典控制方法。

title: PrunePath: Towards Highly Structured Sparse Language Models
summary: Feed-forward networks (FFNs) dominate the parameter count and computation of modern language models, yet existing pruning methods often struggle to convert sparsity into hardware-friendly inference efficiency gains. We introduce \textbf{PrunePath}, a budget-adaptive structured sparsification framework for FFN layers. Built on MoEfication, PrunePath replaces independent expert-wise thresholding with a softmax-normalized routing distribution and activates important experts under a cumulative-mass threshold. This formulation imposes a token-level probability budget, enabling adaptive expert counts and a direct inference-time sparsity knob from a single checkpoint. Across NLU, NLG, and instruction-tuning evaluations, PrunePath achieves a favorable sparsity--performance trade-off compared with existing static pruning and MoEfication-based methods. We further implement Triton kernels for KV-cache decoding to translate the resulting structured sparsity into practical memory savings and measurable decoding-speed improvements. These results demonstrate the superior performance of PrunePath for building highly sparse, deployment-friendly large language models.

AI.tldr: PrunePath是一种基于MoEfication的预算自适应结构化稀疏框架，通过softmax归一化路由分布和累积质量阈值实现FFN层的自适应专家激活，在保持性能的同时提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法难以将FFN层的稀疏性转化为硬件友好的推理效率增益，亟需一种能自适应预算、直接控制推理时稀疏度的方法。
AI.method: 基于MoEfication，用softmax归一化路由分布替代独立专家阈值，结合累积质量阈值实现token级概率预算，支持自适应专家数量和单检查点推理稀疏度调节。
AI.result: 在NLU、NLG和指令微调评估中，相比静态剪枝和MoEfication方法取得更优的稀疏-性能权衡；Triton内核实现KV-cache解码的结构化稀疏，带来实际内存节省和可测量的解码速度提升。
AI.conclusion: PrunePath能有效构建高稀疏度、部署友好的大型语言模型，优于现有方法。

title: Compositional Generalization in Autoregressive Models via Logit Composition
summary: Composing autoregressive models remains a core challenge in understanding how large language models can combine behaviors or skills learned across tasks. We introduce a new and principled composition strategy for autoregressive systems, inspired by composition methods developed for diffusion models. Under a factorized-conditionals assumption, we show that the resulting composition is projective: each component model preserves control over its own designated subspace of the output distribution avoiding interference between models. This property is further preserved under smooth reparameterizations of the output space, yielding a feature-space theorem. Finally, we show that composition preserves length-generalizing behavior when the factorization assumptions and component guarantees hold uniformly at the target length. These results provide a principled understanding of when model composition and merging succeed in autoregressive systems and identify conditions under which their interactions remain stable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自回归模型组合策略，受扩散模型组合方法启发，在因子化条件假设下实现投影式组合，保证各组件模型对其指定输出子空间的控制权，避免干扰，并在光滑重参数化和长度泛化下保持性质。
AI.motivation: 自回归模型的组合（如技能合并、行为组合）是理解大语言模型跨任务能力的关键挑战，现有方法缺乏原则性的理解，尤其是组合后模型间干扰和稳定性问题尚未解决。
AI.method: 借鉴扩散模型的组合方法，提出因子化条件假设下的投影式组合策略，证明每个组件模型在其指定的输出子空间上保持控制权（投影性质），并证明该性质在输出空间的光滑重参数化下不变，在长度泛化条件下仍成立。
AI.result: 证明了组合具有投影性质（组件互不干扰）、在光滑重参数化下保持特征空间性质、在因子化假设和组件保证均匀成立时保持长度泛化行为。
AI.conclusion: 为自回归系统中模型组合与合并的成功条件提供了原则性理解，识别了组合保持稳定的条件。

title: AI, Take the Wheel: What Drives Delegation and Trust in Human-Computer Cooperative Question Answering?
comment: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics, 2026
summary: AI systems are fallible, and humans can make mistakes in deciding whether to trust AI over their own judgment. Thus, improving human-AI collaboration requires understanding when, why, and how humans decide to rely on AI. We study two distinct reliance decisions: the delegation choice -- deciding when to let AI act autonomously without knowing its output, and the adoption choice -- evaluating AI suggestions and deciding how to use them. Both of these decoupled reliance patterns shape collaboration, but prior work rarely studies them together in realistic settings with the same users. We address this gap by studying collaborative human--AI teams competing in a question-answering game in which humans can choose when and how to work with AI agents to win. Our 24 matches pair 23 expert humans with 16 AI agents, capturing 387 delegation and 1440 adoption decisions. While human--AI collaboration performs better than either AI or humans alone, humans make suboptimal collaboration decisions, both under-relying on correct AI suggestions (3.9% of opportunities missed) and over-relying when AI misleads them (1.7%). Both parties contribute wrong answers: reported model confidence is near chance when humans and AI disagree, while confirmation bias drives higher under-reliance (64.5%) when an AI suggestion agrees with humans' initial incorrect answer. To close this gap, we recommend calibrated confidence, evidence-grounded explanations, and mechanisms that help users refine trust.

AI.tldr: 本文通过问答游戏实验，研究了人-AI协作中两种信任决策（委托与采纳），发现人类在协作中既会错过正确AI建议（3.9%），也会被AI误导（1.7%），建议通过校准置信度、基于证据的解释和信任细化机制来改善协作。
AI.motivation: 现有研究很少在真实场景中同时研究人-AI协作中"委托选择"（何时让AI自主行动）和"采纳选择"（如何评价和使用AI建议）这两种信任决策模式。
AI.method: 通过问答游戏实验，23位专家与16个AI代理进行24场比赛，捕获387个委托决策和1440个采纳决策，分析人类对AI的信任行为。
AI.result: 人-AI协作优于单独AI或人类，但人类做出次优决策：错过3.9%的正确AI建议（欠依赖），1.7%被AI误导（过度依赖）；当AI与人类初始错误一致时，确认偏差导致欠依赖率达64.5%。
AI.conclusion: 建议通过校准的置信度、基于证据的解释和帮助用户细化信任的机制来改善人-AI协作。

title: CIRF: Tokenizing Chain-of-Thoughts into Reusable Functional Units for Efficient Latent Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Implicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reduces the inference cost of large language models by internalizing the explicit rationales. However, existing approaches typically lack alignment with explicit rationales and adaptivity to example complexity. In this work, we propose CIRF (\textit{\underline{C}hain-of-thoughts \underline{I}nto \underline{R}eusable \underline{F}unctional units}), an implicit CoT framework that performs reasoning as a dynamic sequence of discrete functional tokens. CIRF assigns a functional token to each semantically coherent reasoning unit in explicit CoT traces. The model is then fine-tuned to autoregressively generate functional tokens and their optional results, followed by the final answer. This design aligns latent reasoning with a sequence of functional units, facilitating parallel training, explicit rationale alignment, and adaptive reasoning. Extensive experiments on mathematical, symbolic, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks show that CIRF provides a favorable accuracy-latency trade-off compared with state-of-the-art implicit CoT methods. Further analyses demonstrate that CIRF constructs distinct, interpretable functional tokens, leading to consistent performance improvements.

AI.tldr: CIRF将显式思维链分解为可重用的功能单元，通过离散功能令牌实现隐式推理，在准确率-延迟权衡上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式CoT方法缺乏与显式推理过程的对齐，且不能根据问题复杂度自适应调整推理深度。
AI.method: 将显式CoT轨迹按语义连贯的推理单元划分为功能令牌，微调模型自回归生成功能令牌及其可选结果，最终输出答案。
AI.result: 在数学、符号和常识推理基准上，CIRF在准确率-延迟权衡上优于SOTA隐式CoT方法，且生成了可解释的、一致的功能令牌。
AI.conclusion: 将隐式推理分解为离散功能单元的设计能同时实现并行训练、显式对齐和自适应推理，是一种有效的隐式CoT范式。

title: Learning to Assess the Reliability of Number-of-Runs Estimation in Stochastic Optimization
comment: Preprint version of a poster accepted at the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference 2026 (GECCO 2026)
summary: In large-scale benchmarking of stochastic optimization algorithms, the key challenge is no longer whether repeated runs are needed for reliability, but how to determine when sufficient evidence has been collected without incurring unnecessary computational cost. We study a learning-based extension of a recent empirical online heuristic that adaptively estimates the required number of runs using outlier handling and skewness-based symmetry checks. Using annotated outcomes from 132{,}000 Nevergrad runs on COCO (24 problems in 20 dimensions, 10 instances each, 11 optimizers), we train classifiers on 23 statistical, energy-free, and shape and stability features to predict whether a run-number estimate is reliable, prioritizing detection of incorrect estimates via minority-class recall. We evaluate reliability prediction using a within-configuration learning setup, where models are trained and tested on data sharing the same optimizer. The results show that run-number reliability can be learned in a within-configuration scenario, enabling detection of unreliable estimates with high minority-class recall, although performance remains limited by the restricted data diversity within fixed configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的自适应方法，利用统计特征和分类器预测随机优化算法基准测试中所需运行次数的可靠性，并在Nevergrad/COCO数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在大规模随机优化算法基准测试中，核心挑战已从是否需要重复运行转向如何在保证统计可靠性的同时避免不必要的计算开销。现有启发式方法仍存在不足，需要更智能的可靠性预测机制。
AI.method: 扩展了现有的在线启发式方法，结合异常值处理和偏度对称性检查来自适应估计运行次数。从132,000次Nevergrad运行中提取23个统计、能量无关及形状稳定性特征，训练分类器预测运行次数估计是否可靠，重点关注少数类（不可靠估计）的召回率。
AI.result: 在相同优化器配置的数据上训练和测试时，模型能够有效检测不可靠的运行次数估计，少数类召回率较高；但由于固定配置内数据多样性有限，整体性能受到限制。
AI.conclusion: 运行次数可靠性可以在相同配置内通过学习来预测，但数据多样性不足是主要局限，未来需探索跨配置的泛化能力。

title: Entropy Distribution as a Fingerprint for Hallucinations in Generative Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often generate factually incorrect outputs, commonly termed hallucinations, that undermine trust and limit deployment in high-stakes settings. Existing hallucination detection methods typically require multiple forward passes, or access to model internals. In this work, we provide theoretical background and empirical evidence that the distribution of token-level entropies, beyond the mean captured by perplexity or length-normalised entropy, serves as a fingerprint of hallucination, with distributional shape and tail behaviour carrying independent signal. We formalize hallucination detection as a statistical hypothesis test and propose the Calibrated Entropy Score (CES), a lightweight algorithm requiring only a single forward pass and black-box access to token logits. CES combines the mean signal with the maximum signal of the generated entropy through a calibrated reference CDF, producing scores that are directly comparable across models and tasks. We establish finite-sample calibration guarantees via a novel random-length Dvoretzky--Kiefer--Wolfowitz inequality, and also prove that CES detects hallucinations with probability converging to one exponentially fast in the generation length. Across eight QA benchmarks and ten generator models spanning open-source and API access models, CES achieves the highest detection performance among all single-pass black-box methods while providing formal error guarantees that existing heuristics lack. Remarkably, CES is statistically indistinguishable from multi-sample methods that require far greater computational cost, closing the gap between lightweight and expensive detection and making it suitable for real-time, large-scale deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Calibrated Entropy Score (CES)，通过分析token级熵的分布（而非仅均值）来检测LLM的幻觉，仅需单次前向传播和黑盒访问logits，在性能上接近多采样方法，并提供统计保证。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法要么需要多次前向传播（计算成本高），要么需要访问模型内部状态，缺乏轻量、单次且具有理论保证的方法。
AI.method: 将幻觉检测形式化为统计假设检验，提出CES算法：结合生成熵的均值信号和最大信号，通过校准参考CDF生成可跨模型/任务比较的分数。理论贡献包括随机长度的DKW不等式和指数级收敛的检测保证。
AI.result: 在8个QA基准和10个生成器模型上，CES在所有单次黑盒方法中取得最佳检测性能，且统计上与多采样方法无显著差异，同时提供形式化的错误保证。
AI.conclusion: CES弥合了轻量检测与昂贵检测之间的差距，适合实时大规模部署，并为幻觉检测提供了首个严谨的统计基础。

title: Revisiting Anthropomorphic Reflection Markers in Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often produce explicit reflective traces during complex reasoning, accompanied by anthropomorphic markers such as wait, hmm, and alternatively. Although these markers are commonly used as visible indicators of reflection, their mechanisms remain unclear, which leaves the risk of overthinking associated with redundant and repetitive reflection markers. In this work, we revisit anthropomorphic reflection markers, examining their necessity for reasoning and role in the reflection. We suppress these markers through prompt-level and token-level interventions, and analyze their effects on task performance across four benchmarks and two model scales. Our results show that anthropomorphic markers are not uniformly necessary for reasoning performance: suppressing them can preserve or improve performance in several settings, especially under larger sampling budgets. Meanwhile, marker suppression does not necessarily remove reflection behavior, as models can still perform marker-free verification. These suggest that anthropomorphic markers tend to be surface cues rather than reliable proxies for reflection itself, and motivate future research on reasoning mechanisms beyond explicit marker patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM推理过程中出现的人类化反思标记（如"wait"、"hmm"等），发现这些标记并非推理所必需，抑制它们可在某些场景下保持或提升性能，且模型仍能进行无标记的验证行为，表明这些标记只是表面线索而非可靠的反思代理。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在复杂推理中常产生显式的反思轨迹并伴有人类化标记，但这些标记的机制尚不明确，且存在冗余重复标记导致的"过度思考"风险，因此需要重新审视这些标记在推理中的必要性和作用。
AI.method: 通过prompt层面和token层面的干预来抑制人类化反思标记，并在四个基准测试和两种模型规模上分析其对任务性能的影响。
AI.result: 人类化标记并非普遍必要的：抑制它们可以在多种设置下保持或提升性能，尤其是在更大的采样预算下；标记抑制并不一定消除反思行为，模型仍能进行无标记的验证。
AI.conclusion: 人类化反思标记更倾向于表面线索而非反思本身的可靠代理，这启发未来应超越显式标记模式来研究推理机制。

title: Hybrid Neural World Models
summary: Neural surrogates promise large speedups over classical solvers for physical dynamics but fail silently at sharp dynamical events such as shocks, fronts, and contact. We present hybrid neural world models for physical dynamics: a recipe for training and deploying multi-horizon surrogates in physical state space, where a single network with continuous horizon conditioning is trained with direct supervision against textbook reference solvers to predict any future state at horizon T in one forward pass.
