On MATH-500 we show this signal is (i) sharply coverage-dependent, that is the proof-winning answer is correct 96% of the time at high proved coverage but 20% at low, and (ii) sparse and often unfaithful: a 7B autoformalizer proves a class for only 28% of problems, and a manual audit finds only approximately 43% of those proofs faithful. We propose COVCAL, a selector over Lean-trace diagnostics that certifies a finite-sample selective-risk bound on accepted answers or abstains, under two regimes (a conservative Bonferroni bound and a tighter dev-then-cal rule). Feasibility depends on autoformalization coverage: with the 7B formalizer the signal is too sparse and Bonferroni abstains on all 20 bootstrap partitions, whereas a prover-specialized formalizer reaches 79% coverage and flips it to feasible on 17 of 20, accepting approximately 48% of problems at 0.98 accepted accuracy. Since self-consistency alone is already 91% accurate, our contribution is a precise account of when, and with which formalizer, a partial formal signal can be trusted under risk control.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Lean对自然语言数学答案的形式化验证信号的质量，发现该信号存在覆盖率依赖性强、稀疏且不可靠的问题。提出COVCAL方法，通过选择性风险控制框架在有限样本下保证接受答案的准确率边界，但可行性高度依赖形式化器的覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 现有工作使用Lean来评判自然语言数学答案的正确性，但Lean的形式化验证信号存在偏差：许多答案无法形式化，且证明失败可能是由类型错误或库缺失导致，而非答案本身错误。作者希望系统性地分析该信号的质量，并提出一种可控的风险保证方法。
AI.method: 提出COVCAL框架，基于Lean追踪诊断信息构建选择器，在两种机制下（保守的Bonferroni边界和更严格的发展-校准规则）对接受答案的有限样本选择性风险进行边界约束，否则拒绝回答。
AI.result: 在MATH-500上：(i) 证明获胜的答案在高证明覆盖率下96%正确，低覆盖率下仅20%；(ii) 7B自动形式化器仅能证明28%的问题，其中仅约43%的证明忠实。使用7B形式化器时Bonferroni拒绝所有20个分区，而专用证明形式化器达到79%覆盖率，在20个分区中的17个可行，以98%接受准确率接受了约48%的问题。
AI.conclusion: 形式化信号的质量和可用性高度依赖于形式化器的覆盖率。自我一致性基线已达91%准确率，本文贡献在于精确刻画了何时以及在何种形式化器下，部分形式化信号可在风险控制下被信任。

title: Comonadic Morphophonology: A Compositional Framework for Context-Dependent Morphological Rules in Finnish
comment: 13 pages. Accepted at the Society for Computation in Linguistics (SCiL) 2026
summary: Composing finite-state transducers (FSTs) for context-dependent morphophonological rules -- consonant gradation, vowel harmony, possessive suffix assimilation -- leads to multiplicative state explosion; neural models sidestep the problem but provide no formal account of the rules themselves. We present the first framework where each morphophonological rule is a function from a focused local context to a single output segment -- the type of a local rule familiar from cellular automata -- and where length-changing rules compose as coKleisli arrows of a comonad. Our central contribution is the Writer comonad (DeletionSet x Zipper), a new algebraic construction that restores strict coKleisli compositionality for such rules: each rule is a coKleisli arrow, extend lifts it to a global transformation, and deletions accumulate as a monoid action rather than requiring intermediate materialization. As supporting evidence, thirteen coKleisli arrows provide an alternative formulation expressing the same morphophonological behaviors that Omorfi encodes via 874 continuation classes (67:1 reduction at the rule-representation level), and the same abstraction enables bidirectional morphology -- a MorphGenerator reuses the analysis arrows for generation. On UD Finnish-TDT, the system achieves 83.92% UPOS accuracy with rule-only disambiguation (94.66% with an external suffix tagger), validating the framework as a practical morphological engine.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于Writer comonad (DeletionSet x Zipper)的形态音位规则组合框架，将每条规则建模为coKleisli箭头，实现严格的可组合性，在芬兰语上以13条规则替代Omorfi的874个延续类，达到83.92%的UPOS准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统有限状态转录机（FST）在处理上下文相关的形态音位规则（如辅音渐变、元音和谐、所有格后缀同化）时存在状态爆炸问题；神经模型虽能规避此问题但无法提供规则的形式化解释。现有方法缺乏既能保持规则形式化又能高效组合的框架。
AI.method: 提出Writer comonad (DeletionSet x Zipper)这一新的代数结构，将每条形态音位规则定义为从局部上下文的焦点位置到单个输出片段的函数（类似元胞自动机的局部规则），长度变化规则以comonad的coKleisli箭头形式组合，删除操作以幺半群动作累积而非即时物化。
AI.result: 13条coKleisli箭头替代了Omorfi的874个延续类（规则表示层面67:1的压缩比）；在UD Finnish-TDT上，仅用规则消歧达到83.92% UPOS准确率，结合外部后缀标注器达到94.66%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为形态音位规则提供了严格的组合语义，支持双向形态分析（分析箭头可直接复用于生成），验证了其作为实用形态分析引擎的有效性。

title: Fitting Unknown Number of Hyperplanes with Manifold Optimization
summary: Fitting an unknown number of hyperplanes to data is a fundamental yet challenging problem in machine learning, characterized by its non-convexity, non-differentiability, and unknown model order. Existing approaches often struggle with local optima or lack geometric consistency. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework based on Manifold Optimization. We reformulate the problem as an unsupervised learning task on the unit sphere manifold $\mathcal{S}^{\textbf{dim}-1}$. This formulation effectively handles the non-convex constraints and linearizes the distance measurement, rendering the gradient descent tractable. We propose a Two-Stage Manifold Optimization algorithm. In Phase I, we employ a Riemannian Expectation-Maximization process with a heavy-tailed kernel to robustly estimate posterior probabilities, effectively resolving the ambiguities of point distribution between intersecting hyperplanes. In Phase II, upon convergence of the soft estimates, the probabilistic weights degenerate into hard matching, generating a precise local optimum that strictly satisfies the geometric definition. Furthermore, we introduce a projected density estimation strategy for initialization to facilitate global convergence by significantly reducing the feature description space and search complexity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both geometric accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于流形优化的两阶段算法，用于解决未知数量超平面拟合问题。第一阶段通过黎曼期望最大化与重尾核鲁棒估计后验概率，第二阶段使概率权重退化为硬匹配以得到精确几何解。结合投影密度估计初始化，在几何精度和鲁棒性上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 超平面拟合面临非凸、非可微及模型阶数未知等挑战，现有方法常陷入局部最优或缺乏几何一致性。本文旨在通过流形优化框架同时解决上述问题。
AI.method: 将问题重构为单位球面流形上的无监督学习任务，提出两阶段流形优化算法：Phase I使用黎曼EM算法与重尾核鲁棒估计后验概率；Phase II将概率权重退化为硬匹配以获得严格几何定义下的精确局部最优解。初始化采用投影密度估计策略降低搜索复杂度。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在几何精度和鲁棒性方面均优于现有最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的流形优化框架有效解决了超平面拟合中的局部最优和几何一致性问题，为无监督结构化模型拟合提供了新思路。

title: CyberJurors: A Multi-Agent Simulation Task for E-Commerce Disputes Verdict
summary: E-commerce platforms have begun recruiting crowdsourced jurors to adjudicate massive volumes of transaction disputes. Unlike formal legal judgment, E-commerce dispute verdicts require grounding pivotal clues from redundant, multi-round, multimodal evidence and making decisions under flexible platform-specific conventions. These characteristics render existing methods insufficient for this scenario. To bridge this gap, we introduce a pioneering task, E-commerce Dispute Verdicts (EDV), and present VerdictBench, a multimodal benchmark comprising 6,000 real-world cases designed to reflect crowdsourced jury decisions. Building upon this, we propose CyberJurors, a multi-agent framework to clarify the dispute logic and regulate the verdict process. At the individual level, Individual Verdict Chain-of-Thought decomposes the EDV task into four structured reasoning stages, enabling fine-grained clue perception and clarifying causal logic between pivotal clues and the dispute focus. At the collective level, Jury Consensus Verdict simulates multi-round discussion and voting among jurors, while incorporating verdict precedents to mitigate cognitive biases toward either disputant. Experiments on VerdictBench show that CyberJurors outperforms state-of-the-art LLMs, MLLMs, and court simulators, while achieving stronger alignment with real-world jury voting patterns. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/YanhuiS/CyberJurors and https://huggingface.co/datasets/piggi/VerdictBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了电商纠纷裁决任务（EDV）及包含6000个真实案例的多模态基准VerdictBench，并设计了多智能体框架CyberJurors，通过个体链式推理和集体陪审团共识机制实现优于现有模型的裁决性能。
AI.motivation: 电商平台需要招募众包陪审员处理海量交易纠纷，但现有方法无法应对多轮多模态证据推理和平台灵活规则的特殊性，亟需专用解决方案。
AI.method: 提出CyberJurors多智能体框架：个体层面采用个体裁决链式推理（Individual Verdict Chain-of-Thought），将任务分解为四个结构化推理阶段；集体层面采用陪审团共识裁决（Jury Consensus Verdict），模拟多轮讨论投票并引入判例减少认知偏差。
AI.result: 在VerdictBench上，CyberJurors优于现有LLM、MLLM及法庭模拟器，并与真实陪审团投票模式实现更强对齐。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为电商纠纷裁决这一新任务提供了基准数据集和有效的方法框架，推动了AI在众包司法裁决领域的应用。

title: A new semantically annotated corpus with syntactic-semantic and cross-lingual senses
summary: We describe a new sense-tagged corpus for word sense disambiguation. The corpus is constituted of instances of 20 French polysemous verbs. Each verb instance is annotated with three sense labels: (1) the actual translation of the verb in the english version of this instance in a parallel corpus, (2) an entry of the verb in a computational dictionary of French (the Lexicon-Grammar tables) and (3) a fine-grained sense label resulting from the concatenation of the translation and the Lexicon-Grammar entry.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于词义消歧的法语多义动词标注语料库，包含20个动词，每个实例使用三种标签：英文翻译、词典条目及两者的组合标签。
AI.motivation: 现有词义消歧资源多针对英语，缺乏法语多义动词的高质量标注语料库，尤其是结合翻译和语法信息的细粒度标注。
AI.method: 从平行语料中提取法语多义动词实例，对每个实例标注三类标签：对应英文翻译、法语计算词典（Lexicon-Grammar）中的条目、以及翻译与词典条目的组合作为细粒度标签。
AI.result: 构建了一个包含20个法语多义动词、每个实例带有三层标注的新语料库。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库为法语词义消歧研究提供了新的资源，尤其结合了翻译和词典信息的细粒度标注有助于提升消歧效果。

title: Universal Time Series Generation with Neural Controlled Differential Equations
summary: Recent work on the sequence universality of State Space Models (SSMs) has introduced efficient, maximally expressive continuous-time approaches for time-series modelling. While these works focus on discriminative settings, we extend this perspective to generative time-series modelling by proving that maximally expressive Structured Linear Controlled Differential Equations (SLiCEs) are universal time-series generators, in the sense that they can approximate the induced path laws of continuous causal pushforwards on compact latent sets in $W_\infty$. Building on these theoretical results, we propose Generative SLiCEs (G-SLiCEs), a maximally expressive continuous-time model for flow matching on path-space. Empirically, we show that expressivity improves performance in probabilistic forecasting and downstream tasks, while retaining the advantages of continuous-time models such as generalising to arbitrary observation grids. This is particularly beneficial for irregular grids, where fixed-grid models often struggle.

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上证明了结构化线性控制微分方程（SLiCEs）是通用时间序列生成器，并提出了生成式SLiCEs（G-SLiCEs）——一种用于路径空间流匹配的最大表达力连续时间模型。实验表明，该模型在概率预测和下流任务中表现优异，尤其在处理不规则观测网格时具有优势。
AI.motivation: 现有工作证明了状态空间模型（SSMs）在时间序列判别任务中的序列通用性，但将其扩展到生成式时间序列建模的理论基础尚不充分。作者希望填补这一空白，从理论上证明结构化线性控制微分方程（SLiCEs）是通用的时间序列生成器。
AI.method: 首先从理论上证明最大表达力的SLiCEs可以逼近紧致潜在集上连续因果推前映射的诱导路径律（在$W_\infty$空间中）。基于该理论，提出Generative SLiCEs（G-SLiCEs），一种用于路径空间流匹配（flow matching）的最大表达力连续时间生成模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，更高的表达力能够提升概率预测和下流任务的性能；同时保留了连续时间模型的优势，如能够泛化到任意观测网格，特别是在固定网格模型难以处理的不规则网格上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为生成式时间序列建模提供了理论基础，证明了SLiCEs的通用生成能力，并通过G-SLiCEs模型在实际任务中验证了表达力提升带来的性能增益，尤其在不规则时间网格场景下具有显著优势。

title: From paper to benchmark: agentic, framework-based reproduction of under-specified methods in machine health intelligence
summary: Industrial Prognostics and Health Management (PHM) provides a representative case study for a broader challenge in applied machine learning: translating published papers into executable, benchmark-ready implementations. Reproducing under-specified methods in PHM is particularly difficult due to restricted access to industrial datasets, incomplete reporting of preprocessing and evaluation protocols, and implicit design choices (e.g., windowing, target construction, data splits) that critically affect performance. Existing paper-to-code systems generate implementations for individual papers, but these artifacts are often not directly comparable due to inconsistencies in assumptions and evaluation settings. We introduce \emph{agentic, framework-based PHM paper reproduction}, where an agent translates a paper into a shared PHM benchmark framework via a \emph{slot-binding interface}. This interface maps equations and protocol descriptions into structured components (task definitions, dataset adapters, windowing, targets, models, and evaluators), while explicitly recording unresolved assumptions. The resulting implementations are validated against standardized task contracts and evaluation hooks, enabling consistent and comparable benchmarking. We evaluate this approach on 16 PHM papers, comparing framework-enhanced, skill-based and prompt-based agentic reproduction against a recent framework-free paper-reproduction agent. We assess reproduction success, model-based code evaluation, framework binding of paper assumptions, and cross-paper benchmark comparability under standardized protocols. Our results show that coupling agentic generation with a shared framework transforms paper reproduction from isolated code synthesis into executable, assumption-aware, and systematically comparable benchmark implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能体与共享框架的PHM论文复现方法，通过槽位绑定接口将论文映射到标准化基准框架组件，实现可执行、可比较的论文复现与基准测试。
AI.motivation: PHM领域存在数据受限、预处理和评估协议不完整、隐式设计选择等问题，导致论文方法难以复现且不同复现实现之间难以直接比较。
AI.method: 提出基于智能体的框架式论文复现方法，通过槽位绑定接口将论文中的方程和协议描述映射为结构化组件（任务定义、数据集适配器、窗口化、目标构建、模型、评估器），并显式记录未解决的假设。复现结果通过标准化任务契约和评估钩子进行验证。
AI.result: 在16篇PHM论文上评估，比较了框架增强型、技能型、提示型智能体复现与无框架的复现智能体，评估了复现成功率、基于模型的代码评估、框架绑定效果以及跨论文基准可比性。
AI.conclusion: 将智能体生成与共享框架相结合，能够将论文复现从孤立的代码合成转变为可执行、假设感知、系统可比较的基准实现。

title: Functional Entropy: Predicting Functional Correctness in LLM-Generated Code with Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Large language models have shown impressive capabilities in code generation, yet they often produce functionally incorrect code. Uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods have emerged as a promising approach for detecting hallucinations in natural language generation, but their effectiveness for code generation tasks remains underexplored. We systematically evaluate how UQ techniques transfer to code generation across three programming languages, five LLMs, and over 1,700 problems. We find that some token-probability-based methods generalize effectively without modification, while sampling-based methods relying on natural language inference (NLI) fail because NLI models cannot distinguish functionally different code, causing most responses to collapse into a single semantic cluster. To address this, we introduce functional equivalence methods, a family of code-specific methods that replace NLI-based semantic equivalence with an LLM-based functional equivalence assessment, including functional entropy, a code-specific analog of semantic entropy. Functional equivalence methods achieve top AUROC in 11 out of 15 model-benchmark combinations and the best calibration across most settings, consistently outperforming both NLI-based counterparts and all other methods evaluated.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了不确定性量化方法在代码生成任务中的迁移效果，发现基于NLI的采样方法因无法区分功能不同的代码而失败，并提出基于功能等价性的代码专用UQ方法（如功能熵），在多数设置中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在代码生成方面能力强大，但常生成功能不正确的代码。不确定性量化方法在自然语言生成中已用于检测幻觉，但其在代码生成任务中的有效性尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 在三种编程语言、五个LLM和超过1700个问题上系统评估UQ技术的迁移效果；发现基于NLI的采样方法失败后，提出功能等价性方法家族，用基于LLM的功能等价性评估替代NLI语义等价性，包括功能熵这一代码专用的语义熵类比方法。
AI.result: 功能等价性方法在15个模型-基准组合中的11个取得最佳AUROC，并在大多数设置中实现最佳校准，一致优于基于NLI的对应方法及其他所有评估方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于token概率的方法可有效迁移到代码生成，而基于NLI的采样方法因无法区分代码功能差异而失效；代码专用的功能等价性UQ方法能显著提升不确定性量化效果。

title: Learning Theory of the SVRG: Generalization and Convergence Analysis
summary: Variance reduction (VR) methods employ stochastic gradients with decreasing variance, and they have been widely applied to solve large-scale optimization problems in machine learning because of their efficiency. Existing theoretical studies of VR methods are mainly focused on the convergence analysis, leaving the generalization behavior largely unexplored. In this paper, we bridge this gap by developing the first non-vacuous generalization analysis of the representative VR method: Stochastic Variance Reduced Gradient (SVRG), through the lens of algorithmic stability. In particular, we establish sharp stability bounds of the SVRG in both convex and strongly convex settings by exploiting its algorithmic structure. The obtained bounds are data-dependent, because the training errors are incorporated along the trajectory. Our analysis clarifies the interplay between optimization and generalization, leading to optimal excess population risk bounds in both settings. Our approach differs substantially from existing analyses of stochastic algorithms in the sense that we decompose the SVRG update as an SGD-like step plus a zero-mean correction term and then introduce novel Lyapunov functions to absorb the additional gradient terms induced by the reference points. Our analytical framework can be generalized to other VR methods, and we demonstrate the generalization by the well-known Stochastic Average Gradient Accelerated (SAGA) method.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过算法稳定性分析，为非凸设定下的方差缩减方法SVRG建立了非平凡的泛化界，在凸和强凸情形下得到了尖锐的稳定性界，并推导出了最优的总体风险界。论文还通过SAGA方法展示了分析框架的通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有方差缩减方法的研究主要集中在收敛性分析上，而其泛化行为尚未得到充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将SVRG更新分解为类似SGD的步骤加上一个零均值校正项，并引入新的Lyapunov函数来吸收参考点引起的额外梯度项，从而建立基于算法稳定性的泛化分析。
AI.result: 在凸和强凸两种设定下，获得了尖锐的、数据依赖的稳定性界；推导出了最优的过量总体风险界；该分析框架可推广到其他VR方法（如SAGA）。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了优化与泛化之间的相互作用，为方差缩减方法的泛化行为提供了理论保证，并为后续研究提供了可推广的分析框架。

title: Mechanistically Interpreting the Role of Sample Difficulty in RLVR for LLMs
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) is empirically shown to notably enhance the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs), particularly in mathematics and programming. However, the mechanistic role of Sample Difficulty in RLVR remains poorly understood. In this paper, we investigate RLVR through the lens of difficulty-wise and one-sample analysis. We find that sample difficulty has a non-monotonic effect on RLVR: easy and medium-difficulty problems yield the strongest and most stable reasoning improvements, whereas overly hard problems often provide weak learning signals, induce degenerate behaviors such as answer repetition or skipping necessary computation, and can ultimately degrade the model's pre-existing capabilities. Beyond the obverse of response, we further analyze the model's internal feature dynamics using Temporal Sparse Autoencoders (T-SAE). Easy problems mainly reinforce direct-answer and basic-computation features while suppressing deliberative-reasoning features; hard problems activate reasoning-related features but become useful only when successful trajectories are sampled; medium-difficulty problems provide a more balanced signal, strengthening both computation and multi-step reasoning features. Motivated by these findings, we propose difficulty-adaptive strategies for hard-sample utilization, using backward-reasoning reformulation and T-SAE-guided training signals to improve reward density and credit assignment during RLVR. Overall, our results identify sample difficulty as a key factor governing both the optimization dynamics and representation evolution of RLVR.

AI.tldr: 本文通过难度分析和单样本分析，发现样本难度对RLVR有非单调影响：中低难度问题带来最强的推理提升，而过难问题会导致退化行为。基于此，提出了难度自适应策略（反向推理重构和T-SAE引导）来改进RLVR训练。
AI.motivation: RLVR已被证明能显著提升LLM的推理能力，但样本难度在其中的机制作用尚未被理解。
AI.method: 1) 难度维度和单样本分析RLVR效果；2) 使用Temporal Sparse Autoencoders（T-SAE）分析模型内部特征动态；3) 提出难度自适应策略（反向推理重构 + T-SAE引导训练信号）。
AI.result: 1) 样本难度对RLVR有非单调影响，中低难度效果最好，过难问题会导致答案重复、跳过必要计算等退化行为；2) T-SAE分析揭示不同难度样本对推理特征的不同影响；3) 提出的难度自适应策略可改善奖励密度和信用分配。
AI.conclusion: 样本难度是控制RLVR优化动态和表征演化的关键因素，为提升RLVR训练效果提供了新视角和方法。

title: On Compositional Learning Behaviours in Formal Mathematics
summary: Self-evolving scientific agents capable of conquering the hard tail of formal mathematics require Compositional Learning Behaviours (CLBs) -- the capacity to ground and recombine novel symbolic structures in context, beyond mere recombination of prelearned atoms. We propose \textbf{S2B-LM}, an adaptation of the Symbolic Behaviour Benchmark that removes numerical processing as a confound and adds chain-of-thought scaffolding to elicit rather than merely probe latent CLB competency. Cross-evaluating ten Lean~4 theorem provers on CLB competency (adj-ZSCT) and miniF2F whole-proof performance, exact permutation tests establish a hierarchical necessity structure: search-heavy models cover the tractable bulk without detectable CLBs, yet every model breaking into the Olympiad-level tier (miniF2F $>75\%$) is among the five highest CLB scorers ($p=0.004$). After ruling out model scale as a confound, our results show that CLB competency is \emph{necessary but not sufficient} for the hard tail of formal mathematical verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S2B-LM框架，通过去除数值处理干扰并添加思维链引导来评估数学定理证明器的组合学习行为（CLB）能力。实验发现：搜索密集型模型虽能处理大部分简单问题，但只有CLB得分最高的五个模型才能突破奥林匹克级难题（miniF2F>75%），表明CLB是攻克形式数学硬核的必要但不充分条件。
AI.motivation: 现有科学智能体在处理形式数学的"硬尾"问题时能力不足，核心瓶颈在于缺乏组合学习行为（CLB）——即上下文中组合新符号结构的能力，而非简单重组已学原子。现有基准（如Symbolic Behaviour Benchmark）存在数值处理干扰，且缺乏对潜在CLB能力的引导性评估。
AI.method: 提出S2B-LM框架：(1) 移除数值处理作为干扰因素；(2) 添加思维链（chain-of-thought）脚手架来引导而非仅仅探测潜在的CLB能力。在Lean 4定理证明器上，通过adj-ZSCT评估CLB能力，结合miniF2F完整证明性能进行交叉评估，并使用精确置换检验分析层次化必要性结构。
AI.result: 搜索密集型模型能在无显著CLB能力的情况下覆盖大部分可解问题，但所有能突破奥林匹克级难题（miniF2F>75%）的模型均是CLB得分最高的五个模型之一（p=0.004）。排除模型规模干扰后，CLB能力是突破形式数学硬核的必要但不充分条件。
AI.conclusion: 组合学习行为（CLB）是攻克形式数学验证硬尾问题的必要能力，但仅有CLB还不够，还需要其他能力的协同。这一发现为构建能处理高难度形式数学的自演化科学智能体提供了重要方向性指导。

title: Stochastic Gradient Descent with Momentum is Algorithmically Stable
summary: Stochastic gradient descent with momentum (SGDM) is one of the most widely used optimization algorithms in machine learning. While optimization properties of SGDM have been extensively studied in the literature, it remains insufficiently understood whether and when SGDM can generalize well to unseen data. In particular, it has been conjectured that while momentum accelerates training, it may degrade generalization. In this paper, we close this gap by developing a comprehensive generalization analysis of SGDM through the lens of algorithmic stability. More specifically, we introduce a generalized SGDM framework that encompasses both Polyak's and Nesterov's momentum schemes, and establish tight on-average model stability bounds for smooth and convex problems. Notably, the obtained bounds exploit small optimization error bounds along the trajectory, apply to any momentum parameter in the interval $[0, 1)$, and do not require the commonly assumed Lipschitzness of loss functions. We further derive optimization error bounds for the generalized SGDM, and combine them with our generalization analyses to obtain optimal excess population risk bounds for SGDM with both Polyak's and Nesterov's momentum.

AI.tldr: 本文通过算法稳定性分析，首次系统证明了带动量的SGD（SGDM）在平滑凸问题上既能加速训练又能保证良好的泛化性能，推翻了“动量会损害泛化”的猜想。
AI.motivation: 尽管SGDM在机器学习中被广泛使用且其优化性质已被充分研究，但关于SGDM能否以及何时能泛化到未见数据的问题仍未被充分理解。特别地，已有猜测认为动量虽然加速训练，但可能会损害泛化性能。本文旨在弥合这一研究空白。
AI.method: 通过算法稳定性的视角对SGDM进行全面的泛化分析。具体而言，引入了一个统一的广义SGDM框架（涵盖Polyak和Nesterov动量方案），为平滑凸问题建立了紧的on-average模型稳定性界。这些界利用了轨迹上的小优化误差界，适用于[0,1)区间内的任意动量参数，且不需要常用的损失函数Lipschitz假设。进一步推导了广义SGDM的优化误差界，并与泛化分析结合得到最优的总体风险界。
AI.result: 获得了紧的on-average模型稳定性界（利用轨迹优化误差、适用于任意动量参数、无需Lipschitz假设），以及SGDM在Polyak和Nesterov动量下的最优过剩总体风险界。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过严格的稳定性分析证明，动量不仅加速训练，而且在适当的条件下不会损害泛化性能，甚至可以达到最优的总体风险界，否定了之前的负面猜想。

title: You Live More Than Once: Towards Hierarchical Skill Meta-Evolving
summary: Test-time skill evolving is regarded as a new paradigm for enhancing deployed agentic systems. Existing works mainly focus on hard-coded skill evolving strategies or parametric learning that rely on expensive parameter updates in the underlying LLMs. In this paper, we demonstrate that test-time refinement of the skill evolving framework itself is necessary for continuous improvement of the agent systems in different downstream scenarios, and lightweight algorithmic adaptation is feasible. Specifically, we propose HiSME, a lightweight hierarchical skill meta-evolving solution that jointly optimizes skills and the skill evolving strategy by learning meta-skills from agents' task execution traces. Experiments on diverse agentic benchmarks show that meta-evolving can produce a higher-quality skill library than pure skill evolving and can derive diverse meta-skills for different scenarios, thereby facilitating future continual experience learning. Our code is temporarily public at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HiSME-BD45.

AI.tldr: 提出HiSME，一种轻量级分层技能元进化方法，通过从代理任务执行轨迹中学习元技能，同时优化技能库和技能进化策略，实现测试时技能进化框架的持续改进。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时技能进化工作依赖硬编码策略或昂贵的参数更新，且忽略了技能进化框架本身需要随不同下游场景持续改进的问题。作者希望实现轻量级的算法自适应。
AI.method: 提出HiSME分层元进化方案，从代理任务执行轨迹中学习元技能，联合优化技能库和技能进化策略，无需更新底层LLM参数。
AI.result: 在多种智能体基准测试上，元进化相比纯技能进化能产生更高质量的技能库，并能为不同场景推导出多样化的元技能，促进持续经验学习。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级的元进化方法（元技能学习）是可行的，能够在不更新底层LLM参数的情况下实现代理系统的持续改进，为未来持续经验学习奠定了基础。

title: ClinicalEncoder26AM: A Multlilingual Diagnosable ColBERT Model; Evidences from the MultiClinNER Shared Task
summary:
ClinicalEncoder26AM is a multilingual Diagnosable ColBERT for clinical and biomedical texts, which aligns at multiple levels its token-level semantic with ClinicalMap25, a clinical latent space inspired by BioLORD-2023 and enriched with synthetic and annotated supervision. The post-training recipe builds upon BGE-M3, and combines synthetic clinical notes, patient--doctor conversations, and annotated resources such as MedMentions, while considering both named-entity-level and sentence-level representations in a multi-adapter distillation, along with a ColBERT-style retrieval objective. In this system demonstration paper, we evaluate the model in the MultiClinNER shared task by finetuning it as a BIO tagger for patient symptoms, disorders, and procedure spans, using a lightweight two-layer CNN head to improve local boundary detection. The resulting system remains simple, processes most documents in a single 8192-token window, and achieves state-of-the-art multilingual entity recall, while achieving Top 5 overall across all entity types and languages in Character-weighted F1 scores. Training curves further show that ClinicalEncoder26AM is markedly more data-efficient than the base M3 model, supporting the usefulness of its clinical post-training for downstream information extraction.
  The model can be downloaded on https://huggingface.co/Parallia/ClinicalEncoder26AM-Diagnosable-Colbert-L2-for-multilingual-medical-texts

AI.tldr: ClinicalEncoder26AM 是一个基于 ColBERT 的多语言临床文本编码器，通过对齐 ClinicalMap25 潜在空间进行后训练，在 MultiClinNER 任务中以轻量 CNN 头微调为 BIO 标注器，实现了高数据效率和多语言实体召回率 SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有临床文本编码器在多语言场景下语义对齐不足，且需要大量标注数据；如何利用合成数据与多层级蒸馏提升数据效率和多语言实体抽取性能是核心动机。
AI.method: 以 BGE-M3 为基座，通过多适配器蒸馏对齐 ClinicalMap25 空间，结合合成临床笔记、医患对话、MedMentions 等资源；采用 ColBERT 风格检索目标与双层 CNN 头微调为 BIO 标注器。
AI.result: 在 MultiClinNER 共享任务中实现多语言实体召回率 SOTA，字符加权 F1 总分进入 Top 5；训练曲线显示比基座 M3 模型显著更数据高效。
AI.conclusion: 临床后训练能有效提升下游信息抽取的数据效率与多语言泛化能力，轻量方案（单窗口 8192 tokens + CNN 头）即达先进水平。

title: Stabilizing distribution-free probabilistic forecasts
summary: Multi-step-ahead forecasts are often updated as new observations become available, since shorter forecast horizons typically improve forecast quality. However, such improvements come at the cost of forecast instability, i.e., variability in forecasts for the same target period. This instability can trigger costly changes to plans formulated based on the forecasts and may erode trust in the forecasting system. In this work, we integrate forecast stability alongside forecast quality into the training of distribution-free probabilistic time-series forecasting models, allowing us to control this trade-off. We propose a method for generating stabilized forecasted conditional quantile functions using regression splines parameterized by a neural network. This approach enables joint optimization of quality and stability, as it allows us to directly penalize dissimilarities arising from forecast updates. Furthermore, it allows assigning varying importance to stabilizing different parts of the forecast distributions (e.g., central parts vs. tails) to focus on the parts most relevant for the intended downstream use (e.g., the upper tail for inventory management). We empirically evaluate the proposed method on two datasets with different statistical properties and show that it can effectively reduce forecast instability without a substantial loss in forecast quality, and that it can target stabilization effort toward specific parts of the forecast distributions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将预测稳定性与预测质量联合优化的方法，通过使用神经网络参数化的回归样条生成稳定的条件分位数函数，可以在不显著损失预测质量的前提下有效降低预测不稳定性，并能针对性地稳定分布的不同部分（如尾部）。
AI.motivation: 多步预测在更新时虽然能提高预测质量，但会导致预测不稳定，进而引发基于预测制定的计划产生高成本变更，并降低对预测系统的信任。现有方法未能在训练中同时优化预测质量与稳定性。
AI.method: 使用神经网络参数化的回归样条生成条件分位数函数，在训练过程中联合优化预测质量与稳定性，直接惩罚因预测更新产生的分布差异，并可对不同分布区域（如中心与尾部）赋予不同的稳定权重。
AI.result: 在两个不同统计特性的数据集上实验表明，该方法能有效降低预测不稳定性，且不会显著损失预测质量，并能针对性地稳定分布中的特定部分。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了预测质量与稳定性的可控权衡，为下游任务（如库存管理）提供了更可靠的预测基础。

title: HRBench: Benchmarking and Understanding Thinking-Mode Switch Strategies in Hybrid-Reasoning LLMs
summary: Hybrid-reasoning large language models (LLMs) expose explicit controls over reasoning effort, allowing users or systems to trade off answer quality against inference cost. However, existing methods for adaptive thinking-mode selection are typically evaluated under different models, datasets, and implementation assumptions, making it difficult to compare their practical behavior. We introduce HRBench, a unified evaluation framework for studying thinking-mode switching in hybrid-reasoning LLMs. HRBench organizes the design space along two axes: three switching strategy families, prompt-based selection, external routing, and speculative execution, and four training regimes, training-free, SFT, offline and online RL, yielding 12 controlled evaluation settings. We evaluate these settings across 6 LLMs, from Qwen3.5-2B to Kimi-K2.5-1.1T, and 5 reasoning benchmarks covering mathematics, science, and code, while reimplementing 12+ representative prior methods within the same pipeline. Our analysis characterizes how different switching strategies occupy distinct effectiveness-efficiency trade-off regions: prompt-based methods often provide favorable token-accuracy trade-offs, routing methods offer more stable cost reduction, and speculative methods tend to improve accuracy at higher token cost. We further find that training affects strategies differently, and that the preferred strategy varies with model scale and task domain. HRBench provides reference implementations and a unified evaluation platform to support more controlled research on efficient reasoning in hybrid-reasoning LLMs. Our data, code and repository are available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/HRBench.

AI.tldr: HRBench 是一个统一评估框架，用于研究混合推理大语言模型中的推理模式切换策略，涵盖 12 种策略设置、6 种模型和 5 个基准，揭示了不同策略在效率-效果权衡上的差异。
AI.motivation: 现有混合推理 LLM 的思维模式自适应选择方法在不同模型、数据集和实现假设下评估，难以比较实际行为，缺乏统一评估框架。
AI.method: 沿两个维度组织设计空间：3 种切换策略（基于提示选择、外部路由、推测执行）和 4 种训练范式（无训练、SFT、离线 RL、在线 RL），共 12 种可控评估设置，在 6 个模型和 5 个推理基准上重新实现 10+ 种方法进行统一评估。
AI.result: 提示型方法在 token-准确率权衡上表现良好；路由型方法成本降低更稳定；推测型方法倾向于提高准确率但 token 成本更高；训练对策略的影响不同；策略偏好随模型规模和任务领域变化。
AI.conclusion: HRBench 提供了参考实现和统一评估平台，支持混合推理 LLM 高效推理的可控研究。

title: GUI-CIDER: Mid-training GUI Agents via Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection
summary: Despite the rapid progress of multimodal large language models in building Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents, their real-world task completion is fundamentally bottlenecked by a lack of world knowledge about GUI operations. Existing solutions typically rely on expensive multi-agent scaffolding or conventional post-training paradigms, such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). However, post-training only allows agents to implicitly absorb world knowledge through action annotations or reward signals, leading to inefficient trajectory memorization rather than genuine comprehension. Therefore, an approach that enables explicit learning of this knowledge is imperative. To this end, we propose GUI-CIDER, a mid-training method that explicitly internalizes GUI world knowledge through Causal Internalization and Density-aware Exemplar Reselection. GUI-CIDER operates in three stages: (1) data synthesis, which distills static planning and dynamic causal knowledge from GUI trajectories into text; (2) exemplar reselection, which filters the corpus by rewarding causal structures and penalizing semantic redundancy; and (3) mid-training, where the refined data is used to embed the acquired knowledge. Extensive experiments on two GUI knowledge benchmarks and three task completion benchmarks demonstrate that GUI-CIDER consistently improves both the agent's understanding of GUI operations and its task success rates.The codes are available at https://github.com/Wuzheng02/GUI-CIDER.

AI.tldr: 提出GUI-CIDER，一种通过因果内化和密度感知示例重选将GUI世界知识显式内化到多模态大语言模型中的中间训练方法，在GUI知识基准和任务完成基准上均取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体虽然依赖多模态大语言模型取得进展，但任务完成受限于缺乏关于GUI操作的世界知识。后训练范式（SFT和RL）只能让智能体通过动作标注或奖励信号隐式吸收知识，导致低效的轨迹记忆而非真正的理解。因此需要一种能让智能体显式学习GUI世界知识的方法。
AI.method: GUI-CIDER包含三个阶段：(1) 数据合成：从GUI轨迹中提取静态规划知识和动态因果知识并蒸馏为文本；(2) 示例重选：通过奖励因果结构并惩罚语义冗余来过滤语料；(3) 中间训练：使用精炼数据将获取的知识嵌入模型。
AI.result: 在两个GUI知识基准和三个任务完成基准上的实验表明，GUI-CIDER一致地提升了智能体对GUI操作的理解以及任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: GUI-CIDER通过显式的中间训练让智能体内化GUI世界知识，比传统的隐式后训练范式更有效地提升了任务完成能力。

title: Semi-Supervised Hypothesis Testing by Betting on Predictions
summary: We introduce a testing-by-betting framework that leverages predictions on unlabeled data to enhance the power of sequential hypothesis testing. Given limited samples from the joint distribution of $(X,Y)$, and additional unlabeled samples from the marginal of $X$, we ask how unlabeled data can be used to hypothesize about the distribution of $Y$, and the conditional distribution of $Y\mid X$. We introduce an e-statistic and use it to construct a sequential test. Under standard distributional assumptions -- label shift or concept shift -- we establish that the test is anytime valid. Furthermore, we show that for binary data, the e-statistic has non-trivial power. Crucially, our approach retains these properties even when the underlying predictions are inaccurate. Through simulations and applications to large language models evaluation, we demonstrate power gains over baseline approaches, including prediction-powered inference. These gains persist even with relatively limited unlabeled data and when predictions have low accuracy due to weak correlation between $X$ and $Y$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于赌注的序贯假设检验框架，利用未标注数据提升检验效力。在仅有少量标注数据和较多未标注数据的情况下，通过构造e统计量实现对Y分布及Y|X条件分布的假设检验，在标签偏移或概念偏移下保持任意有效性，即使预测不准确时仍有效。
AI.motivation: 在标注数据稀缺但未标注数据丰富的场景下，如何有效利用未标注数据增强假设检验的统计效力，同时保持检验的任意有效性（anytime valid）。
AI.method: 提出testing-by-betting框架，构造e统计量（e-statistic）用于序贯检验。在标签偏移（label shift）或概念偏移（concept shift）的标准分布假设下，利用未标注数据中的X边际分布信息来增强检验能力。
AI.result: 理论证明该检验在标签偏移和概念偏移下具有任意有效性；对于二值数据，e统计量具有非平凡统计效力；即使预测不准确（如X与Y弱相关）且未标注数据有限时，仍优于基线方法（包括prediction-powered inference）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在标注数据有限、预测质量不高时仍能有效提升假设检验效力，并在大语言模型评估等实际应用中展示了优越性。

title: Measuring Progress Toward AGI: A Cognitive Framework
summary: Despite widespread discussion of AGI, there is no clear framework for measuring progress toward it. This ambiguity fuels subjective claims, makes it difficult to track progress, and risks hindering responsible governance. As a starting point to address this gap, we present a framework for understanding system capabilities in relation to human cognitive abilities. Drawing from decades of research in psychology, neuroscience, and cognitive science, we introduce a Cognitive Taxonomy that deconstructs general intelligence into 10 key cognitive faculties. We then propose a rigorous evaluation protocol in which a system's performance is measured across a suite of targeted, held-out cognitive tasks, generating a 'cognitive profile' that can be used to understand a system's strengths and weaknesses. We hope this framework will provide a practical roadmap and an initial step toward more rigorous, empirical evaluation of AGI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于认知分类法的AGI评估框架，将通用智能分解为10种认知能力，并通过一套针对性的认知任务生成系统的"认知画像"，以推动AGI进展的实证评估。
AI.motivation: 目前AGI领域缺乏清晰的进展衡量框架，导致主观论断泛滥、进展追踪困难，且阻碍了负责任的治理。
AI.method: 借鉴心理学、神经科学和认知科学数十年的研究，提出一个包含10种关键认知能力的认知分类法；设计了一套严格、保留的认知任务评估协议，通过系统在这些任务上的表现生成其"认知画像"。
AI.result: 构建了一个可操作的理论框架，使系统能力可按照与人类认知能力的对应关系被量化和比较。
AI.conclusion: 该框架旨在为AGI的实证评估提供实用路线图，推动更严谨、经验性的AGI进展评估。

title: Soft-SVeRL: Self-Verified Reinforcement Learning with Soft Rewards
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has improved language models in domains such as mathematics and code, where correctness can be checked automatically. However, many important tasks are only partially verifiable: prompts contain multiple requirements, responses may satisfy some but not all of them, or no single reference answer might exist. We introduce Soft-RLVR, a framework for reinforcement learning from decomposed, learned verification signals. Soft-RLVR converts each prompt into a checklist of atomic requirements, scores candidate responses item by item with an LLM verifier, and trains on the resulting soft reward. Checklist-based rewards turn sparse pass/fail supervision into a denser partial-credit signal, but they also introduce a tradeoff: averaging item-level judgments can reduce verifier noise, while partial credit can reward incomplete responses. We formalize this tradeoff and identify conditions under which checklist-based verification gives a more reliable RL training signal than holistic verification. We further introduce Soft-SVeRL, a self-verifying variant of Soft-RLVR in which the policy also acts as the verifier. We show that self-verification is prone to reward inflation from overly permissive self-judgments, and that explicit stabilization is needed to prevent this collapse. In a controlled instruction-following setting with rule-based ground-truth evaluation, checklist-based Soft-RLVR improves IFEval by up to 11.1 points using only learned verifier rewards. Our experiments further show that verifier quality and checklist quality both affect downstream RL outcomes, and that explicit stabilization is essential for effective self-verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Soft-RLVR框架，将提示分解为原子需求清单，用LLM验证器逐项评分并作为软奖励训练RL，解决部分可验证任务中稀疏奖励问题。同时提出自验证变体Soft-SVeRL，并指出自验证需要显式稳定化以防止奖励膨胀。在指令遵循任务上，基于清单的Soft-RLVR比整体验证提升IFEval达11.1分。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法仅适用于数学、代码等完全可验证领域，而许多实际任务（如指令遵循）只有部分可验证性——提示包含多个需求，回答可能只满足部分需求，且不存在唯一标准答案。这导致稀疏的通过/失败信号无法有效训练模型。
AI.method: 1) 将每个提示分解为原子需求检查清单；2) 用LLM验证器逐项对候选回答进行评分，得到软奖励（部分得分）；3) 基于该软奖励进行RL训练。同时提出自验证变体Soft-SVeRL（策略模型同时作为验证器），并引入显式稳定化机制防止奖励膨胀。
AI.result: 在受控的指令遵循任务中，基于清单的Soft-RLVR仅使用学习到的验证器奖励，就在IFEval上提升了最多11.1个百分点。实验还表明验证器质量和清单质量均影响下游RL效果，且显式稳定化对自验证至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 清单式验证比整体验证能提供更可靠的RL训练信号，但需要权衡验证器噪声与部分奖励问题。自验证虽然可行，但必须进行显式稳定化以防止奖励膨胀导致的训练崩溃。

title: High Performance, Low Reliability: Uncertainty Benchmarking for Tabular Foundation Models
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted at ESANN 2026 (European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks, Computational Intelligence and Machine Learning), 22-24 April 2026, Bruges (Belgium)
summary: Recent Tabular Foundation Models (TFMs) have demonstrated state-of-the-art predictive performance, often surpassing Gradient-Boosted Decision Trees (GBDTs). However, the trustworthiness of these models, particularly their uncertainty quantification, has been largely overlooked. We investigate this gap through an extensive study comparing TFMs, GBDTs, and classical baselines on the 112 datasets of the TALENT benchmark. Our results reveal a performance-uncertainty trade-off: although TFMs achieve the highest predictive performance, measured by AUC, they exhibit lower conditional coverage under conformal prediction, measured by SSCS, compared to GBDTs. Complementary experiments on synthetic datasets further characterize the regimes in which this effect intensifies. We conclude that while TFMs advance predictive frontiers, achieving well-calibrated uncertainty remains a major open challenge for their reliable adoption. Code is available at: https://github.com/jose-melo/high-performance-low-reliability

AI.tldr: 表格基础模型（TFMs）在预测性能上优于GBDT，但在不确定性量化上存在不足，表现出性能-不确定性权衡：AUC更高但条件覆盖率更低。
AI.motivation: 现有TFMs研究主要关注预测性能，忽略了其可信度（尤其是不确定性量化）的评估。
AI.method: 在TALENT基准的112个数据集上，比较TFMs、GBDTs和经典基线模型，使用AUC衡量性能、SSCS（条件覆盖率）衡量不确定性，并在合成数据集上进行补充实验。
AI.result: TFMs的AUC最高，但在共形预测下的条件覆盖率（SSCS）低于GBDTs，存在明显的性能-不确定性权衡。
AI.conclusion: 虽然TFMs推动了预测性能的前沿，但实现良好校准的不确定性仍然是其可靠部署的重大挑战。

title: Efficient Post-training of LLMs for Code Generation With Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Post-training using online reinforcement learning (RL) is an important training step for LLMs, including code-generating models. However, online RL for code generation involves LLM inference and verification of the generated output, which can take considerable time and resources. In this paper, we explore the application of offline RL to code-generating models by leveraging existing code datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that offline RL is an effective training strategy for improving LLM performance. We show that offline RL can be especially beneficial for small LLMs and challenging coding problems.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了离线强化学习（离线RL）在代码生成模型中的应用，利用现有代码数据集进行训练，避免了在线RL中耗时耗资源的推理和验证过程。实验表明，离线RL能有效提升LLM性能，尤其适用于小型LLM和复杂编程问题。
AI.motivation: 在线RL用于代码生成需要LLM推理和输出验证，消耗大量时间和资源，因此作者探索更高效的离线RL方法。
AI.method: 利用现有的代码数据集，对代码生成模型应用离线强化学习训练，无需在线推理和验证。
AI.result: 离线RL能有效提升LLM的代码生成性能，尤其对小型LLM和困难编程问题提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 离线RL是一种有效的代码生成模型训练策略，能节省在线RL的资源开销，并特别有利于小模型和难题场景。

title: Models That Know How Evaluations Are Designed Score Safer
summary: The validity of AI safety evaluations depends on models behaving consistently across controlled and deployment settings. Prior work has identified test-time contextual cues, such as hypothetical scenarios, as a source of verbalized evaluation awareness and subsequent behavioral shift. In this paper, we investigate a potential explanation of this phenomenon: evaluation meta-knowledge, defined as parametric knowledge about the structural traits that characterize evaluations. Similar to dataset contamination, where benchmark exposure leads to higher performance through memorization, we hypothesize that models trained on texts describing evaluation practices may implicitly learn to recognize and respond to evaluation-like contexts, for instance, through exposure to scientific articles or social media posts about AI benchmarking. To test this, we fine-tune models on synthetic documents describing evaluation traits such as verifiable structures or moral dilemmas. Evaluating this fine-tuned model on six safety benchmarks, we find that it is significantly safer than the base model and control model. This behavioral shift persists even when restricting the analysis to responses lacking explicit verbalization of evaluation awareness. Our results demonstrate that evaluation meta-knowledge may inflate safety benchmark performance, introducing a novel confounder that is independent of explicit memorization or verbalized evaluation awareness, thus, challenging to detect. These findings have important implications for the design and interpretation of AI safety evaluations. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/compass-group-tue/arxiv2026_evaluation_meta_knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，AI模型可以通过训练数据中隐式获得的"评估元知识"（关于评估结构性特征的参数化知识）来提升安全基准测试的表现，而这并非出于显式的记忆或对评估意识的言语化表达。这种新型混淆因素使安全评估有效性受到挑战。
AI.motivation: 先前研究发现测试时上下文线索（如假设性场景）会导致模型表现出"评估意识"并改变行为。作者试图探究这种现象的潜在解释：模型是否通过预训练数据中关于评估实践的文本（如科学文章、社交媒体讨论）隐式学习了评估的结构特征，进而影响其在安全基准上的表现。
AI.method: 作者在描述评估特征的合成文档（如可验证结构、道德困境等）上对模型进行微调，然后在六个安全基准上评估微调模型的安全表现，并与基础模型和对照组进行比较。此外，还分析了未显式表达评估意识的回答。
AI.result: 微调后的模型在六个安全基准上显著比基础模型和对照组更安全。即使抑制显式的评估意识表达，行为转变依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 评估元知识可以人为抬高安全基准表现，成为一种独立于显式记忆或显式评估意识的新型混淆因素，难以检测。这对AI安全评估的设计和解读具有重要启示。

title: A Multi-dimensional Framework for Evaluating Generalization in EEG Foundation Models
summary: Evaluating foundation models under appropriate adaptation settings is essential for understanding the quality and transferability of the learned representations. Recent EEG foundation models have demonstrated promising transfer capabilities across tasks and datasets, motivating their growing use in neurotechnology and clinical applications. However, these models are typically evaluated under full fine-tuning on well-curated downstream datasets, a setting that does not reflect biomedical domain constraints such as limited labeled data, reduced sensor coverage, or parameter-efficient adaptation. In this work, we propose a multi-dimensional evaluation framework for assessing EEG models under realistic low-resource conditions. Empirical analysis of both supervised EEG models and recent EEG foundation models, including LaBraM, CSBrain, and CBraMod, across 6 different datasets is performed under the proposed multi-dimensional evaluation framework. We find that EEG foundation models consistently provide performance gains on long-context tasks such as sleep stage prediction and mental health state classification. In contrast, for short-window Brain Computer Interface style tasks, supervised models achieve comparable despite having substantially fewer parameters. Additional analyses demonstrate that current foundation models provide limited robustness to short-window tasks and channel constrained settings. Together, these findings motivate the use of multi-dimensional evaluation protocols that characterize model behavior under realistic use constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对EEG基础模型的多维度评估框架，发现其在长上下文任务（睡眠阶段、心理健康分类）上表现优于监督模型，但在短窗口BCI任务和通道受限场景下优势有限，监督模型参数更少却能达到可比效果。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型通常在完整微调、精心整理的下游数据集上评估，未反映生物医学领域实际约束（如有限标注数据、传感器覆盖减少、参数高效适应），因此需要更贴近真实低资源条件的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出多维度评估框架，在6个不同数据集上对有监督EEG模型和近期EEG基础模型（LaBraM、CSBrain、CBraMod）进行实证分析，涵盖低资源条件（有限标注、通道减少、参数高效适应）。
AI.result: 1) EEG基础模型在睡眠阶段预测和心理健康状态分类等长上下文任务上持续带来性能提升；2) 在短窗口BCI任务中，有监督模型参数更少但性能相当；3) 基础模型在短窗口任务和通道受限场景下鲁棒性有限。
AI.conclusion: 应使用多维度评估协议来刻画模型在真实使用约束下的行为，当前EEG基础模型并非在所有场景下都优于传统监督模型，需根据具体任务条件选择合适模型。

title: DenoiseRL: Bootstrapping Reasoning Models to Recover from Noisy Prefixes
summary: Reinforcement learning has become a central paradigm for advancing reasoning in large language models, yet most existing methods still depend on stronger teacher models or heavily curated difficult datasets, limiting scalable capability improvement. In this paper, we introduce DenoiseRL, a reinforcement learning framework that substitutes external supervision with recovery-oriented optimization over failures from weak models. Instead of relying on stronger supervision or carefully engineered data, DenoiseRL learns directly from incorrect reasoning traces by converting them into opportunities for improvement, making training more scalable and less dependent on external resources. This yields a richer and more diverse learning signal, improving exploration efficiency from imperfect model behavior. As a result, DenoiseRL improves reasoning performance and overall training efficiency while reducing the need for expensive data curation or stronger teacher models. Empirically, DenoiseRL consistently outperforms strong on-policy RL baselines across competitive mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks and promotes stronger self-corrective behavior as training difficulty increases, highlighting an effective and scalable alternative pathway for improving reasoning in large language models.

AI.tldr: DenoiseRL是一个通过恢复性优化从弱模型失败轨迹中学习、无需强教师模型或精心设计数据的强化学习框架，在数学和通用推理基准上持续超越强基线，并促进更强的自我纠正能力。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法依赖更强的教师模型或精心构造的困难数据集，限制了可扩展的能力提升，因此需要一种更少依赖外部资源的可扩展训练范式。
AI.method: DenoiseRL框架将弱模型产生的错误推理轨迹转化为恢复性优化机会，替代外部监督信号，从而获得更丰富多样的学习信号，提升探索效率。
AI.result: 在竞争性数学和一般推理基准上，DenoiseRL持续优于强在线策略RL基线，并随着训练难度增加展现出更强的自我纠正行为。
AI.conclusion: DenoiseRL提供了一种有效且可扩展的替代路径来改进大语言模型的推理能力，减少了对昂贵数据筛选或强教师模型的依赖。

title: Evaluating the Realism of LLM-powered Social Agents: A Case Study of Reactions to Spanish Online News
summary:
LLM-powered social agents are increasingly used to simulate online social behavior, yet their realism remains difficult to validate. Existing work has largely relied on general-purpose benchmarks, while less attention has been paid to short, reactive discourse such as audience replies to online news.
  In this paper, we evaluate whether LLM-generated reactions to Spanish online news reproduce measurable properties of real audience discourse. Using the Hatemedia dataset, we pair 5,631 news items with 58,555 real audience reactions, and generate a matched synthetic dataset using five LLMs under a shared experimental setting. We compare real and synthetic reactions across three dimensions: hate speech, sentiment, and semantic alignment, considering both off-the-shelf and fine-tuned generation.
  Results show that off-the-shelf models are poor proxies for real audience reactions: they strongly underproduce hate speech, introduce model-specific sentiment biases, and remain distributionally distant from human replies. Fine-tuning improves fidelity unevenly. Qwen3 provides the most balanced approximation, while Mistral7B achieves the strongest sentiment and semantic alignment but overshoots hate prevalence. Plausible synthetic replies do not necessarily reproduce the distributional properties of public discourse.

AI.tldr: 本文评估LLM生成的西班牙在线新闻评论是否复现真实受众话语的可测量属性，发现现成模型在仇恨言论、情感和语义对齐方面表现不佳，微调可部分改善但各模型表现不均衡。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多依赖通用基准验证LLM社交智能体的真实性，对短篇、反应性话语（如新闻受众评论）关注不足，亟需系统评估LLM模拟这类话语的能力。
AI.method: 基于Hatemedia数据集，将5,631条新闻与58,555条真实受众评论配对，使用五种LLM在统一实验设置下生成匹配的合成数据集，从仇恨言论、情感和语义对齐三个维度对比真实与合成反应。
AI.result: 现成模型严重低估仇恨言论、引入模型特定的情感偏差，且分布上与人类回复距离较大；微调后Qwen3提供最均衡的近似，Mistral7B在情感和语义对齐上最强但过度生成仇恨内容。
AI.conclusion: 看似合理的合成回复不一定能复现公共话语的分布属性，LLM模拟在线社交行为仍需谨慎验证。

title: Semantic Optimal Transport for Sparse Autoencoder Feature Matching and Circuit Compression
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have become a central tool for interpreting language models. However, two key SAE analyses that remain difficult to scale are (1) matching semantically similar features across multi-layers and (2) compressing large feature circuits into interpretable supernodes. Although these have been treated as separate problems, we show that both are instances of a more fundamental challenge, which we frame as the estimation of semantic distances between SAE features that lie on different activation manifolds. We introduce a distributional framework for this problem, in which each feature is represented not by a single decoder vector like in the literature, but by an activation-weighted distribution over the hidden states that express it. By projecting these distributions into a shared reference space and comparing them with Wasserstein distance, our method provides a unified semantic metric for cross-layer feature comparison. We prove that our representation is invariant to activation rescaling, stable under perturbations, and recovers true matches under finite-sample margin conditions. Empirically, our method outperforms decoder-vector and LLM-based baselines and captures subtle functional distinctions between related features. Notably, our method compresses large feature circuits into interpretable supernodes automatically.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布框架的方法，通过将SAE特征表示为激活加权分布，并利用Wasserstein距离进行跨层语义比较，统一了语义特征匹配与大电路压缩两个问题。
AI.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）已成为解释语言模型的核心工具，但两个关键分析难以规模化：(1) 跨层匹配语义相似的特征；(2) 将大特征电路压缩为可解释的超级节点。现有方法将二者视为独立问题，而本文指出它们本质上是同一基础挑战——估计位于不同激活流形上的SAE特征之间的语义距离。
AI.method: 提出分布框架：每个特征由激活加权的隐藏状态分布表示，而非单一解码器向量。将这些分布投影到共享参考空间，使用Wasserstein距离进行比较，提供统一的跨层特征语义度量。证明了该表示对激活重缩放不变、扰动下稳定，并在有限样本边界条件下恢复真实匹配。
AI.result: 实验优于解码器向量和基于LLM的基线方法，能捕捉相关特征间的细微功能差异，并自动将大特征电路压缩为可解释的超级节点。
AI.conclusion: 该分布框架有效统一了SAE中两个看似独立的核心问题，为可解释性分析提供了一种更鲁棒、更可扩展的跨层语义比较方法。

title: GONDOR to the Rescue: Satisficing Planning with Low Memory
summary: Greedy Best-First Search (GBFS) is the dominant approach for solving search problems where the goal can be estimated with a heuristic, such as planning, route finding, navigation, and pathfinding. This is especially true when the memory is tightly constrained, such as planning on edge devices. To alleviate that, we present GONDOR (Greedy Online Navigation with Dynamic Outpost-based Re-search), a memory-efficient extension of GBFS that allows search to continue under strict memory limits by periodically compressing the search tree while retaining a sparse set of anchor states, then upon reaching the goal reconstructs the path by re-searching between the sparse states. We analyze the algorithm and discuss several variants defined by different outpost selection policies. In addition, we explore using Bloom filters for compact duplicate detection in the closed list. Experiments across numeric planning domains and heuristic configurations show that GONDOR consistently improves coverage under low memory budgets compared to standard GBFS. We release the implementation of GONDOR and the Bloom-filter variant to facilitate further research on memory-efficient heuristic search.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GONDOR，一种内存高效的贪心最佳优先搜索扩展算法，通过在内存受限时压缩搜索树并保留锚点状态，到达目标后重新搜索重建路径，结合布隆过滤器实现紧凑重复检测，在低内存环境下显著提升覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 标准GBFS在内存严格受限的场景（如边缘设备规划）下容易因内存耗尽而失败，需要一种能在有限内存中持续搜索的方法。
AI.method: 1) 周期性地压缩搜索树，仅保留稀疏的锚点状态（outpost）；2) 到达目标后，通过在稀疏状态之间重新搜索来重建完整路径；3) 提出多种锚点选择策略变体；4) 探索使用布隆过滤器作为紧凑的闭环重复检测结构。
AI.result: 在多个数值规划域和不同启发式配置下，GONDOR在低内存预算下始终优于标准GBFS的覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: GONDOR有效解决了内存受限下的启发式搜索问题，提供了实用且可扩展的内存高效搜索框架，并开源实现以促进后续研究。

title: Measuring Form and Function in Language Models
comment: Under review at ACL Rolling Review May 2026 cycle
summary: We introduce quantitative metrics for child language acquisition to evaluate language models. Our focus is on the formal syntactic and functional discourse properties of determiners in English, which young children acquire early and accurately. We propose Contextual Alternative Choice (CAC), a new prompting method which provides targeted tests for both syntactic and discourse knowledge of language. The method enables direct comparison of language models against children, and more importantly, against statistical benchmarks independently established in empirical research. No current model trained on a comparable amount of data simultaneously meet both formal and functional benchmarks like human children, but some very large models do. We present our results as methodological and technical contributions, with specific emphasis on cognitive status of language models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的评估方法（CAC），通过对比儿童语言习得中限定词的句法和话语知识，检验语言模型的认知能力。结果表明，仅极大型模型能同时达到儿童水平。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型评估缺乏与发展语言学（儿童语言习得）的定量对比，尤其是针对句法-话语双重维度的精确测试方法不足。
AI.method: 提出Contextual Alternative Choice (CAC)提示方法，针对英语限定词设计句法与话语层面的靶向测试，并与儿童语料及统计基准进行直接比较。
AI.result: 在同等数据量下，无模型能同时满足句法与功能基准；仅极大型模型（如超大参数量模型）能在两项指标上接近儿童水平。
AI.conclusion: CAC方法为评估语言模型的认知合理性提供了可行框架，指出当前模型在数据效率上与人类儿童存在显著差距，大型模型在规模驱动下可部分弥合这一差距。

title: Efficient Pre-Training of LLMs through Truncated SVD Layers
summary: The massive scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) has made pretraining increasingly cost-prohibitive. While low-rank representation and orthonormal weight matrices could in principle reduce parameter counts and computational overhead, most existing methods rely on static rank selection and do not enforce weight orthonormality due to high computational cost. This paper introduces TSVD, a framework that maintains low rank and strict orthonormality throughout the training process. It utilizes a spectral energy-based heuristic for adaptive rank selection, and a caching mechanisms to maintain orthonormality. Theoretical analysis justifies the advantage of the approach in pretraining dynamics and experiments across various model scales demonstrate that it is effective empirically. TSVD matches or exceeds the performance of full-parameter baselines while significantly reducing compute requirements. The approach thus offers a well-founded, practical, and scalable path toward efficient high-performance LLM pretraining.

AI.tldr: TSVD框架通过在训练过程中保持低秩表示和严格正交性，并采用自适应秩选择机制，在显著降低计算成本的同时达到或超越全参数基线的性能。
AI.motivation: 大规模语言模型预训练成本日益高昂，现有低秩方法依赖静态秩选择且因计算成本高无法实施权重正交性约束。
AI.method: 提出TSVD框架：(1) 利用谱能量启发式实现自适应秩选择；(2) 采用缓存机制在整个训练过程中维持严格的正交性。
AI.result: 在各种模型规模下，TSVD在匹配或超越全参数基线性能的同时，显著降低了计算需求。
AI.conclusion: TSVD为高效高性能的LLM预训练提供了一条有理论依据、实用且可扩展的路径。

title: Diffusion Large Language Models for Visual Speech Recognition
summary: Existing Visual Speech Recognition (VSR) systems commonly rely on left-to-right autoregressive decoding, which can force premature decisions on visually ambiguous tokens before sufficient context is available. We propose DLLM-VSR, to the best of our knowledge, the first Diffusion Large Language Model (DLLM)-based VSR framework, formulating transcription as iterative masked denoising with flexible-order decoding. With confidence-based unmasking, DLLM-VSR commits high-confidence positions early and uses the committed tokens as bidirectional context to refine ambiguous ones. To adapt DLLMs to VSR, we introduce a two-stage masked-denoising training strategy that separates visual-to-text content alignment from length modeling. We further observe a performance gap with oracle-length decoding, which assumes access to the true transcript length, indicating that reducing target-length uncertainty can improve DLLM-based VSR. To reduce this gap, we develop length-guided candidate decoding, which uses video duration to construct plausible transcript-length hypotheses, decodes under multiple hypotheses, and reranks candidates using length plausibility and decoding confidence. The proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art WER of 19.5\% on LRS3 using only its labeled training data.

AI.tldr: 提出首个基于扩散大语言模型(DLLM)的视觉语音识别(VSR)框架DLLM-VSR，采用迭代掩码去噪和灵活顺序解码替代传统自回归解码，通过两阶段训练策略和长度引导候选解码，在LRS3上取得19.5%的词错误率(WER)新最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 传统VSR系统使用从左到右的自回归解码，在视觉模糊的token上会在获取足够上下文之前做出过早决策，导致识别错误。
AI.method: 1) 采用DLLM进行迭代掩码去噪和灵活顺序解码；2) 基于置信度的解掩码策略，先确定高置信度位置，再用其作为双向上下文优化模糊位置；3) 两阶段掩码去噪训练策略，分离视觉-文本内容对齐与长度建模；4) 长度引导候选解码，利用视频时长构建合理转录长度假设并进行重排序。
AI.result: 在仅使用LRS3标注训练数据的情况下，达到19.5%的词错误率(WER)，取得目前最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: DLLM-VSR证明了扩散大语言模型在视觉语音识别任务上的有效性，且减少目标长度不确定性可进一步提升基于DLLM的VSR性能。

title: Mobile-Aptus: Confidence-Driven Proactive and Robust Interaction in MLLM-based Mobile-Using Agents
summary: Recent advancements in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown exceptional potential in enabling mobile-using agents to autonomously execute human instructions. However, fully automated agents often try to execute tasks even when they are unable to resolve them, leading to the problem of over-execution. Previous studies solve it by training a interactive mobile-using agents to let agents request human interaction when agents can not complete user instructions. However, we find that these interactive agents tend to exhibit over-soliciting behavior, relying excessively on human intervention. To mitigate both over-execution and over-soliciting, we propose a universal confidence integration framework that enables confidence-driven proactive and robust interaction in MLLM-based mobile-using agents. The framework consists of two stages: interaction capability empowerment and confidence bias correction. In the interaction capability empowerment stage, agents learn through supervised fine-tuning to output both actions and confidence scores. In the confidence bias correction stage, agents learn to output more accurate confidence scores by combining semantic similarity retrieval with direct preference optimization. Experimental results show Mobile-Aptus achieves state-of-the-art performance on the four popular mobile-using agent benchmarks: OS-Kairos, AITZ, Meta-GUI, and AndroidControl. Mobile-Aptus consistently outperforms all baselines in offline benchmarks, with an average improvement over 17\% in task success rate. In real-world dynamic experiments, Mobile-Aptus surpasses the baseline by 26% in task success rate with only 0.64 intervention steps per instruction. The codes are available at https://github.com/Wuzheng02/Mobile-Aptus.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mobile-Aptus，一种基于置信度驱动的通用框架，用于缓解移动设备多模态大模型代理中的过度执行和过度请求问题，通过交互能力赋能和置信度偏差校正两阶段训练，在多个基准测试中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有移动端MLLM代理存在两个问题：(1) 全自动代理即使无法完成任务也会强行执行（过度执行）；(2) 可交互代理则过度依赖人类帮助（过度请求）。需要一种既能自主执行又能合理请求帮助的平衡方案。
AI.method: 提出置信度集成框架，包含两阶段：(1) 交互能力赋能阶段——通过监督微调让代理同时输出动作和置信度分数；(2) 置信度偏差校正阶段——结合语义相似度检索与直接偏好优化（DPO）来校正置信度，使其更准确。
AI.result: 在OS-Kairos、AITZ、Meta-GUI、AndroidControl四个基准测试上取得SOTA，离线任务成功率平均提升17%以上；真实动态实验中任务成功率提升26%，每指令仅需0.64次人工干预。
AI.conclusion: 置信度驱动的交互策略能有效平衡自主执行与人工求助之间的关系，显著提升移动端代理的任务完成效率与鲁棒性。

title: A Generalized Tikhonov Layer for Interpretable-by-design Graph Neural Networks
summary: We propose the Tikhonov layer, a graph neural network layer that is interpretable by design: once trained, its learned parameters directly reveal which node features and which aspects of the graph topology were leveraged for prediction. In practice, the layer's propagation matrix takes the closed-form $R = (p(L)+Q)^{-1} Q$, where $L$ is the normalized graph Laplacian, $Q = diag(q_1,...,q_n)$ a learnable diagonal matrix of positive node-importance scores, and $p(\cdot)$ a learnable polynomial. For any input feature $x$, the layer output $Rx$ is the exact minimizer of a generalized graph Tikhonov problem that trades off node-level data fidelity against a topology-driven regularization penalty. The learned pair $\{\{q_i\},p\}$ constitutes a built-in explanation: large $q_i$ indicates that node $i$'s own features drive the prediction, while small $q_i$ signals reliance on the local graph topology; the shape of $p$ reveals whether homophily, heterophily, or a band-pass response is exploited. Expressivity is preserved by routing complexity through a dedicated, arbitrarily deep Q-network that produces the importance scores, while the Tikhonov layer itself remains transparent. We prove that distinct node-importance matrices yield distinct propagation operators, structurally coupling the explanation to the computation. Additionally, the Tikhonov layer provides, in a single layer, a global receptive field, mitigating both oversmoothing and oversquashing. Experiments on standard graph classification benchmarks confirm that the model matches (and sometimes outperforms) opaque baselines while producing interpretable and faithful explanations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tikhonov层，一种可解释的图神经网络层，其传播矩阵为闭式解 R=(p(L)+Q)^{-1}Q，通过可学习的节点重要性分数Q和多项式p提供内置解释，同时保持表达能力并在图分类任务上达到或超越黑箱基线。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN缺乏可解释性，难以明确揭示模型预测时依赖了哪些节点特征和图拓扑信息。
AI.method: 提出Tikhonov层，传播矩阵为闭式解 R=(p(L)+Q)^{-1}Q，其中Q为可学习对角节点重要性矩阵，p为可学习多项式。通过Q网络生成重要性分数，Tikhonov层保持透明。
AI.result: 在图分类基准上匹配甚至超越黑箱基线，同时产生可解释且忠实的解释。
AI.conclusion: Tikhonov层不仅具有内置可解释性（大q_i表示依赖自身特征，小q_i表示依赖拓扑；p的形状揭示同质性/异质性/带通响应），还提供单层全局感受野，缓解过平滑和过挤压问题。

title: From Learning Resources to Competencies: LLM-Based Tagging with Evidence and Graph Constraints
summary: Linking learning resources to a structured competency framework is key to enabling competency-based search and curriculum analytics in Learning Management Systems (LMS). However, manual tagging is labor-intensive, and fully automatic methods often lack transparency. In this paper, we present an end-to-end alignment pipeline that uses a large language model (LLM) as a constrained, evidence-producing tagger. LMS resources -both instructional content and assessments -are first segmented into meaningful pedagogical fragments. For each fragment, a small set of candidate competencies is retrieved from structured competency profiles enriched with graph-based context. The LLM then selects the most relevant competencies from this set and provides supporting evidence spans from the fragment text. These predictions are refined using the structure of the competency graph and aggregated at the resource level. We evaluate our approach on a dataset built from the Computer Science department's competency referential at the Université de Technologie de Compiègne (UTC), covering 22 competencies across multiple course materials. Our LLM+BM25+Graph (LBG) pipeline achieves strong results, with a micro-F1 of 0.57 and macro-F1 of 0.50 at the fragment level, 0.51 macro-F1 at the resource level, and an MRR of 0.82outperforming zero-shot and few-shot LLM variants, retrieval/similarity baselines, and supervised classifiers -while also producing more mechanically traceable evidence spans to support human auditing and educational analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的LLM+BM25+Graph（LBG）对齐流水线，将学习资源与结构化能力框架自动关联，在UTC计算机科学数据集上取得优于零样本/少样本LLM、检索基线和监督分类器的结果（微F1 0.57，宏F1 0.50，MRR 0.82），同时生成可追溯的证据片段以支持人工审计。
AI.motivation: 将学习资源链接到结构化能力框架对实现基于能力的搜索和课程分析至关重要，但人工标注成本高、全自动方法缺乏透明度，因此需要一种高效且可解释的自动对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出LBG流水线：（1）将LMS资源（教学内容与评估）分割为教学片段；（2）从结构化能力配置文件中检索候选能力；（3）LLM从候选集中选择最相关能力并给出证据；（4）利用能力图结构进行精炼并在资源层面聚合。
AI.result: 在UTC计算机科学数据集上，片段级微F1 0.57、宏F1 0.50，资源级宏F1 0.51，MRR 0.82，优于零样本/少样本LLM变体、检索/相似性基线和监督分类器。
AI.conclusion: LBG流水线有效结合了LLM的语义理解能力与结构化知识图谱的约束，既实现了优于现有方法的性能，又通过证据片段生成提供了可解释性，便于教育领域的人工审计与分析。

title: The Attentional White Bear Effect in Transformer Language Models
summary: Instruction-based suppression is widely used to prevent language models from generating prohibited content, yet it remains unclear whether suppression reduces internal representation or merely suppresses expression. We investigate this question through representational probing, attention analysis, and behavioral semantic leakage experiments across multiple transformer models. We find that prohibited concepts remain highly recoverable from hidden representations under suppression, continue to influence attention routing, and measurably shape downstream generations despite successful lexical avoidance. These effects persist across pooling strategies, indirect semantic controls, and multiple model families. Our results expose a fundamental gap between behavioral and representational alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于指令的抑制机制对语言模型的影响，发现即便模型表面上避免了生成违规内容，其内部表示仍保留被禁止的概念，且这些概念仍会影响注意力路由和后续生成，揭示了行为对齐与表征对齐之间存在根本性差距。
AI.motivation: 当前广泛使用指令抑制来防止语言模型生成违规内容，但不清楚这种抑制是真正减少了内部表征，还是仅仅压制了表层表达。澄清这一机制对于理解模型的安全对齐本质至关重要。
AI.method: 通过表征探针、注意力分析和行为语义泄露实验，在多种Transformer模型上系统性地分析指令抑制对模型内部表征和行为的影响。
AI.result: 被禁止的概念在隐藏表征中仍然高度可恢复；这些概念持续影响注意力路由；即便成功实现了词汇层面的回避，仍可测量地塑造了下游生成结果。这些现象在不同池化策略、间接语义控制方法和模型族中均保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 当前基于指令的抑制机制仅在行为层面实现对齐，而模型内部仍保留被禁止概念的表征并持续影响生成过程，说明行为对齐与表征对齐之间存在根本性差距，需要更根本的安全对齐方法。

title: Outer-Momentum Restarting in High-Dimensional Two-Phase Optimization
summary: Communication-efficient distributed optimizers such as DiLoCo reduce synchronization costs by letting workers perform many local updates before aggregating their progress with an outer momentum optimizer. Recent theory suggests that the outer optimizer acts on an effective spectrum induced by the inner optimization loop, and that the choice of outer momentum controls how progress from local updates is accumulated across communication rounds. We study periodic restarting of the outer momentum as a simple complementary mechanism for controlling this outer memory. In a linearized squared-loss model where prediction-space residuals evolve under the empirical NTK, we derive a mode-wise restart contraction showing that resets exploit phase cancellation by discarding stale momentum while preserving inner-loop progress. Toy experiments verify the predicted contraction behavior, and language-model pretraining experiments show that periodic restarts widen the stable range of outer learning rates and momentum values across communication periods.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在分布式通信高效优化器（如DiLoCo）中周期性地重置外部动量，作为一种控制外部记忆的简单补充机制，通过理论分析和实验验证表明，重置操作能丢弃过时动量、保留内部循环进展，从而扩大外部学习率和动量值的稳定范围。
AI.motivation: 现有通信高效分布式优化器（如DiLoCo）通过外部动量优化器聚合本地更新，但外部动量的记忆累积可能导致过时梯度信息干扰后续更新，影响优化稳定性和效率。作者希望探索一种简单有效的机制来重置外部动量，以改善优化效果。
AI.method: 在最小二乘线性化模型下（预测空间残差在经验NTK下演化），推导出模态级重启收缩公式，证明重置利用相位消除丢弃过时动量同时保留内部循环进展。通过玩具实验验证预测的收缩行为，并在语言模型预训练中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 玩具实验验证了理论预测的重启收缩行为。语言模型预训练实验表明，周期性重置外部动量可以扩大外部学习率和动量值在不同通信周期下的稳定范围。
AI.conclusion: 周期性重置外部动量是一种简单有效的补充机制，能够通过丢弃过时动量来改善分布式优化器的稳定性和效果，为设计更鲁棒的通信高效优化器提供了新思路。

title: ProvMind: Provenance-grounded reasoning for materials synthesis
summary: Materials process optimization requires reasoning over routes, conditions, tools and causal dependencies, yet most computational formulations flatten synthesis procedures into text or ordered steps. We introduce MatProcBench, a provenance-grounded benchmark constructed from literature-mined MatPROV graphs, to evaluate seven process-reasoning tasks spanning route continuity, step-level variable inference and global causal consistency under both same-split and shift-aware evaluation, including a strict dual-OOD split that combines temporal and material-class shift. We further introduce ProvMind, a process-memory reasoning framework that retrieves analogous training processes, converts them into provenance-aware option-level compatibility scores, and uses a language model for constrained final decision making. ProvMind achieves 52.84\% accuracy on the dual-OOD split, outperforming prompting, retrieval-augmented and supervised fine-tuning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于文献挖掘的MatPROV图构建的MatProcBench基准，用于评估材料过程推理的七个任务，并引入ProvMind框架，通过检索类比训练过程、计算兼容性得分并结合语言模型进行决策，在双OOD分割上达到52.84%的准确率，超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 材料过程优化需要对路线、条件、工具和因果依赖进行推理，但现有方法大多将合成过程扁平化为文本或有序步骤，缺乏结构化的因果推理能力。
AI.method: 1) 构建MatProcBench基准，基于文献挖掘的MatPROV图，评估七个过程推理任务；2) 提出ProvMind框架，检索类比训练过程，转换为兼容性得分，结合语言模型进行约束决策。
AI.result: ProvMind在双OOD分割上达到52.84%的准确率，优于提示工程、检索增强和微调基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化过程表示和类比推理能有效提升材料过程推理能力，尤其在分布外场景下表现优异。

title: GraphLit: Learning Text-Enriched Dynamic Character Network Representations for Literary Study
summary: Methods to represent literary texts as graphs or sequences of graphs mainly focus on representing character interactions, and often overlook another crucial aspect: the textual context in which characters interact. We introduce Dynamic Heterogeneous Character Networks (DHCNs), which organize long novels into temporally localized heterogeneous graphs that align characters with their textual contexts. We extract around 20,000 DHCNs from Project Gutenberg, and propose GraphLit, a self-supervised learning framework that learns rich literary representations through a masked graph autoencoder objective. Across a wide-range of 12 character-related tasks, GraphLit improves over text-only and graph-only baselines, particularly on tasks requiring contextual understanding. Finally, we demonstrate the applicability of DHCNs and GraphLit for literary analysis by studying the link between narrative non-linearity and dynamic social features.

AI.tldr: 提出动态异质角色网络（DHCNs），将长篇小说组织为时序局部化的异构图，对齐角色与文本语境；基于约20,000个DHCNs训练GraphLit自监督框架，在12个角色相关任务上优于纯文本和纯图基线，并用于分析叙事非线性与社会动态特征的联系。
AI.motivation: 现有文学文本图表示方法主要聚焦于角色交互关系，但忽略了角色交互发生的文本语境这一关键方面。
AI.method: 1. 构建动态异质角色网络（DHCNs），将长篇小说组织为时序局部化的异构图，对齐角色与其文本语境；2. 从Project Gutenberg提取约20,000个DHCNs；3. 提出GraphLit，一种基于掩码图自编码器目标的自监督学习框架。
AI.result: 在12个角色相关任务上，GraphLit优于纯文本和纯图基线，尤其在需要语境理解的任务上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: DHCNs和GraphLit可用于文学分析，揭示了叙事非线性与动态社会特征之间的关联。

title: Thinned Mean Field Langevin Dynamics
summary: Several important learning tasks can be formulated as minimizing an entropy-regularized objective over an appropriate space of probability distributions. Mean-field Langevin dynamics (MFLD) facilitate computation in this general context, casting the minimizer as the invariant distribution of a McKean--Vlasov process, which can be numerically discretized using $N$ particles and thus simulated. However, simulating this interacting particle system has computational complexity of order $N^2$. Motivated by recent research into \emph{kernel thinning}, we propose \texttt{KT-MFLD}, in which each particle interacts only with a thinned particle coreset of size $\mathcal{O}(N^{\frac{1}{2}})$. \texttt{KT-MFLD} thus reduces the computational complexity to order $N^{\frac{3}{2}}$ while, under mild regularity conditions, achieving the same convergence guarantees (up to logarithmic factors) as MFLD. Our theoretical analysis is empirically confirmed on tasks including the training of student-teacher neural networks, quantization with maximum mean discrepancy, and computation of predictively-oriented posteriors in a post-Bayesian framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KT-MFLD算法，通过核稀疏化技术将粒子系统的交互规模从N²降至N^(3/2)，在保持与原始MFLD相同收敛保证的前提下显著降低计算复杂度，并在神经网络训练、最大均值差异量化等任务中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: Mean-field Langevin dynamics (MFLD)在求解熵正则化目标时，粒子系统模拟的复杂度为O(N²)，计算负担过重，亟需降低计算开销而不牺牲收敛性能。
AI.method: 提出KT-MFLD，引入kernel thinning技术，每个粒子只与一个大小为O(N^(1/2))的稀疏化粒子核心集交互，将计算复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N^(3/2))。
AI.result: 在温和正则性条件下，KT-MFLD实现了与MFLD相同的收敛保证（至多相差对数因子），并在学生-教师神经网络训练、MMD量化、后贝叶斯预测后验计算等任务中验证了理论分析。
AI.conclusion: KT-MFLD通过核稀疏化有效降低了MFLD的计算复杂度，同时保持了理论收敛性，为大规模熵正则化学习任务提供了更高效的求解方案。

title: Benchmarking AI for low-resource contexts: Thinking beyond leaderboards
comment: Aakash Pant, Kavya Shah, and Apoorv Agnihotri contributed equally
summary: Existing AI evaluation practices often fail to capture how systems actually perform in low-resource environments, where operational constraints shape usability as much as model quality. Through a structured analysis of existing benchmark families across speech, chat/RAG, and vision systems, we identify critical gaps between laboratory evaluation practices and real-world deployment conditions in low-resource environments. We argue that the meaningful unit of assessment is the deployed system rather than an isolated model and that effective evaluation frameworks must integrate task performance with deployment conditions such as noisy inputs, code-switching, intermittent connectivity, low-end hardware, and domain shift. At the same time, benchmarks should recognize that different application classes require distinct evaluation profiles rather than a single aggregate score that obscures operational differences. To support practical decision-making, we propose a shared reporting framework that preserves comparability across systems and application types while remaining sensitive to deployment context. Finally, we emphasize the need for concise and actionable reporting artifacts for policymakers, donors, and implementers, including standardized one-page benchmark cards, deployment profiles, and explicit documentation of failure handling procedures and human oversight mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有AI评估方法忽视了低资源环境中的实际部署约束，主张以“部署系统”而非孤立模型为评估单元，提出整合任务性能与部署条件的评估框架，并建议使用标准化报告工具（如基准卡、部署档案）帮助决策者做出更务实的选择。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评估实践无法反映系统在低资源环境中的真实表现，实验室评估与现实部署条件之间存在显著差距，需要构建更贴近实际应用场景的评估框架。
AI.method: 通过对语音、对话/RAG和视觉系统的现有基准族进行结构化分析，识别实验室评估与低资源部署条件之间的关键差距，并提出一个共享的报告框架，整合任务性能与部署条件（如噪声输入、代码切换、间歇性连接、低端硬件、领域偏移等）。
AI.result: 识别出评估中的关键缺口，并提出以部署系统为评估单元、区分不同应用类别的评估画像、以及标准化的一页基准卡、部署档案等可操作报告工具。
AI.conclusion: 有效的评估框架必须整合任务性能与部署条件，不同应用类别需要不同的评估画像，需为政策制定者、捐助者和实施者提供简洁可操作的报告工具。

title: Sense Representations Are Inducible Interfaces
summary: Sense representations (explicit, per-token meaning decompositions) are useful for disambiguation, steering, and cross-lingual alignment, but existing approaches require models to be pretrained with sense structure baked in. We introduce ACROS, which induces an explicit sense pathway into a frozen pretrained decoder LM through a gated residual addition. On SmolLM2-360M, ACROS preserves base LM quality while supporting three uses of the same induced variables: zero-shot word-sense disambiguation (64.95 F1 on Raganato ALL, competitive with the WordNet first-sense heuristic), low-KL lexical steering across 5,161 CoInCo cases where a simple non-oracle proxy recovers about 90% of positive shifts, and SENSIA cross-lingual adaptation to four languages (mean R@1 0.988, target FLORES PPL 7.94). ACROS makes sense representations an inducible interface for ordinary pretrained LMs.

AI.tldr: ACROS通过门控残差加法为冻结的预训练解码器LM引入显式词义通路，在不损害原始模型质量的前提下，实现了零样本词义消歧、低KL散度词汇操控和跨语言适应三种功能。
AI.motivation: 现有词义表示方法需要模型在预训练时就内建词义结构，缺乏对已冻结的预训练语言模型（如普通decoder LM）进行事后词义诱导的灵活性。
AI.method: 提出ACROS方法，通过门控残差加法（gated residual addition）为冻结的预训练decoder LM引入显式词义通路，在不修改原始模型参数的情况下诱导出词义表示。
AI.result: 在SmolLM2-360M上，零样本词义消歧在Raganato ALL上达到64.95 F1（与WordNet首义启发式相当）；在5,161个CoInCo案例中低KL词汇操控可恢复约90%的正向偏移；跨语言适应四种语言的SENSIA平均R@1为0.988，目标FLORES PPL为7.94。
AI.conclusion: ACROS成功将词义表示变为普通预训练LM的可诱导接口，无需重新预训练即可赋予模型词义感知能力。

title: PLS in the Mirror of Self-Attention
summary: This note provides an interesting observation on casting partial least square (PLS) as a linearized self-attention so that PLS may be studied within the neural network paradigm. On the other hand, the dimensionality reduction and selection of predictors in PLS may indicate that self-attention includes certain degree of dimensionality normalization toward improved learning.

AI.tldr: 本文发现可以将偏最小二乘法（PLS）视为一种线性化的自注意力机制，从而将PLS纳入神经网络研究范式；同时，PLS的降维和预测因子选择特性表明自注意力机制包含一定程度的维度归一化，有助于改善学习效果。
AI.motivation: 作者希望通过将PLS与自注意力机制建立联系，一方面为PLS提供神经网络视角的研究框架，另一方面揭示自注意力机制中隐含的维度归一化特性。
AI.method: 提出将偏最小二乘法（PLS）转化为线性化自注意力机制的观察视角，建立了PLS与神经网络中自注意力机制之间的理论联系。
AI.result: PLS可以被表达为线性化的自注意力机制，从而可以在神经网络范式中研究PLS；自注意力机制包含类似PLS的维度归一化特性。
AI.conclusion: PLS与自注意力机制之间存在深层联系，这一发现为跨领域研究提供了新思路，即可以分别从PLS的统计视角和神经网络的表示学习视角相互借鉴。

title: GS-FUSE: Granger-Supervised Gated Fusion and Multi-Granularity Alignment for Event-Driven Financial Forecasting
summary: Accurately forecasting the impact of salient financial events on markets is critical for investors and policymakers. However, existing multimodal time-series models typically fuse text and prices symmetrically, without an explicit way to decide when event text is truly predictive, and thus struggle to exploit the directional event-to-price structure and the heterogeneous roles of textual and price signals. In this work, we propose GS-Fuse, a multimodal event-based forecasting framework that employs (i) a Granger-supervised, causal-aware gated fusion module, which learns to open toward event text only when it provides incremental predictive value beyond historical prices, and (ii) a multi-granularity alignment mechanism that jointly aligns high-level event representations and fine-grained textual cues with future market trajectories. Built as a flexible, plug-and-play adapter on top of off-the-shelf large language models and time-series foundation models, GS-Fuse can be instantiated across diverse backbones and market settings. Extensive experiments on real-world financial datasets show that GS-Fuse consistently outperforms state-of-the-art time-series and multimodal baselines across multiple assets and forecasting horizons.

AI.tldr: 提出GS-Fuse框架，通过Granger监督的因果感知门控融合模块和多粒度对齐机制，实现事件文本与价格的多模态金融预测，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态时序模型对称地融合文本和价格信号，缺乏判断事件文本是否真正具有预测能力的机制，难以利用事件到价格的因果方向和异构信号角色。
AI.method: (1) Granger监督的因果感知门控融合模块，仅在事件文本超越历史价格提供增量预测价值时打开门控；(2) 多粒度对齐机制，联合对齐高层事件表示、细粒度文本线索与未来市场轨迹；作为即插即用适配器，可集成于各类基础模型。
AI.result: 在真实金融数据集上，GS-Fuse在多种资产和预测跨度上持续超越最新时序和多模态基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果感知门控选择性地融合事件文本，有效提升了金融事件驱动的预测性能，且框架具有良好通用性。

title: Towards Reliable Multilingual LLMs-as-a-Judge: An Empirical Study
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for the automatic evaluation of generated text, yet most prior work focuses on English. Despite the growing demand for multilingual evaluation, extending LLM-based evaluators to multilingual settings remains challenging, particularly for low-resource languages and scenarios where in-domain data is scarce. This work explores several strategies for developing multilingual LLMs-as-a-judge, considering whether in-domain data is available for fine-tuning or not. We systematically analyze English, Spanish, and Basque, representing high-, mid-, and low-resource languages, considering instruction translation, monolingual versus multilingual supervision, and model size. For evaluation, we extend two existing meta-evaluation datasets to Basque and Spanish. Our results reveal key trade-offs: When in-domain data is available, fine-tuned smaller models can achieve performance comparable to proprietary models, whereas zero-shot evaluation with larger models proves more effective in out-of-domain settings. We also observe that fine-tuning on out-of-domain data can adversely affect model performance. These findings provide practical guidance for building efficient, reliable multilingual evaluation pipelines. The data and code are publicly available at hitz-zentroa/mJudge.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了多语言环境下使用LLM作为自动评估器的策略，系统分析了高、中、低资源语言（英语、西班牙语、巴斯克语）下的指令翻译、单语vs多语监督、模型规模等因素，发现当领域内数据可用时，微调小模型可媲美专有模型，而零样本大模型在领域外场景更有效。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM自动评估研究主要集中在英语，多语言评估面临低资源语言和领域数据稀缺的挑战，亟需实用的多语言评估策略。
AI.method: 系统分析了英语（高资源）、西班牙语（中资源）、巴斯克语（低资源）三种语言，对比了指令翻译、单语vs多语监督、不同模型规模等策略，并将两个元评估数据集扩展至巴斯克语和西班牙语进行实验。
